Name: Spinny
Description:
Spinny is a new age used car end-to-end platform in India. By establishing absolute trust & simplicity in transactions, we are bringing radical change to the way people buy used cars. We follow a full-stack business model to offer Value, Transparency, and Simplicity to our customers. Our goal is to help our customers purchase a car that matches their aspirations with absolute confidence and complete peace of mind.

We present our customers thoroughly inspected high-quality cars while making sure the overall process is entirely transparent and seamless. Every Spinny car must pass a 200-Point rigorous quality check and comes with a 5-Day no questions asked money-back guarantee. Our customers can shortlist a car of their choice from our online platform, and then can visit our physical car hubs for a no-obligation test drive. The right selection, adequate assortment, fair & scientific pricing, and assistance in decision making are the core pillars of our business model.

We are on a mission to build Spinny as the most loved and trustworthy brand of India and believe technology has to play a significant role in achieving this. Do reach out to us to explore potential opportunities to collaborate if you share our passion. We are currently operating in Delhi-NCR, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Chandigarh, Indore, Coimbatore, Lucknow and Kochi.

Name: Grupo Mavesa
Description:
Maquinarias y Vehículos S.A. tiene su instalación principal en la ciudad de Guayaquil, tiene sucursales en Quito y agencias en Guayaquil ,Ambato y Cuenca.

Misión

Contribuimos al desarrollo de nuestros clientes, proveedores, colaboradores, accionistas y de la sociedad en general, proporcionando productos y servicios de alta calidad.

 
Visión

Ser la mejor opción del mercado automotor ecuatoriano en servicio de postventa.

Name: Al-Futtaim Automotive
Description:
Al-Futtaim Automotive supports how people and businesses move today, tomorrow and in the future.
 
Part of Al-Futtaim, we operate across a broad automotive network, providing vehicles and services that help customers make informed choices and rely on consistent support throughout ownership. Our focus is on what matters most to customers: trust, reliability, and long-term value.
 
As mobility needs and expectations evolve, our role is to help customers navigate change with confidence. We work to ensure new technologies and services are practical, accessible, and relevant to everyday use so that people and businesses can move with clarity, not complexity.
 
Guided by strong values and powered by our people, Al-Futtaim Automotive focuses on delivering meaningful value for customers across the markets we serve.
 
Driving the future of mobility, today.

Name: Petromin Corporation
Description:
Petromin Corporation is a leading multi-national organization in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. We stand as a strong transformative force, enabling the movement of people, products and services through sustainable and innovative mobility solutions serving individuals and businesses alike – We help you move!

With a family of more than 6000 colleagues, Petromin boasts deep roots in over 40 countries throughout Central Asia, Southeast Asia and the MENA region.

Under the Petromin Corporation banner, we proudly host 8 business verticals, all devoted to provide a wide range of  products and services. Through this profile, we are the only company to serve the entire customer automotive journey.

Name: Inchcape Américas
Description:
Inchcape es el principal distribuidor automotriz multimarca independiente a nivel mundial y opera en más de 40 países con una cartera de las principales marcas de automóviles del mundo. 

Contamos con fuentes de ingresos multicanal diversificadas que incluyen la venta de vehículos nuevos y usados, repuestos, servicios, financiación y seguros. 

Regionalmente Inchcape Américas está presente en 14 países de América Latina y el Caribe (Chile, Colombia, Perú, Bolivia, Argentina, Uruguay, Ecuador, Panamá, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador, Barbados, Honduras y Puerto Rico) empleando a más de 8,000 personas en la región.

Name: CFAO Mobility Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
Créée en 1973, CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire est la filiale de la division CFAO Mobility, groupe CFAO, premier réseau automobile en Afrique et dans les Départements et Territoires d’Outre-Mer. 
 
•Le relais de confiance des plus grandes marques mondiales  

CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire est le distributeur exclusif de plusieurs marques de renommée mondiale. La filiale distribue des véhicules utilitaires (TOYOTA, MITSUBISHI, PEUGEOT, MERCEDES, CITROEN, SUZUKI) ; des poids lourds (HINO, KING LONG, FUSO, JCB, TOYOTA EQUIPMENT, MASSEY FERGUSSON, CAMSO, TECHKING) ; des motos et moteurs marins (YAMAHA) ; des véhicules d’occasions (AUTOMARK) ; des pièces de rechange (Winpart). Elle dispose également d’un service de location de longue et courte durée (LOXEA). 
 
•La proximité, gage d’une plus grande efficacité

CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire est présent à Abidjan, Yamoussoukro, Bouaké et est représentée par un agent agréé à San Pedro. 
 
Disposant de 7 points de vente répartis sur le territoire, elle assure à ses clients réactivité et disponibilité. 
 
CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire dispose également d’un réseau de garages agrées sur l’étendue du territoire. 

•Une organisation performante au service des clients  

CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire s’appuie sur l’organisation logistique du groupe CFAO, et plus particulièrement sur ses plateformes de stockage en Europe, pour assurer la disponibilité et la rapidité d’acheminement des véhicules et des pièces de rechange.

•L’esprit de service, un engagement au quotidien  

CFAO Mobility Côte d’Ivoire propose une offre complète de services pour répondre aux besoins de ses clients : Garantie Constructeur / Contrats d’entretien / Service après-vente.

Name: Derco
Description:
Los cinco mil colaboradores de Derco en Chile, Perú y Colombia y de Imcruz en Bolivia nos unimos a la empresa de distribución automotriz líder en el mundo, para formar Inchcape Américas.

Inchcape Américas combina las operaciones de dos distribuidoras líderes en América Latina, para ofrecer la más variada oferta de soluciones de movilidad para las personas y las empresas, representando a más de 30 marcas y acompañándolos con una propuesta omnicanal que incluye servicios durante todo el ciclo de vida del vehículo.

Inchcape es una empresa de origen inglés con más de 90 años de trayectoria que opera en más de 40 países en todo el mundo e integra una cartera de negocios diversificada que incluye la venta de vehículos nuevos y usados, repuestos, servicios, mantenimiento, financiación y seguros.
 
En la región, Inchcape Américas está presente en 12 países de América Latina y el Caribe (Chile, Colombia, Perú, Bolivia, Argentina, Uruguay, Ecuador, Panamá, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador y Barbados), empleando a más de 8,000 personas.

Síguenos también en Inchape Américas!

Name: Al Jazirah Vehicles Agencies Co. Ltd.
Description:
Aljazirah Ford: A leading agency dedicated to delivering Ford's finest vehicles and services. With over than 200 Sales point across Saudi Arabia! 

Since its establishment, the auto industry in the United States and probably around the world has been closely associated with Ford Motor Co., the leading auto maker established by Henry Ford. Ford vehicles were first introduced in the Kingdom by the U.S President as a gift to the late King Abdul Aziz. In the 1940s Ford became the vehicle of choice for the Saudi people especially as Saudi Aramco adopted Ford vehicles as one of their main trusted car fleet brands.

The introduction of Ford vehicles in the Kingdom has initiated long standing bonds of trust and dependability which Al Jazirah Vehicles Agencies Company Ltd cultivated as the first Ford Dealer in Saudi. It is a unique business relationship that has grown between this world-renowned auto maker and the car owners in Saudi Arabia.


For more about Ford Automotive please visit our website through the link: https://en.aljazirahford.com/ 

For inquiries: 920002999
For complains feel free to reach out to us at: 8007492222

  
To visit the official Al Jazirah Vehicles Agencies co. website, please click on the following link: https://www.aljazirahvehicles.com/en/

Name: Sardar Group
Description:
In 1970’s in Kirkuk city,  Al-Haj Hussien Al-Bebany the founder of the business, had a vision far ahead of his time that started from simple trading of transportation vehicles.

During the early 1980’s the business shifted to car trading; Sardar Cars became the most known name throughout Iraq after the business had moved to Baghdad in the 1990’s building the largest covered Car Showroom in Iraq.

With more than 30 years of rich experience in the automotive sector, Sardar Group became the leading group in the Automotive Sector in Iraq. The intricate knowledge of the Iraqi market helped import, stock and sell the right brands, types, and models, while the excellent reputation, track record and credibility have helped growing the business times over since the year 2003.

Since 2005 with a desire to move from Automobile Trading to providing its customers with all-round Automotive Solutions, Sardar Group started utilizing the synergies of its existing operations to diversify its automotive business activities to include Trading, Leasing of Vehicles, Equipment & Machinery and most importantly Aftersales Service Support.

Today, Sardar Group represents world-renowned automotive brands and heavy construction equipment & machinery exemplified in the following brands :

• Toyota & Hino
• Lexus
• Jaguar
• Land Rover
• Polaris
• BP Castrol
• TOTO
• Thermo Kig

Name: Mitsubishi Motors North America, Inc.
Description: Explore Mitsubishi Cars, Crossovers & Electric Cars. Build, Price, and Locate Today!

Name: Al Abdulghani Motors
Description:
Al Abdulghani Motors (AAM) is the leading mobility company in Qatar with 4000+ employees, proudly operating in the automotive sector as the exclusive distributor of Toyota Motor Corporation. Our diverse portfolio includes Toyota & Lexus vehicles, Kinto Car Rental, Certified Pre-Owned Vehicles, Moteri Car Care Center as well as Warehousing Solutions and Qatar’s largest After-Sales network, offering 22 service centers across the country.

Established in 1958, AAM experienced rapid growth driven by a customer-first philosophy, strong business ethics, and a culture of operational excellence leading to it being widely recognized as one of the pioneering mobility companies in the region. 

AAM’s commitment to positively contribute to the Qatari society is deeply rooted in the values that define us and is visible through our partnerships as the exclusive mobility partner to QFA, QSL & QEF to name a few. We are also committed to giving back to the community and supporting future generations through partnering with leading causes such as the Education Above All Foundation.

At AAM, we strive to create a happy mobility society for all, where access to quality mobility is a possibility for everyone.

Name: AutoNation
Description:
As America’s most admired automotive retailer, AutoNation is transforming the automotive industry through its bold leadership, innovation, and comprehensive brand extensions.  We are committed to hiring driven, diverse Associates and supporting them in growing their career within AutoNation. We offer paid training, competitive pay & benefits, and a culture that believes in investing in our Associates’ professional futures. With over 300 locations from coast to coast, AutoNation has an opportunity for you. We’ve sold over 14 million vehicles, the first automotive retailer to reach this milestone. Our success is driven by our commitment to delivering an excellent Customer experience through customer-focused sales and service processes. We believe deeply in giving back, and every car we sell helps to raise cancer research and treatment awareness with a Pink Plate. We have proudly raised over $40 million dollars to drive out cancer, create awareness, and support critical research.

Join us as we pave the way to moving our company, our communities, and our industry forward. Apply today at a location near you or wherever you dream the road will take you.

Name: VavaCars
Description:
VavaCars is on a mission is to create the most trusted used cars transaction platform in Turkey. We provide our customers a seamless car buying and selling experience.

Our customer proposition is embedded in Transparency, Simplicity, Trust and Convenience. 

We allows customers to browse and purchase cars online from the comfort of their home, and sell their cars using our online valuation and by visiting any of our customer centers or arranging a mobile unit visit.

Since launch in 2019, VavaCars has already traded more than 10,000 cars! We are a fast-paced high growth company, backed by leading global sponsors & investors, and a highly driven and experienced management team.

If you want to disrupt and revolutionize the used car space, check out our careers page and join us!

Name: Lamborghini Abu Dhabi & Dubai
Description:
Ultimate Motors is the authorised dealer for Automobili Lamborghini across the United Arab Emirates.

We have highly experienced and skilled management team, with over 40 years of combined experience. Combined with our passion and mission to be the leader in the industry, these allow us to drive the future of the business in full force.

Ultimate Motors is your trusted choice as the authorised dealer of Automobili Lamborghini, with its headquarters located on Sheikh Zayed Road, it is the largest dedicated Lamborghini showroom & service centre worldwide.  

We offer unsurpassed levels of experience, knowledge and service. We work to maintain the highest levels of customer satisfaction & loyalty. We provide exceptional performance and ensure privacy and punctuality when it comes to the delivery of your vehicle. Based in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, we invite you to visit or call us today for a discussion about your onward unique Lamborghini journey.

Name: GEELY UAE
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn account of Geely Auto in the UAE! We're excited to bring a range of all-new vehicles to the UAE market.
#GeelyUAE

Name: Penske Automotive Group
Description:
Penske Automotive Group, Inc., (NYSE: PAG) headquartered in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, is a diversified international transportation services company and one of the world's premier automotive and commercial truck retailers. PAG operates dealerships in the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, Germany, Italy, and Japan and is one of the largest retailers of commercial trucks in North America for Freightliner. PAG also distributes and retails commercial vehicles, diesel and gas engines, power systems, and related parts and services principally in Australia and New Zealand. Additionally, PAG owns 28.9% of Penske Transportation Solutions ("PTS"), a business that manages one of the largest, most comprehensive and modern trucking fleets in North America with over 431,000 trucks, tractors, and trailers under lease, rental, and/or maintenance contracts and provides innovative transportation, supply chain, and technology solutions to its customers.

Penske Automotive Group is a member of the S&P 400 Mid Cap Index, Fortune 500, Russell 1000, and Russell 3000 indexes. PAG has repeatedly had numerous stores voted in the top 100 as Automotive News’ Best Places to Work For - 35 locations in 2021, 46 locations in 2022 and 44 locations in 2023.

Name: Grupo JAP
Description:
Fundado em 1904, em Marco de Canaveses, o Grupo JAP é hoje uma referência no setor automóvel e da mobilidade.

Representamos perto de 20 marcas de viaturas ligeiras, 15 delas com distribuição via rede de concessionários Carby. Detendo a Matrizauto (maior megastore de viaturas seminovas e usadas do país) e o master franchise da SIXT (um dos líderes mundiais no ramo rent-a-car), em Portugal. Atuamos também no mercado do retalho e reparação de máquinas agrícolas, industriais e de movimentação de cargas. 

A nossa história centenária é movida pela força de mais de 3200 Colaboradores – distribuídos por cerca de 50 empresas em aproximadamente 80 localidades – e tem vindo a ser marcada por uma evolução sustentada, focada na melhoria contínua dos serviços prestados e na satisfação dos nossos clientes e colaboradores.

Simultaneamente, somos uma força em crescimento no mercado dos ligeiros e pesados em África (Angola, Moçambique, Uganda, Quénia e Tanzânia), neste último com a representação oficial da marca de camiões MAN, disponibilizando serviços de reparação e montagem destas viaturas.

Name: Sonic Automotive
Description: Sonic Automotive, Inc., a Fortune 500 company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, is on a quest to become the most valuable diversified automotive retail and service brand in America. Our Company culture thrives on creating, innovating, and providing industry-leading guest experiences, driven by strategic investments in technology, teammates, and ideas that ultimately fulfill ownership dreams, enrich lives, and deliver happiness to our guests and teammates. As one of the largest automotive and powersports retailers in America, we are committed to delivering on this goal while pursuing expansive growth and taking progressive measures to be the leader in these categories. Our new platforms, programs, and people are set to drive the next generation of automotive and powersports guest experiences.

Description:
Los cinco mil colaboradores de Imcruz Bolivia, Derco en Chile, Perú y Colombia nos unimos a la empresa de distribución automotriz líder en el mundo, para formar Inchcape Américas.

Name: SellAnyCar.com
Description:
SellAnyCar.com is the Middle East's first and largest car buying service, which offers FREE and instant online car valuation, FREE car inspection, a GUARANTEE to purchase ANY car within 30 minutes, pay you immediately and take care of all the paperwork. Whatever the make, model, age or condition – SellAnyCar.com will buy any car.

Entrepreneur magazine Middle East awarded SellAnyCar.com as the "Fastest Growing Company in the Middle East". It has also been awarded by Arabian Business magazine as "Digital Business of the Year", while the National newspaper sees it among a handful of tech companies to "have the potential to break the $1bn barrier". In May 2015, SellAnyCar.com has additionally been recognised as "Technology Innovator of the Year" in Saudi Arabia, in the presence of HRH Prince Khaled bin Alwaleed bin Talal Al Saud.


Saygin Yalcin, Founder & CEO of SellAnyCar.com, says that “Selling a car used to be a lengthy and risky process. Consumers were not sure about their car’s real values, needed to arrange too many appointments with time-wasters or might have ended up getting ripped off. SellAnyCar.com makes selling any car easy, fair and quick. You can literally find out your car’s value within 15 seconds, sell your car and get paid during your lunch break. We are located in all major cities all over the country and are the biggest car buyer in the region.”

Name: Nors Group
Description:
Driven by progress and building on a legacy spanning more than 90 years, Nors is adapting to market needs and transforming itself to improve lives and businesses through outstanding services and equipment.

Now with a single brand, Nors operates globally in five business areas: Trucks and Buses, Construction Equipment, Agro, Aftermarket and Ventures.

Thanks to the strategic change, it offers a diversified portfolio and integrated service, maintaining close and trusting relationships with partners, customers and the market itself.

Nors’ brand is present in 7 countries and represents the main manufacturer brands in the business areas in which it operates, through more than 100 units offering services, solutions and equipment to make everything work better, every day.

Name: Romans International
Description:
Romans International is a family run business having been founded in 1994 by Paul Jaconelli who today runs the business alongside his middle son Tom.
 
Romans has established itself as one of Europe's leading independent luxury car dealerships with a reputation for having the very finest selection of the latest, rarest and highest spec examples across a variety of supercars and high end luxury vehicles.

We pride ourselves in making sure all of our cars are prepared to the very highest standards in the industry and combining this with an exceptional level of customer service. Whether you are looking to sell your car, buy your next car or looking at finance options we will make sure you have the very best experience.

All of the cars we advertise are physically available to buy today from our showroom in Surrey, conveniently located in between London's 2 largest airports and just 4 miles from Junction 8 of the M25.

Name: Lithia & Driveway
Description:
Our story began humbly in 1946, with the opening of a Chrysler-Plymouth-Dodge store across from Lithia Springs Park in Ashland, Oregon. Fifty years later, in 1996, after opening a few additional stores and training a talented team of leaders, our CEO decided the best way to give new opportunities to this incredible team was to join the public stock exchange. That’s when our mission of “Growth Powered by People” took off. 

Today, Lithia & Driveway is one of the nation’s fastest-growing automotive retailers and listed as 124 on the Fortune 500 (NYSE: LAD). We own more than 300 stores supporting over 50 automotive brands and provide job opportunities for more than 27,000 people. 

As Lithia & Driveway continues to grow, our success is fueled by the collective efforts, skills, and contributions of our people. We stand by our core values of taking personal ownership, improving constantly, earning customers for life and having fun in the process. 

Our high-performance culture keeps one focus in mind, making the customer experience better, as we aim to meet customers wherever, whenever, and however they desire. 

We offer a variety of opportunities across our hundreds of stores in the US, UK, and Canada; our Driveway, GreenCars, Driveway Finance Corporation brands as well as our home office. With positions in Sales, Service, Corporate, and Finance, we believe you’ll roll into the perfect spot at Lithia & Driveway. Join us as we continue to innovate and exceed our potential and our customers’ expectations. 

Lithia & Driveway is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to inclusion and diversity.

Name: United Motors Company
Description:
Welcome to the United Motors Group (UMG), a prominent and trusted player in the automotive industry in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia since 1986. Throughout the years, we have earned a reputation for excellence, reliability, and unwavering commitment to our customers.

United Motors Group serves as the exclusive Holding Company for the renowned Kia Brand, covering the 7 Western Provinces of Saudi Arabia. Additionally, we proudly represent the JETOUR Brand across all regions of KSA. Our portfolio also includes the recently established Multi Franchise Aftersales Business, FixAuto (Quick Service & Collision) and Repair2Care operating throughout the country.

At UMG, our customer-centric approach remains the cornerstone of our success, fostering strong and lasting relationships with those we proudly serve.

Join us as we continue our journey, committed to delivering exceptional products and services, driven by our passion for automotive excellence.

Name: CFAO Mobility - Congo
Description:
Installé en République du Congo depuis 1937, à Brazzaville et Pointe-Noire, CFAO Mobility regroupe CFAO Equipement et Loxea New Mobility Solution.

CFAO Mobility qui est le distributeur exclusif au Congo de quatre marques de renommée mondiale : Toyota, Suzuki, Peugeot et Bridgestone dont il commercialise une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme et utilitaires.
CFAO Mobility vend également des véhicules industriels de marque Renault Trucks (groupe Volvo).

CFAO Mobility Congo commercialise également une gamme de deux-roues et moteurs marins Suzuki ainsi que des pneus Bridgestone particulièrement bien adaptée au continent africain.

Avec CFAO Equipment, CFAO Mobility Congo propose un choix d’équipements et de matériels ainsi que des solutions innovantes de gestion pour accompagner les acteurs congolais. CFAO Equipment est distributeur exclusif de marques de renommée mondiale : JCB pour le matériel BTP (chargeuses-pelleteuses...) ; Bridgestone pour des pneus adaptés au continent africain ; King Long pour les autocars et minibus.

LOXEA propose au Congo de nombreux modèles de véhicules en location courte ou longue durée. Pour des durées allant d’une journée à 3 ans, voire au-delà selon vos besoins spécifiques, LOXEA met à votre disposition une location accompagnée de services performants destinés à vous assurer ce qui est probablement le plus important pour vous : la mobilité et la disponibilité en toutes circonstances.

Name: Sytner Group
Description:
We are the UK’s largest dealership group representing 25 brands up and down the country. Established in 1968, our success has been built by every team member working together and contributing to our ‘one team’ ethos.

Our group aim is to be famous for delighting our colleagues, customers and manufacturers. We do this by being honest and giving respect, embracing diversity and inclusivity, working together, listening and contributing, celebrating success and having fun. 

We have unrivalled experience in the specialist market, providing customers with new cars, approved used cars and aftersales services. 

Our employees are highly trained, enthusiastic, knowledgeable and driven to deliver our fundamental commitment to our customers – getting it right the first time and making every interaction special. 

To find out more about working for Sytner Group visit: careers.sytner.co.uk

Name: Samaco Motors
Description:
SAMACO Motors is the authorized agent of Audi, Bentley,  Porsche, Volkswagen and Bugatti cars in Saudi Arabia. We provide a full range of services incorporating sales of new and pre-owned cars and commercial vehicles, leasing and full after-sales support with a dedicated service and parts team, taking care of all your motoring needs.

We go the extra mile, no compromises. At SAMACO Automotive, you will find a welcome leap in customer attention, a determination not to overlook every possibility of matching our services with the technological and engineering excellence of our splendid range of German cars. We are selective about the manufacturers we represent and have only brands that make a statement, trouble-free cars that last longer and cost less for maintenance.


Our new and renovated showrooms and workshops in Jeddah, Riyadh and Al-Khobar reflect our commitment to continuous refinement. Highly skilled technicians man our state-of-the-art workshops. We have earmarked installation of telemetry facilities at our service centers for on-camera consultancy with our German principals.

Our after-sales service is prompt and marked by easy availability of spares, precise diagnosis and the most acceptable cost. And our friendly, courteous and specialist staff undergo periodic training with manufacturer support to provide forthright service.

We believe our customers deserve a pleasant and rewarding experience. Catering to all market segments . We have flexible leasing facilities. Our sub-dealer network is fast expanding. Fleet sales activity is being developed.

Name: Bruno Fritsch
Description:
Desde sus orígenes las Empresas Bruno Fritsch han estado fuertemente comprometidas con el rubro automotriz.
 
En 1977 nace primero en Concepción, la automotora Autofrance, que comercializa actualmente las marcas Chery, Chrysler, Dodge, Hyundai, Jeep, Peugeot y Toyota; esta última marca japonesa, Bruno Fritsch la representa desde el año 1982.
 
En el año 1993, bajo la representación de Toyota Chile, se inaugura el primer local Bruno Fritsch en Santiago ubicado en la comuna de Las Condes, declarándose local modelo para Latinoamérica.
 
La excelente calidad del servicio y personal altamente calificado, hace que Bruno Fritsch tome una posición en el
mercado de vanguardia, llevándola a ostentar el privilegio de ser la automotora número uno en ventas de Toyota en Chile.
 
Hoy en día, así como su filial de Concepción, Bruno Fritsch ha diversificado su oferta de marcas en Santiago, incluyendo además de Toyota, Daihatsu, Hyundai, Nissan, Jeep, Chrysler, Dodge, Ram, Fiat, Peugeot, Chery, Mahindra, Brilliance y Baic.

Name: Marshall Motor Group
Description:
With a successful history of growth and development, Marshall Motor Group is a forward-thinking and ambitious company that is dedicated to the growth and we are proud that our network has grown into one of the largest in the UK. Marshall was established in 1909 by David Gregory Marshall, in a small lock-up garage in Brunswick Gardens, Cambridge and we are now the UK's 7th largest motor retail group (AM100 11/24).

We operate 130+ franchise stores representing 25+ manufacturer car, van, truck and bike brands across 34 counties in England. 

Our vision is to be the UK’s premier automotive retail group as recognised by our colleagues, customers and business partners. To achieve our vision we will create a people centric culture, as well as operate as retailers who deliver retailing excellence and are regarded as an employer of choice.

We are part of the Constellation Automotive Group which is the largest vertically integrated digital used car marketplace in Europe giving you peace of mind and transparency that you are dealing directly with a trusted company.

Join us. 

For current vacancies see www.marshall.co.uk/careers

Visit our website and Buy Online at: www.marshall.co.uk

https://twitter.com/marshallmotorgp
https://www.facebook.com/MarshallMotorGroup
https://www.instagram.com/MarshallMotorGroup

Name: Emil Frey France
Description:
Emil Frey France, leader et moteur de la distribution de véhicules en France, agit sur plusieurs domaines d’activités : la distribution automobile et moto (Groupe Autosphere), son cœur de métier, la distribution de véhicules industriels (Groupe Kertrucks), la distribution de machines agricoles, la distribution de pièces détachées d’origine et indépendantes (Dispro, FLSA, Flauraud, Barrault), la conception de pièces détachées (MGA) et l’achat et le reconditionnement de véhicules d’occasion (COFIA et CRVO). Il est l’importateur officiel des marques Mitsubishi Motors, Subaru et TVS sur le marché français. Il a vendu en France, en 2023, un peu plus de 214 904 véhicules neufs et d’occasion sur sa branche retail et son chiffre d’affaires consolidé (IFRS) s’élève à 5,4 Md€. Le groupe représente plus de 11 000 collaborateurs et collaboratrices. 
 
Emil Frey France est la filiale française du groupe Emil Frey.

Name: Abu Khader Group
Description:
Abu Khader Group was founded in 1937, Abu Khader Group is an integrated group of companies of over 1300 employees with decentralized structure allowing each company to remain focused on its own strategy and enables it to stay close to its market segment and customers. 
 
The group operates in several industries; including Automotive, Aftermarket Spare Parts, Manufacturing, Public Transportation, Land Development and Financial Leasing. Abu Khader Group is the exclusive Dealer for many prominent automotive dealerships including:  BMW (Jordan & Palestine), GM, Peugeot, Citroen, Opel, Mitsubishi Motors (Palestine), Mitsubishi Fuso, Daewoo Buses,, and Sixt Auto Rental. Furthermore, Abu Khader Group is one of the major distributors in the aftermarket spare parts, lubricants, batteries, and tires brands having international branches in Jordan, Palestine, UAE, Lebanon, Egypt, Iraq, and Ghana.  
 
The Group has two major Manufacturing lines: Automotive Batteries and Adhesives. In addition, Abu Khader Group is a shareholder in Comprehensive Multiple Transport Company (CMTC) dominating the public transportation sector under the AutoBus brand as well as the comprehensive leasing company offering financial leasing services including cars, machinery, medical equipment and Real Estate.

Name: Retail Renault Group
Description:
RETAIL RENAULT GROUP (RRG), filiale de distribution de Renault Group depuis 25 ans, se positionne comme le leader européen dans la vente de véhicules, les services associés et l'après-vente.

À travers l'Europe, RRG distribue les différentes marques du groupe. L'entreprise emploie près de 5 500 collaborateurs répartis sur 100 sites dans 5 pays européens. En 2024, RRG a commercialisé plus de 245 000 véhicules des marques Renault, Dacia, Alpine, ainsi que Nissan pour le Royaume-Uni et la Suisse. La filiale a réalisé en 2024 un chiffre d'affaires de 5,9 milliards d'euros.

Name: CFAO Mobility Sénégal
Description:
Installée au Sénégal depuis 1888, CFAO Mobility est une filiale du groupe CFAO, leader de la distribution & des services en Afrique et en Outre-mer. Elle regroupe CFAO Equipment et LOXEA New Mobility.

CFAO Mobility est le distributeur exclusif de cinq marques de renommée mondiale : Toyota, Peugeot, Suzuki, Mercedes Benz et Yamaha dont elle commercialise une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme et utilitaires.
CFAO Mobility distribue également des deux-roues, des moteurs marins, des motopompes et des groupes électrogènes YAMAHA. Sous le label AUTOMARK, les véhicules d'occasions certifiés  TOYOTA sont commercialisés au Sénégal

Opérationnel dans huit pays africains, CFAO Equipment est le partenaire des marques de premier ordre que sont Renault Trucks, Hino, King Long, JCB, Toyota industries et Bridgestone. 
Ainsi CFAO Equipement propose une gamme élargie de produits de qualité et performants: poids lourds, bus, engins de travaux publics et de manutention, pneumatiques.

Les marques commerciales LOXEA NEW MOBILITY et AVIS représentent l’activité Location Longue, Moyenne et Courte Durée. Elles profitent de la large gamme de véhicules commercialisée par le groupe CFAO: Berlines, breaks et monospaces, véhicules utilitaires et véhicules 4x4.

CFAO Mobility propose une offre complète de services avant, pendant et après la vente, pour répondre à tous les besoins de ses clients.

Name: Stellantis &You, Sales and Services
Description: Welcome to the official Stellantis &You, Sales and Services page!

Name: Toyota Zambia
Description:
Founded in 1963, CFAO Mobility Zambia Limited is Toyota Motor Corporation authorized distributor Toyota vehicles, genuine parts and after sales services, as well as certified used cars under Automark trade name. The company also offers body and paint repairs through Top Gear Motors.
In June 2022, CFAO Mobility Zambia Limited introduced Loxea brand on the Zambian market to provide long term rental of motor vehicles to companies operating in Zambia.
In line with our business philosophy of contributing to the development of the communities we operate in, CFAO Mobility Zambia Limited has a Corporate Social Responsibility that focuses on ensuring inclusive and equitable quality education and promote lifelong learning opportunities for all. In this vein we have built schools in the rural towns of Zambia and supported the Strong Girls Strong Zambia initiative.
Further, CFAO has a Graduate Trainee and Apprenticeship program that offers an opportunity to recent graduates and school leavers to acquire valuable work experience.
The company has branches in Lusaka on Cairo Road and Nangwenya road, Kitwe on Chingola Road, Solwezi on Kansanshi Mine Road, Kabwe off Butungwa Road and Livingstone on Industrial Road, as well as parts shop on Freedom way in Lusaka. In order to maximize its footprint in Zambia as well as to support local communities and businesses, the company has selected local workshops/companies, trained their staff and turned them into “Toyota Authorized Service Centers” in Chipata, Mkushi and Kasama, as well as “Team Toyota Garage” was appointed in Makeni, Lusaka.

Name: Jameel Motors
Description:
Welcome to Jameel Motors, the international mobility sector brand of Abdul Latif Jameel.

We’re looking beyond today’s traditional transportation models as a key player in the worldwide transformational change leading us to truly sustainable mobility for all.

Our relationship with how we move people and goods around our world, is undergoing what is potentially the biggest disruptive shift in in how we perceive – and experience – the concept of ‘mobility’ and this is happening much faster than perhaps anyone dreamed possible just a few short years ago.  

At Abdul Latif Jameel, we’re investing in the future of mobility, bringing the latest developments to our markets building upon eight decades of commitment to be a key player in this transformation; offering both distribution and retail solutions to automotive manufacturers, and as a trusted partner to  mobility innovators and enterprises redefining the very meaning mobility.

Jameel Motors: Opening new frontiers for freedom. 

 Abdul Latif Jameel IPR Company Limited.  All rights reserved. The Abdul Latif Jameel name and the Abdul Latif Jameel logotype and pentagon-shaped graphics are trademarks or registered trademarks of Abdul Latif Jameel IPR Company Limited.

Name: Arnold Clark
Description:
Founded in 1954, Arnold Clark is the UK’s largest independent, family-run car retailer. The company started with a single-car showroom on Glasgow’s Park Road, given flight by its founder’s simple philosophy: to offer genuine value for money and customer service of the highest level. 

Since then, the Arnold Clark Group has continued to grow with over 200 branches in the UK – selling over 200,000 cars a year in locations stretching from Elgin to Southampton.  

But while Arnold Clark is a name that’s synonymous with vehicle sales, there’s much more to the business than you see on the showroom floor. There’s also a vehicle rental and fleet management operation, training group and vehicle auction division. The Group offers everything that a customer might need for the onward journey, with parts and servicing departments, an accident repairs division, EV charging solutions and insurance services.

Name: OcasionPlus
Description:
OcasionPlus: Donde el cliente es el jefe y tú puedes liderar el cambio
En OcasionPlus llevamos más de 14 años revolucionando el mercado de coches de segunda mano en España. Nuestro crecimiento ha sido imparable, pero tenemos muy claro quién es nuestro verdadero jefe: el cliente. Cada decisión, cada mejora y cada objetivo tiene un solo foco: ofrecerle la mejor experiencia posible.

 Algunos de nuestros logros:
Crecimiento del 5000% desde 2011

Más de 1.400 empleados comprometidos

Más de 14.000 coches en stock

Empresa líder en crecimiento interanual en España

 Nuestra cultura
En OcasionPlus creemos que el éxito viene del esfuerzo colectivo y del foco en resultados. Por eso fomentamos una cultura de incentivos, donde tu rendimiento se traduce directamente en oportunidades de crecimiento y recompensa. Aquí, el mérito se reconoce y se valora.

 Lo que te espera
Si buscas un lugar donde se premie la iniciativa, el cambio y la superación, aquí lo encontrarás. Trabajar en OcasionPlus es asumir retos constantes y tener un impacto real en la experiencia del cliente, que es nuestra razón
Crecimiento de un 5000% desde 2011.
+ 1300 empleados.
+ 14.000 coches en stock.
Empresa líder en crecimiento interanual en España.
OcasionPlus opta por una fuerte cultura de incentivos basada en resultados, lo cual permite a todos nuestros empleados obtener una gran recompensa por su trabajo. 

Si te gusta el cambio, la responsabilidad y la superación personal, este es tu sitio. El crecimiento y mapa de objetivos de OcasionPlus brinda, a diario, nuevos retos a nuestros empleados permitiéndoles, a su vez, un gran desarrollo de su potencial.

Este año tenemos previsto incrementar la plantilla con 250 nuevos empleados para quienes tenemos muchos proyectos apasionantes a la vista: desde la expansión nacional con 15 nuevas aperturas hasta la implementación de proyectos digitales que nos harán seguir a la cabeza del sector.

Ven con nosotros y lidera el cambio en el mundo de la automoción!

Name: Derco Perú
Description:
Los cinco mil colaboradores de Derco en Chile, Perú y Colombia y de Imcruz en Bolivia nos unimos a la empresa de distribución automotriz líder en el mundo, para formar Inchcape Américas.

Inchcape Américas combina las operaciones de dos distribuidoras líderes en América Latina, para ofrecer la más variada oferta de soluciones de movilidad para las personas y las empresas, representando a más de 30 marcas y acompañándolos con una propuesta omnicanal que incluye servicios durante todo el ciclo de vida del vehículo.

Inchcape es una empresa de origen inglés con más de 90 años de trayectoria que opera en más de 40 países en todo el mundo e integra una cartera de negocios diversificada que incluye la venta de vehículos nuevos y usados, repuestos, servicios, mantenimiento, financiación y seguros.
 
En la región, Inchcape Américas está presente en 12 países de América Latina y el Caribe (Chile, Colombia, Perú, Bolivia, Argentina, Uruguay, Ecuador, Panamá, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador y Barbados), empleando a más de 8,000 personas.

Síguenos también en @Inchcapeamericas

Sitio web  http://inchcape.com

Name: Streetside Classics
Description:
After being in the collector-car business for a decade prior, Donna Robbins opened the doors to the first Streetside Classics showroom in Charlotte, NC in 2008.  Armed with a customer-oriented business philosophy and a clear vision for success, she has since led Streetside Classics to an unrivaled sales volume that is currently among the best in the collector car industry. 
 
With the most knowledgeable and professionally trained staff in the industry, we have expanded nationally and opened showrooms in many major U.S. markets.  We operate under the principles of doing business fairly and with the understanding that our customers are the lifeblood of the business.  Much of our success comes from the relationships formed with buyers and sellers around the world who have joined us on this incredible journey and made Streetside’s rapid growth possible. 
 
Today, Streetside Classics is known as The Nation's #1 Classic Car Dealer; providing sellers and buyers alike with the peace of mind that only comes from partnering with one of the largest classic car dealerships in the country.

Name: EXEED UAE
Description:
Al Ghurair is the exclusive distributor of EXEED in the UAE, offering a premium lineup of ICE, hybrid, and electric SUVs. 

Discover our latest addition: a sporty electric sedan featuring advanced REEV technology. Visit our flagship EV showroom in Abu Dhabi and our other showrooms in Dubai and Ras Al Khaimah.

Name: Otoklix
Description:
Founded in 2019, Otoklix bridges the gap between automotive vehicle owners and Indonesia’s fragmented independent car workshop sector, transforming the vehicle maintenance experience for consumers and equipping workshops with business software solutions and procurement savings. 

In the past year alone, Otoklix is on a growth trajectory to become the largest and most trusted aftermarket service network in Indonesia — Southeast Asia’s largest market with a projection of 20 million cars on its roads in the next five years. 

Backers include Alpha JWC Ventures and AC Ventures with participation from Sequoia Capital India’s Surge, Ex-CEO of Indonesia’s largest automotive conglomerate Astra International Prijono Sugiarto, YouTube Co-founder Steve Chen and Google Executives in XA Network. 

Nominated as one of Forbes 100 Asia Company to watch in July 2021.

Name: CFAO Mobility Cameroon
Description:
Chez CFAO MOBILITY CAMEROON, filiale du groupe CFAO, lui-même détenu à 100% par Toyota Tsusho Corporation, notre ambition va au-delà de la vente de véhicules et d'équipements. Présents au Cameroun depuis 1972, initialement sous l’appellation CAMI, nous sommes un moteur de mobilité et de développement économique. 

Avec un réseau inégalé de 9 sites dans 6 villes (Douala, Yaoundé, Bafoussam, Garoua, Ngaoundéré, Bertoua), nous sommes au plus près des besoins de nos clients. Nos 3 pôles d'activité – Mobility, Equipment et Winpart/Autofast – incarnent notre engagement à fournir des solutions fiables et performantes. 

Nos showrooms Mobility invitent à découvrir l'élégance luxueuse de Mercedes, les lignes gracieuses et la fiabilité de Toyota, Peugeot, Citroen ou Suzuki. Nos sites Equipment embarquent dans la robustesse de bus King Long, d'engins Lovol, de camions Hohan, Renault Trucks ou Hino...

Mais notre impact est aussi humain : nous sommes fiers d'abriter à Douala l'une des six Académies Automotive Toyota au monde, formant nos Techniciens aux technologies les plus avancées, pour garantir un service de maintenance le plus fiable possible. Plus qu'un acteur économique, nous sommes un partenaire engagé, soutenant activement l'intégration professionnelle des jeunes (avec une soixantaine de stagiaires accueillis chaque année), l'accès des femmes aux métiers techniques et des associations œuvrant pour l'éducation et l'autonomisation. 

Avec plus de 500 collaborateurs passionnés, notre engagement va au-delà de la route : il est émotionnel, à travers des marques emblématiques et des expériences client uniques, et sociétal, en soutenant activement les communautés camerounaises.

Name: cinch
Description:
We're cinch. And we take the faff out of buying a car entirely online. So when our customers buy a car, they don't just nail it, they absolutely cinch it.

Our mission is simple. To take away all the things that make changing cars trickier than it should be. We know what drivers want, so we’ve ripped up the rule book and replaced it with an approach that helps people browse, buy and receive cars from the comfort of their own homes.  

In the last year, cinch has moved from start-up to scale-up, supported by huge financial investment and a community of almost 200 digital, engineering, marketing, data, commercial and customer experience professionals working across our Manchester, Surrey and Central London offices. With this driving us – and the UK’s online car sales market growing every day – we’re truly set up for success. 

Sound up your street? 

We’re determined to build the best online experiences in the automotive and technology industries. And we’re always looking for talented people to help us on that journey. We want to inspire innovation behind the scenes that drives to continually-improved, faff-free experiences for consumers.

What does that mean for you? 

At cinch, we’ve created an environment where ideas come to life, agile thinking is celebrated and each of us can really make a difference. Our passionate team makes every day exciting – supporting and learning from each other to ensure our work is both meaningful and impactful. 

On top of that, we’ve market-leading salaries and fantastic perks to sweeten the deal. Think company discounts, L&D tools, employee assistance programmes and even our very own cashback and rewards platform.  

Join a brand you’ll be proud to say you’ve helped build. Join cinch.

Name: WeBuyCars
Description: WeBuyCars is SA’s No. 1 car buying service. Whether you're buying or selling a vehicle, WeBuyCars allows you to do so in the most efficient and convenient way possible. Selling a vehicle? We come to you, evaluate your car and pay you on the spot! Otherwise, you can bring your vehicle to one of our branches nationwide and have it evaluated while you browse for your next vehicle. Buying a vehicle? Browse through 1000’s of vehicles on the WeBuyCars website and find the car of your dreams.

Name: Carter
Description:
Carter is your new car buying partner!

We help you conveniently and easily, using leading technology to get you into your new car.

Check out our website (www.heycarter.com) for more information.

Name: Arista Group
Description:
Arista Group is a national automotive company established in 2003, operating as an authorized multibrand dealer in Indonesia.

With a network of more than 150 branches across Sumatra, Java, and Kalimantan, Arista Group provides integrated sales and after-sales services for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, and motorcycles.

Arista Group represents a portfolio of leading automotive brands, including BYD, Denza, Honda, Suzuki, Mitsubishi, Hyundai, Wuling, Mercedes-Benz,  Yamaha, and Hino, and operates across multiple automotive business lines such as vehicle sales and after-sales services, used vehicles, rental and auction services, as well as electric vehicle–based mobility solutions.

Name: Difor Chile
Description: Concesionario de Vehículos Ford - Omoda|Jaecoo - Jetour - MG - Nissan - Peugeot - Opel - Citroen - Chery - Volkswagen - Mitsubishi - Maxus - Karry - Kaiyi. Venta de Camiones Ford, Volkswagen, Hino, Jac y MAN. Venta de Usados Exclusivos.

Name: CFAO Mobility Angola, S.A.
Description:
A CFAO Mobility Angola, S.A. é uma subsidiária do CFAO Group, que por sua vez é uma subsidiária da Toyota Tsusho Corporation (TTC) e está presente em África há mais de 170 anos nas áreas de Mobilidade, Saúde, Grande Consumo e Infraestruturas.

Em Angola, oferecemos soluções 360º em mobilidade, respondendo às necessidades de particulares, empresas e frotas de todas as dimensões. Somos especialistas na distribuição, manutenção e assistência de automóveis multimarca, com foco em qualidade, inovação e confiança.

Desde 11 de outubro de 2022, a antiga Toyota de Angola, S.A. passou a designar-se CFAO Mobility Angola, S.A., uma evolução que reforça a nossa identidade sem alterar a excelência no serviço e a confiança que já nos distinguem.

A CFAO Mobility Angola, S.A., passa assim a ser o novo distribuidor oficial das marcas anteriormente representadas pela Toyota de Angola, S.A., (Toyota, Hino, Sinotruk, Michelin e Bfgoodrich ) e acresce a esta gama a marca Winpart, para peças de segunda linha numa primeira fase.

Name: CarTimes Group
Description:
Established since 2001, CarTimes Group is Singapore’s most trusted, award-winning automotive icon.

Founded by Eddie Loo, the automotive group is driven by its singular dedication to every customer. CarTimes’ full-suite of solutions, from retail sales, rental, insurance and workshop servicing, ensures that customers enjoy the ultimate peace of mind in all their automotive related needs. Constantly innovating and growing from strength to strength, CarTimes takes every customer on a journey towards excellence. Turning miles into smiles. Making every journey simpler, faster and happier.

Graduated from the SMU-SPRING SME Leaders Advanced Management course, Eddie holds active posts in several automotive related associations and pledges to support and promote the motor retail industry in Singapore. Under his stewardship, CarTimes Group today is recognised to be one the finest, most reliable customer-centric automotive partners in the business, second to none.

Some of CarTimes’ awards and accolades include :

- The Entrepreneur Of The Year Award
- Asia Pacific's Most Prestigious Awards For Entrepreneurs
- Enterprise 50 Award
- Singapore Promising Brand Award

Name: Capital Automotive Group
Description:
Spanning three provinces in the stunning Prairies, the Capital Automotive Group is a Canadian automotive retail powerhouse with numerous dealerships spanning multiple brands including GMC, Ford, Chevrolet, Jeep, Dodge, Buick, Lincoln, Cadillac, Ram, and Mercedes-Benz. Our talented team has also started dominating the USA market with Cadillac and GM stores in sunny California as part of the Cornerstone Automotive Group. 

Want to be part of the team? We invite you to check out our careers page. No matter what our job listings indicate, there's always room on our team for great people. We can't wait to meet you.

Name: All EV Canada
Description: The All EV Store. Electric vehicles, advice and expertise. Call us first.

Name: Automilenio S.A.
Description: Concesionario Audi de Venta y Postventa de Automóviles.

Name: Auto Pedigree Official
Description:
For 40 years, Auto Pedigree has been raising the standard of used car retailing, bringing a culture of service, a no-nonsense approach to dealing with customers, and a thorough understanding of motoring needs. We've weathered the storms of the trade and the economy, and survived well.

We conduct business with integrity while providing the best possible quality used vehicle at a good deal. This could be the main reason why Auto Pedigree remains a popular choice for South African car buyers countrywide.

With our experience and heritage, we're truly a part of the South African motoring landscape and will continue to be for a long time to come.

Name: ECGO EV Moto
Description:
ECGO EVmoto adalah sebuah start up yang berfokus pada kendaraan roda dua ramah lingkungan. Sebagai perusahaan baru, kami berjuang untuk menyediakan moda transportasi yang lebih baik. Tujuan kami dimulai dari Indonesia dan akan menyebar ke seluruh Asia Tenggara.

Kami percaya kami bisa menjadi perusahaan nomor satu yang memberikan transportasi yang lebih baik kepada masyarakat tanpa mencemari lingkungan. Singkatnya, kami menyediakan pilihan untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik tanpa harus khawatir dengan masa depan. Hari ini, Indonesia bergerak cepat menuju era baru dan perusahaan kami akan menjadi salah satu yang mendorong Indonesia untuk menjadi sebuah negara yang lebih baik.

Name: Anaamalais Toyota
Description: We, Anaamalais Toyota are a leading Toyota car dealer in South India since 2000. We have 18 branches spread over Tamilnadu (Except  Chennai).

Name: Porsche Zentrum Aargau
Description:
Die Faszination Porsche liegt uns im Blut und wir freuen uns, dass Sie diese teilen. Hinter jedem Modell stecken Emotionen, die wir tagtäglich miterleben. 

Ganz egal, ob Ihr Fahrzeug einen Boxenstopp benötigt oder Sie Ihren Traumporsche suchen - unser kompetentes Personal steht Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung. Vom Macan, über den Taycan, bis hin zum legendären 911: Wir sind stolz darauf, die gesamte Porsche Vielfalt in einem gepflegten Zustand anzubieten. 

Uns ist wichtig, dass Sie in uns einen zuverlässigen und persönlichen Porsche-Ansprechpartner finden. Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, unserer Kundschaft individuelle Wünsche zu erfüllen und den bestmöglichen Service zu bieten. Dafür geben wir alles: Fahrzeuge, die einem den Atem rauben und ein Team, das für seine Arbeit brennt. 

In unserem familiengeführten Unternehmen werden rund 30 Mitarbeiter beschäftigt, die jeden Tag die hohen Erwartungen unserer Kundschaft erfüllen. Um diesen Erwartungen auch künftig stets gerecht zu werden, lassen sie sich regelmässig weiterbilden und vertiefen dadurch ihr umfassendes Fachwissen konstant. 

Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie bald persönlich bei uns in Oftringen begrüssen zu dürfen. Denn bei uns geht es um glänzende Karrosserien, leistungsstarke Sportlichkeit und innovative Technologien aber besonders um Sie - unsere Kundschaft. 

Porsche Zentrum Aargau
F. + M. Konstantin AG
Äussere Luzernerstrasse 19
CH-4665 Oftringen 
info@porsche-aargau.ch

Name: Club Alpine RRG
Description:
Découvrez ici nos actualités, opportunités, ne manquez aucun événement marquant et partagez notre passion pour cette sportive iconique qui séduit de génération en génération. Nous proposons aujourd’hui de vous faire vivre le lifestyle Alpine à travers la vente de véhicules neufs mais aussi la location, via le programme Mobility. N’hésitez pas à vous rapprocher de l’un de nos centres pour plus d'informations.

Que vous soyez initiés ou simplement curieux, nous vous proposons de rester à l’écoute de nos annonces afin de tout savoir sur les innovations Alpine et sur l’offre Alpine by RRG, au sein de laquelle nous vous réservons de belles surprises, très prochainement. Restez connectés !

Pensez à covoiturer. #SeDéplacerMoinsPolluer

Name: BAIC Polska
Description:
Beijing to Pekin w Chinach, właśnie tam w 1958 roku zaczęła się historia marki BAIC. Zainspirowanej pięknem stolicy, kluczowe słowa koncepcji projektu to pewność siebie, ciepło, wschodni styl.
Intensywne rozwijający się koncern BAIC Group zainwestował na świecie w projekty badawczo - rozwojowe ok. 380 mln dolarów, tworząc atrakcyjne i konkurencyjne samochody na każdy rynek.
Obecnie sprzedaż marki BAIC przekroczyła 31 milionów sztuk w 110 krajach i regionach na całym świecie. 
W 2023 roku marka BAIC debiutuje w Polsce.

https://baic-auto.pl
https://www.instagram.com/baicpolska
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100094066105063

Name: Shakti Jaguar Land Rover
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Shakti Jaguar Land Rover.
This page is for the enthusiasts, fans, and drivers of Jaguar Land Rover cars.

Jaguar Land Rover is a business built around two great British car brands that are designed, engineered, and manufactured in the United Kingdom. Jaguar Land Rover is one of the world’s premier manufacturers of luxury sedans, sports cars, and SUVs.

Use this new media channel to talk to us – we look forward to your comments and insights.

While we´re sure you´ve already heard of the netiquette we would still like to remind everyone to maintain a friendly and respectful tone.

The comments, opinions, and images tagged by our fans on this page do not necessarily reflect the opinions of Shakti Jaguar Land Rover

Name: MTI Automotive | MM Group for Industry and International Trade
Description: MTI Automotive is the official dealer for Bentley, Maserati, Jaguar Land Rover, Ducati, Polaris in Egypt.

Name: Volkswagen MidTown Toronto
Description:
At Volkswagen MidTown Toronto, we have spent more than 40 years carefully building a solid foundation with the most important of building blocks: satisfied customers and friends.

We are proud of the manner in which we care for the people who have placed their trust in us. Our clients are the reason we are here, and the reason we have grown. Be it through referrals, repeat sales, or subsequent generations within a family, our customer care has been the bond. Direct relationships, a term that underscores what we stand for and something that you can count on at Volkswagen MidTown Toronto.

Volkswagen MidTown Toronto is a proud member of The Humberview Group, one of Canada’s largest automotive dealer groups. 5000 Vehicles.  20 Stores. 18 Brands. 1 Promise: Serving you better, each and every day.

Name: City Motor SpA
Description: Empresa fundada en marzo del año 2017, fruto de la iniciativa de los empresarios Diego Guzmán Cremaschi y Marilian Marchant Larraín, quienes invitaron a sus cinco hijos a unir capacidades y participar en el negocio de la compra y venta de automóviles. Desde sus inicios, City Motor ha dedicado sus esfuerzos a la compraventa de automóviles, camionetas, camiones y SUV nuevos, seminuevos y usados de todas las marcas y modelos, que cuenten con un alto estándar de calidad.

Name: Audi Mississauga
Description:
Easy, efficient, and enjoyable. At your preferred Audi dealers in Mississauga, it's not only our motto but also a reflection of our commitment to making every customer experience feel unique and extraordinary. 

A member of the Bramgate Automotive Family, Audi Mississauga has provided exceptional quality and superior service to our loyal customers since the Johnston family opened the doors to their one-car Brampton showroom in 1967. With the opening of our Audi Mississauga Airport location, our team is excited to continue sharing their passion for the Audi brand with our customers.

We're always interested in hearing from qualified individuals looking to join our team, and encourage you to send your resume to careers@bramgateautomotive.com.

Name: Tunas Honda
Description:
TUNAS HONDA (PT. Tunas Dwipa Matra & PT. Asia Surya Perkasa) is a company from group of PT. Tunas Ridean, Tbk in collaboration with the Brand Holder Sole Agent (ATPM) PT. Astra Honda Motor (AHM) as the main distributor of Honda motorcycles in the provinces of Lampung and Bangka Belitung.

Vision:
To be the leading automotive dealer group in Indonesia through excellent service for customers.

Mission:
1. Offer customers the best purchasing and ownership experience.
2. Provide sustainable growth and shareholder returns supported by efficient operations.
3. Foster a cooperative culture that enhances both individual creativity and the value of teamwork.
4. Build mutually beneficial relationships with our business partners.
5. Make a positive difference to the communities in which we operate.

Name: autobro.it
Description:
Autobro.it è un e-commerce auto che fa parte del Gruppo Intergea, uno dei più grandi gruppi automotive retail italiani.
La mobilità sta ogni giorno accelerando la propria evoluzione e l’auto si sta velocemente trasformando da bene a servizio. Il Gruppo Intergea, che da anni osserva questo fenomeno e propone alla clientela attraverso le proprie concessionarie soluzioni sempre innovative, ha deciso di ampliare il proprio mercato dando vita ad Autobro.it per connettersi direttamente con quegli utenti – il cui numero è in continua crescita – che desiderano scegliere e comprare l’auto da remoto, magari comodamente dal proprio divano.

Name: La Mesa
Description:
In 1972 we opened a single RV dealership in La Mesa, California, a suburb of San Diego. Since our beginning, “Experience Life” has been incorporated into every RV we sell. We believe in treating our customers like family and strive to make your experience with us as enjoyable as possible.

Today La Mesa RV Center is headquartered in San Diego and operates several dealerships in multiple states. Over the years we have grown to become one of the largest multi-location RV dealerships in the world. We are proud to be recognized as a leader in the industry.

You can trust our knowledgeable staff members who are available to assist you with your RV buying and service needs. Our dealerships are stocked with the best quality new RVs from top name brands, complemented by outstanding certified pre-owned RVs. With a vast inventory of models and floor plans, La Mesa RV has an RV for every lifestyle.

Our sales locations have state of the art service facilities with RVDA Master Certified technicians. We also have buyers available if you are trying to sell your used RV.

We look forward to opening our doors to you, and encourage you to explore all the RV lifestyle has to offer.

(800)496-8778 - La Mesa RV - sales@lamesarv.com

Name: Bymycar Nissan
Description:
Le Groupe BYmyCAR est un acteur majeur de la distribution automobile et motocycliste indépendant français. Nos 6 concessions BYmyCAR Nissan sont implantées en Auvergne Rhône Alpes et Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur.

Nos services et prestations s’adressent tant aux clients particuliers qu’aux clients professionnels, incluant la vente de véhicules neufs ou d’occasion, des solutions de financement sur mesure, des offres d’assurances adaptées, l’entretien et la réparation des véhicules ainsi que la vente de pièces de rechange et d’accessoires.

Name: V12 Sports And Classics Ltd
Description: Founded in 2005, V12 Sports and Classics began with a passion for unique and classic cars. Today, we’re one of the UK’s leading car supermarkets, selling hundreds of vehicles each week. We’re committed to exceptional service, great value, and treating every customer like family - backed by our AA Inspect and Protect package for added peace of mind.

Name: Busato by CHOSSADE
Description:
Busato by Chossade est distributeur exclusif France des motoneiges BRP pour les Marques Lynx et Ski-doo. Nous sommes concessionnaire BRP Can-am pour les départements de Savoie et Haute-Savoie. 
Venez découvrir nos 2 showrooms où vous trouverez un large choix de quads, SSV, 3 roues avec les Spyder et Ryker ainsi que de nombreux accessoires : casques Kenny, Shark, Can-Am et Icon, gants homologués CE Racer, vêtements Can-Am.
Nous avons 2 ateliers pour les réparations et les entretiens de véhicules, à Porte de Savoie et à Fillinges, un service de pièces détachées avec plus de 4 000 références en stock et nous intervenons directement sur site pour dépannage avec possibilité de prêt de matériels.

Name: Audi Guwahati
Description:
Audi Guwahati is the first luxury vehicle showroom in the Northeast India. Audi’s only authorized dealership in Northeast India belonging to Green Valley Pride Pvt Ltd.

Our dealership is committed to Audi’s philosophy of ‘Vorsprung durch Technik’. It signifies advancement through technology, being ahead of the rest and setting new standards.

The Audi Guwahati showroom is the pioneer showroom of luxury segment in the entire North East region of India. It reflects Audi’s philosophy of Vorsprung durch Technik and exemplifies the premium services offered by Audi to its customers.

Situated at Lalmati, N.H -37, the showroom boasts a 6 car display and is spread over a total area of 15,000 sq. ft.
The Audi Service Facility is located in the same premises. These facility 6 cars per day on a total of 3 bays. The technicians at the facility are trained to ensure that they deliver a world-class service to our esteemed customers.
Models available at Audi Guwahati Showroom: Audi A3, Audi A3 Cabriolet, Audi A4, Audi A6, Audi A8, Audi Q3, Audi Q5, Audi Q7, Audi RS 5, Audi RS 7, Audi S6, Audi TT, Audi R8

Name: Bahia Motors
Description: Authorized car dealer for Honda, Acura, Geely y Honda motorcycles in Panama.

Name: CYD CARS
Description:
Welcome to Capture Your Dreams! We're your go-to place for great used cars from Japan, right here in Kenya.

We're based in Mombasa, Kenya, and we've got a bunch of fantastic cars waiting for you to check out. Whether you need a fancy sedan, a tough SUV, or a handy hatchback, we've got something for everyone.

We make sure all our cars are in top shape before they hit our showroom floor. That means they're checked over carefully to make sure they run well, are safe, and ready to go.

We know that getting a car is a big deal, so we're here to help you every step of the way. Our friendly team is ready to answer your questions and give you all the info you need.

Come visit us at our showroom in Mombasa and let's find the perfect car to make your dreams come true on the road!

Name: Grupo Orletti - Orvel
Description:
Formado por 5 irmãos da família Orletti na cidade de Pinheiros – ES em 1966, o Grupo Orletti nasceu para proporcionar o bem-estar das pessoas, oferecendo o melhor em produtos e serviços automotivos.

Hoje, seguindo a nossa missão, atuamos em 3 estados: ES, MG e BA, representando 9 marcas automotivas:

Volkswagen Automóveis
Volkswagen/MAN Caminhões e Ônibus
Fiat
Renault
Hyundai HMB
Jeep
Peugeot
Citroën
RAM
Omoda Jaecoo
MG Motors
Geely
Jetour

Nossas concessionárias estão distribuídas em 13 cidades, além de contarmos também com a marca própria para veículos seminovos, a Orvel Seminovos.

Atuamos ainda com as marcas Orvel Pneus, um Auto Center da marca Continental; Orvel Atacado, distribuidora de pneus, peças e acessórios e Orvel Point S, uma franquia da maior rede global de auto centers, além de uma parceria com a Disal, no segmento de consórcios.

Prezamos sempre pela honestidade, comprometimento e inovação para realizar sonhos através do nosso trabalho.

Name: Mercomax SA
Description: Desde hace ya 26 años que empezamos a comercializar productos relacionados al mundo de las motos. Tenemos presencia en todas las provincias de nuestro país, hoy nos representan más de 30 vendedores en todo el territorio nacional. Contamos con un departamento de asistencia de ventas único en el rubro, que brinda soluciones inmediatas a cualquier consulta. Estudiamos profundamente cuales son las necesidades de su comercio y tratamos de brindarles las mejores soluciones, para que su empresa haga los mejores negocios siempre. Hoy en Mercomax somos 275 personas las que trabajamos en Argentina y Uruguay. Damos servicio a más de 2300 clientes y seguimos día a día enfocados en prestar el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes.

Name: The Spartan Group
Description: The Spartan Group is a prominent automotive retail group operating 14 dealerships across Oregon, Washington, California, Montana, Wyoming, and Utah. They represent various brands including Acura, BMW, Chrysler, Dodge, Ford, GMC, Honda, Jeep, Nissan, Ram, Subaru, Toyota, and Volkswagen. The group's headquarters is located in Ashland, Oregon, and they are known for providing a wide range of employment opportunities with competitive benefits such as health and dental insurance, paid time off, and 401(k) plans. Their dealerships focus on delivering excellent customer service and maintaining high standards in sales and service operations.

Name: Renault - Groupe Maurin Automobiles

Description:
Autocom Japan INC is a pre-owned automotive exporter based in Yokohama Japan that exports cars, buses, trucks and motorcycles all over the world with a strong client base in CIS ,Caribbean and African countries.
Autocom Japan prides itself in 4 principles of commitment : Speed,  Reliability,  Quality  &  Affordability

Name: ElectroRide
Description:
At ElectroRide, we believe electric vehicles are India's future transportation. Our extensive network of multi-brand electronic vehicle outlets is designed to make the transition to electric vehicles smooth and hassle-free for customers across the country.

At ElectroRide, sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. We don't just sell electric vehicles - we're also actively involved in developing and deploying charging infrastructure to make it as easy and convenient as possible for our customers to keep their vehicles charged up and ready to go. Through partnerships with leading energy and technology players, we're working to build a future where charging an electric vehicle is as easy as filling up a gas tank.
We take great pride in providing exceptional customer service at ElectroRide. Our knowledgeable and friendly staff are always on hand to answer any questions or concerns you may have, and we offer a wide range of after-sales services - including maintenance and repair - to ensure that your electric vehicle stays in top condition for years to come.
Join us on our exciting journey towards a greener and more sustainable future for India. Together, let's make a positive impact on the environment and create a better world for future generations.

Name: alkhedrmotors
Description: Abdul Majeed Al Khader Automotive Company is the exclusive and authorized agent for ZXAuto cars in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Contact 8001246665 or WhatsApp 0539162228. Name: Rivervale
Description:
Rivervale provides leasing, purchasing, servicing and vehicle management of cars, vans and minibuses.

Name: Tegeta Cars • თეგეტა ქარსი
Description:
თეგეტა ქარსი (Tegeta Cars) თეგეტა მოტორსის ჰოლდინგში შემავალი სტრატეგიული ბიზნეს დანაყოფია, რომელიც Porsche-ს, Mazda-ს, Toyota-ს, Volvo-ს და Geely-ს ოფიციალური წარმომადგენელია. 
თეგეტა ქარსში ასევე  შედის Europcar Georgia, რომლის ბიზნესპროფილია სრული სატრანსპორტო მომსახურება, ავტომობილების გაქირავება და ავტოპარკის მენეჯმენტი. 
მომხმარებელს მრავალფეროვან არჩევანს სთავაზობს Autogallery, მულტიბრენდული პრემიუმ შოურუმი, რომლის ერთ-ერთი მთავარი მიმართულება ელექტრო ავტომობილების პოპულარიზაციაა. კომპანია ამავდროულად არის NIU E-scooters ელექტროსკუტერების ოფიციალური პარტნიორი, ამავე კომპანიაში შედის Tegeta Off Road Vehicles, რომელიც არის Polaris-ის  წარმომადგენელი საქართველოში. მეორადი ავტომობილების მიმართულებით კომპანიაში შედის Tegeta Approved, სადაც შესაძლებელია მეორადი ავტომობილების შეძენა თეგეტას გარანტიით.

Name: BYD Danmark
Description:
BYD er et nyt navn i Danmark, men på verdensplan er det et af de bedst sælgende elbilbrands overhovedet. 

BYD står for Build Your Dreams. Virksomheden startede i 1995 som batteriproducent og begyndte allerede at producere egne elbiler fra 2003.

Name: Primarca
Description:
Anos de experiência e reconhecimento no mercado automotivo.
O Grupo nasceu em 1966, com uma empresa de consórcios e focando em um grande futuro de sucesso. Em 1999, o Grupo adquiriu a Chevrolet Primarca, localizada em São Caetano, ABC Paulista.

Atualmente o Grupo atua nas cidades de São Caetano do Sul (Rua Baraldi 275 e Av. Guido Aliberti 1670) e na cidade de São Paulo (Av. São Miguel 7117 e Av. Jabaquara 2371)

A Primarca é uma das maiores Concessionárias Chevrolet de São Paulo. Aqui, você sempre encontra as melhores ofertas de carros novos e seminovos. Isso porque a Primarca dispõe de mais de 100 funcionários altamente treinados e qualificados para proporcionar a você o melhor negócio na hora de adquirir seu automóvel.

Nossa Concessionária não se limita apenas à venda de veículos. Oferecemos uma ampla variedade de produtos e serviços de qualidade e preços competitivos para atender com excelência todos nossos clientes.
Location: Sao Caetano Do Sul, São Paulo

Name: Automia
Description:
Automia es un concesionario de vehículos comerciales fundado en 2024, perteneciente al Grupo Octagon.

Nuestro lema, “Mueve tu mundo ahora”, refleja nuestro compromiso con cada persona y su propia definición de mundo.

Sabemos que el mundo de cada quien es único. Para algunos, está formado por su familia, sus mascotas o sus amigos. Para otros, es su trabajo: ese proyecto de vida que representa el sustento diario, los sueños que hoy son realidad gracias al esfuerzo, la dedicación y la disciplina.

Para ellos, hemos construido el portafolio más completo de vehículos comerciales del mercado: herramientas de movilidad pensadas para impulsar sus metas.

En Automia, seguiremos ampliando nuestra oferta para estar cada vez más cerca de los dominicanos, ofreciéndoles soluciones que acompañen su crecimiento, sin importar cuál sea su mundo.

Description:
AutoEasy est un réseau National d'agences automobiles Multimarques, réparti sur toute la France avec 60 points de Vente, spécialisé dans la vente de Véhicules Neufs et Occasions.

Basé sur le modèle des agences immobilières, le concept AutoEasy propose différentes solutions aux particuliers qui souhaitent vendre leur voiture : soit l'intermédiation, sur le modèle des agences Immobilières, soit le Rachat Cash avec paiement du véhicule sous 24h. 

Tous les véhicules sont systématiquement garantis, permettant ainsi à acheteur et vendeur une transaction en toute sécurité. 

Ce concept vous intéresse ? 
Rejoignez notre réseau en ouvrant votre propre agence AutoEasy. Vous serez formés et accompagnés par des personnes issues du réseau pour vous donner toutes les chances de réussir.

- Commercials solicitation or solicitation of donations

Poti achizitiona un automobil de lux din stocul propriu sau poti sa ne spui ce marca si configuratie iti doresti, iar noi iti vom cauta si aduce masina dorita din stocul extern aflat in tarile partenere. Astfel, procesul de achizitie a viitoarei tale masini este mult mai rapid si simplificat, pentru ca noi ne ocupam de toate detaliile si iti livram masina oriunde in tara. 

Calitate Premium 

Credem ca fiecare moment al interactiunii cu tine trebuie sa reflecte valorile in care credem. La BCCH Auto Switzerland, profesionalismul, eficienta si increderea conduc fiecare experienta pe care o oferim clientilor nostri. De la primul contact si pana la cheia in contact. 

Siguranta Absoluta 

Din momentul deciziei, stii ca te poti baza pe noua ta masina. Pentru ca specialistii BCCH Auto Switzerland iti asigura verificarea tehnica a automobilului, dar si a istoricului si documentelor sale. 

Finantare Rapida

Iti oferim mereu solutia perfecta adaptata planurilor tale. Indiferent ca alegi leasing, plata integrala sau credit, specialistii nostri te vor ajuta cu solutia ideala. La BCCH Auto Switzerland confortul tau financiar este o dotare standard. 

Important! Te asteptam oricand sa ne vizitezi in locatia noastra din Otopeni, langa Tiriac Collection, pentru a viziona masinile existente pe stoc si pentru a le conduce in cadrul unui test drive. Astfel, este mai usor decat oricand sa iei o decizie, iar specialistii nostri sunt mereu alaturi de tine pentru a te ghida pas cu pas in ceea ce priveste viitoarea ta achizitie de lux. 

Suntem o echipa dedicata, formata din profesionisti cu o lunga experienta in domeniul vanzarilor de masini. Ne propunem sa construim relatii solide si de durata cu toti clientii nostri, oferindu-le de fiecare data cea mai buna expertiza si cele mai bune servicii.

Name: Grupo Automax
Description:
Há mais de 45 anos nos destacamos pela tradição, inovação e pioneirismo no ramo automobilístico. Fomos precursores nos anos 1990 do circuito Raja Gabaglia, avenida que hoje abriga as principais marcas de automóveis da capital mineira, tornando-se referência para busca e aquisição de veículos, conhecida como “Corredor do Automóvel”. 

Iniciamos nossa história como concessionária Ford de 1979 a 1992 e nos tornamos Fiat ainda no ano de 1992. 

Inaugurou em 2011 a sua filial com intuito de expandir a marca para outro vetor da Grande BH. A loja está localizada na Via Expressa (bairro Coração Eucarístico), corredor de alto fluxo, no sentido de Contagem e Betim, tornando-se uma referência na região. 

Em 2019, adquirimos a tradicional concessionária Bordeaux, da marca francesa Peugeot e agora também Citroën, referência no mercado mineiro e na rede PSA por mais de 27 anos. As instalações foram mantidas no mesmo local, à Avenida Barão Homem de Melo, justamente pela tradição do ponto. 

Atuamos também há mais de 13 anos na área de tecnologia e gestão de negócios com a  Maxmobility, empresa especializada em desenvolvimento de softwares e aplicativos integrados com foco principal no setor automotivo. 

Temos como foco a satisfação total do cliente e a qualificação constante dos seus colaboradores que se evidenciam no comprometimento com a excelência no atendimento e com a qualidade dos serviços prestados.

Name: Rydell
Description: Rydell Chevrolet was founded by Leonard Rydell (1913-2000) who started in the car business in the 1940's in Montgomery, Minnesota. In 1954, at Chevrolet's request, he moved to Grand Forks, North Dakota to operate the Chevrolet dealership. Leonard had many strongly held business and personal philosophies that served him well. These philosophies, known as "Leonardism's", help guide our group through our daily business and personal decisions. In 1976, Leonard sold the business to his son, Wes. Under Wes' direction, Rydell Chevrolet converted to the one price, no hassle, no haggle pricing policy that is followed today. In subsequent years, Rydell Chevrolet added Cadillac, Oldsmobile, GMC, Pontiac & Buick franchises to their lineup in Grand Forks. In 2005, we added the Saturn brand to our model lineup in Grand Forks. Currently Rydell Cars has full service Chevrolet, GMC, Honda, Nissan, Toyota, and Cadillac Dealerships in Grand Forks, ND.  In 1980, Leonard and Wes helped one of their managers purchase a dealership in Mandan, North Dakota. Their goal was to help that manager to eventually own the dealership outright. The plan worked and Leonard and Wes have repeated the process with many other managers since then. The Rydell Group has now grown to 83 dealerships in 17 states and continues to grow to this day.
