Name: Central Car Auctions Limited
Description:
Welcome to Central Car Auctions. We are used vehicle auction house with 1000s  of vehicles ready for sale every week. Established in 1965, we offer the UK’s most competitive vehicle fees and an unbeatable range of brands to cater to every budget. Our auctions are held on our 13-acre Glasgow site every Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday.

Not able to visit us in person? Take advantage of our Auction Live platform on our website and join our auctions from the comfort of your own home.

If you have any questions, want to join our expert team or wish to set up a trade account, please visit http://www.centralcarauctions.com/trade/vehicles/live-bid/ or email the Sales team at info@centralcarauctions.co.uk
Location: Glasgow, Just off M8 motorway - Junctions 8/9

Name: Chapelhouse Motor Group
Description:
Chapelhouse Motor Group was founded in 1989 and are proud to call ourselves a household name across the Cheshire, Greater Manchester, Merseyside & Lancashire regions.

Originally situated on Denton's Green Lane in St Helens, Chapelhouse now has 10 sites across the northwest, including Blackburn, Blackpool, Bolton, Southport, St Helens, Warrington and Wigan, proudly offering new cars from brands such as Suzuki, MG, Omoda and Jaecoo.

We specialise in providing new cars including Motability Vehicles, Electric and Hybrid Cars and quality approved Used Cars, including our 5 Years 0% APR - No Interest, No Deposit options, all of which have undertaken in-depth checks to guarantee they are the best possible quality. All of our showrooms are open seven days a week for sales and our friendly and knowledgeable team is always more than happy to help.

Many of our loyal customers are now driving a fifth, or even a sixth car purchased from a Chapelhouse dealership, thanks to our amazing offers and expert sales teams.

Our service centres are authorised by our main brands for approved repairs and our technicians are brand and EV-trained specialists. Servicing, repairs, MOT testing & parts are available at each dealership every day apart from Sunday.

We offer unbeatable offers, including Drive Now Pay Later to help you spread the cost of your service or surprise repair bill, and provide free annual MOTs and service plans to help keep you on the road for longer.

With over 30 years’ experience selling New and Used cars, you can trust Chapelhouse, where our name means a great deal.

Name: Forces Cars Direct
Description:
Established in 2001, Forces Cars Direct specialises in Forces discounts and tax free car sales to serving and ex-serving members of  the Armed Forces. Since then, we have sold over 22,000 cars saving just under £166 million for all our customers combined. 

We take the hassle out of buying a new vehicle and are dedicated to getting you the best all-round package thanks to our close partnerships with vehicle manufacturers. There’s no need to worry, we arrange everything from finding the right vehicle to sorting out your part exchange, arranging your finance, and we even offer specialised Forces insurance! We liaise with your local dealership to arrange a convenient local collection for you, in conjunction with our specialist discounts. 

Forces Cars Direct is your one-stop-shop, from initial enquiry, to order, delivery and beyond, let us take care of you.

Name: Auto Declic
Description:
Created in 2005, AUTO DECLIC is a company dedicated exclusively to professionals, and specialized in the purchase and sale of new and used vehicles. Private sales: We select for you the best used vehicles available on the market, at competitive prices.

Name: Mazzini
Description:
2.el Otomotiv denildiğinde ilk olarak Oto Galeriler akla gelmektedir. Oto Galeriler, ne yazık ki insanların aklında hoş olmayan bir fikir doğurmaktadır. Geçmişten günümüze dayanan sektör içerisindeki profesyonel olmayan kişi veya kişilerin şeffaflıktan uzak, otomobil satış politikaları bu güvensizliğin başlıca nedeni olmuştur. Müşterilerin sektöre olan inançları her geçen gün azalarak günümüze gelinmiştir.
Mazzini, müşterilerine otomobilden önce güven satma ilkesini benimsemiştir.   Mazzini, müşterilerine son derece şeffaf olmayı benimsemiş, satış politikaları ile sektöre ciddi farkındalık kazandırmıştır.
Mazzini, “2.elde keyif sürdürür” sloganı ile 1969 yılında otomotiv sektöründeki macerasına başlayan ve bugün 2.nesil olarak Mazzini markası ile değerli müşterilerine hizmet veren Ege Bölgesinin en büyük kuruluşu haline gelmiştir.  
Mazzini bünyesindeki araçları müşterilerine sunarken araçları kategorilere ayırmıştır. Bütün araçların özgeçmişlerini en ufak detayları bile gözden kaçırmadan şeffaf bir şekilde sunarak sektördeki güvenilirliğini en üst düzeye çıkarmıştır.
Grande, Mazzini’nin kusursuzluğu ifade eden markasıdır. Grande kategorisindeki araçların, lokal , parça boyalı ve değişen parçası kesinlikle bulunmamaktadır. Grande kategorisindeki araçlar ayrıca bayi çıkışlı olup,   orijinal kilometre garantisindedir. Mazzini, Grande markası ile %100 Orijinalliği sembolize eder.
 “m2”, Mazzini’nin şeffaf politikasının taşıyıcı gücüdür. Mazzini “m2” ile boyalı ve değişen parçalı araçlarını fiyat/kalite dengesini en iyi şekilde kurarak tüm şeffaflığı ile müşterilerine sunmaktadır. “m2” kategorisindeki araçlarda bayi çıkışlı olup orijinal kilometre garantisi verilmektedir.
Sonuç olarak, Mazzini, 2.el Araç satışına yeni bir bakış açısı getirmeyi, bu vizyon içerisinde her zaman yeniliklere açık olmayı felsefe edinmiştir…

Name: Al Falah Auto
Description:
Established in 1969, Al-Falah Group is one of Saudi Arabia's longest-standing groups in the automotive, rental, transport, and logistics sectors.

The Group includes three main companies:

Al-Falah Auto – New vehicle sales and supply.

Al-Falah Car Rental – Providing operational leasing and daily rental solutions.

Al-Falah Transportation – Providing heavy and light transport services and logistical support to the business and government sectors.

The Group serves its clients in both the government and private sectors through strategic partnerships with major brands like Toyota, Nissan, Ford, and General Motors, maintaining a commitment to reliability, quality, and nationwide reach.

Al-Falah Group aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 by adopting smart transportation systems, digital fleet management, and artificial intelligence solutions to enhance efficiency and sustainability.

Name: Dick Hannah Dealerships
Description:
Family. Integrity. Respect. Purpose.

These four simple words, our core values, are the guiding principles of our business. Family-owned since 1949, Dick Hannah Dealerships has grown to become one of the most well respected and trusted automobile companies in the region.

We are steadfastly dedicated to conducting business in a way that promotes the highest principles of integrity and ethical behavior while maintaining a positive, encouraging and productive work environment. We believe in supporting our community - our employees, our local environment and our neighbors. We are honored to be partnered with organizations such as the Boys and Girls Clubs of Southwest Washington, the Children's Cancer Association, the Southwest Washington Medical Center, the National Arbor Day Foundation, the Washington State School for the Blind and The United Way.

Headquartered in Vancouver, Washington - Dick Hannah Dealerships employs nearly 900 people and generously supports charitable, educational, and environmental initiatives in our day-to-day operation. We’re proud to be deeply rooted in our community and we plan to stay that way.

Description:

Conscient que la performance du Groupe passe aussi par la satisfaction et l’engagement de ses collaborateurs, nous accordons une place très importante à la gestion des Ressources Humaines et au bien-être des collaborateurs. Nous cherchons à développer l’implication de nos équipes et leur capacité à recommander Oxylio auprès de leur entourage.
 
Fort d’un esprit combatif et de cohésion, le Groupe Oxylio recrute régulièrement de nouveaux talents souhaitant s’impliquer dans la réussite de l’entreprise. Chez nous, l’évolution est un pilier de notre politique RH. Si vous reconnaissez dans ces quelques lignes des valeurs qui vous sont communes, intégrité, combativité, partage, engagement notamment, alors rejoignez-nous !

Name: Group 1 Land Rover
Description:

Whether you are looking for a new or Approved Used Land Rover, servicing, parts or accessories, our friendly and helpful team at our 10 Group 1 Land Rover retailers will deliver unrivalled choice and value for money, while satisfying your motoring requirements.

Our experienced staff at each of our Land Rover retailers will ensure that your purchasing experience is as pleasurable as possible and that the level of aftercare service during ownership meets these high standards too.

We look forward to welcoming you to one of our Group 1 Land Rover retailers.

Name: Liquid Fleet Ltd
Description:
With over 40 years of rental and leasing expertise behind us, Liquid Fleet is an FN50 ranked company that offers a refreshing customer-focused approach to supplying the short-term rental market.

Our combination of in-house underwriting and fair wear and tear return standards mean we are here to serve our clients with the best rates and service in the marketplace.

If you're looking for an alternative supplier of vehicles with excellent rates then call us on 01952 691025 or email sales@liquidfleet.com. It is easy to open an account and you'll be delighted with the service.

Name: Kroymans Ferrari
Description:
Mon - Fri: 9 AM - 6 PM | Sat: 10 AM - 5 PM

Since 1972, Kroymans in Hilversum is the address for purchase, maintenance and repair of both new and pre-owned Ferrari's.

Kroymans started the official import of the famous brand early in the 70s. The clientele grew steadily and in a few decades Kroymans Ferrari became a well-known name in Europe.

You can contact us for original parts and Genuine Accessories for every type of Ferrari. But also for the certification of your classic Ferrari you have come to the right place: we are officially Classiche Certification Center. Our passion for cars, our knowledge of the market and our technical expertise enable us to serve you in the most professional way. 

You are more than welcome in our Ferrari showroom.

Ciao e arrivederci!

Name: Auto Republic LLC
Description:
With years of experience serving the area, our dealership is dedicated to offering high-quality, pre-owned vehicles to our customers.

From the moment you walk through our door, we’re committed to providing you with a great car-buying experience. With our skilled sales staff and our wide variety of financing options, we’ll help you get the vehicle you want, at the great price you deserve. 

With many vehicle shopping options available, we differentiate ourselves by understanding our local car-buying community and satisfying its needs; helping valued local customers like you, find the vehicle that’s the “right fit”.

Name: Porsche Centre South Lakes
Description:
Porsche Centre South Lakes is family run and has been part of the Porsche family since 1957. As the oldest Porsche Centre in the UK with over 60 years of Porsche experience, we have a wealth of Porsche knowledge. 

Our begging's were in the South Lakes town of Kendal, the gateway to the Lake District National Park and our current Centre is located just off Junction 35 of the M6 near Carnforth. With some of UK's best driving roads on our door step Porsche Centre South Lakes is here to meet all your Porsche needs including new and Approved Pre-Owned vehicles, as well as Servicing and Parts

Name: Hahn Gruppe
Description:
Die Hahn Gruppe, ein Familienunternehmen in vierter Generation, ist mit den Marken Volkswagen, Volkswagen Nutzfahrzeuge, Audi, Porsche, Škoda, SEAT und CUPRA eine der größten Automobilhandelsgruppen in Deutschland und hat sich in den vergangenen Jahren eine führende Marktposition in der Metropolregion Stuttgart erarbeitet. In 36 Betrieben an 17 Standorten beschäftigt die Hahn Gruppe rund 1.750 Mitarbeiter, davon rund 220 Auszubildende.

Impressum: https://www.hahn-gruppe.de/de-de/impressum

Name: Strategy Corporation - شركة الاستراتيجي للتجارة
Description: عبدالله صالح البازعي وكيل سيارات KGM في المملكة العربية السعودية | فخر الصناعة الكورية .

Name: Carbase UK
Description: We aim to provide our team of over 200 staff members with a positive, friendly, and ambitious working environment which encourages them to meet and exceed their personal and professional expectations. At Carbase, we are incredibly passionate not just about our roots, but also about the future that our team is working hard to build for us. It is this passion, determination, and drive from everyone who works at Carbase which has resulted in our success.

Name: Iconic Auctioneers
Description: Iconic Auctioneers is a world-class, specialist auction house for the sale of classic, competition, modern and collectors’ cars, modern and historic motorcycles, as well as automobilia and collectibles.

Name: Charles Hurst Ferrari
Description:
Charles Hurst Ferrari is located on Boucher Road Belfast and we are part of the Charles Hurst Group. As the only Official Ferrari dealer in Ireland, we offer both new and approved Pre-owned Ferraris, our showroom and our Service centre are both in the same location, for your convenience.

The Ferrari of your dreams could be in our Ferrari Approved Pre-Owned selection, or if you are looking for a new model you will have the opportunity to design your car to your prefered specification. We will help you find the perfect Ferrari for you and ensure that it remains at optimum performance. Our Approved models are Certified through the Pre-Owned Programme, which features a series of rigorous technical checks prior to approval. Our Repairs and servicing are provided by our expertly Ferrari-trained Service team here at the dealership.

We are proud to be recognised as a Classiche Officina dealership, allowing us to maintain, repair and certify Classic Ferrari models. This is testament to our ongoing commitment to the marque, its heritage and our clients who have invested in the world's best driving experience, ensuring that these classic supercars continue to receive the treatment they deserve.

Our passion and enthusiasm shine through in our professional service, by understanding the needs of our customers, we have developed a reputation for excellence. There is no request too small. Contact us today for further information and to arrange a test drive or service. Our team look forward to introducing you to the exciting and thrilling world of Ferrari.

Opn Hrs: Mon-Wed,Fri: 9am - 5.30/ Thrs: 9.am - 8pm

Name: V12 Automobil
Description:
Welcome to V12 Automobil - Specialists in sourcing, selling and financing exceptional cars.

We are a well established high-performance and supercar dealer located in London. Providing exceptional service to a wide range of clientele; from sourcing and sales, to ensuring unrivalled levels of preparation. We can ensure your car is wrapped, detailed and delivered to your driveway ready for you to enjoy.

From everyday drives to performance supercars, our combined experience of 30+ years across the car industry ensures you’re in the safest hands. We continually stock and source a wide selection of the most desirable luxury vehicles on the market; everything we do is built on a passion for cars and people coupled with an extensive knowledge of the industry.

Get in touch with us today to arrange your viewing appointment or sourcing needs.

V12 Automobil Limited is an independent car dealer and asset finance broker, not a lender, as such we can introduce you to a wide range of finance providers depending on your requirements and circumstances. We are not independent financial advisors and so are unable to provide you with independent financial advice. V12 Automobil Limited may receive payment(s) or other benefit from the finance provider if you decide to enter into an agreement with them. Our Privacy Notice and Complaints Procedure can be found on our website. V12 Automobil Limited is an appointed representative of AFS Compliance Ltd which is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority under number 625035. V12 Automobil Limited is a Franchisee of Asset Finance Solutions (UK) Ltd.

Name: Planetmoto
Description: Planetmoto merupakan dealer jual beli motor bekas dari Planet Ban.

Name: Distinxion
Description:
Avec plus de 20 ans d’existence et plus de 120 points de vente sur le territoire, le Réseau Distinxion bénéficie aujourd’hui d’une vraie reconnaissance du public. Le sérieux de la marque, l’engagement humain et les valeurs fondatrices de l’enseigne sont autant de forces qui permettent au Réseau de continuer son évolution et son développement. Que vous souhaitiez renforcer votre image, cibler une nouvelle clientèle ou encore diversifier votre activité, le Réseau vous accompagne dans la réalisation de vos projets.

Constituée de plus de 5 000 véhicules toutes marques, la bourse d’échange Distinxion vous assure de répondre sans aucune réserve aux demandes de vos clients. La mutualisation des stocks vous permet d’élargir votre offre et de vendre vos véhicules aux Distributeurs du Réseau. Aujourd’hui, les acteurs du Réseau commercialisent des véhicules d’occasion Distinxion et Zéro KM et peuvent choisir parmi plus de 40 marques.

Les équipes de Distinxion mettent en place tout au long de l’année des opérations de promotion des ventes au niveau national permettant de relayer les offres du Réseau. Au niveau local, Distinxion vous accompagne autour d’évènements ponctuels tel que les foires exposition, les portes ouvertes ou toutes manifestations sportives que vous souhaitez sponsoriser. Distinxion mise sur la communication digitale en proposant un site autos.fr dans lequel chaque Distributeur se reconnait et qui incarne une véritable vitrine du Réseau. Nous déployons des efforts marketing pour continuellement développer des actions d’acquisition multicanal et de fidélisation des clients.
Location: Saint Herblain Cedex, Pays de la Loire

Name: Spirits of Speed
Description:
Specialists in automotive sales and after sale services.
Spirits of Speed was established in 2018 as an automotive trade hub with the introduction of the first Rolls-Royce Motor Cars dealership in Spain, addressing the growing demand for luxury vehicles in the country. Next, we acquired the dealership for Rimac Automobili in the entire Mediterranean region along with becoming the official distributors of Koenigsegg in Barcelona. To further expand, we also acquired the official dealership for Czinger, and Novitec in Barcelona, giving customers the ability to choose from a wide range of vehicles according to their individual needs. Our state-of-the-art workshop in Barcelona is fully equipped to handle the service needs of all automotive brands at competitive prices, along with a car hotel service, following the highest of quality standards to ensure your vehicle is taken care of in the right way. The vision of Spirits of Speed is to be a global powerhouse in the automotive trading sector by expanding and onboarding all vehicle brands. Spirits of Speed is the one stop solution to all your automotive needs.

Name: NBT Brunei (Inchcape)
Description:
Inchcape is the leading global automotive distributor with operations in more than 40 markets around the world. The new and changing world of mobility is a source of growth and opportunity, waiting to be realised.

By combining our in-market expertise with our unique technology and advanced data analytics, we create innovative customer experiences that deliver outstanding performance for our partners – building stronger automotive brands and creating sustainable growth. Inchcape’s role is to accelerate performance of our mobility company partners, unlocking opportunities through our people and technology. 

Our distribution platform connects the products of mobility company partners with customers, and our responsibilities span product planning and pricing, import and logistics, brand, and marketing to operating digital sales, managing physical sales and aftermarket service channels. Our value proposition to partners is built on the core foundations of bringing exceptional standards and responsible partnership to everything we do.

As an Inchcape company, NBT Brunei is the authorised distributor of Toyota and Lexus in Brunei, provides a full range of aftersales services and operates a successful Used Car business.

NBT Brunei is a trusted brand name with the residents of Brunei and is a strong partner with Toyota and Lexus in country. Under NBT Brunei’s strategic leadership, Toyota has been the #1 brand for 43 consecutive years. Lexus managed to attain #1 position in their respective categories in Brunei, and Lexus has the 2nd highest market share globally outside of Japan.

NBT champions the Customer 1st Journey which prioritizes excellent customer experiences internally and externally, and introduced the Friends of the Earth programme under the Responsible Business agenda.

NBT Brunei is part of the Inchcape South Asia & Pacific cluster in APAC, alongside the growth markets of Philippines, Guam, Saipan and Thailand.

Name: Motozite
Description: Motozite is a one-stop platform for luxury car customers where customers can not only buy a new or pre-owned car but also sell or trade-in their existing car. Motozte offers a specially curated inventory of pre-owned luxury cars that include a wide range of certified cars, which are thoroughly inspected, non-meter tempered, and non-accidental, through our trusted and authorized OEM dealer partners. Simply pick your favorite car, take a test drive and choose from a range of ownership solutions provided by our partners. Sell your car to our trusted partners or trade-in to upgrade to a new one. Our partners provide doorstep services, so sit back, relax and buy or sell your car at the comfort of your home.

Name: Ocean Group
Description: Ocean is Devon and Cornwall's locally owned BMW, MINI and Motorrad retail group.  At Ocean we have dedicated Sales, Aftersales and Bodyshop teams who pride themselves in delivering exceptional service. We have retail locations in Plymouth, Torbay and Falmouth and are ideally placed to service Devon and Cornwall for all your BMW, MINI & Motorrad requirements.

Name: Réseau Sofipel
Description:
Né en 1993 d'une société d'affrètement vieille de 90 ans, notre groupe s'est développé pour devenir un acteur incontournable de la région, avec 27 entités réparties en Bretagne, Normandie et Pays de la Loire.
Initialement spécialisé dans le véhicule d'occasion, Sofipel a su diversifier ses activités pour maîtriser l'ensemble de la chaîne d'activité automobile. Cette diversification, garante de notre indépendance, s'appuie sur 27 entités complémentaires :

Vente de véhicules d'occasion :
J.Bervas Automobiles : véhicules d'occasion multimarques
Premium Autostore : occasions haut de gamme de moins de 75 000 km
Kersaint Autostore occasions haut de gamme de moins de 150 000 km
Sélection Autostore : véhicules et  utilitaires d’occasion récente
Hyper Auto : véhicules d'occasion à prix mini
Le Temple Automobile : véhicules d'occasion multimarques et entretien de véhicules

Vente de véhicules neufs :
MG Brest 
Honda Brest, Quimper, Lorient, Vannes, Rennes, Saint-Malo
Suzuki Brest

Pièces détachées :
Caréco Brest : pièces automobiles neuves et d'occasion, recyclage automobile

Carrosserie :
Kersaint Carrosserie et Guipavas Carrosserie : réparation carrosserie

Transport :
Transports Pelleau : transporteur depuis plus de 90 ans

Name: Grupo Haimovich
Description:
Concesionaria Oficial de Volkswagen y Toyota en Entre Ríos.

Somos una empresa con más de 80 años de trayectoria en el mercado automotor, reconocida por nuestra solidez, profesionalismo y compromiso con el desarrollo de la región.

Creemos en el trabajo en equipo y en las personas como motor del crecimiento. El compromiso, el talento y la dedicación de quienes forman parte de Haimovich son clave para construir relaciones de largo plazo y alcanzar la excelencia en todo lo que hacemos.

Name: Axlerator
Description:
At Axlerator we are orchestrating a paradigm shift in the pre-owned commercial vehicle ecosystem. We transcend the conventional marketplace by architecturing a seamlessly integrated, full-stack platform that redefines trust and value.

We curate a portfolio of meticulously vetted trucks through our proprietary 200-point inspection, ensuring unparalleled quality assurance. Our model is elegantly simplified: direct acquisition, transparent pricing, and a comprehensive suite of in-house financial and insurance solutions tailored for the discerning buyer.

This is not merely commerce; it is the cultivation of a trusted ecosystem where every transaction is underpinned by integrity, sophistication, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. We are not just selling vehicles; we are delivering certainty.

Name: SIXT Always Yes
Description:
SIXT Always Yes is the first operational leasing company in Romania and one of the top Rent a Car and Operational Leasing companies on the local automotive market. SIXT Always Yes is unique in its “One-Stop Shop System” and its Always Yes concept. SIXT Always Yes is a market leader in its activities, as a direct result of concentrating on providing top quality services, flexibility, tailor made solutions, and partnership to our clients and stakeholders.

Through the „One-Stop Shop System”, SIXT Always Yes offer all the services under the same umbrella: operational leasing (www.sixtleasing.ro), rent a car (www.sixt.ro), SH cars (www.sixtsh.ro), new cars (authorized dealer Renault – www.renault-unionmotors.ro) and workshop service – one of the largest in Romania (authorized Dacia, Renault and multi-brand – www.union-motors.ro).

SIXT Always Yes strategy is to be flexible and to create tailor made solutions for our clients. Starting from this objective, we created the „One-Stop Shop System”, offering integrated services at the best possible price to value. Our clients have the possibility to choose one or another service, depending on their concrete needs at any given moment. Majority of our clients are using most of our business units at once.

Also, due to our Group synergy, having together the rent a car and the operational leasing business units under the same umbrella, we are creating for SME’s and Start-Up companies the possibility to access the benefits that largely only the big companies have. 

A main differentiator is our people driven and inspired by the Always Yes concept. Our team is motivated, young, and creative, which really makes a difference in a competitive market. We always see the client as a partner and aim to tailor made innovative and flexible solutions to our clients’ needs.

Name: Riverside Motor Group
Description:
AM100 Group of franchise dealerships.
8 sites across Yorkshire in Doncaster, Wakefield, Hull, Leeds and Barnsley established since 1982.
Authorised Volvo, Polestar, SEAT, CUPRA, Mitsubishi, Honda retailers and Sports & Prestige retailers.

Name: PAROT AUTOMOTIVE
Description:
Filiale PAROT, Ford - PAROT est votre distributeur Ford. Retrouvez un large choix de véhicules neufs ou d'occasion labellisés.

PAROT, c'est également :

- Des solutions de financement adaptées
- Des services après-vente dédiés (entretien, mécanique, dépannage, carrosserie)
- Produits dérivés : assurances, contrats d’entretien, gestion du parc ...
- Plages d’ouverture des ateliers adaptées à la clientèle.

Retrouvez-nous dans le Grand Sud-Ouest : 
Angoulême, Bergerac, Bègles, Brive, Bruges, Cahors, La Teste-de-Buch, Langon, Libourne, Limoges, Lormont, Périgueux, Rochefort, Saintes, Sarlat, Tulle.

Il y a toujours une concession Ford - PAROT proche de chez vous.
Nous sommes à votre service, alors n'hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Name: Cuimo
Description:
Cuimo está transformando la forma de comprar y vender motos en España.

Nuestro modelo digital, rápido y transparente, permite descubrir, financiar y comprar motos de segunda mano certificadas, así como vender tu moto de forma ágil y segura, todo desde el móvil.

Con casi 1.000 motos disponibles, trabajamos en toda la península, y gestionamos los concesionarios de motos reacondicionadas más grandes de la Comunidad de Madrid y la Comunidad Valenciana.

La satisfacción de nuestros clientes es nuestro principal motor: contamos con 4,7 en Google (+2.000 reseñas), 4,5 en Trustpilot (+400 opiniones) y un NPS histórico de ~90, respaldados por un equipo joven, profesional y apasionado que pone siempre a los moteros en el centro.

Cuimo combina lo mejor del mundo digital y físico para ofrecer la experiencia más confiable y completa de compraventa de motos en España.

Name: Groupe Bertrand
Description:
Le Groupe Bertrand, entreprise familiale, créée en 1967.
Concessionnaire Renault, Dacia, Nissan, Hyundai, Honda, Suzuki, MG Motor & Isuzu dans les Vosges, en Haute-Saône, dans le Haut-Rhin et le Territoire de Belfort.

www.groupeguybertrand.fr
Location: Saint Etienne les Remiremont, Grand Est

Name: Grupo M. & Costas
Description:
O Grupo M. & Costas, S.A., presente no setor automóvel há mais de 70 anos com reconhecido sucesso, representa as marcas Audi, Škoda, Volkswagen, Volkswagen Veículos Comerciais, SEAT, CUPRA, Hyundai e Honda, nos distritos de Braga e Viana do Castelo. 

A nossa longa experiência com as marcas que representamos, concedeu-nos reconhecida credibilidade no nosso sector de actuação e permitiu-nos a obtenção da Certificação de Qualidade ISO 9001, emitida pela TÜV Rheinland.
Desde então, temos superado com excelência todas as Auditorias de Qualidade a que anualmente nos submetem, e que comprovam o nosso rigor e melhores práticas de trabalho.

Possuímos todos os equipamentos e ferramentas especiais, necessárias para efectuar qualquer tipo de intervenção às viaturas, disponibilizando aos nossos clientes manutenções regulares, serviços ao abrigo da garantia contratual, bem como reparações de carroçarias.

O facto de trabalharmos com uma equipa técnica especializada, em formação contínua e altamente motivada, permite-nos alcançar vantagens competitivas de sucesso junto dos nossos Clientes, com os quais desejamos desenvolver uma relação de confiança e sustentável no longo prazo.

Temos como pilares a inovação, a qualidade e a orientação para o Cliente, com um forte investimento no aperfeiçoamento constante dos meios técnicos e humanos.

Name: Trinity Motors
Description:
Trinity Motors
www.trinitymotors.ie

Trinity Motors is a family-owned dealership group representing seven leading car brands across Wexford and Wicklow. Since 1995, we’ve been committed to delivering a friendly, personalized service. Whether you’re looking for a new or pre-owned car or van, we have a wide range to choose from, and we’ll even deliver it anywhere in Ireland.

Our Shop Click Drive feature makes it easy to reserve your car online with just a small deposit. We also offer a car sourcing service to help you find the perfect vehicle for your needs.

As main dealers for Volkswagen, Škoda, Peugeot, Mazda, Fiat, Jeep, and Fiat Professional, we’re your trusted destination for sales, service, and expertise.

Through our Trinity Fleet Solutions, we also provide flexible rental and leasing options. You can learn more at www.trinityleasing.ie.

PROUD ŠKODA DEALER OF THE YEAR 2025
Trinity Motors, Great People, Great Cars.

Name: Eco Fleet Solutions
Description: New car PDI centre with trade plate and transported delivery options for both new and used vehicles. bookings@ecofleetsolutions.co.uk

Name: Cariva UAE
Description:
While CARIVA is a startup, we bring over 50 years of experience in the automobile industry as part of the A. A. Al Moosa Enterprises—the powerhouse behind some of the biggest companies in the UAE. This deep-rooted expertise ensures that we uphold the highest standards of service, quality, and customer satisfaction.

At CARIVA, we believe that buying a car should be easy, reliable, and built on trust. That’s why we offer only the best quality pre-owned cars, carefully inspected and maintained to meet the highest standards. Whether you're looking for a stylish sedan, a spacious SUV, or a dependable daily driver, CARIVA guarantees excellence in every vehicle.

Name: NGP Group
Description:
The NGP Group is a leading automotive group in Australia employing approximately 1,300 people in Victoria, New South Wales, Queensland. and the Australian Capital Territory.  The company represents some of the world's leading automotive brands including BYD, Volkswagen, Toyota, Ford, Nissan, Subaru and Mazda.

The original company, Wright Ford Motors, consisted of the City Ford dealership at Woolloomooloo, Sydney and was the first dealership under the leadership of the NGP Group's founder, Mr Nick Politis.

Name: mobbi
Description:
PT Astra Digital Mobil (mobbi) adalah platform jual beli mobil bekas online yang merupakan bagian dari PT Astra International Tbk yang berfokus kepada penjualan, pembelian maupun tukar tambah mobil bekas secara on-demand.

mobbi didukung oleh berbagai anak perusahaan otomotif Grup Astra yang tersebar di berbagai wilayah di Indonesia. mobbi hadir untuk menjawab kebutuhan pasar akan jual beli dan tukar tambah mobil bekas yang transparan, cepat dan aman. 

Jual, beli, tukar tambah mobil bekas di mobbi juga semakin mudah dengan sistem pembayaran on-demand yang fleksibel dan aman berkat dukungan ekosistem Astra Financial yang terintegrasi langsung di website atau mobile apps mobbi.

Name: Europamotors
Description:
A Europamotors oferece veículos com alta qualidade, luxo e competência que só a Mercedes-Benz tem. Compromete-se com um pós-venda como: serviço de qualidade e peças genuínas, fazendo com que nosso cliente tenha todo o apoio necessário para seu carro.

Pertence ao Grupo De Nigris e está no mercado desde 1995 com uma organização empresarial que já atua há mais de 40 anos no mercado de veículos comerciais Mercedes-Benz. Em 2003, o market share da marca aumentou com a loja de Campinas – São Paulo, tornando-se a única concessionária da cidade que trabalha com as marcas mundialmente conhecidas Mercedes-Benz, Chrysler, Dodge e Jeep. Em 2006 obteve uma nova concessionária em São José dos Campos – SP, concessionária voltada para o segmento de caminhões e veículos.

A empresa conta com uma equipe de mecânicos, consultores e vendedores de alto nível profissional, sempre dispostos a obter as melhores soluções para os nossos clientes. Preocupação total com o treinamento de nossos consultores, seja ele interno ou realizado na fábrica. O grupo Europamotors proporciona a seus funcionários a chance de aprimorar seus conhecimentos sobre as inovações e novidades mundiais das marcas Mercedes-Benz, Chrysler, Dodge e Jeep.

Name: Cars and Credit Master
Description:
"Cars and Credit Master" is a pre-owned car dealership group that offers financing on "newer cars" and "luxury vehicles" to consumers who otherwise could not obtain financing due to bad or no credit history. 

At "Cars and Credit Master," we all come to work every day because we want to solve the biggest problem in affordable auto financing. We are obsessively passionate about it, and our mission is to help people with less than good credit to meet their transportation needs by offering late model vehicles from compact to luxury class by providing best-in-class financing. 

Our customers say it best, Google reviews rave about us but nothing matches the experience of being part of our team. 

We are dedicated to bringing diversity of thought and talent. To learn more about our goals in becoming a regional and national player and grow with us, reach out to one of our teammates!

Name: Grupo Amazon Fuji
Description:
Fundado em 2021 com a junção de concessionárias Fuji Nissan e Amazon Volkswagen, combinando mais de 30 anos de experiência.
Atualmente contamos com 5 concessionárias nas regiões da Perdizes, Cambuci, Vila Guilherme e Mooca, atendendo os principais pontos de São Paulo.
Juntando o melhor de dois mundos, o Grupo Amazon Fuji oferece aos clientes a tecnologia e inovação da Nissan juntamente com o tradicionalismo e segurança dos carros Volkswagen, isso tudo em um só lugar.
Com mais de 30 anos no mercado, nosso compromisso é oferecer o melhor atendimento e experiência ao cliente, sempre prezando pelo bem-estar dos nossos colaboradores e satisfação dos nossos clientes.

Venha fazer parte de um grupo em crescimento, faça parte do Grupo Amazon Fuji!

Name: Grupo Open Veículos
Description:
Quantos quilômetros podem ser rodados em 20 anos?
Quantas viagens e quantas memórias podem ser construídas? 
Quantos sonhos e quantas realizações alcançadas?
O Grupo Open está há mais 20 anos no mercado, hoje abrangendo 3 marcas, sendo elas Hyundai, Mitsubishi e Renault, que estão presentes em 4 cidades do Paraná. Com o compromisso de proporcionar experiências únicas a cada veículo vendido e serviços realizados com qualidade. Alinhada aos nossos objetivos, nossa equipe é composta por profissionais comprometidos, responsáveis, dinâmicos, comunicativos e com visão de crescimento.
Buscamos levar esses pontos em consideração também para novas contratações, visando a construção de um bom ambiente de trabalho, de excelentes relações profissionais e a satisfação dos nossos clientes.
Grupo Open, juntos chegamos mais longe!!!

Nossa missão: "Realizar sonhos e oferecer soluções automotivas com qualidade e rentabilidade, conquistando e fidelizando clientes"

Name: Mercedes Groep VDH
Description:
Sinds 20 jaar is Groep VDH uw specialist voor nieuwe Mercedes-Benz personen- en bedrijfswagens. Groep VDH maakt deel uit van de holding Willy Van Doorne International en telt vier vestigingen in Herentals, Mol, Diest en Aarschot. We verkopen Mercedes-Benz personen-, bestel- en vrachtwagens, hebben service werkplaatsen en kunnen buigen op een eigen carrosserieafdeling. 

Samen, met onze 140 medewerkers, zetten we elke dag alles op alles om een duurzame en betrouwbare partner te zijn in mobiliteit. ‘Samen, met de klant’ zoals onze slogan het zegt, met persoonlijke aandacht voor de klant en service op maat.

Wij bieden een ruim aanbod aan van elektrische en plug-in hybride modellen. De wereld verandert, ook mobiliteit verandert, duurzaamheid is daarbij een belangrijke pijler. We brengen de mensen daar waar ze willen zijn, met gepersonaliseerde en duurzame mobiliteitsoplossingen. 

Samen | Betrouwbaar | Duurzaam

‘Samen, met de klant.’ zetten we ons in om te voldoen aan al uw mobiliteitswensen. Daarvoor zijn we afhankelijke van onze medewerkers, zij zijn samen met onze klanten de essentie van ons bedrijf. We zijn allemaal trots op onze firma en de groei die we nog steeds doormaken. Door onze oneindige passie en liefde voor ons vak én de klant willen we dé mobiliteitspartner zijn in onze regio. 

20 jaar zorgen wij ervoor dat onze klanten zorgeloos onderweg zijn. Met ons kwaliteitsvol aanbod en professionele service van Mercedes-Benz voertuigen, ons team van specialisten binnen verkoop en service en onze bijbehorende diensten ontzorgen wij iedere klant. Eerlijk, toegankelijk en oprecht, een mobiliteitspartner waarop u kan bouwen en rekenen! 

Als onderdeel van ‘Ambition 2039’ werkt Mercedes-Benz aan het aanbieden van een CO2-neutraal modelgamma. Mercedes-Benz streeft ernaar dat elektrisch aangedreven wagens al in 2030 goed zullen zijn voor meer dan de helft van de verkopen. Bij Groep VDH doen we er dan ook alles aan om zo duurzaam en innovatief mogelijk te werken.

Name: Vendo su Auto
Description:
¿Cómo empezó vendosuauto.com?

Surge a partir de que empezamos a notar algunas falencias en la compra venta de vehículos entre particulares, tanto del mercado formal como informal.

A raíz de nuestra experiencia y conocimientos, percibimos la escasez de opciones que tiene un dueño a la hora de vender su vehículo y las consecuencias que esto trae. Entre ellas; tener que entregarlo en permuta o venderlo a un intermediario (lo que te genera pérdida de dinero), dejarlo en consignación (dejándote sin transporte propio) o venderlo de manera particular (corriendo riesgos, en desconocimiento de cómo proceder ante la venta).

Es por esto que en el año 2014 decidimos lanzar al mercado un sistema integral de comercialización que supere estas debilidades: VENDOSUAUTO.COM, pionero en el rubro, ofreciendo un servicio rápido, seguro y transparente. Actualmente, somos la única plataforma tecnológica que ofrece un servicio completo y diferencial, permitiendo que sigas usando tu vehículo hasta la venta y sin costo previo, solo abonando la comisión en caso de venta exitosa.

Nuestro compromiso empieza en la toma de las fotos hasta la entrega del vehículo, la presentación de transferencia y seguimiento de la finalización de la misma. Te acompañamos y asesoramos durante todo el proceso, garantizándote seguridad, transparencia, tranquilidad y mejor precio.

Name: Leggat Auto Group
Description:
Welcome to Leggat Auto Group! We are a family-owned business with over 90 years of experience in new and used car sales and service. With 12 car dealerships in Ontario, Leggat Auto Group has thousands of new and used cars in Burlington, Milton, Ancaster, Owen Sound, Collingwood, Toronto, and the surrounding areas.

In 1922, Roy Leggat left the family farm in Stoney Creek, Ontario, and, with a $3,000-loan from his mother, laid the foundation for what one day would become the Leggat Auto Group.

In that year, Roy opened his first automobile dealership in Hamilton, Ontario, on the corner of King and Bay streets.  Every morning, he would arrive at the store at 6 a.m., sweep the shop, wash the windows, light the potbellied stoves, and be ready to open the doors by 8 a.m.

Roy’s first dealership initially sold Ruggles trucks, before switching to Oakland (the forerunner to Pontiac). In 1932, he began selling Chrysler automobiles and continued to do so until 1962.

In the years since its inception, Leggat continues to be a recognizable name in southern Ontario thanks to three consecutive generations of the Leggat family operating the Group. Today, dealerships bearing the Leggat name can be found throughout Ontario in cities such as Burlington, Etobicoke, Milton, Owen Sound, Hamilton, Collingwood, Stouffville and Ancaster, selling top-quality vehicles including Acura, Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, Ford, GMC, Honda, Kia, Mazda, and Toyota.

Name: Porsche Atlanta Perimeter (A Jim Ellis Family Dealership)
Description:
Porsche Atlanta Perimeter, previously known as Jim Ellis Porsche, is celebrating over 30 years of serving Atlanta’s Porsche customers! We are privately owned and operated by the local Jim Ellis family whose first dealership opened in 1971 under the Jim Ellis Automotive Group.

From the very beginning, we made a promise to our customers to uphold ourselves to a higher level of service, customer care, and to foster a true Porsche experience. Luxury, convenience, extraordinary, and everything you'd expect from Porsche. At Porsche Atlanta Perimeter, you can always "Expect The Best!" 

How We Started

Growing up, Mr. Ellis worked on a farm, had a milk and paper route, did construction, ran a concessions business at Grant Park, and ran a laundry route. By the time he completed West Georgia College and Georgia State University in 1957 with a BBA in general management, he had worked also as a prison guard and foreman, sold insurance, IBM Machines and real estate, and held various other jobs to work his way through college.

In 1970, Jim Ellis and his wife Billie took the biggest financial plunge of their lives to establish their own automobile dealership. They sold all of their assets, used all of their savings, cashed in Billie's retirement fund from over 15 years at Georgia Tech, and borrowed the balance to begin Jim Ellis Volkswagen in 1971.

Why choose PLC Group?

	2.	Global Reach. PLC Auction is not just a car auction. It is a global ecosystem, connecting thousands of market participants from different countries. We offer access to international-scale automotive auctions, ensuring fast and reliable processes.
	3.	Digital Vehicle Reports. We design systems that generate comprehensive and detailed vehicle history reports, ensuring that our clients can make informed decisions when selecting a vehicle.
	4.	24/7 Support and Service. Our team of experts is always ready to support clients, ensuring the smooth operation of the platform and the prompt resolution of any issues.
	5.	Experience and Professionalism. Our team has many years of experience in IT development, automotive auctions, and data management. We are proud to help our clients find the best solutions in the automotive industry.

Our goal is to make the process of buying and selling vehicles as transparent, simple, and secure as possible. We continually improve our product, focusing on the needs of our customers and staying in line with the latest trends in the automotive market.

With PLC Group, you’re always one step ahead!

Name: Calandre
Description:
Fondée en 1994, notre entreprise familiale repose sur des valeurs solides : l'engagement qualité envers nos clients, l'esprit d'équipe et une passion commune pour l'excellence automobile.

Depuis 30 ans, nous accompagnons professionnels et particuliers dans leurs projets automobiles, en mettant à leur disposition tout notre savoir-faire et en cultivant une expérience client unique.

Spécialistes des véhicules premium, nous distribuons, finançons et entretenons des voitures originales, haut de gamme et innovantes. Nos acheteurs parcourent le monde pour dénicher des nouveautés, des éditions limitées ou des véhicules de collection. Nos experts sont également à vos côtés pour l’acquisition de véhicules rares, l’importation, et l’homologation de modèles américains exclusifs.

Avec nos nouveaux locaux au cœur du Bassin d’Arcachon, Calandre allie désormais technologie et art de vivre. Sur un espace de plus de 2900 m², nous proposons :

- Un showroom de 400 m² dédié aux véhicules d’exception.
- Une conciergerie automobile pouvant accueillir plus de 90 voitures.
- Un atelier suréquipé pour l’entretien, la réparation et la préparation.
- Des espaces conviviaux incluant un bar, un coin lounge, et une salle de co-working et de séminaire.

Fidèles à notre ancrage régional, nous portons une attention particulière à l’impact environnemental. Précurseurs dans la distribution de véhicules hybrides haut de gamme, puis dans la conversion de moteurs aux biocarburants, nous élargissons aujourd’hui notre offre avec des modèles électriques, ainsi que des SUV de nouvelle génération, mais pas que.

Calandre innove en intégrant des solutions adaptées aux enjeux d’aujourd’hui, tout en préservant la passion et le plaisir de conduire.

Com mais de 35 anos de experiência no setor automóvel, o Grupo Confraria é hoje uma referência nacional na mobilidade, com uma atuação sólida e diversificada nas áreas de comercialização de viaturas novas e usadas, assistência técnica, aluguer e soluções para empresas.

Guiados pela confiança, crescemos com os nossos clientes, investindo em inovação, proximidade e qualidade de serviço. Acreditamos que a mobilidade deve ser simples, acessível e adaptada a cada necessidade — seja no momento da compra, na manutenção ou no aluguer.

O Grupo Confraria é composto por várias marcas que refletem a sua especialização e presença territorial:

AM Leiribéria – Representa as marcas SEAT, CUPRA e DasWeltAuto nas regiões de Leiria, Caldas da Rainha, Coimbra e Anadia.

AM RENT – Aluguer de viaturas para particulares e empresas, com cobertura nacional e entregas em aeroportos.

CJR Motors – Especializada em viaturas usadas e reparadora oficial SEAT em Anadia.

A nossa mais recente evolução é o lançamento de uma nova identidade corporativa, que une todas as marcas sob uma imagem mais moderna, coesa e alinhada com o futuro da mobilidade.

Porque mais do que vender viaturas, oferecemos soluções.
Mais do que serviços, entregamos confiança.

Grupo Confraria
Guiados pela Confiança.

Atualmente o mercado automotivo encontra-se no momento de reinvenções e não para de se adaptar às novas condições de consumo. Crescimento alto de seminovos, aplicações em massa no formato online... Com esses recursos, consegue-se reduzir custos, melhorar o atendimento devido à boa organização das tarefas, garantir a satisfação dos clientes e, dessa forma, atrair cada vez mais clientes para a loja.

Hoje: analítico, nostálgico, objetivo, grande, em processo, básico, convencional,
focado, tradicional, mercado de massa, otimista e confiável.
 
Amanhã: grande, vibrante, melhor da classe, flexível, focado, surpreendente,
mercado de massa, sábio, otimista, confiável e entre as melhores.

A união é a direção certa, e sem dúvidas faz a nossa força. Somos marcas consagradas, clientes
leais, parceiros e colaboradores de valor. Juntos, formamos um Grupo único.

Description:

Established in 1950, Tavcor Motor Group is a family-managed, multi-franchise automotive dealership group headquartered in Port Elizabeth (Gqeberha), South Africa. Our Brands

Our extensive network of dealerships is strategically located in Port Elizabeth, George, Mossel Bay, and Knysna, ensuring accessibility and convenience for our clients.

Our Commitment

At Tavcor Motor Group, our passion lies in our people—both our dedicated staff and valued customers. We prioritize customer satisfaction and employee engagement, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous improvement. Our pioneering approach to business and commitment to delivering unbeatable value have solidified our reputation in the automotive industry.

Sustainability and Community Engagement

We are committed to environmental sustainability and community development. Our recycling programs support various charities, including Buyiselekhaya, Happy Feet, and Cheshire Homes. Additionally, our staff-driven initiatives, such as ERC CARES and the TAVCOR Wellness Program, reflect our dedication to social responsibility and employee well-being.

Join Our Journey

With Carly, you can find the car that suits your lifestyle and when things change, you can change the car to suit your lifestyle.  Own the moment, not the car.

Carly was born out of the knowledge gained through eight years of operating DriveMyCar, the car rental arm of our parent company Collaborate (ASX: CL8). 30 anos de um serviço automóvel de excelência.
 
Com mais de 30 anos de experiência no setor automóvel, a Auto Reno consolidou-se como uma referência na comercialização, manutenção e reparação de veículos automóveis. Desde a nossa fundação em 1993, temos vindo a expandir a nossa presença no mercado, e estamos orgulhosos de anunciar a inauguração em breve de uma nova instalação na Póvoa de Varzim, reforçando assim o nosso compromisso em oferecer serviços de qualidade em diferentes regiões.

Atualmente, contamos com instalações integradas em Paços de Ferreira, Penafiel, Maia e em Viana do Castelo, onde operamos sob a designação Auto Reno Minho. Além disso, a nossa mais recente expansão para a Póvoa de Varzim representa um passo importante no sentido de proporcionar uma maior conveniência aos nossos clientes.

Somos representantes oficiais de uma ampla gama de marcas conceituadas, sendo agora distribuidores autorizados de 14 marcas: Opel, Kia, Peugeot, Citroen, Jeep, Fiat, Abarth, Mitsubishi Motors, Fuso, Isuzu, Maxus, Piaggio Commercial, Fiat Professional e Spoticar. Esta diversidade de marcas permite-nos oferecer uma vasta gama de opções aos nossos clientes, garantindo que encontram a solução perfeita para as suas necessidades.

Mantendo o compromisso com a qualidade, destacamos o nosso departamento de viaturas Usadas - Auto Reno Usados, onde asseguramos que as viaturas usadas disponíveis foram recondicionadas segundo os padrões mais exigentes das marcas que representamos.

Name: Zymo
Description:
Welcome to Zymo – where your journey meets its perfect match! 

In the bustling world of wheels and dreams, Zymo is not just a company; it's your trusted companion in the world of mobility. We started with the simple idea of making car rental as easy as a walk in the park. But guess what? We didn't stop there!

Imagine a place where every road trip is a story waiting to be told, and every drive is an adventure waiting to unfold. That's Zymo for you!

Our Story:
Once upon a time, our founder (who loves roads as much as you do) dreamt of a world where finding the perfect car for your journey is as easy as saying 'hello.' That dream became Zymo, a magical place where cars and journeys find their happily ever after.

What We Do:
From zipping through cityscapes in a zippy hatchback to conquering mountains in a sturdy SUV, Zymo brings you the keys to your dream drive. We're not just about cars; we're about the stories you create behind the wheel.

The Next Chapter – Zymo Cars for Sale:
But wait, there's more to our story! We've embarked on a new chapter, one where you can make those dream drives a permanent reality. Zymo is thrilled to introduce car sales! Now, you can find not just the perfect ride for the weekend but the perfect companion for life.

Why Choose Zymo?

Variety: Whether you're renting or buying, we've got a fleet that suits every style and purpose.
Easy Peasy: Booking a car or buying one, it's all as simple as a click. We believe in hassle-free experiences.
Affordable Adventures: Quality doesn't have to break the bank. With Zymo, every journey is budget-friendly.
Join Our Adventure:
Ready to hit the road with us? Zymo is not just a service; it's a community of explorers, dreamers, and those who find joy in every turn. Your journey begins with us, and the road ahead is filled with endless possibilities.

At Zymo, we're not just selling cars; we're selling dreams, adventures, and a lifetime of memories. Come, let's drive into the future together!

Name: Al Mulla Rental and Leasing
Description:
Since 1976 and for over 48years, Al Mulla Rental & Leasing Co. has been known to provide the most reliable transportation alternative to owning a new car.  The company houses under its wings ARABA, its flagship rental and leasing operation, and a network of showrooms under SELECT Used Cars and Certified Vehicles.  These distinct businesses are supported by the company's own dedicated ISO certified service centers.  The company’s comprehensive set up, experienced workforce and market credibility have made Al Mulla Rental & Leasing Co. a regional industry leader.

ARABA caters to both public and private sectors, and to personal long-term retail leasing as well as short-term rental requirements.  ARABA also offers a unique chauffeur drive service for corporate and private use on daily and annual basis.

In addition to its ongoing contracts with the Kuwaiti government in the oil & energy fields through education, health and to defense, the company has a long history with diplomatic missions, the U.S. army and other foreign governmental bodies.  On the corporate side, ARABA’s client portfolio includes major Multinationals, Contracting & Construction Companies, Trading Companies, FMCGs, leading Providers of Banking Services, Insurance and Health Services as well as the main players in the Hospitality Industry and Private Schools.  Its fleet today consists of a wide selection of the latest models from Mitsubishi, Toyota, Nissan to Lexus, Mercedes, Chrysler, Dodge, KIA, Hyundai, Chevrolet and GMC; from small sedans to SUVs, buses, commercial and refrigerated vehicles. This not only offers a choice of vehicle types, but also an attractive brand choice within each type in order to accommodate various tastes and styles.

Through deep understanding of the market dynamics and investment in the right product, Al Mulla Rental & Leasing Co. is able to offer end-to-end Fleet Management & Transport Solutions.

Our partnerships with Premium Motor Manufacturers began in 2006 and have significantly expanded over the years. Today, we provide comprehensive support services for roadside assistance, recalls, and customer service events, managing our own fleet of luxury vehicles alongside those supplied by OEMs. This growth has allowed us to establish a truly national service, with 7 strategically located LCH hubs across the UK: Elstree, Cheltenham, Manchester, Coventry, Newcastle, Glasgow, and our newest location in Guildford. These hubs enhance our vehicle capacity and reach while reducing delivery and collection times. Guided by our core values, we are committed to providing positive differentiation through outstanding service delivery in everything we do.

In our 30 years of experience, we have successfully built a vast client network consisting of thousands of satisfied and returning customers who continue to place their trust in us to provide them with the best car deals in Israel. •	PRIVATE OPERATIONAL LEASING- A 36-month leasing plan that frees customers from worries, concerns and any additional expenses on car repair or maintenance (gasoline excluded).

•	CAR SALE- We have a wide variety of new and second-hand vehicles for sale. For our clients’ convenience, we offer up to 100 instalments.

THE SECRET TO OUR SUCCESS
The automotive market is both competitive and challenging. Our company has developed a responsive and flexible working method to fully meet our customers' needs, enabling them to get a great deal they can be happy with:

•	Attractive rates
•	Always placing our clients’ interests first

Our clients appreciate our commitment to the highest standards of service. In return, they reward us with their trust, loyalty and even friendship while becoming our partners in success.

Name: Fitzpatrick's Garage Group Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Fitzpatrick’s Garages, your award-winning home for Hyundai, Leapmotor, Mercedes-Benz, Smart and Opel.

For over seven decades, Fitzpatrick's Garage Group has been at the heart of automotive excellence in Ireland. But where did it all begin?

Fitzpatricks Garage Kildare was founded in the humblest of beginnings in 1951 by Mr. Jimmy Fitzpatrick, down a small laneway in Kildare Town.

In 1968 the original business was re-located to the Dublin Road, in Kildare town and this remains Fitzpatrick's Garage Kildare's current premises and the Group's head office today. The Group now operates from several locations and has showrooms in Kildare Town, Naas, Carlow, and Tullamore, and employs over 150 excellent people.

Fitzpatrick’s have consistently grown and invested significantly in all aspects of its motor business throughout its 74 years in business to become one of the most advanced and progressive motor groups in Ireland.

Our range of brands include Hyundai, Leapmotor, Mercedes-Benz, Smart and Opel. With over 40 years association with the Toyota and Lexus brands, Fitzpatrick's continue to offer Toyota service, genuine parts, warranty and recall services to its customers as Toyota and Lexus Authorised Repairers from its locations in Kildare Town, Naas, Carlow and Tullamore.

While our showrooms may be based beside Dublin in Kildare, Carlow, and Offaly, the reach of Fitzpatrick’s Garage Group stretches across the country to include Galway, Clare, Limerick, and Cork to name a few.

Customers have always been at the heart of the Fitzpatrick’s business. As the motor industry accelerates to electrification, Fitzpatricks prides itself as being progressive, open to change, new technology, and willing to help their customers on this exciting journey.

SEAI ZEVI Electric Dealership of the Year 2022, 2024.
SIMI Bodyshop of the Year 2025

Fitzpatrick's Garage Group Ltd.
Dublin Road, Kildare, R51 Y165.

Name: Dealer BMW MINI Motorrad Bońkowscy
Description:
W imieniu całego zespołu pragniemy powitać Państwa na stronie Dealera BMW i MINI Bońkowscy.
Dominika i Darek Bońkowscy założyciele Spółki, z branżą motoryzacyjną związani są od początku lat 90-tych. Doświadczenie zbierali w dwóch bardzo popularnych na owe czasy markach Fiat i Opel, a także w samochodach ciężarowych IVECO. W 2003 roku połączyli swoje siły i doświadczenie (handlowo/serwisowe), by wspólnie uruchomić stację dealerską marki Toyota w Poznaniu. Całą wiedzę zaimplementowali w nowo powstały obiekt, a także, co ważniejsze w mądrych i ambitnych ludzi, z którymi chcą realizować życiowe pasje.

Obecność w klasie Premium, czyli stawanie do wyścigu z najlepszymi to część strategii rozwoju rodzinnego biznesu. Dealer BMW Bońkowscy obecny jest w Szczecinie od 2007 r. Przez ten okres zbudowaliśmy silną markę emocjonalnie związaną z całym województwem. W ofercie znajdziecie Państwo pełną gamę modeli marek BMW, MINI oraz motocykli BMW. Prowadzimy również sprzedaż samochodów używanych, które bardzo szczegółowo sprawdzamy, zanim pojawią się w ofercie. Naszym Klientom chcemy  zapewnić także doskonały i szybki serwis oraz wiele usług dodatkowych, które każdego dnia uczymy się świadczyć na najwyższym poziomie.

Bardzo ważnym elementem naszej strategii jest aktywny wkład w rozwój regionu. Chcemy wspólnie pracować i budować markę naszego miasta. W ramach tych działań zostaliśmy ambasadorem i partnerem strategicznym trzech ikon Szczecina:
•    Filharmonii im. Mieczysława Karłowicza,
•    Opery na Zamku,
•    Netto Areny.

Jesteśmy firmą aktywnie działającą  na rzecz środowiska. Pierwszym elementem tej strategii jest otwarcie bezpłatnej stacji ładowania samochodów (CH Kaskada Szczecin). W tym zakresie nie powiedzieliśmy jeszcze ostatniego zdania.

Te wszystkie elementy pozwoliły osiągnąć nam pozycję lidera w sektorze marek premium, a także zdobyć kilka prestiżowych wyróżnień m.in. nagrodę w plebiscycie „Orły 2017” organizowanym przez Tygodnik Wprost.

Dominika i Darek Bońkowscy

Name: Fleasing ApS
Description:
Fleasing ApS er et leasingselskab der tilbyder leasingaftaler til både private og erhverv, og kombinationen heraf kaldet splitleasing. Fleasing er et velkapitaliseret leasingselskab med lav gearing finansieret af Spar Nord Bank A/S. Alle vores leasingaftaler kører på egne bøger uden fordyrende mellemled, og vi driver et effektivt leasingselskab med lave faste omkostninger, bl.a. fordi vi ikke holder lagerbiler og har store husleje omkostninger til et showroom.

Qua vores finansielle baggrund er vi stærke i analyser og statistik. Vores rådgivning og leasingtilbud tilpasses hver enkelt kunde. Et rigtigt leasingtilbud tager højde for værditabet på det leasede aktiv og er derfor baseret på kundens forventede kørselsbehov, finansieringsbehov og den ønskede leasingperiode.

I vores leasingtilbud er fuld transparens på start- og restværdi. Afskrivningen tilpasses hver enkelt kundes kørselsbehov og de samlede omkostninger fremgår tydeligt. Vi kigger altid på om kundens ønsker og økonomiske situation passer bedre med import af bilen og betaling af den fulde registreringsafgift, hvilket vi gerne bistår med.

Fleasing ApS betjener overvejende formuende kunder og tilbyder nogle særlige produkter til de kunder der ønsker at medfinansiere end højere andel af bilen mod en billigere leasingydelse. Vores anderledes tilgang kombineret med den meget lave risiko betyder at vi kan tilbyde de mest attraktive priser og vilkår på markedet.

Obs! Kunder der ikke matcher vores kundeprofil henvises til andre leasingselskaber.

Description:

 Le réseau automobile pour les entrepreneurs ambitieux

BH Car propose un concept révolutionnaire d'agences Zéro stock, permettant à nos franchisés de se lancer sans immobiliser de capital dans l'achat de véhicules. Ce modèle flexible permet à chaque partenaire de se concentrer sur le développement rapide de son activité, tout en bénéficiant de l’accompagnement d'une marque solide. Nous offrons des formations sur-mesure, un soutien opérationnel constant et des outils performants pour maximiser vos résultats.

BH Atelier vous donne l’opportunité de rejoindre un réseau spécialisé dans l’entretien et la réparation toutes marques. Nous fournissons à nos partenaires les outils, les formations et l'accompagnement nécessaires pour faire croître leur activité dans des conditions optimales, tout en garantissant une qualité de service reconnue.

BH Pare-Brise vous permet d'accéder à un marché porteur en pleine expansion, avec des solutions clés en main pour le remplacement et la réparation de vitrages automobiles. Grâce à nos partenariats avec les assureurs, nos franchisés bénéficient d'une clientèle régulière et d'une rentabilité stable.

 Pourquoi rejoindre le réseau BH ?
Accompagnement complet : de la création à la gestion quotidienne de votre activité.
Formations continues : via la BH Academy, nous vous préparons aux défis du secteur automobile.
Un réseau dynamique : rejoignez une communauté d'entrepreneurs avec des synergies entre les différentes marques.

Rejoignez un réseau qui valorise et accompagne ses partenaires pour atteindre la performance et l'innovation

Name: Sunflower Trucks Ltd
Description:
**We Buy Used Trucks at Sensible Trade Prices!** 

At **Sunflower Trucks**, we are a reliable and trusted partner for selling your truck. We purchase used trucks of all makes and models, ensuring you receive **sensible trade prices** that reflect the true worth of your vehicle—**the price we offer is the price we pay.** 

 **Fast Payment**: We understand that time is of the essence. That’s why we guarantee quick payment as soon as the deal is finalized—no lengthy processes or delays.

 **Instant Valuation**: Get an accurate valuation of your truck without the hassle! Our team is dedicated to providing fair and transparent assessments, so you know exactly what to expect.

 **All Models Welcome**: We buy trucks of all ages—whether nearly new or very old. No matter the condition, we’re committed to offering you a fair price for your vehicle.

 **Export Specialists**: We don’t just buy trucks for local sales; we also specialize in exporting. If your vehicle is ready for international markets, we have the expertise to facilitate that process.

 **We Also Buy Non-Runners**: Have a truck that’s seen better days? We buy non-runners too, ensuring you can still get a fair price for your vehicle, regardless of its condition.

 **Collection Anywhere in the Country**: We offer convenient collection services, so you don’t have to worry about transporting your truck. No matter where you are located, we’ll handle the logistics for you!

 **We Work Closely with the Trade**: We collaborate with trade professionals to ensure a smooth and efficient selling process for everyone involved.

 **No Limits**: Whether you’re a private individual looking to sell one truck or a business with an entire fleet, we’re here to help. There’s no limit to what we can buy!

 **Reach Out Anytime**: Contact us at **sellyourtruck@sunflowertrucks.com** for inquiries or to get started on your sale.

 **Call or WhatsApp Us**: You can also reach us directly at **07713938408**. Our team

Name: Mercedes-Benz STARMARK
Description:
I mere end 20 år har Starmark leveret nogle af de flotteste brugte biler i Danmark. Og det skal ikke være nogen hemmelighed, at mange kunder har troet vi solgte nye biler. Årsagen hertil er, at hver eneste Starmark bil gennemgår en omfattende klargøring, som ikke efterlader mange spor af de kilometre, de har lagt bag sig. De bliver tjekket efter fabriksstandard og vi bruger flere dage på at pudse lak og læder, så bilerne næsten præsenterer sig som den dag, de rullede af samlebåndet. Med en lang erfaring indenfor salg, køb og klargøring, er vi stolte af at kunne kalde os danmarks største forhandlere af brugte Mercedes-Benz.
  
Du finder Starmark i Vejle og Roskilde

Description:
LixUp - Revolutionieren Sie Ihre Werkstattbeleuchtung

LixUp ist ein innovatives Lichtsystem, das speziell für den Einsatz an Hebebühnen in Werkstätten entwickelt wurde. Unsere schlanken, leistungsstarken LED-Leuchten erleichtern die Arbeit unter Fahrzeugen, indem sie Schäden schneller erkennbar machen und die Effizienz sowie Konzentration verbessern. Unser Beleuchtungssystem ist in nur 20 Minuten montiert und bietet eine helle und gleichmäßige Ausleuchtung mit über 1.075 LEDs auf 4,8 Metern, unterstützt durch einen speziellen Diffusor.

Sicherheit und Produktivität stehen bei LixUp an erster Stelle, da unser System eine vollständige und kraftvolle Ausleuchtung des Arbeitsbereichs ermöglicht. Die Montage erfolgt ohne Bohren und ist dank Plug & Play Steckern für eine einfache Kabelführung und Handhabung konzipiert, sowohl vertikal als auch horizontal.

Mit 18.600 Lumen übersteigen unsere Hochleistungs-LEDs die gesetzlichen Mindestanforderungen zur Arbeitsplatzbeleuchtung deutlich. Nutzen Sie LixUp, um die Vertrauensbasis mit Ihren Kunden zu stärken, indem Sie alle Fahrzeugschäden sichtbar machen und somit den Umsatz steigern.

Entdecken Sie die technischen Features und die enorme Leuchtkraft von LixUp und erfahren Sie, wie unsere Beleuchtungslösungen Ihre Werkstatt verändern können.

Name: CECRA
Description:
CECRA, the European Council for Motor Trades and Repairs is the European umbrella organisation regrouping national professional association representing the interests of the motor trade and repair businesses and European Dealer Councils on behalf of vehicle dealers for specific makes.

The main aim of CECRA is to promote the interests of its members and above all maintain a favourable European regulatory framework for the 380,000 enterprises of motor trade and repair businesses it represents through national associations and European Dealer Councils.  

CECRA provides representation to its members within the European Institutions. CECRA’s work consists of monitoring the work of the institutions, developing and maintaining high representation within the institutions with the aim of following-up as well as influence the decision-making process.  

There is more to the automotive dealer and repair sector than meets the eye. The companies and enterprises CECRA represents are an essential element in our society. In direct contact with the consumers, not only do they sell, maintain and repair cars, trucks, vans and motorcycles … they also play a key role in protecting the environment and are in the front line of road safety.

Name: anycolourcar.com
Description:
Why we are us - No pressure guaranteed!
In today's world, the process of buying or selling a used car can often feel like a journey through time, plagued by outdated practices, frustrating obstacles, and misaligned expectations between customers and dealers.
This is where anycolourcar.com comes into the picture. Our core principle is simple: to revolutionise the experience of buying and selling used cars, making it effortless and enjoyable. We've honed our expertise in procurement, guaranteeing that the price we offer is the price you receive, eliminating the need for tiresome haggling over every minor blemish.
The vehicles we select for retail are not just cars, vans, or trucks; they are handpicked gems, always in high demand, competitively priced, and meticulously prepared to meet the highest standards.
Our approach is not confined to online or offline; it's a seamless blend of both. We offer a straightforward, customer-centric hybrid journey, where you can visit our showroom, opt for convenient home delivery, or take advantage of our efficient click-and-collect service. The power of choice is in your hands, where you decide how you want to experience the process.
At anycolourcar.com, we've dismantled the old paradigm of used car transactions, offering you a modern, hassle-free, and flexible experience. Your journey is our priority!

Name: Landers Auto Group
Description:
If you’ve lived in the mid-south for long, you know the Landers name. The Landers stores have been building a trusted and powerful reputation in the automotive industry. Landers Chrysler was the top-selling Chrysler dealership in the world for years, and Landers Toyota is ranked in the top 20 Toyota dealerships in the United States.

The Landers Auto Group was founded in 1972. In 2014, Landers Auto Group was purchased by Luther Automotive Group and has continued operating under the Landers name. Landers Auto Group is made up of seven dealerships and two collision centers in Arkansas, Oklahoma and Missouri. The Auto Group is one of the largest in the region, with more than 5,000 in-stock vehicles to choose from.

We didn’t become the best auto group in the mid-south by luck, either. Hard work, quality products, large inventories and “Southern hospitality” are all part of the Landers way of doing business. We’ve included some of the best vehicles in the world in our inventory. Our new lineup includes Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Toyota, Mazda, Kia, Cadillac and Chevrolet, and our pre-owned inventory includes cars, trucks, vans and SUVs from nearly every make, including luxury and exotic vehicles not commonly found at other dealerships.

Our dealerships offer a wide range of services, including financing, service, repair, parts and more. Our technicians are all factory-trained professionals who know everything about your vehicle and how to service it. Our facilities also offer top-notch amenities like free coffee and refreshments, comfortable waiting areas and even play areas for children.

Our Oklahoma dealerships are proud partners of Oklahoma Sooner Athletics!

Name: Automotive Leadership Network
Description:
Automotive Leadership Network (ALN) brings together the senior executives from retailers, manufacturers and industry partners, all on an equal platform in an informal environment and safe space governed by Chatham House Rules, to create a level of thought leadership unique in the sector.

Meeting three times a year, with a format devised to cause minimal disruption to business, a typical programme is:

Monday evening from 5.45pm –
networking drinks, dinner and a speaker

Tuesday morning until lunch at 1pm –
a series of short presentations, panel discussions and open debate

ALN is a membership group, with an annual membership fee. Led by Laura Coase, CEO and the strategic governance of the President’s Committee, all of whom are from retailers, manufacturers and industry partners to represent the membership profile.

President:
John M Neill CBE, Executive Chairman, Unipart Group

Vice Presidents:
Darren Ardron, Group MD, Perrys
Laura Brailey, Sales Director, Mazda Motors UK 
Simon Bottomley, COO, Vindis Group
Robert Forrester, CEO, Vertu Motors
Mike Jones, Director, Fast Track Holdings
Julia Muir, Founder, Automotive 30% Club
Steve Nash, CEO, The Institute of the Motor Industry 
Ian Plummer, Commercial Director, AutoTrader
Dale Wyatt, Director of Automobile, Suzuki GB

Automotive Leadership Network (ALN) is a successor to the Automotive Fellowship International (AFI) founded by Ron Sewell in 1994

Name: Grupo Nissul Gala
Description:
Com 26 anos de história no setor automotivo e motociclístico, o Grupo Nissul Gala tem o propósito de oferecer produtos e serviços de procedência, construindo relações sólidas e duradouras com seus clientes. 

Atualmente, o Grupo representa uma seleção de montadoras prestigiadas no mercado, incluindo Caoa Chery, Geely, GWM, Hyundai, Jeep, Ram, Renault e Yamaha.

Presente nas cidades de Bagé, Cachoeirinha, Camaquã, Canoas, Guaíba, Lajeado, Passo Fundo, Pelotas, Rio Grande e Santa Maria, a empresa engloba 17 concessionárias de veículos novos e 3 lojas de seminovos, oferecendo soluções completas em locomoção.

Essa estrutura atende 389 municípios ao redor do Rio Grande do Sul e conta com mais de 350 colaboradores diretamente empregados, que atuam diariamente para o pleno funcionamento das engrenagens.

Mais do que realizar transações comerciais, o Grupo Nissul Gala assume o compromisso com a mobilidade, a segurança e a experiência de cada cliente, contribuindo para conectar pessoas e transformar trajetórias.

Name: Kocaeli Kaya Şirketler Topluluğu
Description:
1961 yılında, İzmit’te Kaya kardeşlerden İsmet ve Hamdi Kaya tarafından temelleri atılan Kocaeli Kaya Şirketler Topluluğu, elektrik & taahhüt sektörü başta olmak üzere bu gün otomotiv, elektrik-taahhüt, sigorta, gayrimenkul geliştirme, yazılım ve yenilenebilir enerji sektörlerinde Kocaeli’nin en girişimci topluluklarından biridir.

Sanayi alanındaki ilk girişimini, 1980’lerde yılında İzmit Köseköy’de kurulan kablo ve pano fabrikasıyla gerçekleştiren KAYA ailesi, bugün ülkemizin Brisa, Pirelli, Danone, Enerjisa, Beksa, Sakosa, Pekintaş Kartonsan, Ford Otosan, Good-Year gibi en büyük şirket ve Holdinglerine hizmet vermiş güçlü kapasite ve üretim modeliyle Bölge ekonomisinin gelişiminde öncü rol oynamış, ilerleyen yıllarda sınırlarını aşarak İstanbul Borsası, Dedeman Otel, Kocaeli Şehir Stadı, Wyndam Otel gibi pek çok ulusal marka ve projenin de üstlenicisi olmuş bir iş ailesidir.

Bu gün Kocaeli Kaya Şirketler Topluluğu, tamamı yerli sermaye ve İsmet Kaya’nın onursal başkanlığındaki ikinci kuşağın yönetiminde İzmit merkez ’de 12.000 m2 alanda toplam 7 şirket, 350 çalışanıyla faaliyet gösteren Kocaeli’nin sınırlarını aşmış̧, köklü̈ ve yenilikçi bir topluluktur.

Topluluk bölgesel kalkınmada aktif bir rol alarak toplumsal hizmetleriyle sosyal gelişmeleri destekleyerek, sürdürülebilir büyüme hedeflerini, müşteri merkezli, çevre ve insan kaynaklarındaki modern yönetim modeliyle bütünleştirmeyi hedeflemektedir.

Name: Mark Motors Group
Description:
Mark Motors Group: A legacy of luxury. Serving the Ottawa community for 65 years, we embody a passion for European automotive excellence. Founded in 1959 by Louis Mrak, an Austrian visionary, we continue to deliver unrivalled luxury automotive experiences. Join us as we redefine elegance on the roads.

Our extensive lineup includes exquisite vehicles from prestigious European manufacturers such as Porsche, Maserati, Alfa Romeo, Jaguar, Land Rover, Volkswagen, Mercedes Benz and Audi.

Our family-owned and operated business was built on hard work and dedication, and these values have been paramount in our growth and success. What sets Mark Motors Group apart is our unwavering dedication to delivering a superior customer experience. For over six decades, we have been building meaningful relationships with our customers, earning their trust and loyalty. We understand that purchasing a luxury vehicle is more than a transaction—it is an emotional and personal experience. That is why we strive to create a welcoming and personalized environment where our customers feel valued and appreciated.

Throughout our long history, Mark Motors Group has remained deeply rooted in the Ottawa community. We take pride in our philanthropic initiatives and strive to make a positive impact beyond the automotive industry. Supporting local organizations, sponsoring community events, and giving back to the people who have supported us are integral parts of our commitment to the community that has embraced us for decades.
