Description:
Los cinco mil colaboradores de Derco en Chile, Perú y Colombia y de Imcruz en Bolivia nos unimos a la empresa de distribución automotriz líder en el mundo, para formar Inchcape Américas.

Inchcape Américas combina las operaciones de dos distribuidoras líderes en América Latina, para ofrecer la más variada oferta de soluciones de movilidad para las personas y las empresas, representando a más de 30 marcas y acompañándolos con una propuesta omnicanal que incluye servicios durante todo el ciclo de vida del vehículo.

Inchcape es una empresa de origen inglés con más de 90 años de trayectoria que opera en más de 40 países en todo el mundo e integra una cartera de negocios diversificada que incluye la venta de vehículos nuevos y usados, repuestos, servicios, mantenimiento, financiación y seguros.
 
En la región, Inchcape Américas está presente en 12 países de América Latina y el Caribe (Chile, Colombia, Perú, Bolivia, Argentina, Uruguay, Ecuador, Panamá, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador y Barbados), empleando a más de 8,000 personas.

Síguenos también en @Inchcapeamericas

Sitio web  http://inchcape.com

Name: CFAO Mobility Mozambique
Description:
Em outubro de 2021, a CFAO deu início às suas operações em Moçambique como distribuidora oficial das marcas Toyota e Hino. Atualmente, o grupo está presente em 45 países em todo o continente africano, consolidando sua presença e experiência na região.
A empresa conta com uma equipe dedicada de mais de 140 colaboradores distribuídos em três locais estratégicos na província de Maputo: a Sede, a Auto Avenida e o Centro Logístico. Essa estrutura permite atender com eficiência as demandas dos clientes e garantir uma experiência de qualidade em todas as etapas.
Além da representação das marcas Toyota e Hino, a CFAO também é distribuidora da marca Suzuki, oferecendo aos clientes uma ampla gama de opções de veículos. A CFAO vende de veículos novos e usados, destacando-se  na prestação de serviços de assistência técnica especializada e na venda de peças de reposição originais, garantindo o melhor atendimento aos seus clientes.
A CFAO está empenhada em fornecer soluções automotivas de alto padrão, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento e crescimento do setor automotivo em Moçambique. Com sua expertise e compromisso com a qualidade, a empresa se posiciona como uma parceira confiável para os clientes que buscam excelência e confiabilidade em suas necessidades automotivas.

Name: Automotive Distribution & Marketing Company Ltd
Description: Automotive, Distribution and Marketing Company (ADMC) is a subsidiary of Ali Zaid Al Quraishi & Brothers Company (AZAQ). With strong heritage, roots, reputation and rich experience in the automotive industry, guided by the business philosophy to “Be the Number Choice”, ADMC is committed to bringing strong global automotive brands to Saudi Arabia, providing quality experience for customers.

Name: TrustFord
Description:
TrustFord is the world’s largest Ford dealer group, operating over 60 sites in the UK, including Northern Ireland and the Channel Islands.

TrustFord forms part of Ford Retail Group and is wholly owned by Ford Motor Company. As well as managing its Ford franchise operation for new and commercial vehicles, the business runs as a multi franchise for used cars, used commercial vehicles, aftersales and parts.  Ford Retail Group also owns and operates 15 Parts Plus sites nationally and 3 Quick Lane sites.

We employ over 3,000 people in the UK in a wide range of roles, from Sales Assistants or Financial Managers to Technicians and Drivers. You can find all our current vacancies on our dedicated careers site www.trustfordjobs.co.uk and listen to our Leading Ladies podcast here - www.trustfordjobs.co.uk/ourpeople/

Name: Volkswagen Group Polska
Description:
VOLKSWAGEN GROUP Polska Sp. z o.o. (VGP) is a complete-owned subsidiary of the parent company, Volkswagen AG. It is the importer, wholesaler and distributor representing 6 brands in the Polish market: Volkswagen, Volkswagen Commercial Vehicles, Skoda, Seat, Cupra and Audi.

The Volkswagen Group with its headquarters in Wolfsburg is one of the world’s leading automobile manufacturers and the largest carmaker in Europe. 

Volkswagen Group Polska was established at the 1.06.2012 as a result of the merger between KPI Polska sp. z o.o. and Skoda Auto Polska S.A., with its local headquarter in Poznan with a dedicated team of approximately 550 people. The Polish subsidiary handles all local aspects of the company’s operations supporting sales growth, spare parts and accessories, and the expanded network of dealerships and service facilities. 

Realizing our mission we cooperate with Authorized Dealers Network and Authorized Services, which we promote to assure a gratifying care about our clients. 

Since many years our brands are content by client’s loyalty. It is a specific elevation and a stimulus for the constant development for us. 

It is the goal to be the best automotive company in the Polish Market by offering attractive, safe and environmentally sound vehicles which are competitive on an increasingly tough market and which set world standards in their respective classes.

Name: SK Automotive
Description:
A SK Automotive é uma das principais distribuidoras de autopeças do Brasil. Fundada em 27 de maio de 1993, atualmente conta com mais de 60 centros de distribuição estrategicamente posicionados pelo país, atendendo todo o território nacional. Aliado a isso, possui um excelente atendimento e a melhor logística, garantindo agilidade e eficiência para seus clientes.

Atuando nas linhas leve, comercial leve, pesada, injeção diesel, acessórios e moto, a SK possui um extenso e qualificado portfólio de produtos, fruto de sua parceria com as melhores indústrias do segmento. Ao todo são 140 linhas, totalizando mais de 45.000 itens entre: motor, freios, embreagens, suspensão, direção, arrefecimento, filtros, injeção, rolamentos e elétricos.

Name: Motorpoint
Description: There's no car like a Motorpoint car. We offer award-winning customer service before and after you buy. Whatever you need, we’re here to help. We have 1,000s of used and nearly new cars to choose from, all under warranty and available at unbeatable prices. We have something to suit every budget and with our price promise, you can be assured that you'll always get the best price for your car.

Name: Sewell Automotive Companies
Description:
The Sewell Family of Dealerships is just that - a family. The secret is in how we treat others, and each other. We don't view ourselves as a car business so much as a service business. That's why generations of people have worked here, and generations of customers have bought their vehicles here. We've even written a book about it - Customers For Life. 

Discover the Sewell experience at our dealerships in Austin, Dallas, Fort Worth, Grapevine, Houston, McKinney, Plano, San Antonio, and Sugar Land. If Sewell sounds like the kind of place you'd like to experience every day, visit our Careers Page.

Name: Caetano Portugal
Description: A Caetano Portugal agrega as empresas do Grupo Salvador Caetano que desenvolvem a atividade de distribuição e reparação automóvel de diversas marcas em Portugal. Abrangendo um vasto leque de áreas de negócio - desde automóveis novos, automóveis usados, assistência oficinal, colisão, reparação e substituição de vidros até comércio de peças e financiamento -, a Caetano Portugal detém uma presença geográfica que se estende por todo o território nacional e que se materializa em mais de 100 pontos de venda oficiais e 85 oficinas autorizadas. Beneficiando do estatuto de maior operador de retalho automóvel do mercado nacional, a Caetano Portugal representa as principais marcas automóveis do mercado - nomeadamente, Audi, BMW, BMW Motorrad, BYD, Dacia, Dongfeng, Hyundai, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, MINI, Peugeot, Opel, Nissan, Renault, Škoda, Toyota, Volkswagen, VOYAH e XPENG -, às quais se juntam a Chevrolet, SEAT e smart na qualidade de reparadores autorizados, e, também, uma marca dedicada à comercialização de viaturas usadas: a Carplus.

Name: Caetano Portugal
Description: A Caetano Portugal agrega as empresas do Grupo Salvador Caetano que desenvolvem a atividade de distribuição e reparação automóvel de diversas marcas em Portugal. Abrangendo um vasto leque de áreas de negócio - desde automóveis novos, automóveis usados, assistência oficinal, colisão, reparação e substituição de vidros até comércio de peças e financiamento -, a Caetano Portugal detém uma presença geográfica que se estende por todo o território nacional e que se materializa em mais de 100 pontos de venda oficiais e 85 oficinas autorizadas. Beneficiando do estatuto de maior operador de retalho automóvel do mercado nacional, a Caetano Portugal representa as principais marcas automóveis do mercado - nomeadamente, Audi, BMW, BMW Motorrad, BYD, Dacia, Dongfeng, Hyundai, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, MINI, Peugeot, Opel, Nissan, Renault, Škoda, Toyota, Volkswagen, VOYAH e XPENG -, às quais se juntam a Chevrolet, SEAT e smart na qualidade de reparadores autorizados, e, também, uma marca dedicada à comercialização de viaturas usadas: a Carplus.

Name: WeVee
Description: Our EcoMute electric car salary sacrifice scheme offers a brilliantly smart way for employees to save on their next electric vehicle. Our innovative approach is not just about making electric cars more accessible for employees; it's about supporting employers in their journey towards corporate decarbonisation, specifically targeting Scope 3 GHG emissions. We understand the importance of climate action and the role that reducing emissions from travel can play in this. By choosing our salary sacrifice scheme, employees can enjoy significant savings on the cost of an electric vehicle, including benefits such as reduced income tax and National Insurance contributions. It's a win-win: staff get to drive away in their dream electric car for less, and businesses can take a giant leap forward in their sustainability goals. Our commitment goes beyond just offering savings. We're dedicated to providing exceptional support throughout the entire process, from choosing the right electric vehicle to seamless delivery and aftercare. By partnering with us, you're not just making a smart financial decision; you're joining a movement towards a cleaner, greener future. Join us in driving change, one commute at a time.

Name: GUEUDET 1880
Description:
Groupe à l’histoire familiale, Gueudet 1880 est un acteur majeur de la distribution de véhicules en France depuis plus de 100 ans 
Nous opérons dans 5 secteurs d’activité : l’automobile, le machinisme agricole, le véhicule de loisirs, les pièces et services multimarques.
Nous sommes présents dans le quart nord-ouest de la France et la Haute Savoie.
Nous représentons plus de 20 marques

Notre métier : vendre, entretenir et réparer des véhicules. 
Notre ambition : être des artisans de la sérénité de nos clients

4 900 collaborateurs, artisans de la sérénité des clients

L’écoute et la proximité sont au cœur de notre démarche, car nous pensons que ce sont les fondements d’une relation pérenne. Engagés et toujours disponibles, nos 4 900 collaborateurs s’efforcent chaque jour de rendre l’expérience vécue par les clients simple, fluide et attentionnée. Ensemble, nous partageons la passion de nos métiers, le goût du travail bien fait, et l’engagement à fournir des services de qualité. 

La vie chez Gueudet 1880

Chez Gueudet 1880, nous offrons un environnement basé sur la stabilité, l’exigence, avec pour objectif de favoriser l’épanouissement de nos collaborateurs. Nous proposons des parcours évolutifs grâce à un important maillage territorial et à la diversité de nos activités. Nous favorisons l’apprentissage et la transmission de nos savoir-faire dans tous nos métiers et toutes nos divisions.

Pour accompagner notre développement, nous recrutons régulièrement des cadres dirigeants, des conseillers commerciaux et après-vente, des mécaniciens et carrossiers, et de nombreuses autres fonctions, que vous ayez ou non de l’expérience dans le domaine.

Name: BYD Haka Auto
Description:
HAKA Auto is a Mega Dealer in Indonesia in marketing BYD Auto products, will establish Branches/Dealers (VSP - Vehicle, Service, Parts) spread across almost all major cities in Java (including DKI Jakarta), Sulawesi, and Kalimantan.

Not only focusing on selling car units but also on After Sales Services, namely Workshop (vehicle repair) and Spare Parts (supply of spare parts).

Name: Caetano Retail
Description:
A Caetano Retail é a organização que agrega as empresas do Grupo Salvador Caetano que desenvolvem a atividade de distribuição e reparação automóvel de diversas marcas em Portugal.

Abrangendo 7 áreas de negócio - automóveis novos, automóveis usados, assistência, colisão, reparação e substituição de vidros, peças e financiamento - tem uma presença geográfica que se estende por todo o território nacional.

A Caetano Retail representa actualmente 1 marca na comercialização de viaturas usadas, a CarPlus e 18 marcas automóveis: Audi, BMW, Chevrolet, Citroën, Dacia, Hyundai, Lexus, Mercedes-Benz, MINI, Peugeot, Opel, Nissan, Renault, Seat, Skoda, smart, Toyota e Volkswagen. 

No total conta com mais de 100 pontos de venda e assistência. Da carteira de negócios fazem ainda parte 25 Centros de Colisão, 28 Centros de reparação de vidros e 2 Centrais de peças multimarca.

Name: Audi Dubai and Northern Emirates
Description:
The future is now.

Al Nabooda uniquely represents Audi in Dubai and the Northern Emirates. Through our state-of-the-art showrooms and service operations, we strive to lead premium mobility services in the region. 

Focusing on our team of talented people and robust processes, our customers know when they are entering an Al Nabooda business, and enjoy the difference. We look forward to welcoming you and your family

Name: ETG Logistics
Description: An end-to-end logistics services provider facilitating trade in Africa with a presence in 20+ countries within Africa. ETGL is furthermore the official distributor of the range of Ashok Leyland commercial vehicles throughout the Southern African region.

Name: Grupo Via Porto
Description:
Inaugurada em setembro de 1998, o Grupo Via Porto possui uma história traçada no objetivo de satisfazer seus clientes e ter excelência em todos os serviços prestados.

Em Santa Catarina onde teve sua origem nas operações com motocicletas, o Grupo possui uma loja Honda Dream, que oferece atendimento exclusivo para clientes de motocicletas de alta cilindradas localizada no Jardim Atlântico, Florianópolis. Além das lojas ainda em Floripa no centro da cidade, em São José, em Biguaçu e Campinas. No Rio Grande do Sul possui lojas em: Porto Alegre, São Leopoldo, Novo Hamburgo, Viamão, Sapucaia do Sul, Capão da Canoa e Tramandaí.

A Via Porto é uma das maiores e mais modernas revendas Fiat do Brasil, com suas lojas localizadas pela grande Porto Alegre. Em 2013, a convite da Fiat, o Grupo inaugurou lojas em Curitiba no Paraná, sendo uma unidade na região de Xaxim na Linha Verde e a outra em Tarumã. A partir de 2015, a Via Porto passa a atuar com Concessionárias Honda Automóveis, onde possui 08 lojas localizadas em: Canoas, Novo Hamburgo, Caxias do Sul, Bento Gonçalves, Osório, Pelotas, Passo Fundo e Lajeado, no Rio Grande do Sul.

Como parte do processo de expansão do Grupo, em 2019 iniciou suas operações junto a montadora francesa, com a Concessionária Citroën em Florianópolis. E em 2020, buscando expandir a representatividade na região Sul, o Grupo assumiu as operações da Peugeot em Pelotas. 

Em 2024 o Grupo começou a representar a BYD no Brasil. Estamos comprometidos com a inovação e a sustentabilidade, e a chegada da BYD ao nosso portfólio reforça ainda mais esse compromisso. Juntos, estamos moldando o futuro da mobilidade, oferecendo soluções que não só tornam nossas viagens mais eficientes, mas também ajudam a preservar o nosso planeta. Ao todo contaremos com 04 lojas, em Porto Alegre/RS, Gravataí/RS, Lajeado/RS e em Criciúma/SC.

Desde a sua inauguração, até os dias de hoje, o Grupo Via Porto se consolidou no mercado automotivo na região Sul.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Cycle & Carriage Singapore
Description:
Cycle & Carriage, a member of the Jardine Cycle & Carriage Group, is one of the leading automotive groups in Singapore. It started out in 1899 as a trader in nutmegs and other sundries . In more than 100 years since, it has grown to become a major player in the automotive industry in Singapore, retailing Mercedes-Benz, Mitsubishi, Kia and Citroën passenger cars and commercial vehicles.

At Cycle & Carriage, it is more than just the recognition we have earned as being the leader in its class. "Exceptional Journeys" encapsulates our passion for our existence. Bringing together high-performing team members and technical excellence to create people-focused experiences that consistently exceed expectations. Whether it is a customer we serve, an employee that we engage, a brand that we carry, we want to support them in creating exceptional journeys for themselves. 

Jardine Cycle & Carriage (JC&C) is a leading Singapore-listed company and a member of the Jardine Matheson Group. A long-term engaged shareholder of market-leading businesses in Southeast Asia, JC&C has a strategic interest in Astra International, a strong automotive presence through its Direct Motor Interests, as well as diversified businesses comprising Other Interests in key economies. Together with its subsidiaries and associates, the Group employs over 230,000 people in Indonesia, Vietnam, Singapore, Thailand, Malaysia and Myanmar.

Name: Peter Vardy Global
Description:
Peter Vardy Global is a purpose-driven company built on the belief that business can be a powerful force for good. Our mission is simple yet profound: to sell to give. This ethos underpins everything we do, from creating the best place to work and the best place to buy, to achieving financial excellence—all with the aim of giving back via the Peter Vardy Foundation.

2025 see us enter a new chapter at Peter Vardy Global, the umbrella company for the Vardy family’s diverse activities. Following the restructure and divestment of the Automotive Retail Group, we bring together our existing and thriving disruptive new businesses. With change brings opportunities and therefore we are proud to launch our new division Peter Vardy Global Ventures, a dynamic investment arm dedicated to supporting visionary leaders and disruptive ideas in the automotive and fintech sectors.

We continue to scale our own startups—CarMoney, FlexAuto, and Gen+. In addition to growing these ventures, we are actively seeking new businesses to support and nurture as hands-on investors, creating opportunities to build and grow together.

At Peter Vardy Global, we remain steadfast in our mission to innovate, inspire, and give back. Together, we are building a legacy that ensures success is not just measured by profit, but by the positive impact we create in the world.

Name: HR Owen PLC
Description:
Established in 1932 by soldier, adventurer and society figure Harold Rolfe Owen, H.R. Owen is the UK’s official dealer of luxury motorcars for Aston Martin, Bentley, Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati, Lotus, BAC and Rolls-Royce.
 
The Group operates in London, Manchester and across southern England, offering New and Used Luxury Cars Sales, Aftersales Servicing, H.R. Owen Classic Cars, H.R. Owen Insurance Services, Luxury Hire and Chauffeur Driving.
 
H.R. Owen is celebrated within the prestige motorcar industry and prides itself on providing uncompromising service and quality across each of its business areas.
 
H.R. Owen’s factory-approved service centres offer repair, maintenance and circuit preparation for the high performance marques they serve, and the company’s London Service Centre is the UK’s only Bugatti-approved service centre.
 
The H.R. Owen Group includes Jack Barclay of Berkeley Square, an iconic and long-established Bentley dealership, while the H.R. Owen London Ferrari dealership recently opened a Ferrari Atelier at the Berkeley Hotel in Knightsbridge.

Name: Jetour UAE
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page for JETOUR UAE!
The Elite Cars: The Official Dealership of JETOUR vehicles in the UAE.

Jetour is part of a globalized automobile group based in China with over 20 years of formidable experience in automotive engineering.

The Elite Cars Group is one of the leading dealerships across the UAE for a number of years and has the vision to capitalize on the major market share for selling, servicing, and providing spare parts for vehicles across the UAE.


The Elite Cars and Jetour formed an exclusive agreement to bring Jetour vehicles, spare parts and services to the UAE. This exclusive partnership brings over 20 years of combined formidable experience in the automotive industry along with joint-venture British technology and remarkable global market performance, therefore bringing quality and trust to its customers.

Name: Ken Garff Automotive Group
Description:
Ken Garff founded his business in 1932 upon the principles of honesty, integrity, personalized customer service, and being a good corporate citizen.  Today, Ken Garff has more than 50 locations throughout Utah, Texas, Iowa, Nevada, Michigan, and California.  

To distinguish and strategically position its dealerships, Ken Garff recently retooled its brand. The need for this retooling was driven by an evolving market place and super-savvy customers wanting a different car-buying experience, including more transparency and a higher level of trust.  These changes were built around the new brand slogan, "We Hear You." 

Despite the company's growth and changes within a challenging market place, Ken Garff is going to great lengths to keep alive and well the principles upon which Ken founded the company, of providing an unsurpassed experience for every customer, every time.	
	
Ken Garff believes in giving back to the communities in which it serves. Since Ken founded his business over 81 years ago, the company has given millions of dollars and thousands of hours to schools, charities and community organizations. 

Why Work for Ken Garff?

Ken Garff recognizes the importance of a benefit program that provides protection to our employees and their families. A comprehensive benefits program has been created to fulfill a wide range of needs.

Benefits available to employees include:

•	Competitive Compensation Package
•	Medical , Dental and Vision
•	401K Plan with Company match
•	Paid Time Off
•	Holiday Pay
•	Volunteer Time Off Program
•	Year-end bonus program for all employees
•	Personal Wellness Plan
•	GarffCare Roadside Assistance Program
•	Discounts on Parts and Service and More!

Ken Garff is an Equal Opportunity Employer

((We Hear You))

Name: NORAUTO PORTUGAL
Description:
A Norauto é líder europeia em centros-auto, com mais de 50 anos de experiência e presença em 6 países, onde conta com mais de 600 centros-auto. Em constante crescimento, continua a expandir-se para novos mercados.

Em Portugal, estamos presentes desde 1996 e já contamos com 30 centros-auto, reforçando o nosso compromisso de proximidade e inovação na mobilidade.

A nossa missão é ser o parceiro de confiança dos automobilistas, oferecendo soluções sustentáveis e de qualidade, sempre assentes nos nossos valores fundamentais: Profissionalismo das Equipas e Respeito pelos Clientes.

Name: Volvo Car Maroc
Description:
Page officielle de Volvo Cars Maroc
Modèles, offres et dernières actualités du marché de l'automobile

Name: Avek Otomotiv
Description:
Bir Paşalı Grubu kuruluşu olan Avek Otomotiv, 2005 yılından bu yana Doğuş Otomotiv Yetkili Satıcısı ve Yetkili Servisi olarak Volkswagen Binek ve Ticari, Audi, Seat, Cupra, Skoda ve DOD markaları için yeni araç satış, filo satış, satış sonrası ve ikinci el araç alım ve satımı alanlarında hizmet vermektedir.

Kurulduğu yıldan bu yana 150.000’i aşkın sıfır araç satışı yaparak sektörün önde gelen kuruluşlarından birisi haline gelen Avek Otomotiv, Türkiye’nin en büyük şirketlerinin belirlendiği FORTUNE 500 listesinde 2023 yılında da üst sıralardaki yerini aldı.


850 adetlik insan kaynağı ile İstanbul Anadolu, İstanbul Avrupa, İzmir ve Çanakkale olmak üzere 4 şubesiyle hizmet veren Avek Otomotiv, kalite standartları, yetkin çalışanları ve müşteri odaklılığı ile otomotiv sektörünün en büyük perakende şirketlerinden biri olmanın gururunu taşıyor.

Avek Otomotiv, temsil ettiği binek ve ticari araç markalarının, satış ve satış sonrası hizmetlerini “en iyi hizmeti almak için en doğru adres olmak” misyonuyla sürdürmektedir.

Name: Group Landmark
Description: India's most preferred premium and luxury auto retailer with 11 global brands across 135 state-of-the-art facilities in 11 states and 31 cities.

Name: SAS - Authorized Toyota Dealer
Description:
SAS Automotive Trade and Services is a Sardar Group Company and an Authorized Toyota Dealer with a National Network of branches from the North to South of Iraq.

SAS Automotive Trade and Services – Authorized Toyota Dealer provides Toyota vehicles specifically manufactured for the Iraqi environment. 

Additionally, SAS only uses Toyota Genuine Parts for all service related requirements and factory handled by trained and certified Toyota technicians

Name: Approved Automotive
Description:
Approved Automotive: Redefining Premium Luxury Automotive Standards


Based in Dubai and operating from a 60,000 sq ft state-of-the-art facility, Approved Automotive is a multi-award-winning company specializing in the retail, protection, and enhancement of premium luxury vehicles. With over 150 years of combined automotive experience and more than 500 5-star Google reviews since our 2023 launch, we are committed to delivering a truly world-class experience.


Our Divisions


Approved Showroom: Home to over 200 meticulously prepared vehicles from prestigious brands including Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, BMW, and Land Rover. We offer a seamless ownership experience with services such as up to 3 years of unlimited claim warranty, service contracts, flexible financing, trade-in solutions, and bespoke vehicle sourcing.


Approved Detailing: As the UAE’s largest XPEL-authorized destination, we offer premium services such as paint protection film (PPF), window tinting, color wrapping, ceramic coating, and tailored washing packages. All work is performed by expert technicians in our purpose-built, environmentally controlled studio - ensuring every detail meets the highest standard.


Don’t just take our word for it - Explore over 500 verified 5-star experiences by searching 'Approved Automotive' in Google. 


Setting New Standards


At Approved Automotive, we go beyond industry norms to set new benchmarks in customer experience and vehicle presentation. Our ‘Right First Time’ philosophy is rooted in precision, quality, and client satisfaction. At the heart of this approach are our Approved Ambassadors - highly trained professionals who bring expertise, dedication, and a personal touch to every interaction. Their passion ensures that each client receives tailored, top-tier service that truly sets us apart.

Name: ACMobility
Description:
ACMobility (formerly known as AC Motors) is the mobility solutions arm of the Ayala Group of Companies and is among the most diverse automotive groups in the Philippines. The company currently serves as the distributor of Kia and BYD passenger cars in the Philippines, and also operates the largest dealer network for Honda and Isuzu in the country. In addition to automotive retail and distribution, ACMobility is the master franchisor of Bosch Car Service (BCS), an automotive workshop network that offers “one-stop-shop services”, covering mechanical repairs to intricate electronics, engine systems, safety features, comfort upgrades, transmission expertise, and a host of other services and diagnostics.

Since 2023, the Ayala Group has been investing in the development of electric vehicle charging stations. These charging stations have since been consolidated under the helm of ACMobility, which will continue to roll out new stations to support the transition of the automotive industry towards electric mobility.

Name: CFAO Equipment Burkina Faso
Description:
CFAO Equipment Burkina est la filiale Burkinabé de CFAO Mobility, groupe CFAO, 1er réseau de distribution en Afrique et dans les Départements et Territoires d’Outre Mer.

Partenaire de marques internationales de renom, CFAO Equipment Burkina est le distributeur exclusif des marques Hino, King Long, Toyota Material Handling et JCB.

Nous proposons un large choix d’équipements et de matériels, ainsi que des solutions innovantes de gestion pour accompagner nos clients.

Notre réseau de 2 agences situées à Ouagadougou et Bobo Dioulasso nous permet d'être toujours proche de nos clients.

Dotée d'une équipe de professionnels formés, d’un service après-vente avec des équipements à la pointe de la technologie et d'un département de pièces de rechange d'origine, CFAO Equipment Burkina propose une offre complète de services avant, pendant et après la vente, pour répondre à tous les besoins de sa clientèle.

Name: M-AUTOMOTIV
Description:
Distributeur des marques Renault, Dacia et Alpine, ainsi que de véhicules d'occasion multimarques, M-AUTOMOTIV s'impose comme le numéro 1 de la distribution automobile au Maroc. Pour être toujours plus proche de ses clients, M-AUTOMOTIV dispose d'un réseau de 14 points de vente à travers le Maroc et de plateformes digitales conçues pour simplifier l'expérience achat de clients.
Avec l’innovation comme moteur, M-AUTOMOTIV ambitionne de faciliter la mobilité de demain au Maroc et en Afrique.
Horaires :
Showrooms : 8h00 à 18h40
Ateliers : 8h00 à 18h00
Samedi : 8h30 à 13h00

Name: CFAO Mobility Bénin
Description: CFAO Mobility Bénin

Name: AUTOCOM
Description:
Más de 50 años reinventando tu movilidad. 

En AUTOCOM te brindamos todo lo que necesitas para resolver tus necesidades de movilidad, desde un sedán hasta un vehículo todo terreno. 
Conócenos!

Name: Cardan
Description:
A origem da Cardan remonta a 1966, tendo então como principal atividade o comércio e a reparação de automóveis das marcas Simca, Chrysler, Hillman e Sunbeam no Distrito do Porto.

Com o crescimento sustentado dessas áreas de negócio, o portfolio de marcas representadas foi evoluindo, com a integração de mais insígnias de referência. 

À atividade de venda e reparação de viaturas novas juntaram-se entretanto novas unidades de negócio dedicadas às viaturas usadas, distribuição de peças e intermediação de produtos financeiros e seguros.

O Grupo desenvolve também, complementarmente e desde 2006, a atividade de aluguer de viaturas, disponibilização de soluções variadas e flexíveis de mobilidade, adequadas às diferentes necessidades de particulares e empresas.

À medida que a oferta de produtos e serviços foi crescendo, a Cardan foi alargando a sua presença a outras regiões, estando presente, desde 2012, no Grande Porto e no Vale do Sousa, áreas geográficas onde tem vindo a incrementar o número de unidades instaladas.

Atualmente, além da presença física nas principais regiões do Norte do País, o Grupo disponibiliza, através das suas plataformas digitais, a sua oferta global em soluções de mobilidade.

Name: Lavca
Description:
LAVCA, Concesionario con más de 40 años de experiencia y trayectoria en la industria automotriz, respaldados estos años en un crecimiento ordenando, sistemático y permanente, hemos logrado un desarrollo integral en las áreas administrativa, financiera, comercial y de servicio, sustentado en principios y valores corporativos.

Contamos con una amplia infraestructura que nos permite satisfacer las diferentes necesidades de nuestros actuales y futuros clientes, así como variedad en el stock de repuestos y mano de obra calificada. Nuestros talleres cuentan con la tecnología y el equipo para el mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo de los vehículos. Durante estas décadas de gestión, LAVCA se ha destacado por su integridad, seriedad y transparencia con clientes, proveedores y entre todo su personal.

Name: Nusantara Sakti Group
Description:
Founded in 1962, Nusantara Sakti Group began its journey by selling Honda motorcycles in Semarang. Since then, the company has grown significantly and now encompasses various business sectors, including multipurpose financing, spare parts and oil distribution, logistics, property, furniture, and pawn services.

Adopting the ICES work culture (Integrity, Customer Satisfaction, Excellent Achievement, Synergy), Nusantara Sakti Group is committed to providing the best services in every business field. We have an extensive network with many locations spread across Indonesia, ready to serve and meet the needs of dynamic communities.

We provide the fastest, easiest, and most reliable solutions, continually innovating and striving to always be at the forefront of delivering customer satisfaction and achieving excellence through strong synergy.

Didirikan pada tahun 1962, Nusantara Sakti Group memulai perjalanannya dengan menjual sepeda motor Honda di Semarang. Sejak saat itu, perusahaan telah berkembang pesat dan kini mencakup berbagai sektor bisnis, termasuk pembiayaan multiguna, distribusi suku cadang dan oli, logistik, properti, furnitur, serta jasa gadai.

Dengan mengusung budaya kerja ICES (Integrity, Customer Satisfaction, Excellent Achievement, Synergy), Nusantara Sakti Group berkomitmen untuk memberikan layanan terbaik di setiap bidang bisnisnya. Kami memiliki jaringan yang luas dengan banyak lokasi yang tersebar di seluruh Indonesia, siap melayani dan memenuhi kebutuhan masyarakat yang dinamis.

Kami menyediakan solusi tercepat, termudah, dan terpercaya, terus berinovasi dan berusaha untuk selalu berada di garis depan dalam memberikan kepuasan pelanggan serta mencapai keunggulan melalui sinergi yang kuat.

Name: CFAO Mobility - TOGO
Description:
Installé au Togo depuis 1924, CFAO Mobility Togo est le distributeur exclusif de quatre marques de renommée mondiale : Toyota, Citroën, Bridgestone et Yamaha.

Il vend une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme et utilitaires sous les marques Toyota et Citroën.

CFAO Motors Togo distribue également des deux-roues, des générateurs et des motos-pompes Yamaha ainsi qu’une gamme de pneus Bridgestone particulièrement bien adaptée au continent africain.

à travers un partenariat avec Budget, CFAO Motors Togo propose un service de location de véhicules.

Name: CFAO Mobility - Uganda
Description:
We are the authorized distributor of brand new Toyota and Suzuki Vehicles, Yamaha Bikes, Hino Trucks and Buses. We offer genuine parts and aftersales services.

Visit us at our branches in; Namanve, Kampala, Mbale and Gulu.

Name: Pfaff Automotive Partners
Description:
At Pfaff Automotive Partners, we’re united by a passion for cars, and we’re as crazy about them. It’s about more than just selling and servicing cars. We’re passionate about long-term relationships with our teammates, clients, and communities. We love driving the cars we sell, and we love the people that own and drive them.

Hans J. Pfaff started the company in 1964 out of a desire to provide the best customer service experience in the industry. He set the bar extremely high and today, we continue to strive for that bar each and every day, through every customer interaction.

Now, in partnership with Lithia and Driveway, North America’s second-largest publicly-traded dealership group (NYSE:LAD), We are focused on making, buying, and servicing a car and or motorcycle as easy as possible– with a diverse set of brands and deep e-commerce capabilities that provide modern customers an unlimited range of options to suit their needs and lifestyles.

Name: AMG - El Ghalban Group
Description: AMG El Ghalban has been operating in the Egyptian automotive industry as multi-brand retailer since the 1970s. AMG is focused on becoming a solutions provider for all customers and their automobile needs. Currently, we operate multiple showrooms situated across Cairo, El Mansoura and Beheira.

Name: Grupo Cenoa
Description:
Corporación Empresaria del Noroeste Argentino

Somos un grupo de empresas de concesionarios oficiales de marcas líderes como Toyota, Volkswagen, Peugeot y Citroën, con más de 20 años de trayectoria.

Desarrollamos continuamente servicios de movilidad complementarios a la cadena de valor.

Representamos más del 50% de los patentamientos en las provincias de Salta y Jujuy.

Nuestro equipo está formado por más de 500 colaboradores que capacitamos y desarrollamos constantemente haciendo del grupo un gran lugar para trabajar.

 Para sumarte a nuestro gran equipo podés ver nuestras vacantes activas y postularte a través del siguiente link:
https://grupo-cenoa.pandape.computrabajo.com

Name: BYD KSA
Description: BYD is a high-tech company devoted to leveraging technological innovations for a better life.  BYD has developed the industry-leading Blade Battery and dual-mode hybrid power technology, DM-iSuper Hybrid, accelerating the once-in-a-century transition from fossil fuel powered vehicles to electric vehicles.  In 2022, BYD sold over 1.86 million New Energy Vehicles (electric & plug-in hybrids) to become the #1 New Energy Vehicle company, globally.

Name: Dick Lovett Group
Description: The Dick Lovett Group is a family owned company which has been serving the South-West and Wales for over 50 years, representing the very best automotive brands including Aston Martin, BMW, BMW Motorrad, Jaguar, MINI, Land Rover and Porsche.  Operating official dealerships out of Bristol, Swindon, Hungerford, Tewkesbury, Newport, and Melksham, we are perfectly placed along the M4 and M5 corridor to help our customers with all their motoring needs. At Dick Lovett, we have dedicated Sales, Aftersales and Bodyshop teams who pride themselves in delivering the personal service that builds lifelong relationships, resulting in many of our customers coming back to us year after year.

Name: Porsche Centre Bengaluru
Description:
Presenting you with an experience as dreamy and satisfying as driving a Porsche. Porsche Centre Bengaluru is a one-stop destination for the perfect sports car. 

We introduce you to our extraordinary world of cars. Driven by the ideology of our founder, Jerry Porsche, our team takes pride in providing you with the byproduct of his dream. Constantly in pursuit of innovation, beauty and pure thrilling performance, Porsche makes sure you get to live your dream in the fast lane. With every model of Porsche delivered in Bengaluru, we move closer to achieving our goal of delivering the perfect sports car in the world. Explore our array of Porsche cars as we take you on a tour full of luxury with a touch of sportiness.

To write to us: info@porsche-bengaluru.in

Name: Mecum Auctions
Description:
The Mecum Auction Company has been specializing in the sale of collector cars for 35 years, now offering an industry-leading 20,000 collector cars per year. Seller, buyer and event information is available online at www.mecum.com.
Nobody Sells More Than Mecum. Nobody.

Name: Bergstrom Automotive
Description:
Bergstrom Automotive, headquartered in Neenah, Wisconsin, is one of the top automotive retailers in the U.S. and the largest dealer in Wisconsin. The company employs over 2,500 teammates statewide and is focused on delivering outstanding guest service. The Bergstrom organization sells and services the following franchises: Acura, Alfa Romeo, Audi, BMW, Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Dodge, FIAT, Ford, Genesis, GMC, Honda, Hyundai, Infiniti, Jaguar, Jeep, Land Rover, Lexus, Lincoln, Maserati, Mazda,
Mercedes-Benz, Mitsubishi, Nissan, Porsche, Ram, Sprinter, Subaru, Toyota, Volkswagen and Volvo in facilities located throughout the state of Wisconsin. 

In addition to selling new & pre-owned vehicles, Bergstrom Automotive also staffs several body shops & collision centers, several express oil change facilities, wholesale parts operations, many full-service repair shops & fleet management center.

For job listings, visit: joinbergstrom.com

Name: Groupe Maurin
Description:
Distributeur automobile depuis 1982.

 5ème Groupe de distribution automobile Français avec 135 concessions et 22 marques distribuées.

 1er distributeur de marques étrangères en France.

 1er distributeur Ford, Nissan & Suzuki en France.

 Une présence en Espagne, Belgique et Suisse.

Name: Grupo ADTSA
Description: O Grupo ADTSA é um dos maiores grupos automotivos do Nordeste, atuando nos estados de Alagoas , Ceará e Pernambuco.

Name: Grupo Cori Motors
Description:
Grupo Cori Motors es el distribuidor oficial de las marcas, BYD, KAIYI, BAIC y FOTON en Costa Rica. 

Con amplia experiencia en el mercado automotriz, nueve sucursales a nivel nacional y una pasión desenfrenada para transformar la industria con el mejor servicio, Grupo Cori Motors se convierte en una de las principales empresas importadoras de vehículos en el país.

Name: Doğan Trend Otomotiv
Description:
Bir Doğan Holding iştiraki olan Doğan Trend Otomotiv Grubu, otomotiv ve mobilite sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir. 

Bünyesinde seçkin otomobil, motosiklet, deniz araçları ve elektrikli mobilite marka* temsilciliklerini bulunduran şirket, Otomobilite adını verdiği perakende hizmet noktaları ve uzman yetkili satıcı/servis ağıyla ülke çapında hizmet vermektedir.

Yeni araç satış & pazarlama operasyonların yanısıra; suvmarket.com platformuyla kullanılmış araç alanındaki faaliyetlerini segment odaklı ve özgün bir bakış açısıyla sürdürmektedir.

* Temsililiğini yaptığı marka ve ürünler: MG, Suzuki otomobiller; Vespa, Aprilia, Piaggio, Moto Guzzi, Suzuki motosikletleri; Wallbox şarj aletleri, BIMAS ve Silence elektrikli mobilite ürünleri ile Suzuki Marine Deniz Motorları.

Name: Groupe CITADELLE
Description:
Le groupe CITADELLE, ainsi dénommé depuis 2001, a vu le jour il y a un siècle. Il est en effet une filiale du Groupe Comte-Serres, entreprise familiale par excellence, dont la première pierre fut posée par Louis Serres en 1919 à Alger. Cette première société « L. Serres & Cie », avait pour objet le transport des primeurs et agrumes de l'Algérie vers la métropole.

Le groupe Citadelle possède aujourd'hui plusieurs sociétés dans le secteur auto-moto, réparties sur la Martinique, la Guadeloupe, la Guyane, la Réunion et Mayotte. Parmi ces sociétés, on trouve le CCIE (Comptoir Caraïbe d'Importation et d'Exportation, représentant les marques TOYOTA, LEXUS, SUZUKI), SODIVA (qui distribue les marques CITROEN, DS, FIAT, ALFA ROMEO et JEEP), GT Distribution (Autodistribution Martinique), PNEUS CASH, PNEUDEAL.COM, Auto Hall Center Distribution Guyane (Sud Motors en Guyane), GSA-PDK, le Monde de l'Occasion, CARMEN (location de véhicules courte et longue durée), Mécanique Plaisance Services, ainsi que MMCD à Mayotte, Kaizen Moto en Martinique et en Guadeloupe, et Kaizen Motors en Guyane.

La stratégie du Groupe est axée sur la mise en synergie des métiers de l'automobile et du nautisme dans les Départements Français d'Amérique et plus récemment à la Réunion.

Name: Crestanevada
Description:
Crestanevada es una empresa tecnológica especializada en Automoción, actualmente estamos físicamente presentes en Granada, Sevilla, Málaga, Murcia, Valencia,  Madrid, Alicante, Almería, Vigo, Girona, Barcelona. 

Gestionamos departamentos de vehículos de ocasión de diferentes Concesionarios en diferentes ciudades "Programa Crestanevada Tas".

Vendemos vehículos de ocasión online a particulares en toda España teniendo la sede en Granada, vendemos vehículos  a profesionales en diferentes subastas Nacionales e Internacionales. 

Tenemos lavaderos y talleres mecánicos, de chapa y pintura en Granada y Murcia. 

Tenemos un departamentos financiero, facilitamos financiación a los clientes que nos compran un vehículo.

Vedemos vehículos nuevos de todas las Marcas mediante Renting, somos Broker de Renting. 

Esta pagina de Linkedin también esta creada con objeto de poner en contacto a todos los compañeros de trabajos y colaboradores de Crestanevada.

Name: Nissan Iraq AlSour
Description: As the official distributor of Nissan and INFINITI, Al-Sour brings global automotive brands to local roads with integrity, precision, and customer-first service.

Name: EchoPark Automotive
Description: EchoPark makes car buying and selling, happier. It’s literally in our name: ECHO = Every Car, Happy Owner. And you don’t have to take our word for it – 50,000+ 5-star reviews (and growing). Do you love cars and providing the happiest customer experience ever? Get in, we’re expanding from coast to coast.

Name: Wigo Motors
Description:
Somos GACSA Perú, una empresa que conforma el Grupo Americar. Iniciamos nuestras operaciones en octubre del 2018 con el objetivo de convertirnos en una empresa líder dentro del sector automotriz y un referente a nivel nacional. 
En GACSA basamos todas nuestras acciones en nuestros valores corporativos y nos sentimos orgullosos de contar con un equipo de primer nivel y una amplia gama de productos de alta calidad para satisfacer todas las necesidades de nuestros valiosos clientes. 
Actualmente, nuestro equipo está compuesto por más de 300 profesionales y representamos más de 23 marcas.

Name: BAIC QATAR - FUTURE MOTORS
Description:
Future Motors, is the official distributor of BAIC (Beijing Automotive Industry Corporation) in Qatar. We offer a diverse range of BAIC cars, from stylish sedans to rugged SUVs. Exceptional customer service is our priority—from inquiry to after-sales support.

BAIC, founded in 1958 and headquartered in Beijing, China, is a Fortune 500 company. As one of China’s largest government-owned automobile groups, BAIC covers R&D, manufacturing, parts, service trade, travel services, finance, and investment.

Over the years, BAIC has launched significant vehicles, including China’s first light off-road vehicles and light trucks. It established joint ventures with American Motors Corporation (Beijing Jeep Corporation), Hyundai (Beijing Hyundai Auto Co., Ltd.) and Mercedes-Benz (Beijing Benz Automotive Co., Ltd.).

Today, BAIC’s private car brands (ARCFOX, BEIJING, and BAIC ORV), commercial vehicle brands (BAIC Foton, BAIC Changhe) and joint venture brands (Beijing Benz, Fujian Benz, Beijing Hyundai Motor, and Foton Daimler) continue to make an impact globally, with cumulative sales exceeding 34 million units.

Name: Auto Summit Chile S.A
Description: Auto Summit es una empresa con más de 20 años en la industria automotriz, siendo líder en ventas y servicios de reconocidas marcas del mercado.

Name: BYmyCAR BMW
Description:
Le Groupe BYmyCAR est un acteur majeur de la distribution automobile et motocycliste indépendant français. Nos 11 concessions BYmyCAR BMW sont implantées à l’international, en Ile de France, mais également à Madrid en Espagne et en Italie.

Nos services et prestations s’adressent tant aux clients particuliers qu’aux clients professionnels, incluant la vente de véhicules neufs ou d’occasion, des solutions de financement sur mesure, des offres d’assurances adaptées, l’entretien et la réparation des véhicules ainsi que la vente de pièces de rechange et d’accessoires.

Name: Toyota Panamericana (TTCA)
Description: TOYOTA PANAMERICANA es nuestro nombre comercial de TTC Auto Argentina S.A, una empresa de Toyota Tsusho Corporation (TTC). Iniciamos nuestras actividades como Concesionaria Oficial Toyota en 1998 en la localidad de El Talar de Pacheco, Provincia de Buenos Aires. Hoy contamos con dos sucursales, una en Campana y otra en El Talar de Pacheco. Toyota Tsusho Corporation tiene operaciones en todo el mundo a través de una red global que abarca alrededor de 1000 empresas en más de 120 países.

Name: Proa Grup
Description:
PROA GROUP, grupo de empresas referente en el sector de la automoción, con un equipo de más de 800 personas y presente en Illes Balears, Islas Canarias y la península.

Nuestro grupo cuenta con una amplia experiencia de más de 50 años en el mundo del automóvil, que garantiza la calidad y profesionalidad en cada uno de nuestros concesionarios exclusivos, especializados en la venta de vehículos de las marcas BMW, MINI, LANDROVER, HYUNDAI, RENAULT y DACIA, entre otras. 

Nuestra red de concesionarios, está presente en las siguientes ubicaciones:

En Mallorca, concesionarios: 

- PROA PREMIUM, BMW-MINI
- PROA AUTOMOCIÓN, HYUNDAI
- DIBAUTO PLUS, RENAULT-DACIA
- PROA OCASIÓN

En Ibiza, concesionarios:

- PROA PREMIUM, BMW-MINI, LAND ROVER

Nuestra división de Rent a Car, bajo las marcas HERTZ, DOLLAR y THRIFTY, está ubicada en todos los aeropuertos de Baleares, y en Canarias, Tenife Norte y Sur, Lanzarote, Fuerteventura, Gran Canaria y la isla de La Palma, además de contar con oficinas en zona costa, con un total de 45 puntos de servicio.

Name: Fer Mas Oto Tic. A.Ş.
Description: Tesislerinin sıra dışı lokasyonları ve mimarisi ile dünya bayileri arasında kısa sürede farklılığı ortaya koyan Fer Mas A.Ş., sahip olduğu markalara tutku ve profesyonellik ile hizmet vermeyi hedeflemektedir.

Name: Brasil Dealer Group
Description:
O Brasil Dealer Group S.A. (BDG) sediado em Minas Gerais, iniciou suas atividades no mercado  automotivo em novembro de 1992, com a abertura da primeira concessionária de veículos Honda  do estado de Minas Gerais (a Auto Japan), em seguida a BMW, Volvo, GWM, Hyundai, YTO, KIA, Omoda Jaecoo, Triumph, Kawasaki, Bajaj, MG Motors, Royal Enfield e Jetour. 

Hoje, o BDG conta com pouco mais que 900 colaboradores e 30 lojas credenciadas, em locais estrategicamente selecionados.

Fazemos parte de um tradicional grupo econômico de Minas Gerais, que, apesar de ter iniciado  suas atividades há mais de 70 anos, permanece com o mesmo espírito jovem e empreendedor. Além  de uma expressiva atuação no segmento de distribuição de veículos, através das concessionárias  e locação por assinatura, o grupo atua também na área imobiliária, estacionamentos, shopping  centers, hotelaria, cinemas, álcool e açúcar, agropecuária e mineração.


O grupo tem profundo conhecimento do mercado automotivo e vem se destacando pela expressiva  participação de mercado na linha de automóveis de luxo, assim como na prestação de serviços  de pós-vendas, elevado índice de satisfação de seus clientes e de resultado dos programas de  excelência das marcas que o Grupo representa.

Name: CFAO Mobility- Madagascar
Description: CFAO Mobility Madagascar distributeur officiel des véhicules de marques : Toyota, Suzuki, Yamaha, Mitsubishi, Mercedes-Benz, Fuso et Sino Truck

Name: BYD Bangladesh
Description:
BYD: short for Build Your Dreams. Founded in February 1995, BYD Company Limited is a high-tech multinational
company devoted to technological innovations for a better life. After 29 years of development, the company has
expanded from 20 employees to around 600,000 with over and more than 40 branches worldwide. BYD has four
industries dedicated to realizing its green dreams of creating a zero-emission energy ecosystem: automobile,
electronics, new energy, and rail transit.
BYD is also a pioneer in battery technology. After our successes with manufacturing batteries for mobile telephones
and laptops, BYD decided to create a complete clean-energy ecosystem that reduces the world’s reliance on fossil
fuels. BYD is dedicated to making mobility solutions emission-free. The company has become the world’s leading
manufacturer of new energy vehicles (NEVs). In 2022, BYD NEV sales of 1,863,000 units, up 208.6% year on year,
ranked first in the world’s new energy vehicles sales. From January to November 2023, BYD’s cumulative sales of new
energy vehicles totaled 2.683 million units, up 64.8% year on year.

Name: Grupo Betiolo
Description:
O Grupo Betiolo atua há mais de 25 anos no mercado e  caracteriza-se por ser uma empresa sólida, de tradição, que conjuga excelência no atendimento  e qualidade incomparável nos produtos que comercializa.

Por ser uma empresa moderna, dinâmica, com grande conhecimento no segmento em que atua, o Grupo Betiolo vem acelerando de maneira significativa seu crescimento. Hoje somos referência na Serra Gaúcha, e a experiência e credibilidade do Grupo Betiolo, confirmam cada vez mais ser uma das maiores forças no segmento automotivo no Sul do país.

Para nós, do Grupo Betiolo,  um bom negócio é fazer o melhor por nossos clientes, sempre.
Um bom negócio é atender bem. Com experiência de mercado, temos equipe especializada e sempre pronta para receber cada um de nossos clientes.

Um bom negócio é encontrar o carro certo para cada pessoa. Por isso, oferecemos as melhores opções de novos Fiat, Jeep e Ram; e seminovos multimarcas, da mais alta qualidade com lojas em Lajeado, Santa Cruz do Sul, Montenegro, Caxias do Sul, Canoas e Estrela.

Um bom negócio é ter serviços de primeira. Com o maior atacado de peças genuínas do Sul, oficina especializada, locação de frota e outros serviços, nós temos tudo que seu carro e você precisam.

Visite a loja mais próxima e descubra por que carros novos, seminovos ou serviços, na Betiolo, é sempre bom negócio.

Conte sempre com a Betiolo!

Name: SMEIA
Description:
Société spécialisée dans l'import et la distribution des véhicules prémium au Maroc.

Marques représentées : BMW, MINI, Motos BMW, Jaguar, Land Rover et Mazda

Name: THE COLLECTION
Description:
THE COLLECTION is South Florida’s premier luxury automotive destination, representing eleven world-renowned brands: Audi, Porsche, Ferrari, Maserati, Aston Martin, McLaren, Lamborghini, Land Rover, Jaguar, Alfa Romeo, and Pininfarina. 

Our flagship dealership is located at Bird Road & Ponce de Leon Boulevard in Coral Gables, with additional showrooms including Ferrari of Miami on Biscayne Boulevard in Downtown Miami, Lamborghini South Dade & Audi Miami South at our new 96,000 sq. ft. campus in Palmetto Bay, and Jaguar Land Rover Coral Gables on US1 & Ponce de Leon Boulevard. 

For employment opportunities, please contact our HR office at hroffice@thecollection.com or visit our website at www.thecollection.com.

Name: Laith Alobaidi Cars Jordan
Description:
Laith Al-Obaidi was founded in 1968 by Mr. Laith Al-Obaidi and is represented alongside him by Mr. Mohammed Al-Obaidi, Mr. Ahmed Al-Obaidi, Mr. Ali Al-Obaidi, and their sons, who play a key role as members of the board, carrying the company’s vision towards further growth and excellence.

Laith Al-Obaidi’s management boasts decades of experience in the automotive sector, making it one of the leading names in the industry. The company is wholly self-owned and independently operated, which has enabled it to achieve continuous growth and strategic expansion year after year, strengthening its presence across the Middle East.

Our Success Story
The secret behind our success lies in making well-planned strategic decisions that prioritize achieving the highest levels of customer satisfaction. We believe that customer satisfaction is the solid foundation on which sustainable success is built, and that is why we continue to provide services and products that reflect the quality and innovation standards we are committed to.

Name: BYD Auto Chile
Description:
Tú también puedes ser el nuevo protagonista en la #electromovilidad.
Sorpréndete con modelos 100% eléctricos e híbridos, líderes a nivel global.

Name: Morrie's Auto Group
Description:
Morrie's Auto Group is one of the fastest-growing privately-owned dealership groups in the Midwest. We have a comprehensive portfolio of OEM brands, and 26 locations across Minnesota, Wisconsin, and Michigan.

As a leading auto retailer, we strive to be the preferred and trusted provider for our team members and customers, and we care deeply about our community, the people in it, and doing what’s right. Our mission is to enhance the lives of our employees through the work they do, to make our customers happier through the experiences we provide, and to make our communities better by providing time and resources.

We are proud to offer comprehensive benefits, industry-leading pay plans, career growth opportunities, and modern work environments. We firmly believe that our employees are the key to our success, and we provide for them accordingly.

If you're interested in joining our mission, we invite you to Move Your Career Forward and apply now.

Name: Midas Portugal
Description: Líder mundial em manutenção e serviço automóvel, com 65 anos de experiência e mais de 2.200 lojas de reparações rápidas em todo o mundo. A Midas opera em Portugal há 20 anos, tendo já servido cerca de 2,5 milhões de clientes.

Name: BHANDARI AUTOMOBILES PVT. LTD.
Description: BHANDARI AUTOMOBILES PVT. LTD, based in West Bengal, is the top passenger vehicle dealer in the eastern region for Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. They also represent Tata Motors commercial vehicle segment and are ranked number one nationwide. With a workforce of over 3,000 passionate employees, BHANDARI AUTOMOBILES is a leader in the Indian automotive industry.

Name: Tratorcase
Description:
Concessionária Case IH em Ponta Grossa, Guarapuava, Lapa, Arapoti, Mauá da Serra, Castro, Ivaiporã, Tibagi e Irati, foi fundada em 2007 e é um dos principais distribuidores da marca no Paraná.
Fundada em 2007, nossa empresa é um dos principais distribuidores CaseIH Agricultura no Brasil.

Name: Silkway Cars LLC
Description: Welcome to Silk Way Cars LLC, your trusted automotive partner since 2006.

Name: Møller Bil
Description:
Møller Bil er Norges ledende leverandør av bil og bilhold. Det håper vi du opplever når du besøker våre forhandlere. Møller Bil AS er et datterselskap av Møller Mobility Group, Nordens ledende bilkonsern med virksomhet også i Baltikum.

Møller Bil er Norges største bilforhandlerkjede med bilforhandlere og skadesentre spredt over hele landet. Vi fører merkene Volkswagen, Volkswagen nyttekjøretøy, Audi og Škoda, og har Norges største utvalg av brukte biler.  Møller Bil har flere tusen medarbeidere og er en av Norges største lærlingebedrifter.  

Vår felles bedriftskultur bygger på våre grunnverdier ÅPEN OG ÆRLIG – INITIATIVRIK – OMTENKSOM – TYDELIG.

Name: Automotriz Portillo Sur
Description:
Portillo Sur es un grupo automotriz con más de 10 años de trayectoria en el sur de Chile, dedicado a entregar soluciones de movilidad integrales a personas, familias y empresas. Nuestro compromiso ha sido siempre acompañar a nuestros clientes con una oferta diversa de marcas, servicios y experiencias que generan confianza y respaldo en cada etapa de su camino.
Desde nuestras sucursales en Concepción, Temuco, Osorno y Puerto Montt, hemos construido una sólida presencia que nos posiciona como un actor clave en la industria automotriz del sur del país. Nuestra propuesta integra vehículos nuevos y usados, planes de financiamiento, seguros, servicios técnicos especializados y repuestos originales, todo bajo un estándar de calidad orientado a entregar la mejor experiencia de compra y postventa.
Nuestro equipo humano es el motor de nuestra operación. Profesionales capacitados, motivados y comprometidos que trabajan día a día para ofrecer atención cercana, eficiente y de alto nivel, entendiendo que cada cliente tiene necesidades únicas.
La innovación y la diversidad de marcas son parte de nuestra esencia. Representamos un portafolio amplio que abarca desde automóviles premium hasta soluciones comerciales y de transporte, con opciones que se adaptan a distintos estilos de vida y proyectos.
En Portillo Sur miramos hacia el futuro con la convicción de ser líderes regionales en movilidad, apostando por la sustentabilidad, la transformación digital y la cercanía como ejes centrales de nuestro desarrollo.

Name: SAVAR
Description:
Desde 1968, o Grupo SAVAR expande fronteiras e abraça novos caminhos, sempre comprometido com a excelência. De caminhões pesados à mobilidade completa, construímos uma trajetória marcada pela inovação e pela confiança.

O Grupo reúne marcas que são sinônimos de qualidade e inovação:  Mercedes-Benz, Jeep, Ram, Toyota, Leapmotor, Multimarcas, Michelin, Ravas, Shell e Ipiranga e, juntas, transformam cada jornada em algo único.

Aqui, tecnologia, design e confiança não são apenas atributos: são compromissos que acompanham você em cada etapa da sua vida.

Mais do que produtos, o Grupo SAVAR entrega experiências completas de mobilidade e serviços, sempre guiado por propósito, excelência e pela construção de relações duradouras com cada cliente e parceiro.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Schumacher Group
Description:
Le Groupe Schumacher a fusionné avec la Groupe Lamirault en 2019 pour former ensemble, un des leaders de la distribution automobile française : LS Group. En janvier 2024, le groupe est renommé CAR LOVERS. 

Les marques généralistes, qui ont fondé historiquement le socle Lamirault-Schumacher, sont structurées en 3 pôles : Groupe Renault, Groupe Volkswagen et Groupe Toyota. Depuis fin 2020, CAR LOVERS se développe sur le Grand Ouest avec la marque Volvo. En 2023, le groupe s'implante en Italie, à Rome, avec les marques Renault, Dacia et Alpine.

Parallèlement, Edouard Schumacher a créé un pôle Sport, EF SCHUMACHER, comprenant les marques Alpine, Maserati, Lamborghini, McLaren, Bugatti, Porsche et Dallara.

Les 7 concessions du pôle sport sont réparties sur les départements des Hauts-de-Seine, des Yvelines et de la Seine et Marne.

Toujours en quête d’innovations et de nouvelles expériences clients, Edouard Schumacher s’est lancé dans le metaverse en juin 2022, avec une galerie d’art automobile, nommée C-AR(T).

Des artistes et designers reconnus ont participé à ce projet, pour mettre en valeur la prestigieuse marque Lamborghini au travers de NFT inédits ; une première pour un groupe automobile français.

Name: Mitsubishi Motors Oman
Description:
General Automotive Company (GAC) was founded in 1978 under the umbrella of Zubair Automotive to formally represent the Mitsubishi Motors brand. It has since enjoyed a long and mutually beneficial relationship with these vehicle manufacturers stretching over four decades.

Unquestionably the flagship of the Group's automotive subsidiaries, General Automotive has developed an impressive sales, marketing, and after-sales service infrastructure that reflects the global cachet of the Mitsubishi automotive brands. General Automotive Company also holds the prestigious ISO 9001:2015 quality standard quality certification and combines internationally trained service personnel, professional sales staff and state-of-the-art technology to guarantee customer satisfaction.

Professionalism, coupled with the delivery of consistently superior customer services, has also helped provide a strong platform for the brand's growth in an increasingly competitive market. As a result of its efforts, the company has achieved a number of impressive milestones in the Sultanate over the years, winning numerous regional and global awards for sales and customer service.

Name: Aston Martin Lyon
Description: Le Groupe Chopard distribue la prestigieuse marque Aston Martin à Lyon en respectant et en cultivant les valeurs chères à la marque anglaise, synonyme de luxe : Beauté, Savoir-Faire et Art.

Name: TAIKOO MOTORS GROUP
Description:
Taikoo Motors Group (www.taikoomotors.com) is the biggest and most diverse automobile distribution group in Taiwan, selling Volkswagen passenger cars and light commercial vehicles, Mazda and Mercedes‑Benz passenger cars, Volvo and UD trucks and buses, Harley-Davidson and Vespa motorcycles, and is still expanding its product and service portfolio in both Taiwan and overseas. Entering Hong Kong in April 2011, Malaysia in Dec 2013 in the name of Swire Motors. Taikoo Motors Group has also built an online searching platform for the used car with a name CARGURU. We are still actively expanding into new businesses and new countries.  

Swire Motors in Taikoo Motors Group has established a multi-brand repair and spare part business in Asia and to be extended to other regions. In Hong Kong, we are selling Volvo and UD trucks and buses. 

Taikoo Motors Group is a member of Swire Pacific (http://www.swirepacific.com), one of the largest conglomerates in Hong Kong with 200 years of history. Our sister companies include Swire Properties, Swire Hotels, Cathay Pacific, Swire Coca-Cola, Taikoo Sugar, Swire Resources, etc.

Name: Hudson Automotive Group
Description:
Our dealerships offer a wide variety of quality vehicles and award-winning service to provide an exceptional experience all around. We take great pride in customer satisfaction at all our locations and are also active members of the community, proudly supporting local charities and organizations.

Our dealerships have been repeatedly recognized for outstanding customer service and have received the Toyota President’s Award, the Nissan Global Award, Ford’s President’s Award and Honda's President’s Award for their dedication to excellence.

Name: Mecanicus
Description: Mecanicus is a digital platform dedicated to classic cars enthusiasts: gathering media and content, database and community network, we create a full mobile environment to live differently your classic car passion.

Name: Retail Renault Group UK Ltd.
Description:
Driving Business & Personal Solutions Across the UK

Retail Renault Group is your complete automotive partner, serving businesses and consumers through our extensive UK dealership network with Renault, Dacia, and Alpine solutions.

 B2B Services:
• Fleet management and leasing solutions for all business sizes
• Commercial vehicle expertise (LCV specialists)
• Dedicated corporate aftersales and priority servicing
• Volume pricing with dedicated account management

 B2C Services:
• New & used vehicle sales across all brands

• Customer-focused transparent service

Why Choose Us:

We serve fleet managers, procurement teams, business owners, and individual customers seeking reliable automotive partnerships.

Connect with us - whether you need a single vehicle or a full fleet solution.

Part of the global Renault network | Your trusted UK automotive partner

Name: Autoleague
Description:
Autoleague is one of Australia's largest and most innovative automotive retailers.
 
A consortium of the Australian management team and institutional investors acquired IDOM Inc.'s Australian retail business. As a result of the transaction, IDOM Automotive Group (IAG) and its affiliate companies became an employee-owned and operated Australian business, established on 4 July 2022.
Our name, Autoleague, was launched on 1 August 2022 and represents the elements of Autonomy, Competition and Diversity; instrumental factors in our growth and success.

Autoleague is one of Australia's largest and most innovative automotive retailers - a national footprint with global reach.

Autoleague is a company that touches all aspects of car ownership and mobility through our national new and used car retail and service footprint. All our offerings are powered by our digital retail platform, mymoto, and our software development arm, Autoleague X.

We are committed to our Purpose to become leaders in the ever-changing mobility landscape to be at the forefront of digitisation, electrification and ownership flexibility.

Name: Porsche Vietnam
Description:
Porsche có mặt tại thị trường Việt Nam vào năm 2007 thông qua nhà nhập khẩu và nhà phân phối chính thức là Công ty TNHH Xe Hơi Tối Thượng và Công ty TNHH Xe Hơi Thể Thao Uy Tín.

Thành công xác lập vị thế hàng đầu trong phân khúc ô tô thể thao hạng sang, Porsche Việt Nam duy trì cam kết vững mạnh trong đầu tư, cung cấp những dòng xe đậm chất thể thao mang tính cá nhân hóa cao, cùng nhiều sản phẩm và dịch vụ theo tiêu chuẩn của Porsche toàn cầu ngay tại Trung tâm Porsche Sài Gòn, Trung tâm Porsche Hà Nội và điểm đến phong cách sống Porsche Studio Hà Nội.

Porsche Việt Nam cũng mở rộng cơ hội hợp tác và kết nối với các đối tác tiềm năng để mang lại những giá trị cộng hưởng độc đáo cho khách hàng và những người yêu mến Porsche.

Name: BYD - Electrik Automobile
Description:
Bienvenue chez BYD, leader mondial de l'innovation de la mobilité électrique ! Depuis notre création en 1995, nous sommes engagés à créer un avenir plus durable en développant des véhicules électriques performants et écologiquement responsables. 

Electrik Automobile est le distributeur officiel BYD dans l'Ouest de la France. Venez essayer nos modèles électriques et hybrides rechargeables.

Retrouvez nos concessions à Angers, Brest, Caen, Lorient, Nantes, Quimper, Rennes, Saint-Brieuc et Vannes et réservez votre essai dès aujourd'hui pour découvrir l'expérience BYD !

Name: vibe moves you
Description:
Wir sind vibe – E-Mobilität im Abo, flexibel, markenunabhängig und auf Augenhöhe.

Was wir tun
Unser E-Auto Abo ist die smarte Alternative zu klassischen Finanzierungsformen. Ein Preis, alles drin: Versicherung, Service, Bereifung, Zulassung uvm. Keine langfristige Bindung, kein Restwertrisiko, null versteckte Kosten.

Warum es für dich funktioniert
Ob 1 Fahrzeug oder 100 – wir begleiten Flottenverantwortliche und Entscheidungsträger*innen persönlich und effizient: von der passenden Fahrzeugwahl über schnelle Lieferzeiten bis zu einem Nutzererlebnis, das begeistert. Und: Je länger du fährst, desto günstiger wird’s.

Unsere Vision
Eine elektrifizierte Zukunft, die für alle zugänglich und einfach ist. Mit Expertise, starken Partnern und einem wachsenden Ökosystem rund ums E-Auto gestalten wir E-Mobilität neu – international, innovativ und mit klarem Kundenfokus.

 Das E-Auto Abo von vibe: weniger Aufwand, mehr Wirkung. #goodvibes

Name: CFAO Equipment
Description:
Division spécialisée de CFAO Mobility, groupe CFAO, leader reconnu de la distribution en Afrique, CFAO Equipment propose des offres de vente, de location et de maintenance de biens d’équipement adaptées aux besoins de ses clients afin de les accompagner dans leur projet de développement sur le continent africain.
Vos partenaires opérationnels, engagés à vos côtés au quotidien.

POUR GARANTIR LA MAÎTRISE, LA SÉCURITÉ ET LA RENTABILITÉ OPTIMALE DE VOS OPÉRATIONS.
Nos équipes vous accompagnent sur vos projets avec une offre à 360° adaptée à vos besoins :
- Conseil 
- Vente
- Livraison
- Service
- Financement
  
Nous prenons le temps de comprendre vos attentes et votre besoin, pour vous conseiller au mieux et vous garantir une réponse adaptée à la nature de votre projet, votre budget, le niveau de service après vente souhaité.
Nous vous garantissons une transparence sur les délais de livraison et nous engageons à vous tenir informés à chaque étape de la livraison de votre matériel et lors de sa maintenance.
Nous nous engageons sur la qualité de la livraison et vous accompagnons dans la mise en place et la formation des opérateurs.

Name: Angolauto
Description: A Angolauto é o representante e Distribuidor oficial em Angola para as Marcas Suzuki, Scania e Random.

Name: FAI Autos
Description:
FAI Autos es una empresa sólida, dedicada a la venta y financiamiento vehículos nuevos y seminuevos, con más de 25 años en el mercado de la República Dominicana. Hoy en día cuenta con 9 sucursales distribuidas en Santo Domingo y la región Este del país. Cuenta con un portafolio robusto, que además de incluir todas las grandes marcas del sector, abarca el 88% de marcas de distribución autorizada en el país.

Junto con el crecimiento y la construcción de una trayectoria como marca, está la construcción de un equipo de profesionales comprometidos, que fundamentan su labor en la perseverancia de un servicio excepcional para nuestros clientes. 

FAI Autos más que una empresa es una familia, y tú eres parte de ella.

współpracujemy już ponad 30 lat, takie jak Volkswagen Samochody Osobowe, Volkswagen Samochody Dostawcze., Škoda, , Seat, Cupra oraz Audi.

Select. Secure. Drive.

Name: Pupil of Fate Motors
Description: Launched in August of  2022, Pupil of Fate LLC has a High-end, multi-brand Automobile showroom, an Rental Department & Service center located in the heart of Dubai. We Consist of a diverse, multi-lingual team waiting to welcome you at all times.

Name: TOYOTA VIOLA
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a la permanente búsqueda de la excelencia para satisfacer íntegramente las necesidades de nuestros clientes, con el máximo respeto por nuestra comunidad y proactivos en el cuidado del Medio Ambiente. 

Desde 1979, nos hemos embarcado en un camino de mejora continua, comprometidos a ofrecer una calidad excepcional en todos nuestros procesos. Nos especializamos en la compra y venta de vehículos 0 km de la prestigiosa marca TOYOTA, así como en brindar Servicios de Postventa, que incluyen reparaciones y mantenimiento. Nuestra Sede Central está ubicada en la Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, en el histórico Barrio de Barracas, y nos enorgullece formar parte de su rica tradición.

Comprometidos en poner especial atención en mantenernos dentro de los cánones de la ética y la conducta, cuyos valores y principios son observados consecuentemente para mantenernos dentro de las buenas costumbres y en el cumplimiento de la ley.

A través de nuestro compromiso con la calidad, la innovación y el respeto por el planeta, buscamos superar constantemente las expectativas de nuestros clientes.

Contamos además, con el talento y la pasión de nuestros colaboradores y la convicción de que siempre existe una mejor forma de hacer las cosas. En este camino, nos guía la filosofía "Toyota Way", cuyos principales valores son la mejora continua y el respeto por las personas. 

Nuestros principios y valores fundamentales que nos rigen: Respeto, Libertad, Justicia, Integridad, Profesionalismo, Excelencia y Calidad, nos ayudan a quienes formamos parte de Toyota Viola, a desempeñar mejor nuestro trabajo, a fortalecer el sentido de pertenencia, la cultura de servicio y a construir relaciones de confianza, abarcando el desempeño de nuestras acciones diarias, considerando tanto el impacto en lo económico, social como ambiental.

Estos son los pilares que nos sostienen, y son la base fundamental para el desarrollo y crecimiento de nuestra compañía.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires (CABA), Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Loop Brasil
Description:
Existe um bom negócio automotivo para todo mundo. A Loop tem todos.

Name: Kearys Motor Group
Description:
Kearys is Ireland's largest family owned motor groups, with 12 dealerships and over 450 employees. 

We have the best selection of new and used vehicles in the country with over 1750 displayed on our website www.kearys.ie and offer our end-to-end Deal & Deliver service too. 

Kearys represents BMW, MINI, Motorrad, Hyundai, Renault, Dacia and Nissan brands in Cork and Dublin. 

Also, Kearys Carstores in Dublin, Cork & Limerick display over 800 used cars at the most competitive prices in Ireland. We offer a no haggle, no hassle, no pressure service and a 12 month warranty on all vehicles. 

Kearys We Buy Cars is a seamless car buying journey with our expert team happy to offer a same day quotation and collection service. we buy cars.ie 

We are passionate about customer care and are proud of our highly skilled sales and after sales teams who are committed to giving you the best customer experience. 

Please contact us if you would like to test drive, trade in or sell your car for cash - we look forward to meeting you at one of our dealerships soon.

Name: XPENG Egypt
Description:
About XPENG, a leading NYSE-listed technology company, pioneers smart mobility solutions such as electric vehicles (EVs), electric vertical take-off, landing aircraft (eVTOL), and robotics. Our commitment to sustainable mobility drives our in-house R&D efforts, with 40% of our workforce dedicated to launching cutting-edge products.

About RAYA AUTO, a subsidiary of Raya Holding in Egypt, established in 2018, focuses on assembling and distributing modern EVs to the Egyptian market. As a premier manufacturer of scooters, motorcycles, and light commercial vehicles in Europe, Raya Auto solidifies its position as a key player in the automotive sector.

Name: Fletcher Jones Motorcars
Description:
Established in 1946 as well as being family owned and operated since 1946, the Fletcher Jones Company has grown into one of the largest and most respected automotive groups in the world.

Our flagship store, Fletcher Jones Motorcars in Newport Beach, is the Nation's #1 Mercedes-Benz Center in New Car Sales for 27 consecutive years* and for good reason.

Our Preferred Owner Benefits include many amenities such as a complimentary Mercedes-Benz courtesy vehicle and a complimentary hand car wash while you take advantage of our on-site shoeshine service.

Our boutique offers unique gifts and accessories while you enjoy a Starbucks coffee on us. Catch up on some work while using our workstations with Wi-Fi as the little ones play with the Nintendo Wii in the play area. During the holiday rush and travels, don't forget about our complimentary airport shuttle and parking.


*Number One Claim based on Calendar Year 1999-2025, per MBUSA National New Vehicle Sales Reporting.

3300 Jamboree Road
Newport Beach, CA 92660

949-267-3264
contact@fjmercedes.com

Name: NEUBAUER BMW
Description:
Un seul homme au départ...

L’origine de l’activité commerciale du groupe Neubauer remonte à la fin du 19ème siècle : Mr Albert NEUBAUER
créa les bases de ce qui deviendra une entreprise familiale.
En 1905, la Société NEUBAUER & FARMAN voit le jour à Paris.
Quelques années plus tard, en octobre 1935, la société familiale présidée par Jacques NEUBAUER s’agrandit et devient alors concessionnaire Peugeot avec un garage dans le 17ème arrondissement de Paris.
Le Groupe n’aura de cesse d’évoluer pour atteindre aujourd’hui une représentation importante en région parisienne avec 17 marques.

BMW NEUBAUER représente les marques BMW, BMW i et BMW M.

Que vous soyez un particulier ou un professionnel, nos équipes commerciales vous accompagnent dans vos démarches d'achat, de la découverte du modèle, en passant par l'essai et le choix de la solution de financement.

La proximité de nos différents sites nous permet de vous proposer une large gamme de véhicules à l'essai en permanence.

Le service après-vente et ses techniciens expérimentés vous apportent leur savoir-faire lors de l'intervention sur votre véhicule. 

L' équipe NEUBAUER.
