Name: BYD Harmony Auto Spain
Description:
Harmony Auto is the leading distributor group for luxury and ultra-luxury automobiles in China founded in 2005 and was listed on the main board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange in 2013 (stock code: 03836.HK).

The company focuses on the core business of selling luxury and ultra-luxury automobiles, representing prestigious brands such as Rolls-Royce, Bentley, Ferrari, BMW, and Lexus. In 2023, Harmony Auto established strategic collaborations with leading electric vehicle brands in China, such as BYD and Denza, to implement the national "Belt and Road" initiative and actively promote the development of electric vehicles in China.

Harmony Auto Spain was established in 2024. With an excellent reputation and authentic expertise, Harmony Auto distributes the prestigious BYD brand in Spain, offering an exclusively hybrid and electric vehicle lineup.

Name: PAVE
Description:
Welcome to PAVE, an AI-first solution thats brings the latest computer vision research and machine learning techniques to visual assessment. 

Our intelligent platform enables consumers and dealers to complete a guided vehicle inspection that generates a comprehensive condition report in only minutes.

PAVE. It’s not just artificial intelligence, it's automotive intelligence.

Headquartered in Toronto, our team brings deep expertise from the automotive and technology industries.

Twitter: @PAVEinspects

Name: Rick Case Automotive Group
Description:
The Rick Case Automotive Group, founded in 1962 in Northeast Ohio and also proudly serving Atlanta and South Florida since 1985. Today, Rita Case along with son, Ryan, and daughter, Raquel, and over 1,000 associates serve their customers operating Audi, Mazda, Hyundai, Genesis and Kia in Atlanta, Georgia; Honda Cars & Cycles, Acura, Hyundai, Kia, Volkswagen, Fiat, Alfa Romeo, Maserati, Genesis, and E-Z-Go, dealerships in South Florida – the Rick Case Automotive Group has forged an irrefutable reputation as one of the country’s leading dealers.
 
Rick Case Automotive Group attributes its growth to not just selling quality vehicles and products, but also to its unwavering commitment to customers. All Rick Case dealerships include customer lounges with workstations that have telephones, computers and Internet access for the customers’ convenience. Additionally, Rick Case personally along with all Rick Case managers, sales and service personnel are available 24 hours a day and provide customers with their home and cell phone numbers. 

Additionally, Rick Case Dealerships offer a Rick Case Rewards Program. All customers receive a Rewards Card, which earns Rewards Points with every purchase in sales, service and parts that can be used to save on future purchases, receive gas discounts and free car washes for life.
 
The Rick Case Automotive Group also contributes to the community. Many children are not fortunate enough to have a bike of their own. Fortunately, the Rick Case Bikes for Kids program, founded in 1982 by Rita and Rick Case of the Rick Case Automotive Group, has been making that dream a reality for needy children going on for over 40 years. Bikes in good condition are being collected at all Rick Case Automotive Group locations and then donated to a child in need for the holiday season. Rick Case believed your business is only as strong as the community around it, so it is important to support local residents and children, especially in their time of need.

Name: Volkswagen Dubai and Northern Emirates
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Al Nabooda Automobiles Volkswagen! 

As the exclusive authorized distributor for Volkswagen in Dubai and the Northern Emirates, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional automotive experiences. Established in 1976, Al Nabooda Automobiles LLC is a part of the prestigious Khalifa Juma Al Nabooda group and has since become synonymous with automotive excellence in the UAE.

Our journey began with a single showroom, and today we operate state-of-the-art facilities across Dubai, Sharjah, and Fujairah. Our dedicated and highly skilled team ensures that every interaction with us is personalized and memorable, whether you are purchasing a new vehicle, seeking maintenance, or exploring our range of certified pre-owned cars.

At Al Nabooda Volkswagen, we don’t just sell cars; we create lasting experiences. Our mission is to redefine service excellence by continually investing in cutting-edge facilities and nurturing lifelong relationships with our customers. We strive to be an employer of choice, attracting and developing top talent to maintain our high standards of service and innovation.

We invite you to join us on this exciting journey and experience the joy and thrill of owning a Volkswagen. Stay connected for the latest updates, news, and exclusive offers.

Experience the difference with Al Nabooda Automobiles Volkswagen – where your automotive dreams come to life.

Name: PT Hasjrat Abadi
Description: PT Hasjrat Abadi merupakan distributor eksklusif mobil TOYOTA dan sepeda motor YAMAHA dengan jaringan yang tersebar di wilayah Indonesia bagian Tengah dan Timur, dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Name: GVE LONDON
Description:
GVE London was founded in 2009 by David Rai and initially begun exporting luxury vehicles to the Far East. After excelling in this particular automotive field, David decided to bring his expertise and experience to the UK market. 

As a result, GVE London has established itself as one of the largest indoor luxury showrooms in the UK and a leading independent supercar dealer. We have gained a reputation of unparalleled customer service and an unmatchable selection of the most luxurious and performance focused supercars in the UK. All the vehicles we advertise are physically available to purchase from our showroom.

Name: Car Marketing System
Description:
Leasing premium used vehicles: a great way to treat yourself. Leader on this market, Car Marketing System has been by your side since 1998, in your search for the rare gem, which will make you vibrate to the rhythm of its engine.

The concept

Inspired by an Anglo-Saxon concept, leasing is the rental with purchase option (LOA or leasing) of vehicles. CMS has made it its core business while specializing in top-of-the-range second-hand vehicles. In 2005, the company was taken over by a team with a passion for cars, coming from the Consulting and Finance sector.

A leading position

In France, the market for rental with purchase option (LOA or leasing) of second-hand top-of-the-range vehicles is gradually developing, but CMS maintains its leading position. More than 3000 customers all over the country have shown their confidence in us. Always more demanding, their satisfaction leads them in many cases to renew their experience with us, for a superior category vehicle.

Independence

CMS is totally independent of car manufacturers. As a result, we can advise you objectively and offer you the top-of-the-range vehicle that meets all your expectations. We rely on a network of some 340 official dealerships of premium brands (Porsche, Audi, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Mercedes Benz, etc.) in France and Europe.

Name: Flow Automotive Companies
Description:
Flow Automotive was founded in 1957 with one pre-owned automotive center in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. Over sixty years later, we have experienced tremendous growth and now have 50+ locations throughout North Carolina and Virginia, representing more than 20 manufacturers. Our continued success has been driven by a strategy to attract and develop outstanding employees who are committed to operational excellence and providing extraordinary personal service. We are grateful for the many dedicated members of our organization who have made our growth possible. Flow Automotive serves as a pillar in local communities through partnerships in numerous non-profit organizations. We also encourage our employees to get involved by offering paid volunteer opportunities in addition to many other benefits.

After 65+ years in the retail automobile business, Flow Companies continues to be defined by three simple principles:

1. A covenant with our customers to be a place that keeps its promises and is worthy of their trust.

2. A community of people who work together towards a common vision.

3. A commitment to work towards the common good of every city where we do business.

Name: Baxter Auto
Description:
Baxter Auto Group is one of the nation's leading automotive retail groups, serving the communities of Omaha and Lincoln, Nebraska, the greater Kansas City area, Madison, Wisconsin, and Colorado Springs, Colorado. The company operates 20 dealerships and represents eight of the nation's top automotive brands, including Ford, Lexus, Toyota, Audi, Volkswagen, Honda, Subaru, and Mercedes-Benz. 
 
At Baxter Auto, we have always had strong convictions around delivering the best customer experiences, valuing our employees, and contributing to our communities. These goals are the framework of our company’s Purpose, Vision, Mission, and Mindsets.
 
Our Purpose is to empower people with the freedom to experience a fulfilling life.
 
Our Vision is to be the retailer that best delivers the most remarkable experiences for our employees and guests.
 
Our Mission is to be great teammates to each other, to provide tremendous care to our guests, and to represent our manufacturer brands with excellence.
 
Our Mindsets are how we show up when we’re at our best and are the foundation for achieving our Purpose, Vision, and Mission.
- Win together
- Make it matter
- Be authentic
- Be caring
- Welcome differences
- Stay curious
 
We recently announced an additional investment of more than $10 million over the next five years in significant improvements to our overall employee experience. To us, a remarkable employee experience is focused around four key pillars:
- Well-being
- Purpose
- Growth
- Belonging
 
We focus on employee well-being by incorporating flexible workplace practices, competitive compensation, and benefits that foster physical, mental, and financial well-being. Some of our benefits include top-tier health insurance, flexible vacation & sick leave, paid parental leave, 401(k) plan, flexible work arrangements, vehicle discounts, and tuition reimbursements.

Name: Mohammad Saleh & Reza Yousuf Behbehani Co.
Description:
Established by two brothers in 1963, Mohammad Saleh & Reza Yousuf Behbehani Company is one of the most successful and best selling vehicle dealers in Kuwait and in the region, with a long history of achievements, advancement and successful businesses.

The company has one of the most modern and luxurious sales facilities on both regional and international levels, in addition to a state of the art maintenance workshops and service facilities in the Middle East. The Quick Service workshop is equipped with the latest devices, machines, advanced technical equipment and professional maintenance technicians trained in accordance with the latest administrative and technical development programs.

Mohammad Saleh & Reza Yousuf Behbehani Co. is one of the first companies that received GM tribute and appreciation for its distinctive performance and the success it continually achieves in terms of sales and customer service. We have succeeded in occupying the first position on an international level with regard to sales of Envoy vehicles in 2004, 2005 and 2006 in addition to the second position among all GMC vehicle dealers and distributors in the world. It is currently deemed as one of the leading Kuwaiti companies on a local and international level.

1964: We acquired the "Beaumont" and "Acadian" vehicles agency from General Motors Company and continued to import and sell them in the local market.

1966: GM announced that the company will discontinue the manufacture of the two vehicles mentioned above.

1967: Behbehani acquired GMC Distribution in the state of Kuwait. This actually constituted a good start for the company which preserved this successful path throughout the years and achieved record sales for "Buick" cars alone in 1992 as the sales reached 1,922 vehicles. From that point on there was no looking back. Behbehani continued to expand its portfolio and is now the sole distributor of GMC vehicles in Kuwait.

Name: Trivett
Description:
Trivett is one of Australia's leading prestige automotive groups, representing brands such as Subaru, Peugeot and Citroen. With dealerships in Sydney, Melbourne and Brisbane, we pride ourselves in offering a professional, seamless purchasing experience in our state-of-the art showrooms. Our extensive range of new and certified approved pre-owned used vehicles, combined with our competitive finance options, mean we can accommodate for almost every customer's individual needs and budget.

At Trivett, we believe that purchasing a vehicle is just the first step of the ownership journey. Our factory-trained, award-winning staff are on hand to service and maintain your vehicle in our world-class servicing facilities. We offer genuine parts and accessories to keep your vehicle in top condition, with our service centres featuring concierge services, coffee bars, wireless internet, and space to relax and unwind.

We know how important it is to have exceptional people with a wide range of skills and capabilities. At Trivett, we focus on developing our people and ensuring we have a great workplace. We measure our success not just by sales but by customer experience and quality of our work. Trivett values honesty, friendliness, customer service, loyalty, curiosity and attention to detail. Our staff are dedicated to providing the best care at all times during your vehicle ownership journey.

Social Media Guidelines:
Whilst we welcome all questions and commentary – including constructive feedback – and want all members of our community to be able to express their opinions and experiences freely; for legal reasons, all posts on official Trivett social media channels are regularly moderated in line with our Social Media Guidelines: https://bit.ly/3SJJ54M

Name: Fields Auto Group
Description:
Fields Auto Group the nation's Premier Luxury Auto Group!  We are proud to serve our customers in Florida, Illinois, Wisconsin, and North Carolina.  Family owned and operated, Fields Auto began with the opening of Fields Cadillac in Evanston, IL in 1971. 

Currently, we represent Bentley, BMW, Cadillac, Chrysler, Dodge, Jaguar, Jeep, Lamborghini, Land Rover, Lexus, Mazda, Mercedes-Benz, MINI, Porsche, RAM, Rolls-Royce, Sprinter and Volvo Cars.  We also carry an extensive selection of pre-owned vehicles, many of which have extended warranties thanks to manufacturers' Certification Programs.

Everyone who purchases or leases a vehicle from Fields Auto Group is entitled to complimentary loaner vehicles with service appointments, as well as free car washes for the life of the vehicle.  Our commitment to building long term relationships with our customers has enabled Fields to grow from a single store in 1971 to North America's premier luxury auto group.  We specialize in ensuring that our customers get the right vehicle and packages not only for their driving needs and budget, but for their lifestyle as well.

We believe our employees are our greatest asset. As such, we treat all employees with respect and appreciation for their contributions to the company. We believe not only in providing ongoing training, but also rewarding outstanding effort and results through bonus and commission programs.

We're always on the lookout for highly motivated and resourceful individuals, who can both contribute to and be part of a proactive and customer-focused team in a positive work environment.

Name: CFAO Mobility Mauritius
Description:
CFAO Mobility, the Mauritian subsidiaries of CFAO Automotive, is the largest automobile network in Africa and the French overseas territories.

CFAO Mobility Mauritius was set up in 1997 and is the exclusive Mauritian distributor for numerous internationally renowned brands: Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Suzuki, Mitsubishi Fuso, Riken, Techking and Motul.

It sells a broad range of brand-new Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen and Suzuki passenger and commercial vehicles, the No.1 selling truck, Mitsubishi Fuso, the acclaimed Motul oils & car care products and renowned Riken and Techking tyres. CFAO Mobility serves the whole island from its base in Pailles, Phoenix, Forbach and Tamarin providing customers with upmost service and reliability.

It comprises a team of over 130 skilled professionals striving for customer satisfaction through a relentless focus on quality and compliance with automakers' international standards of excellence.
Location: Temple Road, Michael Leal Avenue, Pailles

Name: ClassTrucks
Description:
ClassTrucks is part of the Girteka Group and the go-to partner for fleet owners who value transparency, expertise, and reliability. Since 2010, we’ve specialized in young-used trucks and semi-trailers from premium brands - Volvo, Mercedes, MAN, Scania, Schmitz Cargobull, Krone, and Chereau - each sourced from a single owner and backed by a complete maintenance history. 

Before the sale, every vehicle receives a manufacturer-authorized service inspection and a final quality check, ensuring it’s ready to hit the road immediately. Operating across Spain, the Netherlands, Poland, and Lithuania, we supply both large volumes of same-specification units and tailored mixes of premium brands, striking the right balance between purchase price and high performance. 

Our end-to-end service streamlines the buying process so fleet owners can stay focused on their business. 

As your trusted, transparent partner, ClassTrucks makes fleet renewal and expansion easy and cost-effective, delivering the right vehicles in the right condition exactly when you need them.

We are a world-class specialists in minibus and small coach customisations. Whether you are a vehicle dealer, single vehicle enterprise or fleet operator you can expect expert advice, price, and service from EVM. 
Our expert teams are based across the UK and Ireland, and we deliver trusted solutions to customers around the globe.

Our Promise to You
We are committed to constant growth and progress and setting the highest standards in our field. We share our customers’ pride in seeing the best possible vehicles on the road. Striking the perfect balance between luxury, performance and value requires a careful consideration for the finer details. 
We will always endeavour to offer the best price and long-term return on your investment. You can expect clear and sincere product information delivered in a timely manner. 

Our Values
Everyone at EVM is determined to ensure that you receive the best customer service. Our values are the cornerstones of our operations. You can always rely on us to be:

Authentic
Trust and transparency are important values to everyone at EVM. Our sales teams have a combined experience of x years within the industry. We will offer the best advice and timely communication throughout the purchase process. 

Dynamic

Description:
At CFAO Mobility Nigeria, we are dedicated to providing top-quality vehicles and services to meet the diverse needs of our customers. In the passenger car, SUV, and light commercial vehicle segment, we proudly offer renowned brands such as Toyota, Mitsubishi, and Suzuki.

For our B2B customers, we provide specialized solutions with robust options including Fuso trucks, King Long buses, Toyota forklifts, Howo trucks, Techking tyres, and a variety of construction equipment. Additionally, we offer Yamaha motorcycles and outboard engines, known for their performance and reliability.

Our services are designed to enhance the overall customer experience. Under the LOXEA brand, we offer corporate leasing, providing flexible and efficient leasing solutions for businesses. Through our Winpart brand, we supply aftermarket multi-brand spare parts, ensuring our customers have access to quality parts for their vehicles at the right prices. Some of our brands include Motul, Denso, Bosch, and KYB, among others.

Our quick service franchise, Autofast, ensures that vehicle maintenance is convenient and reliable. Additionally, our growing network of service outlets in Total filling stations in Lagos and Abuja makes these services easily accessible.

Join us at CFAO Mobility Nigeria, where we are committed to driving excellence and delivering exceptional value to our customers.

Name: AUSEV
Description:
At AUSEV, we recognise the scale of transformation underway across Australia’s mining and commercial sectors. Companies are moving from words to action on decarbonisation, and we’re proud to be at the forefront of that shift. Our team has engineered and developed the only heavy-duty, mine-spec 4x4 electric ute — the Ford F-150 Lightning — already validated in some of the harshest mine environments across the country.

We’re a 100 % Australian-owned company with manufacturing capability in Queensland and a national support network spanning every major mining region. From Brisbane and Sydney to Karratha, Newman, and Mount Isa, our hubs and partner sites provide full-life vehicle support, rapid parts supply, and service continuity. This network ensures our clients’ fleets remain operational, safe, and supported wherever they operate.

Most importantly, we are ready now. With a proven product, a fully established supply and service footprint, and trusted partners, AUSEV empowers the mining sector to electrify with confidence. This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to reshape how mining operates — building Australian industry, capability, and a cleaner future.

Name: Grupo Takai
Description:
Nossa Jornada:

Em 2003, a Honda Takai iniciava as atividades em Blumenau, com a venda dos primeiros automóveis Honda no vale do Itajaí. No mesmo ano, era inaugurada a segunda loja do grupo em Balneário Camboriú.
Prosseguindo com o crescimento de mercado da marca, em 2007 chegava à Brusque nossa terceira loja, com estrutura completa para o cliente Honda: Vendas, Serviços Financeiros, Assistência Técnica, Funilaria e Pintura, entre outros.
Buscando aperfeiçoar nossa competitividade para os anos seguintes, em 2014 transferimos nossa loja de automóveis Honda de Balneário Camboriú para Itajaí.
No ano de 2016 mantendo o foco de oferecer uma melhor experiência aos clientes, realizamos a transferência da loja Honda de Brusque para novas instalações mais modernas e mais bem localizadas.
Em 2019, com o crescimento do mercado de seminovos, inauguramos a Takai Select, no Vale Auto Shopping de Itajaí especializada em veículos Honda e Multimarcas selecionados e de procedência. E para acompanhar o mercado em expansão, no primeiro semestre de 2022 ocorreu a ampliação da operação da Takai Select inaugurando a segunda loja - na cidade de Blumenau.
A sede da Honda Takai em 2021 recebeu atualizações em sua estrutura dentro dos novos padrões Honda. Além da gama de produtos e serviços ao cliente Honda, a unidade mantém também a área Administrativa, Planejamento comercial e logístico e Central de peças.

Está no nosso DNA, promover a melhor experiência para quem compra, vende e vive Takai, estando presente em nosso dia-a-dia.

Somos muito gratos por fazer parte da vida de clientes que nos têm como referência quando o assunto é Honda. Clientes que confiam em nós para seus novos negócios e também para a manutenção e revisão de seus veículos.

Nossa motivação é e sempre será ouvir os feedbacks de nossos clientes, pois são fundamentais para a condução da nossa jornada.

Takai, desde 2003 seu melhor negócio Honda!

Name: eSTART Coalition
Description:
Today, we can do almost everything online simply, securely, and seamlessly. Yet, title and registration processes still run on paper, resulting in raising costs, slowing down service, and limiting choices and convenience for consumers, who prefer simple online processes. Technology solutions are cost-effective, readily available, benefit everyone, and often only require minor changes in law and policy to be implemented.

WHO WE ARE
The eSTART Coalition is a group of aligned stakeholders – welcoming to government, industry partners, associations, and others – fostering a belief in the value of shared conversations about modernizing title and registration processes across every State.

MISSION
Our mission is to save the automotive industry AND consumers valuable time and money by modernizing the title and registration process.

OBJECTIVES
We aim to modernize three key components of vehicle transactions:
• Electronic signatures on title & registration documents
• Electronic title & registration submission & processing
• Electronic vehicle record transfers

Name: BYD Company Europe
Description:
Diversification, Automotive, Rail Transit, Renewable Energy, Electronics
car
BYD has developed industry-leading blade battery, e-Platform 3.0 and dual-mode hybrid technologies to accelerate the once-in-a-century transition from fossil fuel-powered vehicles to electric vehicles.
blade battery
Enhanced security
Unique flat rectangular shape improves cooling efficiency and preheat performance. Blade Battery has passed the nail penetration test safely and will not emit fire or smoke.
optimize strength
Arranged in an array within a battery pack, each cell acts as a structural beam to help withstand forces. Aluminum honeycomb structure, high-strength panels are used on the top and bottom of the package, which greatly enhances the rigidity in the vertical direction.
longer range
Compared with traditional battery packs, blade batteries have more than 50% improved space utilization, providing higher energy density and longer range.
longer service life
Blade batteries have a long battery life of over 5000 charge and discharge cycles.
Electronic Platform 3.0
Give full play to the advantages of intelligence, efficiency, safety, and beauty brought by electrification.
Safety
The e-Platform 3.0 doubles the rigidity of the vehicle after integrating the blade battery into the body. The blade battery is both an energy storage unit and a structural part. It plays a vital role in improving the structure and safety performance of the vehicle.
high efficiency
The world's first mass-produced 8-in-1 electric powertrain is standard, and the overall system efficiency is as high as 89%.
intelligence
The evolution from the distributed electronic and electrical architecture to the integrated domain control architecture greatly improves the system interaction efficiency and iterative capability, and realizes the continuous automation upgrade of the whole vehicle.

Name: STERNPARTNER
Description:
Ihr autorisierter Mercedes-Benz Verkaufs- und Service-Partner - an 24 Standorten in Hamburg & Niedersachsen.

Wenn Sie Mercedes-Fahrer in Norddeutschland nach dem Händler ihres Vertrauens fragen, erhalten sie auch heute noch sehr vielfältige Antworten: Mürdter, Rudeloff, Frido Anders, Kuhlow, Santelmann, Hans Tesmer … Alles klangvolle Namen mit langer Tradition, einem unglaublichen Know-how und einer tiefen Verbundenheit zur Region. Über Jahrzehnte hinweg prägten diese Unternehmen den Markt, bis es im Jahr 2000 zu zwei großen Fusionen kam. Die Mercedes-Benz Vertretungen Frido Anders in Uelzen, Santelmann in Lüneburg, Mürdter-Kuhlow in Soltau und Celle sowie das Autohaus Mathias Kuhlow Walsrode schlossen sich zur neu gegründeten STERNPARTNER GmbH & Co. KG mit Sitz in Uelzen zusammen. Etwas weiter im Norden fusionierten zeitgleich die Unternehmen Hans Tesmer und Rudeloff Automobile – schon damals unter der Führung von Klaus-Günther Mohrmann als Geschäftsführer und Hans-Adolf Völsch als alleiniger Gesellschafter, die bis heute die Erfolgsgeschichte des Unternehmens schreiben.

Heraus kamen zwei große Mercedes-Benz Vertreter, die den Markt zwischen Hamburg und Hannover über 20 Jahre hinweg in friedlicher Co-Existenz bearbeitet haben. Beide fühlen sich Ihrer langen Tradition und den Wurzeln, die teilweise über 100 Jahre in die automobile Geschichte zurückreichen, zutiefst verpflichtet. Eine Philosophie, die die Basis für den nächsten großen Zusammenschluss in der norddeutschen Mercedes-Benz Vertreterwelt gelegt hat. Am 01. Januar 2021 gingen die Unternehmen STERNPARTNER und Hans Tesmer in der neuen STERNPARTNER GmbH & Co. KG mit Sitz in Hamburg auf. So wurde aus zwei großen, Norddeutschlands größte Mercedes-Benz Vertretung. Die Gruppe umfasst insgesamt 20 Autohäuser und Servicestützpunkte, die weiterhin als Hans Tesmer und STERNPARTNER am Markt auftreten. Mehr als 1.100 Mitarbeiter sind für die überwiegend regionale Kundschaft aktiv und sorgen für Mobilität.

Name: Carmall
Description:
Carmall LLC is a professional car importing company with a huge amount of experience operating in Georgia. We specialize in importing vehicles from all over the world, ensuring that our customers have access to a wide range of vehicles to choose from. At Carmall LLC, we pride ourselves on providing a comprehensive service that includes insurance, history checks, and warranties for gearbox and engine, as well as a 1-year warranty for used cars.

Our friendly and knowledgeable team is dedicated to providing the best possible customer experience, and we always go the extra mile to ensure that our customers are satisfied with their purchases. Whether you're looking for a brand new vehicle or a high-quality used car, you can trust us to provide you with the best possible service.

One of the unique aspects of our company is that we offer our customers the opportunity to buy a used car with the experience of a service center. Our team of experienced mechanics can provide expert advice on the condition of a vehicle and ensure that any necessary repairs are made before it is sold. This means that our customers can have peace of mind knowing that they are buying a reliable and well-maintained vehicle.

At Carmall LLC, we believe that buying a car should be an enjoyable and stress-free experience, and we are committed to making that a reality for our customers. So if you're looking for a reliable and professional car importing company in Georgia, look no further than Carmall LLC.

Our goal is to create a new standard for buying a car in Georgia. With the help of experts with 10 years of experience and unique services, it is possible to bring a car or buy it on the spot with conditions tailored to the customer.

Name: Grupo Azzurra
Description:
Há mais de 55 anos no mercado automotivo da cidade do Rio de Janeiro, somamos um time de mais de 500 profissionais, movimentando, atualmente, 16 Concessionárias e uma Corretora de Seguros. Nossos processos são focados na excelência do atendimento, objetivando criação de valor e um relacionamento ético e duradouro com nossos clientes.
A partir da Visão dos nossos fundadores de “Sermos referência no mercado de produtos e serviços que comercializamos”, temos, continuamente, aprimorado e alinhado nossas estratégias de atuação à intenção subjacente da nossa Missão, também inspirada nos ensinamentos que herdamos:
“Comercializar produtos e serviços com honestidade e ética, focados na plena satisfação do cliente, respeitando parceiros e colaboradores, objetivando liderar o mercado e expandir nossas atividades”.

  Para nós, a qualidade no atendimento nos diferentes segmentos de atuação, é essencial e prioritária, o que é evidenciado pela nossa trajetória de sucesso crescente, cuja base organizacional e tecnológica tem por objetivo conquistar, manter e ampliar permanentemente a satisfação dos clientes.

  Nosso compromisso com a melhoria contínua se caracteriza pela inovação e pelo aprimoramento dos produtos e serviços que oferecemos, e também é fruto de constantes investimentos na formação do nosso pessoal.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Popular Hyundai
Description:
Popular Hyundai is one of the largest dealers of Hyundai motor India Ltd. in Kerala. Our corporate office located on NH 47 byepass Kochi and is one of the best Hyundai showrooms in Kerala because of the long history in automobile business as well as the quality in service.

All types of Hyundai cars are displayed here and the customers can experience the ultra fast delivery of cars. Popular Hyundai is well known for its 1.5 hrs express service and 20 minutes insurance renewal. Every customer will be a member of our privilege club. The customers will be rewarded with points in their privilege card for each delivery and service. Customers can redeem these points to get our guaranteed gifts.

Our showroom has all new models of Hyundai cars. The customers who prefer to buy a used car can also get the services of Popular Group through H-Promise, Our used car showroom which provides Hyundai motor India certified used cars to the customers. H-Promise certified cars will have one year or 20,000 km (whichever earlier) warranty and can be serviced at any Hyundai service center in India. The buyer will get 2 free service and certificate along with warranty booklet.

Our service centers are equipped with most modern technology along with experienced technicians and service engineers. Popular Hyundai will rectify all the problems of your car in a short span of time and will provide world class service.

Popular Hyundai is well known for its customer care facilities. We provide 24/7 emergency service helpline, dial a service, online service booking etc. Popular Hyundai has been awarded in national as well as in International level for the excellence in sales and service.

Total customer satisfaction is the prime motive of Popular Hyundai and we believe in long term relationship with the customers. After all Popular Hyundai is the ultimate solution to all the problems of your car.

Name: Fenabrave
Description:
Representamos 59 Associações de Marca que reúnem 8.225 Concessionários de Veículos dos segmentos de automóveis, comerciais leves, caminhões, ônibus, implementos rodoviários, motocicletas e máquinas agrícolas, em 979 cidades do Brasil. Um setor que responde, diretamente, por 5,79% do PIB Nacional e pela geração de 370 mil empregos. 
Desde 1965, movemos o país sobre rodas, por meio de empresas de capital nacional e, em sua grande maioria, de estrutura familiar, que passam de geração a geração, realizando sonhos e provendo riquezas e gerando empregos ao Brasil. 
Nossa missão é ser a voz do Setor da Distribuição de Veículos no Brasil, zelando pelo cumprimento da Lei 6729/79, representando os interesses políticos, econômicos e legais da categoria econômica dos Concessionários, trabalhando em parceria com as Associações de Marca. 
Contribuímos para a formação e desenvolvimento de profissionais e gestores do segmento, além de desenvolver e debater as melhores práticas de processos e negócios, por meio de intercâmbios com entidades congêneres internacionais e programas educacionais, como os desenvolvidos pela Universidade Fenabrave e em eventos como o Congresso & ExpoFenabrave, consagrado como o 2o. maior do setor no mundo.
Embarque conosco nesta emocionante jornada sobre rodas!

Name: Groupe Autosphere Belux
Description:
Groupe Autosphere Belux est un réseau de concessionnaires officiels présent à Bruxelles, dans la province de Liège, la province de Luxembourg et au Grand-Duché de Luxembourg. Nous représentons et distribuons certaines des marques automobiles les plus reconnues en Europe.

À Bruxelles et au Grand-Duché de Luxembourg, nous assurons la distribution des marques Renault, Dacia et Alpine. Dans la province de Liège et la province de Luxembourg, nous représentons les marques Volkswagen, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA, Škoda et Volkswagen Utilitaires.

Avec plus de 45 points de vente et ateliers mécaniques ainsi qu'une dizaine de carrosseries agréées toutes marques, Groupe Autosphere Belux est un acteur de proximité au service des particuliers et des entreprises. Nous proposons également un vaste choix de véhicules d’occasion, avec plus de 1 000 voitures disponibles immédiatement.

Notre expertise ne se limite pas à la vente et à l’entretien automobile. Grâce à nos équipes spécialisées en Fleet & Business, nous accompagnons les entreprises dans la gestion de leur mobilité :

- Conseils en fiscalité automobile et anticipation des évolutions réglementaires ;
- Gestion de parc automobile (avec une approche TCO affinée); 
- Aménagement de véhicules utilitaires;
- Personnalisation d’une offre et la négociation du prix au meilleur niveau.
-Etc.

Notre mission est claire : offrir des solutions de mobilité adaptées à chaque client, que ce soit pour un usage privé ou professionnel.

Name: SWM Turkiye
Description:
The SWM brand was founded in Italy in 1971. Shineray Holdings made the purchase of SWM in 2014. In 2016, Brilliance Shineray Chongqing Automobile Co., Ltd. of Shineray Holdings formally incorporated SWM into the new passenger vehicle brand: SWM Motors .

SWM Motors respectively established its Design Center and R&D Center in Milan, Italy and Chongqing (China). SWM Motors built a headquarters in Fuling District, Chongqing, with an annual production of 300,000 complete vehicles and 300,000 engines.

As of October 2023, it has been serving in Turkey with the assurance of ATMO Group.

Name: Shasheela Motors Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Shasheela Motors Pvt. Ltd., established in 2015, is a trusted and authorized distributor of leading global vehicle brands in Nepal, including Higer EV Vans, Keyton Motors, Cherry Wanda, and Vanche EV. Strategically headquartered at Annapurna Chowk in Shasheela Tower, Kathmandu, we are driven by innovation, professionalism, and a deep commitment to transforming the mobility landscape of Nepal.

We specialize in commercial and electric vehicles that are future-ready, efficient, and reliable. From EV vans offering an impressive range of up to 400 kilometers to durable commercial models backed by up to 8 years or 400,000 kilometers of warranty, our products are tailored to meet the diverse needs of the Nepali market. Our services also include accessible financing options, a growing network of showrooms, and easy online booking tools to enhance your vehicle purchasing experience.

Mission:
Our mission is to deliver high-value, customer-centric mobility solutions that support the growth of businesses and individuals alike. At Shasheela Motors, we believe in building strong, ethical relationships with our customers, employees, and partners—fostering a culture of transparency, trust, and long-term success.
Vision
As we look ahead, Shasheela Motors envisions becoming one of Nepal’s leading names in the electric and commercial vehicle industry. We are focused on continuous innovation and sustainable growth, determined to drive Nepal toward a smarter, greener transportation future.

The modern flagship showroom of Mitsubishi is located in Al Rai, while additional new and used car showrooms are located in prime locations across Kuwait. The complete range of Mitsubishi vehicles, from small to medium sedans, SUVs, SPVs as well as commercial vehicles such as pickups and mini buses are available through the showrooms.

 

Al Mulla Group also offers specialized teams of professional sales staff to cater to different customer requirements. The retail team serves walk-in customers in the retail showrooms, while the fleet team is dedicated to offering fleet solutions for corporate and business entities. In addition, a wholesale team focuses solely on government and quasi-government projects and tenders.

- Consultancy – Providing expert consultancy to help businesses implement and scale EV charging networks.
- Off-Grid Charging Systems – Sustainable charging solutions for remote or off-grid locations.
- MEP – Full Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing services for the design and implementation of EV charging infrastructure.

Name: Autocorp.ai
Description:
At Autocorp.ai, we are pioneering the future of the mobility industry by integrating cutting-edge fintech with the latest in E-commerce technology, ID Verification, Lender Intentions and Fraud Prevention solutions. Our mission is to transform the automotive market landscape, offering both consumers and dealerships a seamless, secure, and superior buying and selling journey. By leveraging our deep industry insights and technological expertise, we provide a comprehensive suite of Virtual Retailing Tools & Software designed to streamline the car shopping and buying process.

By integrating cutting-edge online financing options, including real time credit data with seamless lender integrations, we ensure a smooth, secure, and efficient digital experience for all users. Our comprehensive suite of services not only enhances operational efficiency for dealers but also revolutionizes the customer journey, making every transaction as transparent and user-friendly as possible.

In an era where digital transformation is key, Autocorp.ai stands out by providing a holistic approach to virtual retailing in the automotive sector. Our solutions are crafted to meet the dual needs of fraud prevention and efficient eCommerce transactions, thereby setting new standards in the industry. With a keen focus on integrating real time credit paired with lenders into the digital experience, we facilitate a seamless connection between financing options and consumer needs, ensuring every interaction is optimized for satisfaction and security. This unique blend of technology and service excellence positions Autocorp.ai as a leader in the future of automotive fintech, driving forward with innovation, integrity, and an unwavering commitment to revolutionizing the way the world shops for and purchases vehicles.

Name: Connolly Motor Group
Description:
Connolly Motor Group is a family-run company since 1939 that is grounded in tradition and our family’s passion for cars while operating a very modern business from our state-of-the-art showrooms in Ballina, Sligo, Letterkenny, and Galway. 

We have 14 dealerships across the west of Ireland and employ over 300 staff.

Connolly Motor Group represents Audi, Volkswagen, Mercedes-Benz, Hyundai, SEAT, CUPRA, Volkswagen Commercials, Volvo and MG Motor.

We also operate our used car supermarket The Car Centre which offers affordable used vehicles, all makes and models, all sourced as trade-ins from the 15 dealerships in the Connolly Motor Group. The Car Centre has dealerships located in Ballina, Sligo, and Galway.

We pride ourselves in excellence – both in the knowledge and expertise of our technicians and salespeople as well as the quality and dedication of our after-sales and customer care teams.

Looking to sell your car for cash? Then contact our buying team at Sell My Car to Connollys. We will buy your car, any make, any model! We purchase 1000’s of vehicles every year, we are a trusted source with a professional team who are here to help you with every step of your car-selling journey. Sell your car, the easy way.

Please contact your local Connolly's dealer if you'd like to book a test drive, sell your car for cash, or book your vehicle in for a service. Our family looks forward to welcoming you to our dealerships.

Name: Hemmings
Description:
Hemmings is a collector car marketplace and services provider for car enthusiasts. Through multimedia content and a new mobile app, the audience can research tens of thousands of vehicle listings to buy or sell via Classified, Auction, or Make Offer programs.

Road-ready vehicles can be sold at Hemmings Auctions after a listing specialist interviews the seller and each vehicle is carefully reviewed. Hemmings Make Offer product allows a seller to set their own asking price, get offers and retain 100% of the sales price. Hemmings’ Classified ads, which are free to browse, list thousands of cars for sale by dealerships and private sellers.

Hemmings also offers publications in both print and digital formats, original video programming and live events.  Hemmings is the largest publisher of collector car magazines, producing Hemmings Classic Car, Hemmings Muscle Machines and its flagship title Hemmings Motor News.

Hemmings was acquired in April 2002 by American City Business Journals Inc. of Charlotte, North Carolina, and part of Advance Media.

Name: Groupe Legrand
Description:
Le Groupe Legrand, c’est avant tout l’histoire d’une famille animée depuis plus d’un siècle par la passion automobile. 

Implantée dans le nord-ouest de la France depuis 4 générations, le groupe a connu ces dernières années une expansion rapide, intégrant efficacement de nouvelles plaques pour des marques prestigieuses telles que Ford, Citroën/DS, Peugeot, Honda, Lotus ; tout en se diversifiant dans les secteurs du loisirs, motocycle et du nautisme.

Cette stratégie a permis d'atteindre un chiffre d'affaires de 320 millions d’euros, à travers 39 concessions qui distribuent 30 marques de renommées.

Le groupe a déployé une approche organisationnelle et managériale axée sur l'intrapreneuriat, encourageant la prise d'initiative et l'amélioration continue des 628 collaborateurs œuvrent quotidiennement pour offrir des produits et des services de qualité.

L’ambition du groupe familial est d’optimiser la performance des marques représentées et d'intensifier la présence régionale dans le Grand Ouest, tout en assurant un accompagnement client exemplaire pour répondre aux exigences élevées des partenaires.

Le Groupe Legrand allie aujourd'hui tout le savoir-faire des marques avec lesquelles il travaille. Il s’engage sur un chemin de croissance et d’innovation dans le monde de la mobilité.
Location: Le Mans, Pays de la Loire

Name: Valec Renault
Description:
A Renault inova e produz carros no Brasil desde 1998, ano de inauguração do Complexo Ayrton Senna em São José dos Pinhais no Paraná. Ao longo de duas décadas, a marca já produziu cerca de 3 milhões de veículos e quase 4 milhões de motores destinados ao mercado nacional e também a vários estados americanos.
 
A VALEC RENAULT nasce no mesmo ano de inauguração da fábrica Renault no Brasil, em 1998, com a concessionária em Jundiaí (SP).
 
Depois disso, com objetivos ambiciosos, a Valec Renault seguiu apostando no mercado automotivo da região. Em setembro do ano 2000, chegava à cidade de Sorocaba.
 
Quatro anos depois, em 2004, já estava em Campinas e, em junho de 2005, tamanho o sucesso, a VALEC abriu sua segunda unidade na cidade. Já em dezembro de 2011 inaugurou-se a loja na cidade de Valinhos.
 
Assim, com mais de 20 anos de tradição a Valec Renault se consolidou na região, ultrapassando até as fronteiras das cidades em que atua. Muitos são os fatores que influenciaram nessa conquista. A Valec acreditou na expansão de seus serviços e qualificação em todos os setores. Sendo assim, além de oferecer toda a gama de veículos de passeio 0km da marca, é referência quando se trata de utilitários, cuidando da manutenção e transformação desses veículos adequando-os para a necessidade de cada cliente.

Name: PAG Direct
Description:
We are excited to announce that Phaeton Automotive Group is now - PAG Direct.

As a natural evolution of the Phaeton brand, PAG Direct speaks to our promise. That is to be an innovation leader in the automotive retail industry, continuously redefining the digital and in-store experience for Canadians seeking to purchase and service the highest quality vehicles, and do it on their own terms.

PAG Direct is comprised of 5 dealerships and a state-of-the-art collision centre located in London, Ontario and the Greater Toronto Area. As a premier vehicle dealer group, we carry all the latest gas, hybrid and EV models from Hyundai, Toyota and Lexus. Our friendly, customer-focused Sales teams can help you find the right new or pre-owned vehicle to fit your lifestyle, assist with attractive financing and lease options, and help you choose the right products to protect your investment. After you drive away, you can rest assured that our factory-trained technicians are here to handle the regular maintenance of your vehicle with the greatest level of care and professionalism. And our highly knowledgeable Parts teams can recommend both OEM and aftermarket accessories to make your vehicle your own.

PAG Direct understands that each of our guests has different needs. That’s why we offer online purchase options. Right from our dealer websites, you can select the make, model and trim of vehicle you would like to purchase, choose products to protect your purchase, and complete an application to lease or finance - all from the comfort of your home. You can also send in details for a no-obligation evaluation of your trade-in, right from your driveway! In our Service departments, booking an appointment has never been easier. Use our online booking tool and get a confirmation right to your mobile device or find all our contact information if you prefer to speak with one of our friendly team members.

PAG Direct is automotive – your way.

Name: SOFIDA Auto
Description:
Situé au cœur des Hauts de France, SOFIDA Auto, dirigé par Xavier DUBOIS et épaulé par une équipe jeune et dynamique ayant plus de 16 ans d’ancienneté en moyenne, se distingue comme le 1er distributeur automobile des Hauts-de-France. 

Fondé en 1965 à Boulogne-sur-Mer, SOFIDA Auto est un groupe familial ayant su s'adapter aux évolutions du marché pour offrir aujourd'hui une gamme étendue de services.

Juillet 2024, marque une étape significative dans l’expansion et l’engagement de SOFIDA Auto envers l'excellence du secteur automobile régional avec la prise de participation du Groupe SIMA.

Avec plus de 1400 collaborateurs, nous nous engageons à fournir un service de proximité exceptionnel grâce à la synergie des forces et expertises, en mettant l'accent sur l'activité Après-Vente pour garantir un accompagnement continu à notre clientèle.

Réparti sur 68 points de vente, SOFIDA Auto distribue 15 marques de véhicules neufs (PEUGEOT, CITROEN, DS, OPEL, FIAT, ABARTH, ALFA, JEEP, AUDI, SKODA, VOLKSWAGEN, SEAT, CUPRA, HYUNDAI et LIGIER), et propose un large choix de véhicules d’occasion reconditionnés.

Afin de répondre à tous les besoins de mobilité, nous proposons également un service de location courte durée avec notre enseigne Locandgo basée à Lille et à Dunkerque, ainsi qu’une plaque logistique de pièces de rechange automobiles (XPR Distribution) basée dans la Somme.

SOFIDA Auto est ravi d'accueillir de nouveaux talents au sein de sa grande famille. L’entreprise partage une vision commune : offrir un service client inégalé, développer les compétences et innover dans les solutions de mobilité.

SOFIDA Auto continue de se développer avec passion et détermination, en motivant ses équipes à se surpasser, à apprendre et à innover, toujours au service de la satisfaction client. Faire confiance à SOFIDA Auto, c’est découvrir un monde de passionné, où chaque visite, physique ou digitale, est une expérience unique.

Seit über 70 Jahren steht der Name Tiemeyer im Ruhrgebiet für Tradition, Erfahrung und Fortschritt in Sachen Fahrzeug und Fahrzeugtechnik. Die Tiemeyer Gruppe vertreibt als eine der größten Automobilhandelsgruppen im Ruhrgebiet derzeit an 32 Standorten Fahrzeuge der Marken Audi, Volkswagen, SEAT, SKODA und Volkswagen Nutzfahrzeuge.

Inhabergeführt und mit einer positiven Entwicklung ist die Tiemeyer Gruppe nicht nur ein attraktiver Partner im Bereich Automobil, sondern auch ein attraktiver Arbeitgeber für mehr als 1.800 Mitarbeiter. Vom Kfz-Mechatroniker, Automobilverkäufer und Automobil-Serviceberater bis hin zu den Auszubildenden im kaufmännischen und technischen Bereich ist das Tiemeyer Team breit aufgestellt. Moderne Arbeitsplätze, abwechslungsreiche Herausforderungen und kontinuierliche Mitarbeiterentwicklung sind überzeugende Argumente für die Tiemeyer Gruppe als Arbeitgeber.

Name: Brozauto Veículos e Peças Ltda.
Description: O ano de 1969 foi marcante para a família Zanatta, quando um sonho começou a se tornar realidade. Em Canoas, no Rio Grande do Sul, iniciava uma caminhada que aos poucos se tornou diferenciada. Partindo da comercialização de veículos novos e usados numa pequena sede da concessionária, após 50 anos, o grupo encontra-se hoje numa posição respeitável dentro do mercado. É formado por quatro importantes empresas: Brozauto Veículos – Concessionária Chevrolet, Brozauto Seguros, Brozauto Locadora e Montreal. Conseguiu transformar-se em marca com sinônimo de credibilidade e confiança entre os gaúchos.

Name: Grupo Pesado Castro
Description:
Grupo Pesado Castro es una destacada empresa automotriz cuyos orígenes se remontan a fines del año 1920 en la ciudad de San Juan. En sus primeros años, se estableció como representante de las marcas Overland y Willys, brindando servicios de venta y distribución de automóviles.

En 1934, la compañía evolucionó y se convirtió en una Concesionaria General Motors, operando bajo la razón social "Pesado Castro Hermanos SRL". Esta asociación con una marca de renombre como General Motors les permitió expandir su alcance y ofrecer una amplia gama de vehículos a sus clientes.

En el año 1944, debido al terremoto que azotó la ciudad de San Juan, el Grupo Pesado Castro tomó la decisión de trasladar sus operaciones a la ciudad de Rosario. Este cambio de ubicación no solo permitió a la empresa recuperarse y seguir brindando sus servicios, sino que también les proporcionó nuevas oportunidades de crecimiento en un mercado en constante expansión.

Desde su llegada a Rosario, el Grupo Pesado Castro ha consolidado su posición en el sector automotriz. Han ampliado su cartera de marcas representadas, incluyendo reconocidas marcas como Chevrolet, Renault, Volkswagen y Toyota. Esto les ha permitido ofrecer una amplia variedad de opciones a sus clientes, desde automóviles compactos hasta camionetas y vehículos comerciales.

Además de la venta de vehículos, el Grupo Pesado Castro ha diversificado sus servicios y ha establecido una destacada red de talleres de servicio y repuestos. Su compromiso con la calidad y la satisfacción del cliente se ha mantenido a lo largo de los años, brindando un excelente servicio postventa y asegurando la disponibilidad de repuestos y accesorios originales.

Con una trayectoria de más de un siglo en la industria automotriz, el Grupo Pesado Castro se ha convertido en un referente en la región

Name: Agnew
Description:
Agnew Cars is the leading car retailer in Northern Ireland, proudly ranked among the UK’s Top 25 franchised motor dealer. With over 90 years of automotive expertise.  We operate 14 dealerships across Belfast and Northern Ireland, representing 8 manufacturer brands: Audi, BMW, MINI, Volvo, Volkswagen, Porsche, Skoda and Mercedes-Benz.

Beyond our dealerships, Agnew also operates:

•	Agnew Leasing – Award-winning vehicle leasing solutions for personal and business customers. 
•	TPS (Trade Parts Specialists) – Official Volkswagen Group Trade Parts supply.
•	Agnew Repair Centre – Manufacturer-approved accident repair and body shop services.
•	Agnew Trade Centre – Trusted trade car auction.
•	Agnew Car Buyer – Hassle-free car buying and selling service.

In 2012, Agnew became part of the Sytner Group, the UK’s largest motor retailer, which in turn is owned by the Penske Automotive Group, USA whose shares are listed on NYSE. 

Whether you’re searching for a new or used car in Northern Ireland, need expert servicing, genuine parts, fleet solutions, or accident repair, Agnew is your trusted automotive partner.

Name: Severs Breeman BMW & MINI
Description:
Officieel BMW en MINI dealer in het Groene Hart en Regio Rotterdam

Severs Breeman is een familiebedrijf met een hecht team dat met passie en veel betrokkenheid te werk gaat. Het deskundige team is erop gericht om een passend advies geven; dit vertaalt zich in een uitstekende en vooral persoonlijke service. Severs Breeman biedt maatwerkoplossingen voor de beste mobiliteitsbeleving. De medewerkers ontvangen u graag in een van de vijf vestigingen om de tijd te nemen en u te leren kennen. Ze bespreken uw wensen en behoeften en verlenen hoogwaardige service op maat. Hiermee onderscheiden zij zich door op alle momenten de beleving centraal te stellen.  

Met vestigingen inAlphen aan den Rijn, Gouda, Rotterdam-Noord, Rotterdam-ZuidenWoerden, vertegenwoordigen zij het Groene Hart en regio Rotterdam. Severs Breeman heeft voor iedere klant  een vestiging in de buurt met bevlogen medewerkers, die altijd klaar staan voor de aanschaf en het onderhoud van uw BMW of MINI.  Service staat voorop en ze zijn altijd eerlijk en oprecht naar de klant toe.  

Bel via onderstaande link met de vestiging naar keuze of laat uw gegevens achter, dan nemen zij zo snel mogelijk persoonlijk contact met u op. Op seversbreeman.nl kunt u het ruime aanbod bekijken, voor zowel nieuwe als gebruikte modellen.

Name: Gottfried Schultz Automobilhandels SE
Description:
Die Automobilhandelsgruppe Gottfried Schultz Automobilhandels SE mit Sitz in Ratingen ist einer der größten Vertragspartner für die Marken des Volkswagen Konzerns (Volkswagen, Audi, Seat, Skoda, Bentley, Bugatti und Porsche) in Deutschland.
In insgesamt 28 Betrieben im Großraum Rhein-Ruhr beschäftigt das Unternehmen derzeit rund 1.800 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Von Essen als nördlichster Standort bis Köln im Süden, von Neuss als westlichste Grenze bis Wuppertal im Osten decken unsere Gottfried Schultz-Betriebe einen Großteil des Ruhrgebietes ab. Weitere Betriebe befinden sich in Düsseldorf (u.a. das größte VW-Zentrum in Deutschland), Leverkusen, Solingen, Mettmann, Mülheim sowie Velbert.

Gottfried Schultz kann auf eine über 80jährige Firmenerfahrung zurückblicken, die unseren Kunden sowohl in unserem Service-Bereich als auch im Neu- bzw. Gebrauchtwagen-Bereich zu Gute kommt.

Name: Binelli Group

Name: KIA Indonesia
Description:
Kia Corporation – about us 
Kia (www.kia.com) is a global mobility brand with a vision to create sustainable mobility solutions for consumers, communities, and societies around the world. Founded in 1944, Kia has been providing mobility solutions for more than 75 years. With 52,000 employees worldwide, a presence in more than 190 markets, and manufacturing facilities in six countries, the company today sells around three million vehicles a year. Kia is spearheading the popularization of electrified and battery electric vehicles and developing a growing range of mobility services, encouraging millions of people around the world to explore the best ways of getting around. The company’s brand slogan – ‘Movement that inspires’ – reflects Kia’s commitment to inspire consumers through its products and services.

Name: GRUPO SAVAR
Description:
Bem-vindo ao Grupo Savar 
Atualmente, o Grupo Savar se destaca como um conglomerado robusto, composto por 35 empresas, impulsionado por uma equipe de mais de 890 profissionais. Nossa paixão e compromisso são evidentes em nosso trabalho incansável para oferecer excelência a todos os nossos clientes. Dentro de nossa diversificada gama de especializações, somos uma força motriz em vários segmentos, incluindo:
Concessionária de Caminhões, Ônibus e Sprinter - Representando a prestigiada marca Mercedes Benz, estamos na vanguarda das soluções de transporte comercial. 

Concessionárias Automotivas - Detentores das marcas Mercedes Benz, Chrysler, Jeep, RAM, Toyota e Multimarcas proporcionamos uma experiência única no mundo automotivo. 
Ravas Peças Multimarcas - A fonte confiável para as peças que mantêm os veículos em movimento. 
Savar Pneus - Mantendo a segurança e a performance na estrada por meio de produtos de qualidade. 
Postos de Combustíveis - Mantendo os motores funcionando com combustíveis de alta qualidade.
Nossa visão transcende o simples transporte terrestre. Nosso propósito reside em tornar o transporte mais eficiente, acessível e seguro. Para concretizar essa visão, nossa missão é clara:
"Entregar produtos e serviços de excelência que superem as expectativas, promovendo a satisfação de todos os envolvidos. Almejamos liderar a rede de concessionárias de veículos e produtos relacionados, impulsionando a inovação, a sustentabilidade e a confiança."

Estamos empenhados em forjar o caminho à frente, em parceria com nossos clientes e colaboradores. Junte-se a nós enquanto continuamos a impulsionar o futuro do transporte terrestre, excedendo limites e criando novas possibilidades a cada passo.

#GrupoSavar #TransporteTerrestre #ExcelênciaEmMobilidade
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Apenas uma palavra pode definir o combustível que move nosso aperfeiçoamento constante: Para nós da Fiat Via Verdi, é motivo de orgulho poder representar o pioneirismo, a alta tecnologia e o design que são marcas da Fiat Automóveis e, realizar esse trabalho nas cidades de Maringá e Campo Mourão com excelentes avaliações vindas do consumidor, nos faz acreditar que estamos na direção certa, transformando as inovações Fiat em um número cada vez maior de clientes satisfeitos.

Não basta apenas efetuar uma boa venda. Estamos diretamente envolvidos com toda a experiência de compra, desde o início até a aquisição do próximo Fiat, afinal, nós trabalhamos para que isto aconteça.

É honrando o compromisso que a Fiat Automóveis possui com o Brasil que buscamos estar sempre ao seu lado, para fazer da Fiat Via Verdi a sua concessionária Fiat.

Name: Grupo Globo
Description:
O Grupo Globo com mais de 35 anos no mercado automobilístico mantém sua referência em qualidade, variedade e comodidade na realização dos sonhos de nossos clientes.

Amplo atendimento com grandes marcas como Fiat, Ford, Nissan, Renault e Jeep, com 23 concessionárias distribuídas nos estados do Paraná e Santa Catarina.

Grupo Globo acredita em você cliente que preza por seriedade e segurança ao adquirir seu sonho, lhe proporcionando a certeza de um excelente atendimento, tendo por tradição o respeito ambiental, social e econômico nas cidades onde estamos localizados gerando empregos, eventos solidários mantendo uma equipe solida dedicada a você cliente.

Name: Groupe DMD
Description:
Depuis 1934, date d’ouverture du premier garage du Groupe à Nantes par Charles Mustière, le Groupe DMD a continué de se développer. Avec 56 concessions, plus de 10 marques implantées sur 7 départements, couplés à un réseau de 50 agents, le réseau DMD dispose d’une proximité au service de ses clients. 

Exerçant 6 métiers principaux : la vente de véhicules neufs, d’occasion, de pièces de rechange, l’entretien et la réparations mécanique, la carrosserie, la peinture et la location de véhicules, le Groupe DMD fait gage de qualité, de diversité et d’innovation. 

Riche d’une histoire marquée par trois générations d’entrepreneurs et rythmée par un développement important, le groupe DMD conserve toujours une dimension profondément familiale avec des dirigeants opérationnels qui sont les seuls actionnaires et dont l’objectif principal est d’assurer la pérennité économique du groupe tout en préservant le respect de fortes valeurs humaines et le rôle citoyen de l’entreprise.
Location: ST HERBLAIN, Pays de la Loire

Name: Grupo Caminho Veículos
Description:

Com o passar dos anos, o Grupo foi expandindo suas operações com as marcas Ford, Hyundai, Fiat e DAF, nas cidades de São José do Rio Preto, Piracicaba, Limeira, Americana, Catanduva e Ribeirão Preto.

A transparência, a excelência nos serviços e a experiência adquirida proporcionaram a ascensão, consolidação e notoriedade do Grupo em uma região estratégica e de grande relevância no cenário nacional.

O sucesso da nossa história é explicado pela transparência na relação com os nossos clientes e baseado no respeito mútuo.

Servir e realizar sonhos é a base do nosso negócio.

Name: Cycles Motoshop
Description:
Somos Cycles Motoshop, agencia oficial de motocicletas 0KM con más de 30 años de experiencia en el rubro.

Desde 1989, trabajamos en la comercialización de motos, accesorios y repuestos, prestando servicio técnico en nuestros talleres propios.

Nuestros primeros pasos en el rubro se orientaron hacia la importación y comercialización de motos japonesas de alta cilindrada, usadas, preferentemente custom, estilo con el cual nos especializamos casi con exclusividad. A partir de 1995, incorporamos unidades 0KM de motos de alta gama. En 2003 empezamos a ser parte de la red de concesionarios oficiales de las marcas que hasta hoy representamos.

Con más de 35.000 unidades vendidas, podemos decir que conocemos perfectamente el rubro y sabemos exactamente cuáles son las necesidades del usuario de motos. Ofrecemos algo distinto, que se destaca por nuestra atención y nuestro servicio postventa, acompañado de los mejores precios y la mejor financiación del mercado.

Seguimos llevando la pasión por las motos siendo representantes oficiales en Argentina de las mejores marcas.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: BMW Rhein Gruppe
Description:
BMW Rhein - Dein zuverlässiger Partner in Sachen Mobilität! 

 Mit 20 Standorten in Bayern und Baden-Württemberg sind wir stolz darauf, zu den größten BMW Händlern Deutschlands zu gehören. Unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der Automobilbranche hat uns zu dem gemacht, was uns heute auszeichnet: ein Top-Team, das für dich da ist!
 
 Ein respektvoller Umgang mit unseren Kunden und ein Gespräch auf Augenhöhe stehen bei uns an erster Stelle. Unsere qualifizierten Mitarbeiter sind bestens geschult, um deine Bedürfnisse zu verstehen und dafür zu sorgen, dass du dich bei uns rundum wohl fühlst. Kundennähe ist unser Markenzeichen, und wir arbeiten hart, um deine vollste Zufriedenheit sicherzustellen.
 
 Egal, ob du Fragen hast, eine Probefahrt machen möchtest oder Unterstützung bei der Auswahl deines Traumwagens benötigst - unser engagiertes Team setzt sich mit ganzer Kraft für dich ein. Wir finden immer die optimale Lösung, denn du als Kunde liegst uns am Herzen. Deine Zufriedenheit ist unser Ansporn!

 Qualität ist für uns nicht verhandelbar. Deshalb setzen wir bei Technik und Material auf höchste Standards, um dir ein unvergleichliches Fahrerlebnis zu bieten. Mit uns an deiner Seite kannst du auf Zuverlässigkeit, Effizienz und innovative Technologie zählen.

Bist du bereit für eine neue Ära der Mobilität? Besuche uns in einem unserer Standorte und lass dich von unserer Begeisterung für BMW anstecken. Wir freuen uns darauf, dich kennenzulernen und dich auf deiner automobilen Reise zu begleiten! 

Dein Team des BMW Autohaus Rhein

Name: Peoples Ford
Description:
Peoples Ford has been providing customers with specialist Ford sales and servicing across the UK for over 40 years. With six dealerships – in Edinburgh, Falkirk, Livingston and 3 across Liverpool in Speke, Bootle and Prescot – our professional teams of Ford experts are perfectly positioned to help you with your Ford vehicle, wherever you are.

Nossa missão é realizar sonhos por meio de produtos e serviços inovadores com excelência, sempre pautados pela transparência, respeito e pelo encantamento dos clientes.

Nossa visão é ser referência nacional em satisfação, confiabilidade e transparência, gerando crescimento sustentável e fidelização.

Nossos valores traduzem o que acreditamos: cada pessoa é única e essencial, prezamos por relações de confiança e transparência, buscamos constantemente inovar, encantar e gerar resultados consistentes. No AGP, acreditamos que o futuro é construído com e para pessoas.

Name: Bilia Olofsson Bil
Description:
Olofsson Bil är Bilia från den 1 september
Allt och inget förändras. Vi finns på samma anläggningar, med samma trevliga personal. För dig som är kund kommer det mesta fungera precis som innan, men nu som en del av en stor och trygg Biliafamilj. 

Välkommen in till våra anläggningar! 
Läs mer på bilia.se/vwgOlofsson Bil grundades som ett familjeföretag 1966 av Bengt Ove Olofsson. Företaget blev återförsäljare för Scania och Volkswagen och senare också för Audi, Skoda och SEAT i södra Stockholm. Verksamheten startade i provisoriska lokaler på Runstensvägen i Haninge och i en källarlokal i Nynäshamn. Redan 1967 byggdes den första egna lokalen på Nynäsvägen 54 i Nynäshamn. Tio år senare byggdes nuvarande huvudanläggning på Kilowattvägen i Haninge.

Sedan starten har företaget växt och sysselsätter idag ca 170 medarbetare. 1998 startades dotterbolaget Bildepån i Haninge AB, som idag är verksamt under namnet Olofsson Bil, med specialisering på försäljning av nya och begagnade Skoda. Olofsson Bil Skoda finns representerade i Haninge och sedan 2004 även i Nacka. I april 2018 öppnade vi även en ny anläggning för Skoda, SEAT och begagnade bilar i Albyberg, Haninge.

Sedan maj 2024 är Olofsson Bil en del av Bilia. Ett fullserviceföretag i bilbranschen med bilförsäljning, service- och reparationsverkstad, plåt- och lackverkstad samt reservdelslager. Varje år levereras ca fyratusen bilar från våra anläggningar i Haninge och Nacka.

Vi strävar, sedan många år, efter att vara företaget med personligare service vilket alla våra medarbetare jobbar hårt för att Du som kund skall uppleva.

 Vi hälsar dig hjärtligt välkommen.

Onder de noemer Brussels Auto Group bundelen we al onze krachten, kennis en expertise samen in één dynamische autogroep. Op die manier kunnen we in een snel veranderende autowereld continu de vinger aan de pols houden.

We zijn officieel verdeler van de merken Volkswagen, Audi, ŠKODA, SEAT en Volkswagen Bedrijfsvoertuigen en verwelkomen je graag in Anderlecht, Buizingen, Dilbeek, Groot-Bijgaarden, Halle, Overijse of Ternat!

Onder de noemer Brussels Auto Group bundelen we al onze krachten, kennis en expertise samen in één dynamische autogroep. Op die manier kunnen we in een snel veranderende autowereld continu de vinger aan de pols houden. Voor u als klant verandert er niets: u wordt nog altijd geholpen door uw vaste contactpersonen en kunt ook in de toekomst de vertrouwde service in uw lokale concessie blijven genieten. 
***
Désormais, Bruynseels Group (Audi Dilbeek - Volkswagen & CVI Anderlecht), Don Bosco Garage (Audi Halle - Skoda, Volkswagen & CVI Buizingen) et Overijse Automotive (Audi, Skoda, Volkswagen et CVI) unissent leurs forces.

Sous le nom de Brussels Auto Group, nous regroupons toutes nos forces, nos connaissances et notre expertise dans un groupe automobile dynamique. Cela nous permettra de garder le tempo dans un secteur de l’automobile qui évolue rapidement. Rien ne change pour vous en tant que client : vous serez toujours aidé par votre interlocuteur habituel et pourrez continuer à profiter du service de confiance de votre concessionnaire local à l’avenir.

Name: Van Mossel - Hyundai - MG - Maxus - Suzuki - Isuzu
Description:
Graag stellen we u 'Van Mossel' voor als uw mobiliteitspartner van A-Z. Niets voor niets is onze slogan: "Voor mobiliteit, voor iedereen".

Als officiële verdeler van 5 merken - Hyundai, Suzuki, MG, Maxus en Isuzu - zijn wij vandaag actief op 13 verschillende locaties in 4 provincies. 
Strategisch bezetten wij de E17 of de as Kortrijk-Gent met garages in Menen, Zwevegem, Deinze, Oudenaarde en Ledeberg (Gent). In Vlaams- Brabant vind je ons terug in Groot-Bijgaarden en Zaventem en in de provincie Antwerpen in Mechelen, Deurne, Brasschaat, Wilrijk en Antwerpen.

We streven als team naar een hoge klantentevredenheid en bieden een full service aan. Onze medewerkers staan u ten dienste en doet er alles aan om het familiaal karakter van het familiebedrijf te bewaren en toch een professionele service te bieden. 

Als particulier kan u uiteraard terecht in een van onze showrooms waar we u graag verder helpen. 
Bedrijven kunnen echter rekenen op een aparte dienst vanuit ons Fleet Business Center. Hier zetten we in op een professionele aanpak op maat van A tot Z, dit voor elke klant. 
Flexibiliteit is hierin een kernwoord; de actuele marktsituatie vereist dat we als kameleon optreden en u op elk niveau het beste advies kunnen verlenen in functie van uw situatie. Meer en meer krijgt de wagen een prominente rol in het fiscaal/financieel beleid van een bedrijf, ook daarin onderscheiden wij ons als specialist ter zake en adviseren wij u graag om tot de beste oplossing te komen! 

Een veranderende mobiliteit is de realiteit, met Van Mossel als partner maakt u de juiste keuze!

Name: Hovány Csoport
Description:
A Hovány Csoport közel 30 éve Magyarország piacvezető, magánkézben lévő autókereskedelmi cégcsoportja. Jelenleg hét minőségi autómárkát - Mercedes-Benz, Volvo, Ford, Peugeot, Citroën, Fiat, Omoda - forgalmaz az egész országban 5 városban. A központ Kecskemét. Jelszavunk: Minőség az erősségünk!


The Hovány Group is founded in 1991 and currently the market leading car dealer company in Hungary, under hungarian ownership. The group currently distribute seven brands across the country, mainly in East-Hungary and Budapest. Our slogan is: "The quality is our strength".

Name: Larson Automotive Group
Description:
Larson Automotive Group is the largest dealer group in the Pacific Northwest. Family owned since 1953, we have 13 locations in Western Washington offering great low prices on New & Used vehicles including; Toyota, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Audi, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Cadillac, Chrysler, Jeep, Dodge, and Ram. 
Our expert Service & Parts staff help customers keep their vehicles in top condition. Because of our outstanding service and low prices, customers travel from all over the Pacific Northwest to visit us because they know they won’t find a better deal on a new or used vehicle than at Larson.

Name: Motorenn
Description:
We’re modernizing the world of used premium vehicles.

Motorenn is a Los Angeles-based startup leading the evolution of the buying and selling of premium used cars through high-quality inventory, white glove service, and operational excellence. 

We are automotive enthusiasts, rather than salespeople, who are focused on transforming the high-end car sales experience. We want our customers to experience the same joy and awe that we have for these modern engineering marvels, rather than worrying about haggling or wasting hours in a palatial showroom! From our careful vehicle selection, innovative data-driven pricing, and investment in our best-in-class digital capabilities, we are trailblazing a new retail and e-commerce model in order to share that experience with customers throughout the country. 

Trust, value, and efficiency are at the core of what drives us. Our vehicles, which undergo an exhaustive 151-point inspection, will never have salvage titles, frame damage, airbag deployment, or damage to more than two external panels. Our pricing model takes into consideration condition, mileage, and options to provide you a value that can’t be beaten with transparent, no-haggle prices with no hidden fees. Our digitally streamlined process also means that you never even have to step foot into our showroom! You can sign your documents digitally and have your vehicle picked up or delivered, or visit our Los Angeles location for a test drive and then complete the process remotely.

Name: Sky Automobiles
Description:
Sky Automobiles is the oldest and most trusted Maruti Suzuki Dealership of Central India. Established in 1987 in Raipur, Chhattisgarh(then Madhya Pradesh), 

Sky Automobiles through its dealership network of Nexa & Arena Channels in Chhattisgarh & Odisha offers Sales, Service & Spares facilities including commercial vehicles, Maruti Suzuki True Value & Maruti Driving School. 

Sky Automobiles has won numerous awards in the Annual Maruti Suzuki Dealer Convention for best Sales, Service and Customer Satisfaction. As a testimonial to this, the company has sold more than 2,00,000 vehicles and the numbers are growing year on year.

Name: BMW Century City SMG
Description:
At BMW Century City, we are more than just a dealership - we are your gateway to the exhilarating world of BMW. With a passion for precision engineering and a commitment to customer satisfaction, we strive to deliver an unparalleled automotive experience.

Our dealership, situated in the vibrant heart of Century City, Cape Town, is your destination for exploring the latest BMW models, from sedans to SAVs, and embracing the ultimate driving pleasure they offer.

Backed by a dedicated team, we provide a comprehensive range of services, including new and Approved Used vehicles, expert maintenance and repairs, genuine BMW parts, and personalized financing solutions to suit your needs.

From the moment you step into our state-of-the-art showroom to the day you drive off in your dream BMW, our focus remains on providing excellence in every aspect of your journey.

Stay connected with us for updates on our latest offerings, events, and stories that celebrate the sheer joy of driving a BMW. Join us in embracing the #UltimateDrivingExperience and be a part of the BMW Century City family.

Contact us:
 021 525 6000
 1 Century Way, Century City, Cape Town

Visit our website to explore more: www.bmw-centurycity.co.za 

#BMWCenturyCity #DrivingDreams #LuxuryAutomotive #SheerDrivingPleasure

Name: Unifleet
Description:
Unifleet är din kompletta onlinetjänst för företagsleasing. Här ingår allt för dina fordon, som service, försäkring, vinterhjul, skifte och förvaring samt garanterat restvärde. Välj varumärkesoberoende en eller flera bilar som passar ditt företag. Genom vår användarvänliga kundportal har du alltid full koll på hela bilparken samt tjänsteresor och kostnader. 
Allt samlas på en faktura för enklast möjliga administration. 

Så välj ett kvalitetssäkrat, enkelt och bekymmersfritt sätt att ha företagsbil, som flyttar ditt företags gränser framåt. Move yourself. Move your company.

Det här får du alltid hos oss på Unifleet:
• Bilen och allt omkring i ett paket
• Varumärkesoberoende valfrihet
• Digital beställning och flöde.
• Minimal administration
• Total kostnadskontroll
• Konkurrenskraftiga priser

Name: IDYLCAR  - Le réseau préféré des familles
Description:
Le réseau préféré des Familles   

Qui sommes-nous ?

Chez IDYLCAR, nous sommes une grande FAMILLE passionnée depuis plus de 20 ans ! En 2001, nous avons donné vie à notre réseau de concessionnaires indépendants, et depuis, nous n'avons cessé de grandir. Aujourd'hui, nous comptons fièrement plus de 50 concessions à travers la France, avec un chiffre d'affaires de 345 millions d'euros et une super équipe de 500 collaborateurs !
IDYLCAR, c'est bien plus qu'un réseau, c'est une véritable famille.
Nous sommes des experts dans la vente de camping-cars, caravanes, vans et fourgons, neufs et d'occasion, distribuant avec fierté 60 marques de renom.
En plus de la vente, nous offrons une gamme de services allant de la location au financement, de la garantie au service après-vente, sans oublier une sélection d'accessoires pour rendre l'expérience de nos clients exceptionnelle.
Et devine quoi ? Nous avons récemment modernisé notre siège dans le Nord, à proximité de Lille, un espace ultramoderne pour nourrir notre passion !

Nos véhicules sont conçus pour s’adapter aux réalités locales tout en intégrant des fonctionnalités intelligentes, de sécurité renforcée et de performance optimisée.

Name: AVP AUTOLAND
Description:
AVP AUTOLAND ist seit über 25 Jahren Dein Spezialist für Neuwagen, Gebrauchtwagen und Firmenflotten der Marken Audi, Volkswagen, Volkswagen Nutzfahrzeuge, Porsche, Škoda, SEAT & CUPRA mit 22 Betrieben an 10 Standorten in Ober- und Niederbayern. Unsere Kfz-Werkstatt- und Serviceleistungen stehen für ein Höchstmaß an Qualität. Mit über 1.000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern ist das AVP AUTOLAND die größte Automobilhandelsgruppe in Ostbayern.
