»begeisternd« | »leistungsstark « | »verlässlich« | »familiär«

Name: Monarch Enterprises
Description:
We specialise in new and used luxury vehicles, we also supply new and used commercial vehicles. We pride ourselves in making sure all of our cars are prepared to the very highest standard making sure each car is rigorously valeted and detailed to ensure the car is in the best possible condition before it is offered for sale at our showroom where customers can browse and take a closer look at our cars in a friendly relaxed atmosphere.

Whether you want competitive finance packages, worldwide delivery & collection or just want to buy or sell your vehicle, Monarch aims to give our customers the best possible experience and look after all of your motoring needs.

Name: Superior Car Rental
Description: Superior Car Rental is a renowned car hire service provider offering luxury cars for rent in Dubai. Backed by a team of professionals, we extend dedicated services to both residents in the UAE and tourists. Our extensive car collection features a car suitable for every occasion, whether you are going to attend a wedding, business trip, or cruise the streets of this fascinating city. Select your desired vehicle, book it online and receive it at your door hassle-free. With a fleet of over 120+ cars, including luxury cars, sports cars, SUVs, and economy cars, you can count on us to find a car of your choice. You can choose from leading car brands, including Aston Martin, Bentley, Lamborghini, Porsche, and Rolls Royce. Owing to our reputation as a luxury rent-a-car company in Dubai, we ensure all our cars are well-maintained and regularly serviced for your safety. At Superior Car Rental, we follow a no-hidden fee policy so customers can rest assured of integrity, transparency, and reliability. Our booking process is easy and hassle-free, so select from our inventory and make a booking now.

Name: CoMo - Contigo Mobility
Description: CoMo – Contigo Mobility is a innovative mobility company offering EV motorcycle managed services and multi-brand subscription scheme for B2B, B2G and B2C. Our advantage is that on top of our core offerings, we also offer EV conversion, battery swapping and IoT/fleet management solution. All these are enabled with proprietary technology.

Name: The Premier Collection
Description:
Every day, we come to work, focused on our four main principles. It is a standard of excellence that we strive to provide to every customer that walks through our doors:
•	Integrity
•	Fair and Competitive Pricing
•	Excellence in Service
•	Respect for the Individual

Since we were founded in 1995, our employees have always been our best brand ambassadors. Each customer is treated as family and is provided with a unique car buying experience. It is that treatment that allows our company to grow, and in turn, allows your career to prosper. 

The Premier Collection is a privately owned family of automotive dealerships dedicated to providing a new standard of excellence. We operate 12 exclusive divisions across New York and Connecticut, including top safety picks, such as Subaru and Volvo, and luxury brands, such as Lincoln and Maserati. We also feature dealerships for Volkswagen, Mazda and Alfa Romeo, along with a brand new, climate controlled used vehicle showroom in White Plains. 

If you are looking for a rewarding career path, that allows you to grow, please contact us. At The Premier Collection, we will train you and give you the tools to be successful, allowing you to control your own future.

Name: Cameron Commercials - Hire & Sales
Description: Cameron Commercials has been supplying quality used light commercial vehicles for over a decade. We know that the right vehicle can make all the difference to your business. From private clients looking for a specific vehicle to commercial clients seeking new additions for their fleet, we’ll source the vehicles you need!

Name: Healey Brothers Automotive
Description:
Healey Brothers is the Hudson Valley’s leading family-owned car dealership group, proudly representing 11 top automotive brands: Cadillac, Chevrolet, Ford, Lincoln, Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, Ram, Kia, Hyundai, and Mitsubishi.

With 10 convenient locations across Fishkill, Middletown, Goshen, Newburgh, Beacon, and Poughkeepsie, New York, Healey Brothers has been serving drivers throughout the Hudson Valley, New York, Connecticut, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania for over 45 years.

We offer new and used cars, SUVs, and trucks from trusted manufacturers, along with factory-authorized service centers, auto financing, and genuine parts.

At Healey Brothers, we’re dedicated to providing every customer with exceptional value, honesty, and expert service—making us the Hudson Valley’s most trusted automotive destination.

Leading Multi-Franchise Dealership Group in South-West England with 12 wonderful brands under our belt.

Name: Finlay Motor Group - Ford and Volvo Dealer
Description:
Finlay Motor Group are your local Ford & Volvo dealer, located in the M7 Motor Park, Newhall Naas. With over 80 years in business, Finlay Motor Group’s state of the art showroom and workshop is your one stop shop for all your motoring needs. 

Finlay Motor Group consists of Finlay Ford, Finlay Volvo, Finlay Horseboxes, Clearwater Finance Limited. The official names of the companies are M.A. Finlay & Sons Ltd. and M7 Trailers Limited and Clearwater Finance Limited. The main activities are Ford Car Dealer, Ford Commercial Vehicle Dealer, Volvo Car Dealer, Used Car Centre, & Equi-Trek Horsebox Dealer.

Our business may have changed many times in 80 years however our attention to customer care remains constant. The principals of Finlay Motor Group are Mike and Gary Finlay. The company currently employs 30 people.

Name: GROUPE DEBARD AUTOMOBILES
Description:
DEBARD AUTOMOBILES est à l'écoute de tous vos projets automobiles depuis 28 ans.
Eric Debard a créé la société en 1996 avec la volonté de faciliter les démarches d'achat des véhicules 10 kms (fiscalement neufs) et occasions. Aujourd'hui, nous sommes présents dans 15 villes de France : le siège à Albi et les agences de Toulouse (Labège), Rodez (Onet-le-Château), Montauban (Campsas), Tarbes (Ibos), Bordeaux (Mérignac), Le Mans (Saint-Saturnin), Dax (Mées), Pau (Serres-Castet), Béziers, Angers (St Jean de Linières), Valence (Alixan), Poitiers (Dissay), Limoges (Couzeix) et Perpignan (Rivesaltes). Au fil des années, nous comptons renforcer notre présence nationale pour mieux répondre à vos besoins. 

Négociant et mandataire automobile spécialisé dans la vente de voiture 10 km et occasions, nous commercialisons les véhicules de plus de 50 marques automobiles. Pour répondre aux envies de chacun, nous possédons en permanence un stock de plus de 3000 véhicules répartis sur nos différents points de vente.

Name: Audi Bauer Paris
Description:
Groupe Bauer Paris

Le Groupe Bauer Paris a été créé le 3 mai 1998. Dirigé par M. Daniel Urcun, avec plus de 200 collaborateurs, c’est le 1er Groupe de Distribution Automobile exclusivement dédié au constructeur Audi.

4 concessions exclusives Audi à Paris et en Ile-de-France et 1 Techno Centre Carrosserie / Centre Occasions toutes Marques

- Audi Bauer Paris Saint-Ouen
Plus grand Audi Service de France : véhicules neufs et d’occasion,  2 ateliers de mécanique, magasin de pièces de rechange, boutique accessoires et un service location courte durée Audi rent.

- Audi Bauer Paris Wagram
La nouvelle génération de concession Audi, 8 000m2 dans le 17ème à deux pas de la place de l’Etoile, avec un service 360°.

- Audi Bauer Paris Nanterre

- Audi Bauer Paris Roissy
Tout l'univers Audi au pied d'Aéroville ainsi que des services exclusifs "Airport".

En 2012, ouverture de la 2ème agence Audi rent en France dans les murs de Bauer Paris Saint-Ouen (Porte de Clignancourt).

En 2013, Bauer Paris a lancé le 1er service de Conciergerie Automobile Audi : Bauer Paris Conciergerie.

En 2014, le Groupe Bauer Paris a distribué 2 500 véhicules neufs et d’occasion et a atteint un chiffre d’affaires de 92 Millions d’Euros.

En 2015, ouverture de la 4ème concession exclusive Audi à Paris et en Ile-de-France : Bauer Paris Wagram (75017).

En 2016, lancement du 1er showroom du futur "Audi City Paris" (75001) et d’un site de réparation carrosserie haute technologie Bauer Paris Saint- Witz (95) avec un centre véhicules d'occasion.

En 2017, lancement de la 1ère agence Audi rent en France spécialisée en modèles Sport. Toute la Gamme S en location courte durée chez Audi City Paris.

En 2018, ouverture de la 5ème concession exclusive Audi au pied d'Aéroville : Bauer Paris Roissy (95).

Name: Trident Automobiles
Description:
Trident Automobiles was incorporated in 1997 and commenced operations as a Hyundai dealer in Bangalore in Sep 1998. 

From a single showroom and service center with just about 25 people, Trident has now grown to being a multi-brand dealership with Hyundai, Renault, Isuzu, Daimler (commercial vehicles) and JCB (construction equipment) employing over 3000 people.

This phenomenal growth can be attributed to the commitment and sincerity embodied in the motto of the company, "Drive home a relationship".

One of the key drivers of this growth has been the quality of people manning various operations across Trident. The culture of the company to attract and nurture the best talent in the industry has given Trident the decisive edge over its contemporaries. It is this winning combination of talent and an empowering work environment that has enabled Trident to remain in the forefront of car dealerships in the country.

With over a 100,000 customers, Trident continues its relentless march to winning more hearts with its focus on customer delight.

Come, experience the award-winning Trident service.

Name: Acura Kuwait - Al Mulla Auto Co.
Description:
In 2013, Al Mulla Group added another feather to its cap when it was selected by Honda Motors as the first exclusive distributor of their luxury vehicle brand, Acura Motors, in Kuwait.

The partnership was forged after Al Mulla Group proved itself by demonstrating how the Group’s long-term vision and strategy that has been instrumental to the Group’s success in the automotive market, was clearly aligned with that of Acura and its vision for the future.

Al Mulla Group has established a world-class 3S (sales, service, spare parts) facility and showroom for Acura in Kuwait, which is one of the largest of its kind in the world.

Name: Mercedes-Benz Autoprima
Description:
Autoprima es una empresa familiar, con más de 30 años de experiencia en el sector de automoción, abriéndose camino hasta convertirse en el Concesionario y Taller Oficial Mercedes-Benz referente en la zona centro Levante. Con sede en Motilla del Palancar (Cuenca), Albacete, Cuenca, Castellón y 2 centros en Valencia (Quart de Poblet).

El modelo de negocio de Autoprima se divide en 2 áreas principales: por un lado, los Concesionarios Oficiales de Mercedes-Benz, dedicados a la venta de todo tipo de vehículos como turismo, ligeros y vehículos industriales; de los cuales destacar el UNIMOG (siendo Autoprima el único Concesionario Oficial de España) y los camiones. 

Y por otro lado, los Talleres Oficiales de Mercedes-Benz, centrados en la postventa para toda la gama de productos Mercedes-Benz, contando con un equipo profesional altamente cualificado. 

Con unas instalaciones innovadoras y con lo último en tecnología y maquinaria. Comprometidos en avanzar en innovación, con un equipo en constante formación que comparte la pasión por lo que hacen, consiguiendo la clave de la excelencia.

Empresa beneficiaria de las subvenciones de la Junta de Comunidades de Castilla-La Mancha: Ayudas -Adelante Inversión- para el fomento de la inversión y la mejora de la productividad empresarial. Proyecto incentivado con una subvención cofinanciada por el Fondo Europeo de Desarrollo Regional con el objetivo de conseguir un tejido empresarial más competitivo.

Name: Disnove Volkswagen
Description:
A Disnove foi fundada em 1967 na Cidade de Timbaúba localizada a cerca de 100 km do Recife, Capital Pernambucana. De lá saíram os primeiros Volkswagen zero km vendidos na Cidade e uma nova fase se iniciava no mercado local e com isso novos investimentos foram realizados com o objetivo de ampliar as vendas de veículos, peças e serviços de assistência técnica.

Em 1998 o Grupo Disnove, empresa familiar e de origem local, adquiriu os direitos comerciais para atuar na Cidade do Recife através de aquisição de uma Concessionária também da marca Volkswagen, localizada na avenida Caxangá no bairro da Iputinga. Neste mesmo período havia 10 Concessionárias instaladas no grande Recife, das quais apenas duas Revendas, incluindo a Disnove, juntamente com uma terceira recém nomeada permanecem operando no mercado.

Com o mercado em crescimento o Grupo Disnove dava início aos processos de expansão e reestruturação, com a aquisição de um novo ponto comercial para venda de veículos seminovos e em seguida de um local específico para Logística de recebimento dos veículos novos recebidos da Montadora.
Ao completar 41 anos a Disnove comemora o crescimento nas vendas e os resultados obtidos ao longo desses anos ao mesmo tempo em que é declarada pela Assobrav – Associação Brasileira dos Revendedores Volkswagen como a 14ª Concessionária em faturamento no universo de cerca de 600 revendas espalhadas no Brasil. Face a todo esse cenário positivo o Grupo Disnove é contemplado pela Volkswagen com a concessão de um Filial Plena que já se encontra em funcionamento desde outubro/2007.

Em Fevereiro de 2010 foi inaugurada a nova loja de veiculos seminovos no Arruda e até Agosto deste mesmo ano estaremos inciando as operações do novo centro de distribuicao de logistica. Além da abertura de novos pontos o Grupo também está realizando reformas estruturais em seu atuais predios destacando a conclusão da reforma completa da Filial Caxangá.

Name: Vecol Volkswagen

O Grupo Vecol tem a certificação ATC Volkswagen. Um programa desenvolvido pela Volkswagen do Brasil voltado para  excelência no atendimento dos nossos clientes no departamento de pós venda. Nosso Grupo também foi um dos primeiros selecionados pela Volkswagen do Brasil para implantação do programa Dealer Qualification, programa que busca a excelência no  atendimento dos clientes de veículos novos e seminovos.

Name: Longo Toyota
Description:
Longo Toyota is the largest retailer of Toyota products in the world.  

Founded in 1967, Longo Toyota is the #1 volume Toyota dealership in the U.S.A.  Longo's pledge is to build lifetime relationships with its guests by delivering a world-class experience at every transaction, every day.
 
Longo has received over 130 awards and recognition, including the prestigious Toyota President's Award. Longo is one of only five dealers in the nation - and the only Toyota dealer in California - to have achieved this honor every year since the award's inception in 1986.

At the GAIN Group of Companies, our mission is to deliver an unparalleled blend of care, safety, and driving enjoyment to every client we serve. Name: GRUBBS Family of Dealerships

GRUBBS FAMILY OF DEALERSHIPS IS ELEVATING THE AUTOMOTIVE EXPERIENCE

This "customer first" philosophy would be passed down for generations to come, and you can see it firsthand at any of the Grubbs dealership locations in Texas. The Grubbs Auto Group has won a number of awards for our customer service and sales operations, and has been recognized as a leader in our local community for our continued support and involvement.

We invite you to visit a Grubbs car dealership to experience personalized attention and our robust showrooms to experience personalized attention and our low-pressure, fully transparent sales process. Find a Grubbs dealership location near you- our team looks forward to serving you!

Name: Bonnefis Automobile

Name: Team Colin
Description:
Un acteur de référence dans la distribution automobile.

Le Groupe Team Colin est une entreprise française de premier plan spécialisée dans la distribution des marques Toyota et Lexus. Fondée en 2009, elle s’est imposée comme un réseau de plus de 20 concessions stratégiquement implantées en Île-de-France, ainsi que dans les régions Grand-Est et Nord. Parmi ses sites emblématiques, l’entreprise compte l’une des plus grandes concessions Lexus d’Europe à Lille, renforçant ainsi sa position d’acteur majeur du secteur.

Fidèle à l’engagement de Toyota en faveur de la mobilité durable, le Groupe Team Colin met un accent particulier sur la commercialisation de véhicules hybrides et électriques, tant neufs que d’occasion. Son expertise s’étend bien au-delà de la vente, avec une gamme complète de services incluant l’entretien après-vente, les réparations, la fourniture de pièces et d’accessoires, ainsi que des solutions de financement adaptées aux particuliers comme aux entreprises. L’entreprise se distingue également par son offre de mobilité dédiée aux professionnels, en accompagnant notamment les petites et grandes entreprises ainsi que les secteurs spécialisés tels que les taxis.

Basée à Vélizy-Villacoublay, le Groupe Team Colin demeure une entreprise familiale, portée par une équipe de plus de 450 collaborateurs passionnés et engagés. Son développement repose sur des valeurs fortes : excellence, innovation et satisfaction client, faisant du Groupe Team Colin un acteur incontournable du marché automobile français.
Notre petite histoire en qualité de distributeur a débuté il y a près de 14 ans avec nos 2 premiers sites en périphérie parisienne, pour désormais représenter fièrement 24 établissements et plus de 450 collaborateurs, 
En 2022, le groupe accède au cercle des 100 principaux distributeurs automobiles français.

Name: Waylands
Description:
Waylands are a family run and owned motor retail group that proudly represents Volvo in Bristol, Gloucester, Newbury, Oxford, Reading & Swindon. Also representing Kia in Reading & Bicester and MG in Oxford.

Our Mission is clear; “To deliver an exceptional experience that customers trust and advocate, to represent our franchise partners successfully and to build class leading environments for every member of our team”

The company was established by John O'Hanlon, former CEO of Ridgeway Group which represented many premium franchises in the South of England. Waylands commenced business in November 2017 with its first franchise, Volvo in Reading. The company aims to grow steadily to achieve sufficient scale to compete with the industry's biggest players but to maintain representation that has the feel and culture of a local dealership.

We believe that our relationship with our customers goes far beyond the initial purchase of the car. It is highly important to us that we deliver on our promises and offer full transparency to deliver an exceptional experience.

We believe in ensuring every member of our team gets the right development journey for them. With dedicated in-house and manufacturer training programmes available, we encourage our staff to take pride in their work and remain committed which is reflected in the excellent level of service we offer.

We understand that buying a car is a significant and emotional experience. At Waylands we aim to deliver straightforward advice to make sure customers get the most appropriate vehicle, financed in the best way to suit their circumstances.

Name: Truck Line SA
Description:
Truck Line is the exclusive distributor of FAW heavy-duty trucks and Aucma refrigerated trailers in Saudi Arabia, bringing world-class commercial vehicles and cold-chain solutions to the local market. With a commitment to quality, reliability, and after-sales support, we provide our clients with vehicles that meet international standards while being fully adapted to the demands of the Kingdom.

Beyond distribution, Truck Line operates a growing logistics and transportation fleet, specializing in both refrigerated and dry cargo across all regions of Saudi Arabia. Our logistics network supports key industries such as food, pharmaceuticals, construction, and manufacturing, ensuring goods are delivered safely and efficiently.

Supported by advanced maintenance facilities and certified spare parts warehouses, we guarantee comprehensive after-sales services, giving our customers confidence and long-term value in every truck and trailer they operate.

At Truck Line, we combine global partnerships with local expertise, driving innovation in the trucking and logistics sector while contributing to the Kingdom’s Vision 2030 goals for infrastructure and economic growth.

Description:
Valentino Automobili rappresenta da sempre il punto di riferimento a Roma per l’automotive. Eccellenza nelle performance, dinamismo, proposte sempre vantaggiose, una consulenza attenta e dedicata in tutte le fasi di acquisto. In due parole, competenza ed affidabilità. Si potrebbe riassumere così la mission di Valentino Automobili. Il risultato di un’esperienza ultrasettantennale nell’automotive a Roma.

Con 4 sedi a Roma Valentino Automobili è concessionaria ufficiale Volkswagen.

Vincitore del premio “Volkswagen Award Italy”, dealer primo classificato in Italia nella vendita e service, per gli anni 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025.

Name: Luxon TATA
Description: Luxon Motors Is An Authorized TATA Dealership Offering Tata Vehicles In Kerala.

Name: Valauto
Description:
Créé en 1976 dans le Nord de la France par Jean-Dominique Roger, le Groupe Valauto s’efforce, depuis bientôt 50 ans, d’être au service de ses clients en leur transmettant les valeurs familiales qui ont fait son succès.

Aujourd'hui, le Groupe Valauto est implanté au plus près de ses clients sur le Nord et le Pas de Calais avec toujours cette même envie de les satisfaire. 

Chacune de nos concessions s'attache à faire vivre les valeurs du Groupe Valauto en conjuguant écoute, réactivité et bien évidement proximité.

Grâce à nos marques innovantes et compétitives : Volkswagen, Skoda, Seat, AUDI, Volkswagen Utilitaires et Hyundai, le Groupe Valauto vous propose un large choix de véhicules neufs et d'occasion pour répondre à toutes vos attentes, tous vos besoins et toutes vos envies.

Pour aller plus loin, le Groupe Valauto vous offre une solution professionnelle grâce à son agence Valauto Entreprises à Lomme.

Name: Solitaire Automotive Group
Description:
Formerly known as Solitaire Motors, Solitaire Automotive Group opened its doors in December 1971, originally selling smaller used cars. Despite these humble beginnings, we were driven to excel in every facet of customer service, right from the outset. At Solitaire Automotive, effortless performance, unparalleled efficiency and an incomparable experience combine to ensure that our service is as distinguished as the marques we carry.

Solitaire occupies six premium, easily accessible locations:

Hawthorn: Where our stunningly designed showrooms provide a spectacular setting for new Aston Martin, Audi, Ducati, Jaguar, Land Rover and Volkswagen vehicles.

Prospect: The brand new, state of the art showroom where Volkswagen and Volkswagen Commercial take pride of place, along with our brand new Audi City showroom

Eastwood: Home to Maserati and the all new ZEEKR 

Parkside: The destination for Polestar & Volvo. Also available are our luxury pre-owned vehicles.

Adelaide CBD: Home to our Spanish brand CUPRA.

Mile End: Our state-of-the-art service centre, built in partnership with some of the world’s finest car manufacturers, to satisfy their exacting demands for technical excellence and customer satisfaction. Here, factory-trained personnel complete with quality work bays are backed up by an equally impressive parts department stocking a comprehensive cache of parts on site.

With a focus on customer service excellence and fostering a supportive team environment, Solitaire Automotive is an organisation that embraces change, innovation and a positive working environment for all employees.  We are always looking for ambitious and motivated personnel to join our team. If you are eager to work for a quality retailer in the automotive industry, please contact us.

Name: G. NEDELEC
Description:
Bienvenue dans le Groupe G. Nedelec, un réseau de 15 concessions automobiles Peugeot, Fiat et Leapmotor en région Bretagne : Finistère (29), Côtes d'Armor (22) et Ille-et-Vilaine (35).

Le Groupe G. Nedelec vous propose ses services 
 Vente de véhicules neufs et occasions : particuliers, professionnels et utilitaires.
 Atelier de réparations mécaniques et carrosserie 
Peugeot Rapide 
 Peugeot Professionnel Center
Vente de pièces de rechange

Name: Groupe Pautric
Description:
Le Groupe Pautric est un acteur majeur de la distribution automobile premium en France et en Belgique, en partenariat avec  les marques BMW, MINI, BMW Motorrad, Alpina, Volvo, Jaguar & Land Rover. 
Le Groupe Pautric est notamment le 1er distributeur de la marque BMW en France.

Il compte 28 sites répartis dans l'Ouest de la France et en région Rhône-Alpes, ainsi qu'en Belgique.

Le Groupe a réalisé près de 923 M€ de chiffre d'affaires en 2024, et compte environ 1.000 collaborateurs.

Name: AUYANTEPUY
Description:
Le groupe AUYANTEPUY, un des acteurs leader dans l’univers du Loisirs, et tout particulièrement dans le voyage itinérant, propose, au travers de ses filiales, le portefeuille le plus complet du marché : Conseils, ventes, services, marketing, gestion, entretien, community management, développement, country developper, data scientist.

En forte croissance depuis sa création en 2006, le Groupe AUYANTEPUY c’est un CA 2016 établi à 40 millions d’euros - 85 collaborateurs - 9 entités (7 concessions - 1 start’up - son siège social).

Au sein d’AUYANTEPUY, chaque collaborateur(trice) de part son savoir, ses idées et sa personnalité compose l’ADN de notre groupe. Sur la saison 2017-2018, notre entité accueillera plus de 20 talents pour donner naissance à des projets d’envergure.

Name: B&B Vehicle Contracts Ltd
Description:
Established in 1997, B&B Vehicle Contracts has grown over the years into one of the UK’s leading vehicle leasing specialist for business and private individuals. We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional customer service and with over 70 years of combined industry experience, we are able to offer tailored packages to suit your requirement.

Daily industry research through the UK’s largest finance partners including Alphabet, Arval, Lex Autolease, ALD and Leaseplan, enables us to offer the most competitive leasing, contract hire, outright purchase and short term rental options.

Name: Pike + Bambridge | Vehicle Leasing
Description:
At Pike+Bambridge, we’re changing the way people buy cars. Our team offers expert, tailored advice, saving busy professionals and businesses time and money when it comes to securing their next vehicle. With over 5,000 professionals supported across the UK over the last decade, our clients trust us to simplify the process and deliver the right vehicle with confidence and ease.
 
At the beginning of your journey, you will be assigned to an expert member of our team who can best meet your needs, be they individual or business-related. We offer independent advice on a range of brands, specialise in setting up Salary Sacrifice schemes and the transition to Electric Vehicles and advise on a number of financing options including both personal and business leasing. 

We are also the official vehicle providers to membership organisations, such as the Law Society of Scotland and the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Scotland.

______

We are fully authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority, all staff are trained to Specialist in Automotive Finance level and the business is a member of the British Vehicle Rental and Leasing Association.

Name: Thonburi Group
Description: Thonburi Group is a leading automotive and mobility solutions provider in Thailand with a legacy since 1914 as the country’s first Mercedes-Benz distributor. Today, we have expanded beyond dealership and distributorship operations into comprehensive automotive manufacturing and innovation including Dealership with Mercedes-Benz, Authorized Partners in Assembly Plant Operations, Production of High-Voltage Batteries for Electric and Plug-in Hybrid Vehicles, and Premium EV Car Distributorship partnering with Chinese Global Automotive Brand such as Geely. Guided by our purpose “Driving Solutions, Advancing Life,” we are committed to advancing people’s lives through Sustainable Business Practices, Cutting-edge Technology and Customer-Centric Experiences.

Name: Kalyani motors
Description: Kalyani Motors, established by an insightful personage Late Sri S Anantha Raju, began its Maruti Suzuki dealership in Bengaluru in 2006, as an authorised Sales and Service Dealer. Kalyani Motors believes in customer satisfaction and constantly aims to enhance its quality standards to achieve perfection.

Name: AU Limitless Mobile App Specialists | Integrations Pioneers
Description:
Our aim is to support automotive dealers who aspire to lead the way in digital innovations. We recognise the importance of maximising the lifetime value of the customer, reducing costs, and delivering a seamless customer experience which is designed around customer convenience.

We understand dealers use several systems, gateways and partners to support their businesses. This is why we have over 60 integrations and counting waiting to join forces and unite all customer touch points into one central space which connects and engages directly with their customers lifestyle needs.

Customer ownership, (Lifetime value) and costs savings have never been more paramount in todays markets and AU Limitless ensures their clients lead the way in customer satisfaction.

Name: Sundaram Motors Group -  Automotive Retail Operations
Description:
Trichur Sundaram Santhanam & Family Private Limited formerly known as TV Sundaram Iyengar and Sons Private Limited established a Vehicle Dealership in Chennai for handling Cars and Commercial Vehicles and thus SUNDARAM MOTORS was born on August 13, 1945, to provide for rapid expansion in the business activities.

Sundaram Motors, a division an authorized dealers for Mercedes-Benz Passenger Cars in the states of Karnataka & Tamil Nadu and has been in the automobile industry for over six decades. Sundaram Motors started its Mercedes-Benz dealership in Karnataka in the year 2001 and Tamil Nadu in the year 2003 at Coimbatore. Today it has 10 state-of-the-art Mercedes-Benz facilities spread across both Karnataka and Tamil Nadu with the latest launch being the #10 Facility near Airport Road Bangalore. TVS Sundaram Motors, which recently celebrated 24 years of successful partnership with Brand Mercedes, is known for its solid and widely acclaimed lineage of trust, value and service. 

Sundaram Motors are also distributors for the products of Premier Ancillary Manufactures whose products are fitted as original equipment by the vehicle manufacturers. These distribution centres are located in several cities and towns in Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat, Maharashtra, West Bengal, Bihar, Jharkhand, Orissa and Assam.

Sundaram Motors believes in total customer satisfaction and constantly strives to improve quality standards to achieve excellence.

Name: Omni Motors Pvt Ltd
Description:
Omni Motors is the authorized distributor for BharatBenz brand of trucks and buses across Nepal. BharatBenz is a brand owned by Daimler AG of Germany (the maker of Mercedes Benz cars and commercial vehicles and one of the largest manufactures of commercial vehicles in the world). Omni Motors has presence across 10 locations in Nepal and is ever expanding to have even a greater coverage within the country. 
Omni Motors started the sales of BharatBenz commercial vehicles in Nepal in late 2014 and is already making it's name for being one of the most respected commercial vehicle players in the country.

Name: Automax
Description: Established in 1997 in Little Rock, Arkansas, Automax, a multi-award-winning dealership, specializes in the supply of brand-new vehicles to the MENA region, focusing on quality, affordability, and exceptional service. With over 120 experienced specialists, a network of 7 showrooms, and a remarkable record of 62,000+ cars sold, Automax is synonymous with reliability and customer satisfaction. Our latest showroom opening in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, marks another milestone in our journey to bring excellence closer to our customers.

Name: Duta Hino
Description:
Duta Cemerlang Motors, PT  (Duta Hino) is an authorized distributor for Hino buses and trucks for the Central Java and Yogyakarta provinces.
Duta Hino was founded in 1981 as one of the first Hino distributors in Indonesia. 

Our head office is conveniently located within Kendal with branches in Magelang, Sragen, Semarang (Kaligawe), Yogyakarta, Kebumen, Salatiga, Boyolali and Banjarnegara.

Our facilities and services includes:
- Large and conveniently located showrooms
- Friendly and knowledgeable sales consultants
- Extensive stock of spareparts with available same day delivery
- Large and state-of-the-art workshop with certified technicians
- Mobile workshop providing on-site and emergency services

We partner with many banks and financial institutions including Hino Finance, Adira Finance, Mitsui Finance, BCA Finance, IMFI, Asia Finance, Clipan, Mandiri Tunas Finance, ORIX, Dipostar, Panin Bank, Bank Permata, and BCA Bank.

Name: CFAO Mobility Guinee
Description:
Installé en Guinée depuis 2004, CFAO Mobility est le distributeur exclusif de trois marques de renommée mondiale : Suzuki, Bridgestone et Toyota.

Il propose une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme et utilitaires sous les marques Suzuki et Toyota.

Depuis début 2011, les motos et moteurs marins Suzuki font également partie de l’offre CFAO Motors en Guinée.

Name: Arndt Automobile GmbH
Description:
ARNDT mobility group - Die Autovermietung des Mittelstands!
Die Autovermietung Arndt ist Ihr Partner rund um die Fahrzeugmiete. Unsere Fahrzeugflotte bietet Ihnen viele Möglichkeiten, vom Kleinwagen bis hin zur Luxuslimousine in der Kurzzeit oder Langzeitmiete. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Anfrage!

Name: Leather and Chrome
Description: Bringing the best motorcycle brand in the world to the best country in the world, Cape Town!

Name: ellers - Volvo, Polestar, Lynk & Co. in Osnabrück
Description: Mobility is taking new paths, join us. Hybrid, combustion engine, or full electric - the choices are expanding, making clear guidance increasingly important. Many paths, one direction. Forward: moving people and inspiring people. Welcome to Ellers, your Volvo and Polestar partner for Osnabrück and its surroundings.

Name: Renault BYmyCAR
Description:
Le Groupe BYmyCAR est un acteur majeur de la distribution automobile et motocycliste indépendant français. Nos 13 concessions BYmyCAR Renault sont implantées à l’international, dans 2 régions de France en Auvergne Rhône Alpes et Grand Est ainsi qu’en Espagne.

Nos services et prestations s’adressent tant aux clients particuliers qu’aux clients professionnels, incluant la vente de véhicules neufs ou d’occasion, des solutions de financement sur mesure, des offres d’assurances adaptées, l’entretien et la réparation des véhicules ainsi que la vente de pièces de rechange et d’accessoires.

Name: Exeed Egypt
Description:
In 2023, NATCO acquired EXEED as the exclusive general distributor in Egypt. This strategic partnership aims to provide the Egyptian market with a premium Chinese brand featuring high-tech innovative technology and safety standards.
EXEED is a premium car brand that harmoniously blends timeless European automotive heritage with cutting-edge Chinese manufacturing expertise. It has developed for consumers who dare to continuously explore and break through the realm of life with a progressive attitude. Focusing on "Premium, Elegance, and Intelligence," this brand is committed to consistently exceeding expectations by introducing customers to new technologies that enhance their lifestyles.



فى 2023 قامت الشركة الوطنية للسيارات (ناتكو) بالحصول على الوكالة الحصرية للعلامة الصينية الرائدة اكسيد في جمهورية مصر العربية. تهدف هذه الشراكة الاستراتيجية إلى التقديم للسوق المصري علامة تجارية صينية فاخرة  بتصميم مميز وتكنولوجيا ذات طابع فاخر لما تم إطلاقه من قبل. 
تعد "اكسيد" علامة تجارية مميزة تجمع بين ثقافة السيارات الأوروبية مع أحدث الإمكانيات التي تشتهر بها الصين اليوم. تم إطلاقها للمستهلكين الذين يرغبون في تجربة واكتشاف كل ما هو جديد ومتطور تحت شعار "الفخامة والأناقة والذكاء

Name: Harley-Davidson Cape Town
Description: Bringing the best motorcycle brand in the world to the best country in the world, Cape Town!

Name: Vaden Automotive
Description:
Reputation and quality mean everything at Vaden Automotive. Our commitment to ethics and our customers won us the Better Business Bureau's Diane Wahrman Torch Award for Marketplace Ethics. We also won the Time Magazine Quality Dealer award in 1992. With our award-winning professionals, and quality vehicles, it's no wonder so many people in the Lowcountry and Coastal Empire visit a Vaden Automotive dealership for their new or used car purchase.

At Vaden, we are proud partners of our manufacturers carrying the following brands: Cadillac, Chevrolet, Chrysler, Dodge, Genesis, GMC, Hyundai, INFINITI, Jeep, Nissan, and Ram. Additionally, we have a dedicated fleet and commercial division, including Isuzu trucks and cargo vans, tailored to meet your business needs. Whether you are looking for a fuel-efficient new car, a mini-van, or SUV for the family, or a do-it-all work truck, you'll discover all these options at a Vaden Automotive dealership. 

We proudly serve our customers in Savannah, Beaufort, Brunswick, Pooler, Hinesville, Statesboro, Hilton Head, Beaufort, and beyond! 

Come visit us at Dan Vaden Chevrolet, Vaden Cadillac, Vaden of Beaufort, Dan Vaden Chevrolet Brunswick, Vaden Cadillac Brunswick, Vaden Chevrolet Pooler, Vaden CDJR Brunswick, Vaden CDJR Savannah, Vaden Hyundai Brunswick, Vaden Nissan of Savannah, Vaden Nissan of Hinesville, Vaden Hyundai of Statesboro, Genesis of Hilton Head, Vaden Nissan of Hilton Head, and INFINITI of Hilton Head.

Vaden Automotive Group serves as one of the most sought after employers in the Coastal Georgia and South Carolina area. Since 2010, we have created more than 400 new jobs in the cities where we serve. We are invested in giving back to our communities through community partnerships, with a strong focus on education. The Vaden Team offers competitive compensation, unmatched benefits, and a culture of inclusion where everyone feels a part of something special.

Name: ROX Automobiles UAE
Description: ROX Motors, premium modern luxury automotive brand leading a new market in the region Empowered By Nature.

Name: Porsche Center Uppsala
Description:
Vår absoluta målsättning är att överträffa medarbetarnas, kundernas och därtill våra ägares förväntningar och vi kommer inte ge oss förrän vi lyckats. 
Porsche Center Uppsala är en del av Möller Sportbilar och finns idag representerade genom Porsche Center Örebro och Uppsala är den andra etableringen i ett nätverk som i framtiden kommer bestå av tre anläggningar, då vi även etablerar oss i Västerås framöver. 
Vi önskar er varmt välkomna in på ett besök och ser fram emot att ta hand om er.

Name: Cover All Program
Description:
At Cover All Program, we are committed to safeguarding our clients’ investments with our comprehensive range of products. We're a trusted partner to the retail automotive industry, enhancing business office performance and ensuring a positive customer journey.

Cover All Program supports dealerships by offering industry-leading service plan programs, dependable products, cutting-edge marketing, and ongoing assistance. As a privately held company, Cover All Program proudly serves a vast network of nearly 700 dealers. Our team is committed to living out our mission each day, which is to provide our dealership partners and customers with the exceptional experience they deserve.

Name: Bymycar Škoda
Description:
Le Groupe BYmyCAR est un acteur majeur de la distribution automobile et motocycliste indépendant français. Nos 10 concessions BYmyCAR Skoda sont implantées dans 3 régions de France, en Centre Val de Loire, Auvergne Rhône Alpes, et Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur. 

Nos services et prestations s’adressent tant aux clients particuliers qu’aux clients professionnels, incluant la vente de véhicules neufs ou d’occasion, des solutions de financement sur mesure, des offres d’assurances adaptées, l’entretien et la réparation des véhicules ainsi que la vente de pièces de rechange et d’accessoires.

Name: Miller Motorcars
Description:
For 50 years, Miller Motorcars has been the premier destination for luxury and exotic automotive sales, service, parts and storage.

We are proud to represent Aston Martin, Alfa Romeo, Bentley, Bugatti, Czinger, DeTomaso Ferrari, Maserati, McLaren, McMurtry, Pagani, Pininfarina, Rolls-Royce, Touring Superleggera and more.

Customer satisfaction is our number one priority. Our countless awards and unwavering reputation speaks for itself. Family owned and operated since 1976. Located in Greenwich, Connecticut.

Name: Golden Dragon Egypt
Description:
Golden Dragon microbus has a long history and presence in the Egyptian market over the years, since Kasrawy Group started being the sole agent of the brand in Egypt in 2009

Golden Dragon microbus has been among the top 3 brands in microbus sales in the last decade

Name: Harlem Group
Description:
Harlem Group, a renowned family-owned enterprise established in 1995, has been a stalwart in the global business landscape for nearly three decades. Our journey has been defined by a steadfast commitment to long-term relationships and unwavering consistency with all stakeholders.


Key Highlights:
Global Presence: We operate over 30 facilities spanning four countries - Iraq, UAE, Jordan, and the USA, we have cemented our footprint in diverse markets.
  
Diverse Industries: With expertise across four industries including automotive, real estate, luxury watches, and management consultation.
  
Trusted Partnerships: Serving as distributors for esteemed global brands across various sectors, including automotive giants like Jeep, Dodge, Chrysler, Ram, Mopar, JETOUR, SOUEAST, Karry, Mitsubishi, Maserati, Alfa Romeo, Fiat, and Virgin Oil as well as luxury watch icon Jacob & Co, those 14 global brands have entrusted Harlem Group with their reputation and commercial success abroad.
  
Proven Track Record: Our success story is underscored by the trust and confidence reposed in us by our esteemed partners, serving as a testament to our capability and integrity in delivering exceptional results.

Name: KTM Sportmotorcycle France
Description:
Life is too short to work just anywhere / La vie est trop courte pour travailler n'importe où. 
Rejoins notre équipe !

Name: ABT Maruti
Description: “From a Small Seed, a mighty trunk may grow”- The Logistics behemoth “ABT”, a mighty trunk rooted from the thought seeds of our great Visionary, our Founder Late.P .Nachimuthu Gounder, who started business in 1921 by hiring Bullock carts at pollachi, a bantam town far from Coimbatore city, Tamilnadu.

Name: Grupo HBW-Oportunidades
Description:
O grupo HBW vem atuando no mercado automotivo as marcas Volkswagen, Honda e BYD.

A Brasilwagen é sinônimo de atendimento qualificado, com excelência em produtos e serviços. Líder em vendas de carros da marca Volkswagen, a rede de concessionárias faz parte do Grupo HBW, que atua em São Paulo Desde 1955.

A primeira loja, inaugurada no bairro Cambuci e é uma das primeiras concessionárias Volkswagen autorizadas no Brasil. Hoje, a Brasilwagen conta com mais cinco unidades, Cambuci, Santo Amaro, Vila Nova Conceição, Aeroporto e Vila Guilherme, contando com o maior estoque de carros nacionais e importados no Brasil.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A SP Japan atua no mercado de automóveis e tem sua área de atuação na cidade de São Paulo em quatro endereços.

A primeira loja do grupo foi inaugurada em 1992 nos Jardins, sendo a primeira concessionária da marca Honda no Brasil.

Hoje, a SP Japan possui 4 unidades : Jardins (1992), Cambuci (1992), Morumbi (1998) e Ricardo Jafet (2003).

Name: CG Motors Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
CG Motors is the newly developed wing of CG Corp Global, a conglomerate that comprises 202 companies and 261 brands across the world. This organization has the long history of experience and trust since 1870's.

CG Motors purely emphasizes on green energy vehicles. CG signifies reliability, trust and continuity and CG Motors signifies sustainability and innovation. CG Motor aims in providing our customers peace of mind while investing in a new brand as it is be backed by the largest and most reliable Nepalese business house and right away providing the world class electric vehicles.

We are committed to the highest standards in our product and service we provide. Our quality benchmarks will be amongst best in Nepal, our ethical standards are high, and we are responsive to the needs of our customers and believe in building long-term partnership with them.

Name: EV Auto
Description:
EVauto is Utah's largest high end used electric vehicle and hybrid dealership with a brand new location under construction from the ground up in Davis County (Summer 2023 opening) and a second location to be announced soon. EVauto carries all brands of premium, low mile, clean title electric vehicles including Tesla, Rivian, Lucid, Ford, Audi, Hyundai, Kia, Fisker, Porsche, Chevy and more! We will also be Utah's only dedicated EV service center providing support for every EV and Hybrid make and model.

With meteoric growth since founding in late 2019, we have helped hundreds of customers purchase their first (or upgrade an existing) EV! We operate as a true service oriented, customer first business.  No weird fees.  No pressure.  No sitting in various rooms signing documents forever.  As a technologist that happened to start a car dealership, we make sure the experience is different by making it easy, chill and fun to get a super high quality EV.

Name: Johnson Automotive
Description:
Headquartered in Raleigh, NC, Johnson Automotive promises Great Deals, Great Service, and No Badgers in each of our dealerships from southern Florida to Maryland.  We offer a wide range of new, manufacturer-certified-preowned, and quality preowned vehicles for every lifestyle.  Representing Lexus since 1991 from our dealership on Capital Boulevard in northern Raleigh, Johnson Automotive has earned a reputation for unparalleled customer support and first class operation.  The same customer-first attitude that has won accolades in our Lexus dealerships is equally obvious to guests in our Hyundai, Genesis, Maserati, Alfa Romeo, Subaru, Porsche, Volvo, Kia and Honda dealerships.

We share the thrill our customers receive from owning and driving a fine automobile.  Whether you come in for a new or pre-owned auto, to arrange financing, or to have your vehicle serviced, the entire staff of Johnson Automotive is committed to providing an excellent experience that keeps you wanting to return.  Our customers regularly enjoy a level of value and convenience that meet and exceed their expectations.  Everyone at Johnson Automotive continues to pledge 'Great Deals, Great Service, No Badgers!'.

Name: CFAO Mobility Niger
Description:
Installé au Niger depuis 1926, CFAO Mobility Niger est le distributeur exclusif de huit marques de renommée mondiale : Toyota, Peugeot, Suzuki, Yamaha, Hino, Renault-Trucks, King Long, Avis et Bridgestone.

CFAO Mobility Niger commercialise une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme et utilitaires sous les marques Toyota, Peugeot et Suzuki. Elle distribue également des deux-roues, motos marine, des motopompes et des groupes électrogènes Yamaha. Les marques Renault-Trucks et King Long proposent respectivement en poids lourd et bus de grande capacité des produits de qualité et performants.

A travers la marque Bridgestone CFAO Mobility Niger offre des pneus particulièrement bien adaptée au continent africain. 

La marque Avis représente l'activité location longue et courte durée en profitant de large gamme de véhicules commercialisée par le groupe CFAO: Berlines, SUV, véhicules utilitaires et 4x4.

CFAO Mobility Niger propose une offre complète de services avant, pendant et après la vente, pour répondre à tous les besoins de ses clients.

Name: OMODA & JAECOO Belux
Description:
About OMODA
OMODA stands as an explorer in the intelligent, electrified era of automotive innovation. The brand is dedicated to exploring new horizons in complete vehicle research and intelligent manufacturing, intelligent automotive solutions, and innovation in the field of new energy ecosystems. OMODA is committed to building innovative business models centered around the user, exploring future-oriented transportation technologies, constructing sustainable green ecosystems, and philanthropic systems. OMODA aims to provide global consumers with high-quality automotive products and service experiences. Currently, the company has embarked on a comprehensive layout in the new energy sector and has created a “Lifestyle of Health and Sustainability” (LOHAS) circle that goes beyond cars, catering to the global pursuit of a finer life.

About JAECOO 
As a brand-new off-road brand, the name JAECOO is inspired by a fusion of the German word "Jäger" and the English word "Cool." This captures both off-road and urbanism while exuding a refined style and quality that imparts a mission of brave exploration and unwavering perseverance. With more than a decade of joint venture experience, the group adheres to the brand philosophy "From Classic, Beyond Classic". JAECOO is tirelessly dedicated to innovation and breakthroughs, leading the new urban off-road trend with exceptional four-wheel-drive performance, remarkable safety features, and forward-thinking intelligent technologies. Inheriting the genes of meticulous luxury, it blends the wisdom and craftsmanship of master design teams from the UK, Germany, and other countries, setting a new standard for urban off-road SUVs. In the future, JAECOO will actively promote the concept of sustainable development, combining all-road capabilities with new energy solutions, creating a more efficient and environmentally friendly off-road performance to provide a more comfortable and greener travel experience for the urban elite.

Name: Jigcar
Description:
Jigcar's AI-driven transport optimisation software is built from the ground up for moving cars quickly and cost effectively in modern automotive retail.

We enable automotive businesses to cut costs, reduce days-to-sell, and eliminate manual processes.

We work with some of the biggest automotive retailers in the UK, like Perrys, Glyn Hopkin and Steven Eagell - as well as transport providers, rental companies, auction houses and fleet companies.

Name: Audi Beverly Hills
Description:
Audi Beverly Hills in Beverly Hills, CA is a proud member of the legendary Fletcher Jones portfolio of dealerships. As the #1 Audi dealership in the Nation for 11 consecutive years, our key to success derives from delivering a World-Class Guest Experience through the pursuit of excellence with the help of our highly driven associates. 

To learn more about Audi Beverly Hills, Career Opportunities, or latest news, please contact (424) 281-5600 or visit our website at www.audibh.com.

*Number One Claim based on Audi USA New Sales Results 12/31/25.

Name: Alcopa Auction
Description:
Alcopa Auction est le premier opérateur de ventes aux enchères de véhicules d'occasion de France avec plus de 145 000 lots vendus en 2024. Suite à l'intégration de 7 sociétés de vente aux enchères, Alcopa Auction est devenue le leader sur le marché des ventes aux enchères physiques d'automobiles d'occasion en France. Les ventes aux enchères ont lieu dans nos 7 salles de vente de Beauvais ( Paris nord ), Paris Sud, Rennes, Nancy, Tours, Lyon et Marseille, dont certaines sont actives depuis plus de 25 ans en France.

Name: Carflip - Locadora de Veículos
Description:
Se você está com dificuldade de adquirir seu carro precisa conhecer a Carflip!

Somos uma locadora de veículos por assinatura sob demanda com opção de compra.

Você escolhe o veículo de sua preferência em alguma loja parceira, nós compramos o carro e você assina conosco de forma simples. Se mais tarde desejar comprar o veículo, ainda recebe um desconto.

Como a Carflip funciona?
1) Você escolhe o carro que lhe agrada em uma das revendas parceiras.
2) Você preenche o formulário com o revendedor e uma proposta de locação é enviada ao seu e-mail.
3) Se você aceitar, após análise de crédito e vistoria do veículo, enviaremos o contrato para assinatura digital.
4) Após assinatura, contratamos o seguro e garantia mecânica, e fazemos a instalação do rastreador.
5) Agora é só retirar o veículo na loja e sair rodando, sempre cumprindo o plano de manutenção necessário e pagando em dia as mensalidades.
6) Em cada mensalidade paga você acumula 25% de cashback que poderá ser utilizado para adquirir o veículo contratado a partir do 6° de uso.

Carflip - democratizamos o acesso à mobilidade!

Name: I'm In The Right - Accident Replacement Vehicles
Description:
I’m In The Right is a nationwide company that specialises in accident management solutions providing drivers who aren’t at fault with like-for-like replacement vehicles and end-to-end accident management assistance, with costs recovered from the at fault parties insurer.

We are able to do this because the party at fault is required by law to cover the not-at-fault party’s reasonable costs associated with a car accident, including the cost of hiring a like-for-like replacement vehicle and vehicle repairs.

Alongside providing the not-at-fault party with a like-for-like replacement vehicle, we also facilitate that not at fault parties' vehicle assessment and repairs. 

I'm In The Right provides a 24 hour / 7 days a week support. That means our team will deliver the replacement vehicle at any time and place.

We provide: 
- Accident management
- Accident replacement vehicles
- Total Loss Recovery
- Insurance Dispute Resolution
- Vehicles Repairs
- Towing
- Personal Injury Claims
- Legal advice and litigation

At IITR, we offer a diverse range of vehicles to cater to various needs. Our extensive fleet includes standard, SUV, 7-seater family, electric, prestige, and exotic passenger cars. We can cater to your needs, including supplying baby seats. Additionally, we provide commercial vehicles and trucks such as utilities, vans, flatbed trucks, semi-trailers, prime movers, tautliners, tippers, refrigerated and non-refrigerated trucks, pantechs, assorted trailers, hiabs, toppers, buses, and more. This comprehensive selection ensures we can meet the specific requirements of our customers, whether they need a vehicle for personal use or commercial purposes.

If you have been involved in a not at fault accident, contact I'm In The Right Accident Replacement Vehicles today to keep you back on track ! Contact our team at I'm In The Right on 1300 004 487 or visit www.imintheright.com.au to find our more information.

Description:
O Grupo Amazonas iniciou suas atividades em 1979 com uma loja multimarcas em Guarulhos. Com o sucesso obtido, continuou a expandir seus serviços e, em 1984, abriu um consórcio para financiar seus clientes. Em 1994, foi inaugurada a primeira concessionária.

De lá para cá, tornou-se um dos maiores distribuidores automotivos de São Paulo, possuímos pontos de venda das principais marcas do ramo automotivo, estrategicamente posicionadas para atender todas as regiões da cidade.

Name: Automotive Search Group
Description:
Automotive Search Group has been a trusted leader in recruiting for automotive dealerships since 1996. As a nationwide company, we specialize in connecting dealers with top-tier professionals and assisting industry talent in their job search. We understand that finding the right hire and the right role in the automotive industry can be a challenging journey, which is why we have dedicated ourselves exclusively to automotive recruiting for nearly three decades. We work in the strictest confidence and understand the importance of doing so. 

Our team consists of industry experts who are not only well-versed in automotive trends but also understand the specific needs of dealerships. 

We Provide Skilled Automotive Employees in the Following Areas:
-C-Suite (CFOs, COOs, Managing Partners)
-Regional Managers / Platform Managers
-General Managers
-General Sales Managers
-New and Used Car Sales Managers
-Finance Managers & Finance Directors
-Fixed Operations Directors
-Body Shop Managers
-Service Managers
-Service Advisors
-Parts Managers & Personnel
-Controllers & Office Managers
-Accounts Receivable/Payable
-All Office Staff and Administrative Personnel 

Confidentiality is at the core of what we do. Your job search will remain fully confidential, allowing you to explore new career paths without concern. Automotive recruiting isn’t just a service we offer; it’s our passion and the foundation of our business. We are committed to supporting you at every step, whether you're searching for new opportunities or in need of qualified managers for your dealership.

Whether you’re seeking experienced managers for your dealership or exploring new career opportunities in the automotive industry, we’re here to help.

Dealers: Call us at 508-620-6300 for immediate assistance.
Job Seekers: Submit your resume confidentially to jobs@automotivesearchgroup.com, and one of our representatives will contact you shortly.

Name: Auta
Description:
En Auta, tenemos una misión clara: transformar la experiencia de la compra y venta de autos. Creemos que comprar y vender autos debe ser una experiencia fluida, transparente y placentera para todos los involucrados.

Somos un equipo de profesionales apasionados comprometidos y estamos aquí para demostrar que la honestidad, la profesionalidad y un enfoque centrado en el cliente pueden marcar la diferencia.

Lo que nos distingue es nuestro compromiso con la transparencia. Proporcionamos información precisa sobre vehículos, inspecciones detalladas y precios justos para capacitar a nuestros clientes a tomar decisiones informadas. No solo vendemos autos; entregamos tranquilidad.

Detrás de Auta hay un equipo diverso y talentoso, desde expertos en la compra y venta de autos hasta entusiastas de la tecnología. Nos une nuestra dedicación a crear una experiencia superior en la compra y venta de autos. Trabajamos incansablemente juntos para lograr esta visión.

Ya sea que estés buscando comprar, vender o unirte a nuestro equipo, Auta te da la bienvenida a ser parte de esta emocionante transformación. Redefinamos juntos la compra y venta de autos usados, un cliente satisfecho a la vez.

We’re Peach Cars - the tech-powered marketplace turning Africa’s car chaos into calm, 𝑜𝑛𝑒 𝑡𝑟𝑢𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑑𝑒𝑎𝑙 𝑎𝑡 𝑎 𝑡𝑖𝑚𝑒!

From corporate fleets to first-time buyers, we handle it all - inspections, financing, transfers, even the haggling (𝑠𝑜 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑑𝑜𝑛’𝑡 ℎ𝑎𝑣𝑒 𝑡𝑜). Every Peach car is 600-point inspected, insured, and prepped to move - literally.

Buy • Sell • Finance • Fleet • Trade-In • Partner with Peach

Name: Popular Vehicles & Services Ltd
Description:
Our fixation with cars go way back..what began as a family run automobile spare part store seventy years back, is now a multi-dimensional business enterprise with a network of over 200 units spread throughout the country.

Name: Altitude
Description:
Altitude est un groupe de concessions BMW, MINI, ///M, MINI Electric et BMW i créé par Pierre-Edouard Dieu. Aujourd'hui, le groupe est implanté sur sept sites : Vienne, Saint-Étienne, Roanne, Lyon Vaise, Lyon Limonest, Villefranche-sur-Saône et Mâcon.
Partageant les mêmes valeurs, la même éthique, la même ambition que BMW Group, le Groupe Altitude, est un groupe familial qui se distingue d’autres groupes de distributeurs automobiles français par une caractéristique bien spécifique : être un groupe mono-constructeur. 

Les collaborateurs du Groupe Altitude s’engagent :
- Des conseillers commerciaux et des conseillers services accessibles partout et à tout moment
- Une écoute proactive pour faire évaluer les besoins des clients
- Des explications claires et détaillées des contrats, des prestations
- Des solutions et conseils de spécialistes

Nos concessions se positionnent parmi les meilleures concessions de leur groupe en Indice de Satisfaction Clientèle (ISC) en Vente et en Après-Vente que ce soit pour les marques BMW, MINI, BMW i, et BMW Motorrad.

Nous évoluons dans un marché très concurrentiel. L’une des différences notables, hormis l’excellence des produits du BMW Group, que nous développons est la satisfaction de nos clients.

Cet objectif est atteint par un engagement fort au quotidien de l’ensemble des collaborateurs. C’est un état d’esprit, un comportement, une capacité à anticiper les besoins, une remise en question fréquente de nos méthodes, un travail d’équipe.

En 2021, le Groupe Altitude conforte à nouveau sa place dans le TOP 10 des distributeurs #BMW ... et le TOP 10 #MINI

Name: Bawaria Motors
Description:
Bawaria Motors to największy dealer BMW i MINI w Polsce. Zespół wchodzi w skład firmy PGA Polska, która jest częścią PGA Motors istniejącej od 1979 roku i działającej we Francji, w Holandii i Polsce, należącą do Emil Frey, jednej z największych na świecie firm motoryzacyjnych. 

Na terenie naszego kraju znajdują się cztery salony Bawaria Motors zlokalizowane w Warszawie, Jankach, Gdańsku i Katowicach. Łącznie pracuje w nich aż 345 specjalistów w dziedzinach związanych z motoryzacją, renowacją i sprzedażą pojazdów. Każdy z oddziałów posiada w ofercie samochody nowe, dostępne od ręki, jak i używane. 

Oddziały oferują także usługi blacharsko-lakiernicze oraz serwisu mechanicznego. Wymiana oleju, odnowienie wnętrza pojazdu czy zabezpieczenie powłoki lakierniczej to tylko część z usług czekających na kierowców.

Poza standardową ofertą obejmującą części i akcesoria takie jak koła i opony, lusterka, kierownice czy pokrowce, Klienci znajdą tu także wiele innych dodatków związanych z motoryzacją. Wśród nich są między innymi foteliki dziecięce, kosmetyki samochodowe, oleje, a nawet ubrania i kolekcje odzieżowe dla kobiet i mężczyzn.

Usługi Bawaria Motors są atrakcyjne nie tylko dzięki szerokiemu wyborowi pojazdów. Grupa cyklicznie udostępnia swoim Klientom możliwość skorzystania ze specjalnych ofert dających wszystkim wyjątkowy wachlarz możliwości.

Istniejąca od 2004 roku grupa Bawaria Motors rozwija nie tylko ofertę, ale i swoje kompetencje. Efektem tego jest nagroda 6. Ogólnopolskiego Kongresu Dealerów Samochodowych. W jego ramach Grupa PGA Polska, w skład której wchodzi Bawaria Motors, otrzymała tytuł Najlepszego Dealera Samochodów Używanych.

Name: LSH Auto Australia
Description:
Australia’s leading Mercedes-Benz retail group and the exclusive authorized dealer for smart Mobility with presence in major cities in Melbourne, Sydney and Brisbane.

LSH Auto Australia is nation’s leading Mercedes-Benz dealer retail group.  We comprise a total of 9 outlets in Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane, which are the largest in their respective cities. 

From June  2024, LSH Auto Australia became the exclusive authorized dealer group for smart Mobility with presence in  major cities of Melbourne, Sydney and Brisbane.

We have developed and expanded following successful acquisitions of dealerships from Daimler AG including Mercedes-Benz Sydney in June 2015, Brisbane in September 2015 and Melbourne in July 2017. 

In 2023, we sold over 4,400 new vehicles and over 3,300 pre-owned vehicles across our operations and provided 83,000 vehicle services to our customers. 

We are part of LSH Auto Holdings, the world’s largest Mercedes-Benz passenger vehicle dealer groups with a decades-long heritage, expertise in retail operations, more than 120 premium automotive retail outlets across over 30 cities and more than 6,400 employees. Daimler AG maintains a 15% share in the LSH Auto Holdings business. 

We are a leading provider of Mercedes-Benz car sales and services in Taiwan, South Korea, Germany, the United Kingdom, Australia and Vietnam. 

Our parent is Lei Shing Hong Group, a major Hong Kong based, international conglomerate, with four core businesses – Automobile Distribution, Machinery & Equipment Distribution, Property Investment & Development, and Financial Services.

Combining the operations of Mobility and CFAO Equipment, the company offers a wide range of products and services, including passenger vehicles from premium brands like Mercedes-Benz, Mitsubishi, and Suzuki, as well as industrial equipment such as Mercedes-Benz Trucks, Shacman Trucks, Toyota forklifts and a wide range of tyre brands including Pirelli and Techking.

 Supported by modern facilities in Accra, Tema, Kumasi, Takoradi, and a dedicated service center on Spintex Road, CFAO Mobility Ghana delivers exceptional after-sales service. Additional offerings include vehicle trade-ins, long-term rentals through Loxea, financing solutions with partner banks, and Winpart, a second-channel business specializing in aftermarket parts and vehicle servicing through Autofast centers. 

With a focus on customer-centricity, innovation, and sustainability, CFAO Mobility Ghana continues to play a pivotal role in enhancing mobility and industrial development across the nation.

Popri dovoze elektromobilov štandardných západných značiek sa v poslednej dobe zaujímame aj o možnosti dovozu čínskych elektromobilov na Slovensko. 

Našim poslaním je robiť Vám radosť, preto kvalita našich služieb bude pre nás vždy dôležitejšie ako kvantita predaných vozidiel. Elektromobily sú naša vášeň a máme s nimi bohaté dlhoročné skúsenosti, o ktoré sa s Vami veľmi radi podelíme. 

Vitajte v budúcnosti, vitajte na našom Linkedin profile, alebo navštívte rovno našu webstránku e-cars.sk

W ciągłej sprzedaży mamy ponad 500 aut używanych. Z myślą o naszych Klientach opracowaliśmy program Cygan Assistance 24h oraz unikalną, dożywotnią gwarancję na naprawy blacharsko-lakiernicze w Toyota Marki. 
Zapraszamy do naszych salonów i zapoznania się z oferta, którą przygotowaliśmy po wysłuchaniu Państwa oczekiwań. Obiecujemy nieustannie starać się o Państwa zadowolenie.

Auto na abonament w Qarsonie to usługa, w której każdy może korzystać z nowego samochodu - z niską i niezmienną miesięczną opłatą oraz na krótkiej, 12-miesięcznej umowie. Każdy może cieszyć się fabrycznie nowym autem bez zbędnych formalności logistyczno-administracyjnych czy obaw związanych z utratą wartości samochodu.

Qarson oferuje kilkadziesiąt modeli aut z różnych segmentów: od małych miejskich samochodów, przez klasyczne sedany, samochody kompaktowe i rodzinne, po popularne SUV-y i crossovery. W portfolio firmy znalazły się m.in. marki: Toyota, Renault, Fiat, Suzuki, Nissan czy Tesla.

Abonament w Qarsonie to gwarancja pełnego serwisu - bez ukrytych kosztów. Zespół Qarsona zajmuje się rejestracją auta i kompletnym przygotowaniem go do użytkowania, aby każdy mógł bez zmartwień cieszyć się bezpieczną jazdą zupełnie nowym samochodem.

Licznik całkowitych kosztów wynajmu dostępny jest na stronie www.qarson.pl.

Name: PCH Exotics
Description:
We founded PCH Exotics in California, with a simple idea: combine the thrill of high-performance machines with white-glove, hospitality-level service.

Today, we operate a global luxury mobility platform spanning 709 exotic cars, 343 (brokered) private jets, and 355 (majority brokered) yachts across 30+ cities in 9 countries. From supercars on Pacific Coast Highway to long-range jets and yachts in key global destinations, we serve founders, family offices, celebrities, athletes, and discerning travelers who expect more than a rental – they expect a seamless experience.

As true enthusiasts, we understand the nuance: the right spec, sound, and arrival. Our team obsesses over details – from vehicle curation and maintenance standards to punctual delivery, route planning, and discreet, security-conscious service. Whether it’s a weekend trip, a multistop business itinerary, or a full lifestyle experience across land, sea, and air, we build it around you.

Reliability matters as much as horsepower. Behind the scenes, we invest heavily in operations, safety, and service standards so every handoff feels effortless – from first inquiry to keys in hand, wheels up, or lines off the dock. Our goal is simple: to be the most trusted name in luxury mobility for clients who value both speed and precision.

What we do:
• Exotic & luxury car rentals
• Private jet charters
• Yacht charters
• End-to-end concierge

PCH Exotics IG: @PCHexotics
CEO IG: @VJ.Sheth

More about our CEO:

Vijay Sheth is an American billionaire entrepreneur and philanthropist from Palos Verdes, California. He is the Chairman and majority shareholder of Macau of the Americas (MOTA), a $10 billion integrated luxury casino resort development spanning 1,500+ acres on a privately controlled Caribbean island, which expects to close a $1.5 billion capital raise in early 2026, and the founder of PCH Exotics, a global luxury automotive, aviation, and yacht platform.

Often imitated, never duplicated.
In Speed We Trust.

Des Weiteren sind wir Großkunden-Leistungszentrum und vertreiben Fahrräder sowie Motorroller von Vespa – Mobilität für die ganze Familie!

Als erfolgreiches und seit vielen Jahren bestehendes Familienunternehmen bieten wir Praktikanten, Auszubildenden, Berufseinsteigern und Berufserfahrenen spannende Aufgabengebiete im kaufmännischen und technischen Bereich an.

Name: Volvo Car Wrocław-Bielany
Description:
Nasza przygoda z Volvo rozpoczęła się w październiku 2010 roku, kiedy to zostaliśmy Autoryzowanym Dealerem Volvo INTER-CAR BIELANY. W 2018 roku po gruntownej przebudowie obiektu nazwa zmieniła się na VOLVO CAR WROCŁAW-BIELANY.
Jesteśmy jednym z oddziałów Spółki INTER-CAR SILESIA z siedzibą w Rudzie Śląskiej. Przez ostatnie 12 lat Samochody marki Volvo przeszły rewolucję technologiczną. Ewoluował też design. Są jak zawsze bezpieczne i komfortowe, ale teraz są również bezpieczne dla planety dzięki produkcji samochodów ładowanych z gniazdka i redukcji CO2 całego procesów produkcji i dostaw.
Volvo Car Wrocław-Bielany to bardzo nowoczesny obiekt. Jak na Volvo przystało przytulny i przyjazny dla ludzi. Urządziliśmy go w stylu skandynawskim. Wybudowaliśmy też drugi salon dla samochodów używanych: Volvo Selekt.
Na przestrzeni lat ilość naszych pracowników znacznie się zwiększyła – dwukrotnie w porównaniu z rokiem 2010. Zatrudniamy ok. 60 osób. Doradcy handlowi, doradcy serwisowi, mechanicy, pracownicy myjni, diagności, administracja, recepcjonistki oraz kadra kierownicza - to zgrany i ambitny zespół, z którego jesteśmy dumni. Wiele osób pracuje od samego początku. Z takimi pracownikami jesteśmy gotowi na kolejne lata. Świat się zmienił ale nasza pasja do motoryzacji jest ciągle taka sama.

Name: Helmets Nepal Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Helmets Nepal is the result of a technological revolution and growing e-commerce industry, that encouraged us to create “a one-stop digital platform”, for bike lovers. We sell fashion with protection ensuring quality and with the promise of reliability. But above all, one thing we prioritize in selling is “Road Safety”.
We don’t just sell Helmets; we do it by advocating ROAD SAFETY.
Our team, comprised of motorcycle enthusiasts make sure that they cater to our customers with our company’s values of Thinking ahead, Building Solidarity, and Ensuring Road Safety in mind. And those values are reflected in helping you choose the right gear that protects you throughout all your rides and saves your life in an accident.
Our Story
A story of many firsts and every one of them was a blessing.
Helmets Nepal began operation in Kathmandu in 2016 as the first complete online one-click online platform in Nepal with a store in Anamnagar. The same year, we became the first motorcycle safety gear and accessories retail store in the industry to introduce the concept of showrooms in Nepal by opening our first one in Maitighar. Another showroom followed in Teku, next to our corporate office in 2019.

In early 2021, we opened our third showroom in Nagpokhari.
Now Helmets Nepal is the go-to platform and place for safety gears ranging from varieties of helmets, safety apparel lubricants and, riding techs.

Name: Toyota | Jaworski Auto
Description:
Od 25 lat jesteśmy rodziną marki Toyota. 
Pierwsze kroki stawialiśmy w salonie we Włocławku, w którym ludzie otwarci na zrozumienie, współpracę i wzajemną komunikację stworzyli odpowiedzialny i uczciwy zespół specjalistów Toyota Jaworski Auto. Dość szybko okazało się, że to właśnie te wartości: uczciwość, wzajemny szacunek i zrozumienie najbardziej cenią nasi klienci. 
W 2005 roku otworzyliśmy drugi salon, w Bydgoszczy, a konsekwentnie prowadzona polityka firmy, doprowadziła nas do uzyskania nagród takich jak Ichiban (x5), Dealer Roku (x6), Lider Rynku (x8) Nasze starania zostały też dostrzeżone przez „Auto Świat”,  który nadał nam tytuł Wzorowego Salonu. 
Dzisiaj, współpracując ze świetnym zespołem zaangażowanych, lojalnych, tolerancyjnych i pełnych pasji ludzi stawiamy na dalszy rozwój Toyota Jaworski Auto. Naszym celem jest zbudowanie takich relacji z klientami, aby zostali z nami na zawsze.

Description:

Com a rápida adesão ao modelo, demos um passo além e lançamos nossa própria marca de motocicletas, produzidas em Manaus. Hoje, ampliamos o poder de escolha dos nossos clientes: é possível alugar (com opção de compra ao final do contrato) ou adquirir uma moto Mobílli e viver a experiência completa sobre duas rodas — em veículos econômicos, robustos, modernos e com tecnologia de ponta.

Operamos de forma rentável desde o início e a criação da nossa marca própria reforça a solidez do nosso modelo de negócio. Existimos para democratizar o acesso à mobilidade e impulsionar a evolução de pessoas, famílias e negócios por meio da locação e da venda de motocicletas.

Mobilidade acessível. Oportunidades reais. Evolução para quem faz o Brasil acontecer.

Name: Rohrman Automotive Group
Description:
The Rohrman Automotive Group, is one of the largest family owned auto groups in the United States.  Shortly after Mr. Rohrman finished his term with the U.S. Army's tank division at Fort Lewis in Washington state, he opened a used car lot on the Sagamore Parkway in Lafayette, IN.  This was the start of the Bob Rohrman Auto Group that has grown to over 30 franchise new car dealerships in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin.  How did the Bob Rohrman Auto Group get so big? Two simple things: the best products and the best people.  We've built a solid reputation for our ethical business practices and being great members of our community.

The Rohrman Automotive Group has been providing the Midwest with quality new and used vehicles for well over 40 years. In that time we have never rested on our accomplishments or pretended that we already do enough for our customers. We have sought to expand and to bring our products to more and more people by expanding to Indianapolis and Fort Wayne, Indiana, Chicagoland, Illinois, and Kenosha, Wisconsin. We believe that everyone deserves a quality car buying experience, and that everyone deserves to have a great vehicle that they can rely on.

Even though we have expanded in size to compete with some of the biggest dealership groups in America, we still have never forgotten about our customers or where we came from. That is why, along with our superior customer service, we have pushed to offer some of the best car maintenance and repair in the industry, and that goes for all our brands. Speaking of brands, we can pretty much guarantee that we have a brand for every occasion and for every customer. Come down to one of Bob Rohrman Auto Group's dealerships today and find out everything that we have to offer you and just how nice and friendly our staff can be.

Mission and Values
Our mission is to provide transportation solutions for our community with unparalleled hospitality and complete transparency. At Step One Automotive Group, we are guided by our four core values of Integrity, Excellence, Growth and Accountability. We strive to exemplify these values in every interaction we have with our customers, our employees and our community.

Step One in the Community
One thing that sets Step One Automotive Group apart from other automotive groups is our singular dedication to making an impact in our local community. Whether it is through employee volunteer efforts, sponsorships and in-kind donations, or support of existing programming and non-profit initiatives, Step One Automotive Group has put more than 3 million dollars back into the communities that we serve and plans to continue well into the future. 

Forever Warriors

Name: Borusan Next
Description:
Borusan Next, Borusan Otomotiv Grubu'nun tek çatı altında çoklu marka ve çoklu kanal stratejisi vizyonu doğrultusunda oluşturulan bir ikinci el araba platformudur.


Bu platform kendi lokasyonlarında, teknoloji, güven, hız ve premium müşteri deneyimi odaklı bir yaklaşım ile ikinci el araba alım, satım, takas ve iş ortakları vasıtasıyla finansman ve sigorta çözümleri sunmaktadır.


Borusan Next, müşterilere teknolojiyle desteklenen çoklu kanal ile hızlı, güvenilir ve etkileşimli bir alışveriş deneyimi sunarak Borusan Güvencesi ile müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı amaçlar.


Borusan Next Platformu;


Her marka, model ve yaşta 2. el araba satış süreçlerinde, satılan her araba için detaylı kontrolleri gerçekleştirir, devir ve ruhsat işlemlerini takip eder, takas hizmetinde ise ekspertiz ve detaylı kontroller sonucu müşterilere en optimum fiyatı sunar.


Satış hizmetine ek olarak müşterilere en uygun ödeme koşullarını sunmak adına uzman finansman destek ekibiyle işbirliği yapar.


Borusan Next, müşteriyi merkezine alarak müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarmak amacıyla haftanın 7 günü boyunca kesintisiz hizmet sunmaktadır. Uzman kadromuz, müşteri odaklılığı ve sorunsuz bir deneyim sağlama konusundaki kararlılığımızla her gün müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına hızlı ve etkili bir şekilde yanıt vermektedir.

Welcome to MotorPedia – Your Ultimate Destination for Revolutionizing Auto Dealerships! At Motorpedia, our dedicated team is committed to streamlining every aspect of your dealership operations, ensuring exceptional customer experiences and unparalleled success.
