Name: Han Sung Motor 한성자동차
Description:
Han Sung Motor opened a new era of imported cars since 1985. With nearly 40 years of excellence and brand heritage, Han Sung Motor provides the highest quality & entrepreneurship of service as the official dealer company of Mercedes-Benz Korea.

Han Sung Motor has the largest network of any imported car dealer in the nation, with 19 new car showrooms, 19 service centers, and 8 used car showrooms nationwide. It was the first in the imported car industry to have all service centers KS Service certified, as well as the first foreign company to win the Presidential Award for Service Innovation. Representing Korea in the Mercedes-Benz Global TechMaster, Han Sung Motor demonstrates technical excellence through its industry-leading professionals. The company also uniquely operates an AS Academy to train talent and hosts the biennial Han Sung Skill Contest for staff development.

Han Sung Motor continues to provide convenience for customers and invest for better service and tries to carry out responsibilities and duties as an expert to lead social contribution and various supporting business for community development. 

To fulfill its corporate responsibilities, Han Sung Motor focuses on shared value creation and social contribution investments to drive community development. Since 2012, as part of its social contribution efforts, Han Sung Motor has partnered with the Arts & Business Foundation to run the DREAM GREAM scholarship program, supporting artistically talented students through various opportunities in arts and culture. Han Sung Motor’s efforts have been recognized with multiple awards, including the Minister of Culture and Sports Mecenat Award and the Seoul Social Contribution Award.

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@hansung_official
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hansung_official

Name: BYD Sipa Automobiles
Description:
Le groupe Sipa Automobiles s'associe à BYD, entreprise pionnière de l'industrie des nouvelles énergies. 

Sipa Automobiles est le distributeur automobile multimarques du Grand Sud-Ouest. Depuis 1963, la marque se développe et occupe une place incontournable dans l'univers de la distribution automobile. Aujourd’hui, nous comptons plus de 30 concessions distribuant plus de 15 marques constructeurs. Aujourd'hui, c'est un tournant pour Sipa Automobiles qui distribue une marque premium 100% électrique !

 En savoir plus sur la marque BYD // 
BYD a été fondée en février 1995 et, après plus de 20 ans de croissance rapide, l’entreprise a joué un rôle important dans les secteurs de l’électronique, de l’automobile, des nouvelles énergies et du transport ferroviaire. De la production et du stockage d’énergie à ses applications, BYD se consacre à la fourniture de solutions énergétiques sans émissions. Depuis sa première voiture conceptuelle entièrement électrique dévoilée en 2004, BYD est devenu l’un des premiers équipementiers de véhicules à énergie renouvelable à produire un million de véhicules de tourisme électriques dans le monde.

 Vous souhaitez passer à un véhicule électrique ? Contactez nos experts vendeurs BYD à Bordeaux au 05 57 10 00 00 ou à Toulouse au 05 82 84 34 34

 BORDEAUX : 83-131 Boulevard Godard, 33110 Le Bouscat.
 TOULOUSE : 79 Route de Paris, 31150 Fenouillet

BYD Sipa Automobiles, distributeur officiel BYD.

Name: ScootUp Scooters Trading LLC
Description:
in 2009 we set out to revolutionize urban commuting by creating innovative, foldable electric scooters that minimize time and effort while reducing carbon footprints. Today, ScootUp Scooters Trading LLC, powered by Inokim, has evolved into a leading-edge company that continues to push the boundaries of design and functionality in the electric scooter industry.

At Scootup (formerly known is Upabo), we understand that our riders have diverse needs when it comes to power, distance, and portability. That's why we offer a range of products that cater to each individual's unique preferences, whether it be a heavier-duty model for long distance travel, or a lighter, more compact option for city commutes.

Our commitment to innovation and quality is unwavering. Each year, we upgrade and release new models to ensure that we are constantly improving our products and providing the best possible riding experience for our customers. 

Join us on our ongoing journey towards perfection, and discover the convenience, sustainability, and fun that Inokim electric scooters have to offer.

Name: Jowett Motor Group
Description:
Jowett Motor Group was born from the experience and forethought of Tony Jowett in 1995 with brands Audi, Volkswagen and Subaru, before opening Eastern Honda Doncaster in 2000 which remains today.

JMG has continued as a family-owned and operated business with its award-winning group of BMW and Honda dealerships across Victoria, South Australia and now the Australian Capital Territory.

JMG is an established retail partner of Honda Australia, operating three metro Honda Centres: Eastern Honda, Northern Honda & Brighton Honda Centre. The JMG journey with Honda has been recognised by multiple National Dealer of the Year and Customer Excellence awards, to now leading national sales and service volumes.

A new era was marked in 2013 for JMG with the opening of its first BMW dealership, Waverley BMW. Fast establishing itself as a key member of the BMW dealership network through a strong customer focused approach and commitment to excellence, JMG acquired South Yarra BMW in 2020. This was followed by the greenfield development of Berwick BMW opening in late 2020 and the recent introduction of Berwick MINI Garage. 2021 marked the opening of Glenelg BMW and MINI Garage in South Australia with a full redevelopment of the Glenelg site underway - due for completion in the second half of 2025. In September 2024, JMG will officially take over all existing business operations in Canberra BMW - including Canberra MINI Garage and Canberra BMW Motorrad.

The growth plan for JMG continues with the opening of Chery Doncaster in July 2024 and Chery Brighton in early 2025. The JMG Executive Team is committed to fostering growth and excellence in the automotive retail operations sector. The Group aims to continue to collaborate with current and future Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) to deliver award-winning retail experiences for customers while creating job opportunities for the automotive industry and current JMG employees.

Name: Frontier Group
Description: Frontier Group is a diversified group into Mobility, Real Estate, and Distribution business with a strong footprint across Delhi, Haryana, MP, and UP. We operate 35+ sales & service outlets and partner with top global automotive brands including Volkswagen, Kia, Hyundai, Tata, Honda, MG, Skoda, and JCB. We’ve developed and leased over 500,000 sq. ft. of commercial real estate.

Name: Al Hashar Automotive
Description:
Al Hashar Automotive, part of the Al Hashar Group, is the authorised distributor of Nissan and INFINITI in the Sultanate of Oman.
We are dedicated to delivering exceptional ownership experiences — from the joy of driving to the peace of mind that comes with reliable aftersales care, innovative products, and a customer-first approach that reflects the values of both global brands.

Name: Tom Wood Automotive
Description:
About  the Tom Wood Group
Founded in 1967, the Tom Wood Automotive Group has remained family-owned and operated throughout its 50+ year history.   Tom Wood Automotive began in Indianapolis with a single dealership  on East Washington Street and has expanded to 28 businesses (including 15 dealerships, representing 13 brands in three states) with more than 1,000 employees.  We remain committed to serving our guests with the very best vehicles and service in the industry.  Throughout Tom Wood, we strive to create customers for life by providing a friendly, professional atmosphere and reinvesting in our communities of which we are proud to support.

For more information, visit TomWoodCareers.com, Facebook, Instagram, twitter, YouTube and LinkedIn. We have opportunities for any level of experience. If you have the motivation and drive - we can put you on a lifetime career path at Tom Wood!

Name: Waylands
Description:
Waylands are a family run and owned motor retail group that proudly represents Volvo, Polestar, Kia, Honda, OMODA, JAECOO and MG across the Thames Valley and into Wales.

Our Mission is clear; “To deliver an exceptional experience that customers trust and advocate, to represent our franchise partners successfully and to build class leading environments for every member of our team”

The company was established by John O'Hanlon, former CEO of Ridgeway Group which represented many premium franchises in the South of England. Waylands commenced business in November 2017 with its first franchise, Volvo in Reading. The company aims to grow steadily to achieve sufficient scale to compete with the industry's biggest players but to maintain representation that has the feel and culture of a local dealership.

We believe that our relationship with our customers goes far beyond the initial purchase of the car. It is highly important to us that we deliver on our promises and offer full transparency to deliver an exceptional experience.

We believe in ensuring every member of our team gets the right development journey for them. With dedicated in-house and manufacturer training programmes available, we encourage our staff to take pride in their work and remain committed which is reflected in the excellent level of service we offer.

We understand that buying a car is a significant and emotional experience. At Waylands we aim to deliver straightforward advice to make sure customers get the most appropriate vehicle, financed in the best way to suit their circumstances.

Name: Victory Automotive Group
Description:
Family owned and operated since 1997, strives to be the premier automotive retailer in the country. We provide the best opportunities for all employees, customers, communities and each manufacturer we represent. Our continued commitment is to improve our dealerships and services to satisfy our customer’s wants and needs 100 percent of the time and always provide a pleasant, informative and professional experience. We encourage our entire organization to begin each day with a focus on: 

Faith – our success lies in following established processes, building a climate of trust, open communications, candor and everyone working to achieve our mission; keeping faith that Victory Automotive will always provide an environment in which each individual will be able to achieve the level of success they desire, based on ability, effort and results. 

Family – The Victory Automotive “family” is encouraged to begin each day remembering family and loved ones as a source of inspiration. 

AND 

Future – our future relies on maintaining good, long term relationships with our customers, manufacturer and fellow employees. By always striving to improve the future, the horizon will always be closer…

Name: Steve Marshall Group

The Steve Marshall Group is a values-driven organization built on a foundation of respect. We believe that fostering relationships with our team and the community is ingrained in all aspects of our lives and reaches beyond customer service. We are motivated by excellence. From acquisitions to accountability, from recruitment to ROI, we are a company fueled by a competitive, compassionate, caring mindset motivated to succeed and win every day.

The Steve Marshall Group is an established owner and operator in the Vancouver Island, Thompson/Okanagan, and Vancouver markets, we continue to expand within British Columbia and the United States. We continue to recruit and invest in the best people who share our values and want the opportunity to advance in a fast-paced, rewarding career.

Name: BMW Krishna Automobiles
Description:
BMW Krishna Automobiles is the sole dealer for BMW cars in Chandigarh and Ludhiana. The parent company, Krishna Automobiles completes 50 years of operations during year 2017-18. Name: Gurudev Motors
Description:
Gurudev Motors commenced its operations in the year 2005 by becoming the Authorised Dealers of Skoda India to sell & service passenger cars. 

Ever since its inception, Gurudev Motors has grown significantly. In 2005,operations were started with a state of the art Skoda Showroom in Teynampet, Chennai & also a centrally located & easily accessible workshop on Mount Road. In 2006, a workshop dedicated for accidental repair jobs & paint jobs was started at Saligramam,Chennai. In 2007, Gurudev Motors spread its wings by opening a Skoda Showroom & Workshop in Madurai. To expand its Skoda customer base even further a wonderful SSS facility (Sales,Service,Spares) was inaugurated in the year 2008 in Koyambedu, Chennai. To meet the growing demand of customers, a Sales & Service facility was started at Trichy in 2009. In 2010, another Skoda workshop in Guindy commenced its operations. In 2011, yet another SSS facility was started in Vellore. 

In 2016, it launched Skoda India's largest Sales, Service & Spares Facility in Ambattur, Chennai

In 2016, Gurudev Motors was also awarded the dealership of Tata Motors to sell & service Tata Cars in Chennai

During this expansion phase, it also enjoyed various accolades. To name a few, Gurudev Motors was awarded with Best Warranty Management, Best Sales Satisfaction Index, Best Dealer for 2009 by Skoda Auto India.

Name: Farizon Auto UAE
Description:
Farizon Auto UAE is the regional arm of Farizon New Energy Commercial Vehicle Group, the commercial vehicle division of Geely Holding Group and a pioneer in zero-emission mobility. As China’s first commercial vehicle brand to offer a full new energy lineup, Farizon leads with innovation built on two advanced technology routes: Methanol-Hydrogen and Electric.

Backed by Geely’s Central Research Institute, Farizon has established the largest new energy commercial vehicle R&D hub in China. Its cutting-edge approach applies passenger vehicle innovation to commercial needs — delivering smarter, greener solutions for the logistics and mobility industries. Farizon has consistently doubled its market share in China over the last three years, with over 20% market penetration.

Globally expanding and coming to the UK in Q1 2025 with the Euro-NCAP platinum-rated Farizon SV (SuperVan), the brand is now establishing itself in the Middle East through a powerful partnership with Jameel Motors.

Jameel Motors is a leading global mobility solutions provider and the exclusive distributor of Farizon Auto in the MENA region. With operations across the UK, Türkiye, Morocco, Egypt, Algeria, Japan, China, Monaco, Poland, Australia, and South Africa, Jameel Motors represents some of the world’s most recognized automotive brands — including Toyota, Lexus, BYD, GAC Motor, MG Motor, and Hino. Its in-depth local knowledge enables OEM partners like Farizon to grow closer to their customers, driving market share, sustainable growth, and loyalty.

Together, Farizon and Jameel Motors are paving the road for a cleaner commercial transport future across the UAE and the wider Middle East.

 Learn more: global.geelycv.com | jameelmotors.com

Nos esforzamos por ofrecer a cada cliente atención de calidad, personalizada y basada en la confianza y el respaldo que nos caracteriza.

Entendemos que nuestros colaboradores son el corazón de Grupo Opencars. Por eso, fomentamos el liderazgo y ofrecemos programas de capacitación continua que impulsan el crecimiento profesional. Garantizamos un entorno que promueve las oportunidades de desarrollo y recompensamos el compromiso con beneficios diseñados para apoyar a quienes forman parte de nuestro equipo.

Nuestra misión es ofrecer soluciones automotrices de primer nivel, manteniendo altos estándares de calidad y satisfacción. Con la mirada puesta en el futuro, aspiramos a ser el concesionario preferido en la región, reconocidos por nuestra dedicación, innovación y servicio excepcional.

Name: Motive Retail
Description:
Motive Retail is the trusted API integration partner for OEMs and automotive SaaS vendors, delivering real-time, bi-directional data connectivity across the entire retail ecosystem.

Our flagship Motive Integrator Suite is a powerful integration platform built to streamline data flow between Dealer Management Systems (DMS), Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs), and software providers—enhancing operations, accelerating timelines, and improving customer experiences.

With white-glove onboarding and expert support, our solutions include:
•  MIX: A multi-user integration exchange using standardized STAR- based APIs for scalable connectivity.
• Certify: A proprietary API testing and onboarding system that governs integrations to your exact specifications.
• Activate: A secure workflow automation tool for dealer approvals and data access management.

We don’t just simplify integration—we make it faster, more secure, and more reliable. Learn more at www.motiveretail.com.

Name: Procar Automobile
Description:
Seit 35 Jahren steht die Procar Automobile Gruppe für Zuverlässigkeit, Dynamik, Mitarbeiterorientierung und Kundenzufriedenheit. Gegründet 1989 in Bottrop wuchs das Unternehmen innerhalb kürzester Zeit, mit 24 Standorten in NRW und einem jährlichen Fahrzeugabsatz von etwa 20.000 Fahrzeugen und etwa 195.000 Servicedurchgängen für die Marken BMW & MINI, zur starken Procar Automobile Gruppe heran.

An erster Stelle steht jedoch nicht die Größe, sondern die Begeisterung der Kunden. Um dies zu erreichen braucht es vor allem zufriedene Mitarbeiter. Es sind immer die Menschen hinter einer Marke, die den Unterschied machen. Genau aus diesem Grund hat die Procar Gruppe in Sachen Mitarbeiterausbildung und Mitarbeiterqualifizierung Maßstäbe gesetzt und zählt mittlerweile zu den attraktivsten Arbeitgebern im Automobilbereich. Jedes Jahr beginnen über 75 junge Menschen ihre Ausbildung oder es werden interne Mitarbeiter innerhalb der Procar-Akademie gefördert und weitergebildet.

Name: ikinciyeni.com
Description:
ikinciyeni.com, Çelik Motor bünyesinde; 2013 yılından itibaren Türkiye’nin ikinci el online otomobil açık artırma platformu olarak hizmet veriyor. İade olanağı ve Anadolu Grubu güvencesi ile ikinci el otomobil satışını hızlı ve güvenilir bir ortamda gerçekleştiren ikinciyeni.com’da, 2023 başı itibariyle 7.699 bin açık artırma düzenlendi, 12.540.712 kez teklif oluşturuldu ve 122.757 aracın satışı gerçekleştirildi.
 
 Yenilikçi hizmet anlayışıyla online açık artırma yöntemiyle faaliyetlerine başlayan ikinciyeni.com, yıllar içerisinde “Kullanırken Sat”, “Nakit Sat”, “Takas İndirimi”, “Lojistik Hizmeti”, ‘’Kredi Kartı ile Ödeme’’ gibi seçeneklerle kullanıcılarının beklentilerini karşılayan hizmetleri de devreye aldı.
 
 Ayrıca ikinciyeni.com’a özel olarak geliştirilen yapay zeka temelli fiyatlama motoru ile satış sürecine başlamadan, otomobillerin değeri kolayca öğreniliyor. Ekspertiz raporunda mevsimsel ve ekonomik etkilerde dahil olmak üzere otomobiller en ince detayına kadar inceleniyor.
 
ikinciyeni.com, yeni nesil hizmetleriyle önümüzdeki dönemlerde de sektörün kılavuz markası olarak daha çok otomobil severi hayallerindeki otomobillerle buluşturmayı hedefliyor.

Name: SHLOMO GROUP קבוצת שלמה
Description:
The Shlomo Group is a living proof of the courageous, pioneering and always innovating Israeli spirit. 
Since its founding by Mr. Shlomo Schmeltzer in 1969, Shlomo Group has been the driving force in Israel's Automotive market. With a 30% market share, a powerful brand, and services recognized in every home in Israel, Shlomo is leading the revolution of mobility as a service.

We're proud to be the leading provider of high quality Automotive Services, with a fleet of over 78,000 vehicles  generating a revenue of 5.3BN NIS (2024), and offer integrated mobility solutions across the fields of private and corporate leasing & rental, car sharing, sales and services for hundreds of thousands of commercial and private clients. Among our global clients: Intel, HP, IBM,SAP, Microsoft, Wix, Oracle, Deloitte, Philips & many more.

Shlomo is committed to improving the future of transportation in two areas: business and academic. Shlomo Innovation company, is constantly on the lookout for entrepreneurs that are driven by a desire to safeguard and protect people. Inspired by the 55 years of experience we continue to invest in a wide portfolio of exceptional technologies that are redefining the future of driver safety. The Schmeltzer Institute for Smart Transportation, established in partnership with Tel Aviv University, supports gifted researchers in studying the challenges and solutions which assist decision makers.
Shlomo operates in multiple areas of life, supporting the growth of the Israeli economy and brings the values of hard work, initiative and a consistent desire to do good.

In addition to our Automotive services, the Group owns a diverse portfolio of brands in the fields of Insurance, Finance, Electro-Mechanical Engineering, Real Estate, Port Management, Ship Building, Warehousing, Tourism, Logistics and Shlomo Motors, specializes in importing an electric BYD cars and buses. 

A group which feels like family where the answer is always yes!

Name: STERNAUTO
Description:
STERNAUTO ist eine der größten Automobilhandelsgruppen Deutschlands. In 6 Bundesländern mit insgesamt über 25 Standorten in Berlin, Brandenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Sachsen, Sachsen-Anhalt und Thüringen leben wir in unseren modernen Autohäusern individuelle Mobilität. Unsere über 1.600 Mitarbeitenden kennen die Trends und gehen voran. Wir sind der starke Partner rund um den Verkauf, die Vermietung und den Service der Marken Mercedes-Benz, smart, BYD, INEOS Grenadier, FUSO, HYMER, Tremonia und Silence.

Als große Händlergruppe fühlen wir uns zur Kontinuität verpflichtet. Besonders wichtig sind uns dabei die Kundenbeziehungen, die Servicequalität und lokales soziales Engagement.

Seit mehr als 20 Jahren garantieren wir unseren Kunden hohe Qualitätsstandards und investieren in unsere Standorte, Mitarbeiter sowie in die Ausbildung junger Menschen. 

Wir stehen für unternehmerisches Denken, einen starken Gemeinschaftsgedanken und zukunftsweisende Technologien. Aus diesem Grund investieren wir kontinuierlich in Aus- und Weiterbildung. Wir fühlen uns unseren Kunden, unseren Mitarbeitern sowie unseren Standorten gegenüber eng verbunden und werden diesen Weg nachhaltig fortsetzen.

STERNAUTO gehört zu LSH Auto Holdings mit Hauptsitz in Hong Kong. Jahrzehntelange Erfahrung im Automobilhandel sowie über 120 Standorte in mehr als 30 Städten machen LSH Auto Holdings zu einem der größten Mercedes-Benz Vertriebspartner weltweit.

LSH Auto Holdings ist eine führende Automobil-Handelsgruppe im Premiumbereich in Taiwan, Südkorea, Deutschland, Großbritannien,  Australien und Kambodscha.

Name: Continental Automotive Group
Description:
The Continental Automotive Group is one of the few remaining locally owned and operated, family-run car dealership groups in Austin. For 50 years, we’ve been delivering a quality selection of new cars and pre-owned vehicles, along with a genuine commitment to serving our customers’ needs throughout the greater Austin area.

Beginning in 1964 as Continental Cars, Continental Automotive Group has experienced phenomenal growth in the past four decades and has always been active in the community. Continental Automotive Group now features the following automotive franchises: Austin Infiniti, Austin Subaru, First Texas Honda, Subaru of Georgetown, Mercedes-Benz of Austin, Mercedes-Benz of San Juan, and Audi San Juan.

At each of our dealerships, you’ll find the members of our sales team will always have a laid back approach and genuine interest in ensuring you get the vehicle you want. Once you do find the vehicle you’re interested in, our dealerships offer competitive prices with accessible auto financing available with all types of credit scores.

You won’t have to worry about keeping your car in great shape when you decide to buy a car from one of the Continental Automotive Group dealers, either, because we’ve made sure to hire some of the best technicians around. Bring your vehicle to one of our service departments for all your maintenance and repair needs, or stop into our Continental Collision center in Austin for auto body repair.

With its history and its future both located in Austin, the Continental Automotive Group remains focused on its role in the local business community. Maintaining its tradition of contributing back to the Austin community will always be an important priority of the Continental Automotive Group, and the company is extremely proud of the various local service organizations it reaches out to and supports.

Continental Automotive Group - "We're All About Austin!"

Name: GROUPE JALLU-BERTHIER
Description:
En 1992, après 10 ans passés chez le constructeur FORD, Pierre Jallu-Berthier, rachète la concession FORD de Beauvais. En plus de 30 années d’engagement pour ses clients, le groupe qui porte son nom s’étoffe. Il compte aujourd’hui 27 sites autour de marques de référence comme Ford, Mustang, Audi, Volkswagen, Volkswagen utilitaires, Seat, Skoda ou Suzuki, localisées en région parisienne, l’Oise, L'Aisne et la Somme.

Le groupe s’est, depuis toujours, construit autour d’un ensemble de valeurs partagées par chacun ; celles du service client, de l’engagement, l’enthousiasme des équipes et de l’innovation. Il en a fait l’un des piliers de son management, en interne comme dans ses relations client

Soucieux d’offrir le meilleur à ses clients et à ses collaborateurs, le Groupe Jallu-Berthier a toujours un temps d’avance ! En janvier 2012 est lancé Racing qui permet à une équipe de 2 compagnons de réaliser une révision complète en 1 heure. En décembre 2015, il ouvre le premier Salon DS de France et en avril 2015, le premier Ford Store d’Europe du Sud. L’innovation est un des moteurs de nos équipes. Elle développe leurs compétences en relevant des défis techniques et humains qu’il leur propose de relever.

Name: Gowago
Description:
Our mission is to Make People Move With A Smile.

Founded in 2017 in Zürich, Gowago is redefining car financing and ownership in Switzerland—making it simple, transparent, and hassle-free. No hidden costs, no complicated paperwork—just an effortless way to get your next car.

We partner with leading automotive brands and OEMs to offer seamless leasing and financing solutions. By combining cutting-edge technology with best-in-class service, we create a frictionless experience for both customers and the automotive industry.

Existing at the intersection of technology, design, and simplicity, we challenge outdated processes to create a car ownership experience that’s as smooth as the drive itself. 

With best-in-class customer support and incredible Google reviews, we make getting a car something to smile about.

 Ready to move on?

 gowago.ch

Gowago. Move on.

Name: Automotive Titling Company
Description:
50 states. All DMVs. Nineteen million different combinations of rules, laws, requirements, and forms, all driven by the vehicle, location, type of transaction, etc.  And let’s not forget about all of the state and local taxes! It adds up to auto title and registration being a very complex endeavor.

This is why you should use Automotive Titling Corporation (ATC) to power your out-of-state auto title and registration. The reason is both complex and simple because we make the complex, simple!

DMV processes and paperwork are complex. The differences between state regulations are often subtle, yet always absolute. This is where ATC makes the complex simple.

ATC is the original innovator and industry leader of out-of-state title and registration information and services for all 50 states and every county in the US. Easily incorporated in the dealer work flow, ATC offers a way to title and register leased or purchased vehicles across state lines.

Description: VEHIS tworzą ludzie, którzy od lat działają w branży motoryzacyjnej i finansowej. Jesteśmy pasjonatami i dobrze znamy rynek oraz zmieniające się potrzeby użytkowników samochodów, niezależnie czy są one narzędziem ich pracy czy korzystają z nich prywatnie. To właśnie samochody i ich właściciele są w centrum wszystkich naszych działań. Dlatego stworzyliśmy kompleksową ofertę, która doskonale uzupełnia rynek i pozwala naszym klientom na przyjemne, proste i wygodne nabycie samochodu. Posiadamy własne finansowanie - oferujemy najem długoterminowy oraz leasing zarówno dla przedsiębiorców, jak i konsumentów. Nasze podejście do potrzeb klienta jest unikalne. Robimy wszystko, aby z całego procesu nabywania nowego samochodu po swojej stronie mieli po prostu przyjemność. Z nami wszystkie sprawy można załatwić w jednym miejscu. Na www.vehis.pl dajemy wybór spośród prawie 5000 ofert blisko 30 najpopularniejszych marek. Otrzymujesz jedną, prostą umowę, która obejmuje wszystko - od finansowania, przez ubezpieczenie, po wsparcie w serwisowaniu samochodu. Maksymalnie uprościliśmy formalności oraz zapewniamy opiekę osobistego doradcy w całym procesie zarówno nabywania, jak i użytkowania samochodu. Stworzyliśmy VEHIS, aby być blisko ludzi i dzielić się z nimi naszą pasją. Jesteśmy dla wszystkich tych, którzy oczekują prostych rozwiązań, lepszych ofert i niższych cen. Zaufał nam nasz inwestor – Enterprise Investors, co gwarantuje nam pełne bezpieczeństwo finansowe i umożliwia ciągły rozwój. Nasza oferta zmienia rynek na dobre i pozwala klientom czerpać przyjemność z nabycia nowego samochodu - cała reszta jest po stronie VEHIS

 What makes us different

Conversations go beyond the surface — exploring leadership, digital transformation, engineering education, and the future of mobility.

We connect academia and industry, helping bridge the gap between classroom knowledge and real-world challenges.

We focus on people, processes, and lessons learned, not marketing slogans.

 Our Mission
To create a platform where professionals, students, and enthusiasts across the Middle East & Africa (and beyond) can learn, share, and grow. By highlighting real challenges, honest experiences, and future trends, we aim to inspire the next generation of automotive leaders.

Name: GENPAR Otomotiv
Description:
Genpar Otomotiv Tic. ve San. Ltd. Şti. 1968 yılında Genoto – Bedford’un ana bayisi olarak ticari hayatına başlamıştır. 1994 yılında Genoto’nun faaliyetlerini yavaşlatması ile birlikte dünyanın önde gelen ticari araç üreticilerinden Iveco’nun Türkiye distribütörü olan Otoyol Pazarlama A.Ş’nin Türkiye’deki ilk 4S bayisi olmuştur.
 
Genpar Otomotiv eğitimli ve tecrübeli kadrosu ile toplam kalite felsefesi doğrultusunda müşterileri için ayrıcalıklı hizmet ve en üst seviyede müşteri memnuniyetini kendine ilke edinmiş; Iveco markasının Türkiye’ de başarı grafiğini hızla yükseltmesinde ve “Yüksek Kalite - Modern Teknoloji - En İyi Çözüm Ortağı” kavramlarını ticari araç pazarına yerleştirmesinde öncü olmuştur.
 
Araç satış - servis - yedek parça satışı -  2.el ticari vasıta satışı - sigorta hizmetleri ve araç kiralama hizmetlerinin tümünü sunmakta olan Genpar Otomotiv “müşterilerinin en iyi çözüm ortağı’’ anlayışı ile faaliyetlerine 10.600 m2 alan üzerine kurulmuş Bağcılar – İstanbul tesislerinde devam etmektedir.

Genpar Otomotiv, filo müşterilerine kullanılacak aracın projelendirilme aşamasından, satış sonrası eğitimlere kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet vermektedir. Genpar Otomotiv, gıda, meşrubat, nakliye, turizm, hat, servis taşımacılığı ve benzeri sektörlerde kullanılan standart tip araçlardan, çöp kamyonu ve su tankerine kadar özel üretim araçlarımızı siz müşterilerine sunmaktadır. Hangi sektör olursa olsun, ne büyüklükte filo olursa olsun Genpar Otomotiv sizin araç, finansman ve satış sonrası destek ile ilgili ihtiyaçlarınıza cevap vermeye devam ediyor.

Name: C. de Salamanca Ferrari
Description:
The history of Concesionarios C. de Salamanca. Since 1907, a history of excellence.

The Marqués de Salamanca founded the company in 1907 for the distribution and sale in Spain of the best automotive brands. In the 1960's, the Toda Group, comprising an extensive network of dealerships throughout Spain, incorporated it into its portfolio, thus creating the most important Spanish company in the luxury car sector. It was the world's oldest importer of some luxury brands and its business grew with the commercialisation of foreign vehicles, being the exclusive importer of the most prestigious brands in Great Britain.

Part of the company's business moved to the south of Spain, specifically to the area of Marbella, where in the early 90's a large exclusive area was set up in San Pedro de Alcántara to serve customers of its most prestigious brands. It was here that one of the most important dealership relationships in the history of our group began, Ferrari Official Dealer - C. de Salamanca Marbella, which has now become our flagship brand.

More than 100 years of service and quality have given C. de Salamanca recognition as one of the leading facilities in the European luxury market.

Name: HEDTKE
Description:
Die Familie Hedtke ist seit über 35 Jahren im Automobilgeschäft tätig. Dabei ist sie heute wie damals in erster Linie für die Bedürfnisse ihrer Kunden da – mit Leidenschaft, Leistungsbereitschaft und Serviceorientierung und einem begeisterungsfähigen Team von gut 110 Mitarbeitern, die alle eines vereint: die Liebe zum Automobil.

Und so ist das Familienunternehmen Hedtke heute das modernste Mobilitätszentrum der Region für die Premiummarken Volvo, Lynk & Co, und Jaguar Land Rover. Mobilität ist im Wandel und Volvo wie auch Lynk & Co und Jaguar Land Rover fahren mit ihren Produkten technisch in der Spitzenklasse. Die traditionsreichen Markenpartner stehen auch für ein Höchstmaß an Innovation, Qualität und Leistungsfähigkeit. Werte, an denen Hedtke sich im Umgang mit seinen Kunden jeden Tag orientiert.

In zentraler Verkehrslage inmitten des Rhein-Main-Gebiets und in unmittelbarer Nähe zum Flughafen Frankfurt gelegen, bietet Hedtke alle Vorteile eines modernen Mobilitätszentrums. Hedtke sorgt auf über 20.000 Quadratmetern für ein umfangreiches Verkaufs- und Serviceangebot rund um die individuellen Mobilitätsanforderungen der Kunden. Vom spezialisierten Karosseriebauer über 25 hochmoderne Werkstattplätze bis zur E-Tankstelle und zum Räderlager – Hedtke bietet ein komplettes Dienstleistungsportfolio aus einer Hand. Dabei garantieren erfahrene, gut ausgebildete Mitarbeiter und die Servicekultur eines Familienunternehmens auch seit vielen Jahren höchste Kundenzufriedenheit.

Name: BK Automobiles LTD
Description:
BK Automobiles Ltd is one of the most highly reputed and esteemed companies in the automobile sector in Bangladesh. BK Automobiles Ltd is now the most reliable hub of commercial and passenger vehicles all over Bangladesh. Over time, the company has diversified its business including light commercial vehicles and passenger buses. To revolutionize the transportation sector and to minimize the costs of CBU, and CKD vehicles, BK has set up a workshop (3s Center in Boilapur, Savar) to ensure better after-sales service to our valuable customers. This big step forward is another milestone in the history of BK Automobiles Ltd.  All these successful ventures of BK Automobiles Ltd are a humble beginning towards making our country self-reliant in the automobile sector shortly.

Our company has employed over sufficient personnel. All these have been possible with the honest and sincere effort of our employees, the cooperation of our foreign partners, our clients and well-wishers. BK Automobiles Ltd. is highly committed to flourishing its full potential by taking future investments bearing the mark of excellence.

Name: Kolina Volkswagen
Description:
A história do Grupo Kolina começou em dezembro 1992 na região serrana do Rio Grande do Sul, na cidade de Bom Jesus, com a aquisição da sua primeira concessionária. Desde então, o Grupo segue crescendo ano a ano, com foco integral no ramo de concessionárias de automóveis, tornando-se reverência no setor para o Sul de Santa Catarina e Vale do Itajaí.

Hoje, o Grupo Kolina, conta com 4 concessionárias Volkswagen, todas localizadas no estado de Santa Catarina, nas cidades de Criciúma, Tubarão, Imbituba e Blumenau. A Kolina Premier Volkswagen, inicia suas atividades no segundo semestre de 2006 na cidade de Criciúma. A concessionária marca o início deu uma parceria de sucesso entre a Volkswagen e o Grupo Kolina. Surpreendente pelo tamanho e modernidade, a Kolina Premier, traz para Criciúma toda identidade do grupo, com estrutura física que permite comodidade e melhor qualidade nos atendimentos ao cliente.

A Kolina Premium Volkswagen, foi inaugurada em agosto do ano de 2007, na cidade de Tubarão, colocando a disposição desta região o que há de mais atual em termos de estrutura física Volkswagen, seguindo o padrão mundial da marca.

A Kolina Blu Motors Volkswagen surgiu no ano de 2012, diante da oportunidade do Grupo Kolina de ampliar sua área de atuação no estado de Santa Catarina, partindo do sul em direção à região do Vale do Itajaí.A concessionária chega à cidade de Blumenau, como uma nova alternativa de atendimento Volkswagen para esta região, focada na proximidade e bom relacionamento com o cliente, oferecendo negócios e serviços diferenciados.

A Kolina Porto Volkswagen nasce em dezembro de 2012, com a necessidade de se aproximar e oferecer uma estrutura física completa a cidade de Imbituba e região, ofertando a completa linha de produtos e serviços Volkswagen a uma área portuária em crescente desenvolvimento, além de cidades vizinhas que se expandem no mesmo ritmo.

Name: BERROCAR - GRUPO EMPRESARIAL
Description:
Confianza, transparencia y solidez. Estas son las señas de identidad y los valores que definen a GRUPO BERROCAR; una empresa sevillana creada hace 30 años, dedicada a la compra y venta de vehículos de ocasión, y desde hace un tiempo, al alquiler de vehículos con su línea Rent a Car. 

El espíritu de constante evolución y crecimiento del equipo humano, junto con la mejora continua orientada a la experiencia del cliente, ha hecho que el grupo haya ido ampliando y ofreciendo nuevos servicios a lo largo de sus tres décadas de historia: asesoramiento, financiación, servicios de post-venta, talleres concertados y su nueva línea de alquiler de vehículos. Todo ello con el objetivo de satisfacer a los numerosos clientes que proceden de todas las partes de España.

La confianza es el motor que mueve al grupo. Y es esa misma confianza que los clientes han depositado en GRUPO BERROCAR la que ha sido clave para su crecimiento. Hoy en día, la empresa es agente oficial de SEAT, TOYOTA, MERCEDES-BENZ y SKODA, y cuenta con más de de 30.000 metros cuadrados de exposición de vehículos, más de 1.500 unidades de stock a lo largo de sus nueve concesionarios por toda Andalucía, y más de 100 profesionales conforman su equipo humano, lo que demuestra que los vehículos de ocasión es la compra más inteligente.

Name: Jaszpol
Description:
JASZPOL Sp. z o.o. - to jedna z największych, prężnie rozwijających się firm motoryzacyjnych na rynku łódzkim oferująca swoim klientom samochody nowe marek Renault i Dacia. W 2019 roku firma Jaszpol obchodziła Jubileusz 30-lecia działalności. 
Swoją historię firma Jaszpol zaczęła dokładnie 1 sierpnia 1989 roku. Przełomowy był listopad 1992 roku, kiedy to podpisano umowę z Renault. Kilka lat później, w marcu 1998 roku rozpoczęto budowę drugiego salonu przy ulicy Brukowej 2, a w listopadzie przyjęto już pierwszych klientów. W 2002 roku zostało otwarte Centrum Obsługi Firm, które może obsługiwać sprzedaż flotową dla przedsiębiorstw i instytucji, a w czerwcu 2003 roku oddano do użytku najnowocześniejszą w regionie halę napraw blacharsko-lakierniczych. Za milowy krok w rozwoju firmy trzeba uznać otwarcie kolejnego salonu przy ulicy Przybyszewskiego 176, którego firma dokonała w kwietniu 2015 roku. Rok później firma Jaszpol otworzyła tam zadaszony salon samochodów używanych. W 2013 roku tygodnik „Auto Świat” uhonorował Jaszpol tytułem Najlepszego Salonu Renault w Polsce pod względem jakości obsługi klienta. Tytuł utrzymano 7 lat z rzędu. Serwis został także oceniony jako najlepszy w grupie Renault. W 2016 roku Prezes firmy Jaszpol Krzysztof Jaroszewicz został Menedżerem Roku Regionu Łódzkiego w dziewiątej edycji konkursu organizowanego przez Polska Press i Łódzką Lożę Business Center Club. W ubiegłym roku firma Jaszpol zdobyła prestiżowy tytuł „Przedsiębiorca Roku 2018”, wygrywając w konkursie Rajmunda Rembielińskiego, w kategorii średni przedsiębiorca. W firmie Jaszpol wszystkie motoryzacyjne potrzeby klient załatwi pod jednym dachem. Firma oferuje: sprzedaż samochodów nowych marek Renault i Dacia, sprzedaż samochodów używanych, kredyty i ubezpieczenia, usługi w zakresie doradztwa finansowego, serwis mechaniczny gwarancyjny i pogwarancyjny, sprzedaż detaliczna części i akcesoriów serwis blacharsko-lakierniczy samochodów wszystkich marek.

Since 1976, we’ve been more than just a motorcycle dealership — we’ve been a cornerstone for motorcycling enthusiasts and communities alike. From our showroom located on a busy main road, we proudly offer an exceptional range of new and used motorcycles, scooters and children’s bikes, as well as accessories, parts and servicing.

At AAA Motorcycles, our values of pride, passion and trust drive everything we do:

Pride in the quality of our products and services, and in the relationships we’ve built with our loyal customers.
Passion for motorcycling, ensuring every customer feels the same excitement for the road that we do.
Trust as the foundation of our business, ensuring integrity and transparency in every interaction.
Under new management, we are reinvigorating this long-established dealership by expanding hours, enhancing stock and planning exciting new services, including MOT testing. We are proud to represent trusted brands like Kymco, offering both traditional and electric motorcycles, and to provide top-tier servicing to keep our customers on the road.

Whether you’re a seasoned rider, a beginner looking for your first 125cc bike or a parent searching for the perfect child’s motorcycle, we’re here to help every step of the way.

Name: Oakes Auto Inc.
Description:
In 2010, Oakes Auto was founded in Merriam, KS by Dan Oakes.  It quickly grew into one of the largest independent car dealerships in the Kansas City area. Oakes Auto was founded with the belief that all people deserve to be treated with respect and kindness when purchasing a vehicle. 

In December of 2018, we purchased a Kia franchise in North Kansas City, MO, and relaunched it as Oakes Kia. In 2021, 2022, and 2023, Oakes Kia was one of 40 dealers in the US to receive the prestigious Presidents Club award.

And in August of 2023, we added Oakes GMC in downtown Kansas City, MO. Across from the Oakes GMC location, Oakes Auto Collision Center was also added.

When you are looking for a dealer whose focus is on transparency, value and relationships, we’re the one place to go. Oakes Auto has quickly grown to one of the largest dealerships in the Kansas City region and we have one of the area’s largest inventories.

Name: Euler Group
Description:
Die Euler Group gehört zu den zehn größten BMW-Handelsunternehmen in Deutschland, mit 9 Betrieben im Rhein-Main-Gebiet sowie in der Pfalz. In unseren Häusern in Frankfurt, Hofheim, Hainburg, Rödermark, Kaiserslautern, Pirmasens, Landstuhl und Bad Bergzabern stehen wir Ihnen mit allen Möglichkeiten eines großen Automobilspezialisten, mit Know-how und Kapazität zur Verfügung.

Wir sind ein inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen mit Frankfurter Wurzeln, das seit über 47 Jahren Vertragspartner der BMW AG ist und als Spezialist für die Qualitätsmarke steht. Derzeit beschäftigen wir über 730 Mitarbeiter, die sich für die Wünsche ihrer Kunden täglich mit hohem persönlichem Engagement einsetzen. Denn zur sprichwörtlichen Freude am Fahren gehört die Zuverlässigkeit eines starken Partners – mit Sachverstand, Herz und Einsatzfreude.

An vielen BMW Standorten der Euler Group präsentieren wir Ihnen die gesamte BMW Modellpalette. Unser Spezialisten-Team der Filialen in Frankfurt-Eckenheim, Frankfürt-Höchst, Hofheim, Kaiserslautern und Pirmasens berät Sie auch rund um die Trendmarke MINI. Zusätzlich stehen Ihnen auch für Ihren MINI-Service der Betrieb in Rödermark zur Verfügung.

In Sachen Motorsport bündeln wir die Kompetenz an unserem M-Stützpunkt in Frankfurt-Eckenheim, die Marke ALPINA können Sie seit 2005 an unserem Standort Hofheim erleben. Unsere Gebrauchtwagenzentren verfügen ständig über mehr als 1.000 hochwertige Dienst- und Gebrauchtfahrzeuge mit BMW-Gütesiegel Premium Selection. Zu unserem Leistungsportfolio zählen wir außerdem das BMW- und MINI-Military-Sales-Programm, das unseren amerikanischen Kunden mit vier Standorten in der Pfalz und einem Standort in Hessen zur Verfügung steht.

Am 1. Juli 2018 haben wir den Hyundai-Flagshipstore auf der Hanauer Landstraße in Frankfurt übernommen und somit eine weitere spannende Marke in unser Portfolio aufgenommen.

Name: Stradale Pure Sport
Description:
Te damos la bienvenida a Stradale Pure Sport

¿Quienes somos?
Somos una empresa especializada en la compraventa y en el cuidado de vehículos de alta gama. Nuestra experiencia, pasión y equipo con más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector, estaremos encantados de atenderte y buscar el mejor vehículo para ti.

En Stradale Pure Sport, sabemos lo difícil que es innovar, pero hemos conseguido crear un espacio único y diferente.
 
¿Que servicios ofrecemos?
Nos dedicamos a la compraventa de vehículos de alta gama. Si se da el caso de que el vehículo que buscas no se encuentra en nuestro stock, lo buscamos para ti, y si no buscas un modelo específico, te asesoramos, para que realices la mejor compra posible que más se ajuste a tus intereses. Todo esto contando con el chequeo mecánico que se realiza a todos nuestros vehículos, junto con  nuestra garantía de un año. 
Si estás pensando en adquirir un vehículo nuestro, pero no puedes acercarte a nuestra ubicación, no dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros y buscaremos la mejor opción para trasladar el vehículo al destino que tu nos digas.
Si estás pensando en vender tu coche, te ofrecemos nuestro showroom para hacerlo, esto permitirá lucirlo como en ningún otro lado, llegando incluso a incrementar su valor de venta. 
Además de esto, contamos con más de 1.700m2 para la custodia de tu vehículo, garantizando la mayor seguridad y el mejor cuidado. Gracias a esto podrás despreocuparte de tu vehículo, con la libertad de poder usarlo siempre que quieras.

Nuestros vehículos 
Todos nuestros vehículos reciben un exhaustivo chequeo mecánico y una verifica documental para su posterior venta. Además, todos los vehículos son pulidos por profesionales, reciben un tratado cerámico y una limpieza tanto exterior como interior para que recibas tu vehículo en las mejores condiciones posibles.

Name: Autoankauf-regional.de
Description:
Autoankauf-regional.de ist eine Marke der Deobald Trading GmbH. Zu Beginn vor allem regional in Bayern im Autoankauf tätig hat sich autoankauf-regional.de immer mehr auf den Ankauf von Fahrzeugen mit Beschädigungen in ganz Deutschland spezialisiert.

Von Beginn an galt unser Interesse besonders den Kunden und nicht allein deren Fahrzeugen. So ist einer der wichtigsten Grundsätze des Unternehmens: „Unser Service beginnt und endet nicht mit der Schlüsselübergabe“.

Da viele Unternehmen ein scheinbar ausschließliches Interesse am Fahrzeug, statt dem Kunden zeigen, scheint ihnen nicht bewusst zu sein, welche Unterstützung der Kunde beim Fahrzeugverkauf benötigt und erhalten sollte.

Diese ausgeprägte Kundenorientierung, machte einen rasanten Wachstum möglich. So ist autoankauf-regional.de längst nicht mehr nur in Deutschland tätig.

Inzwischen ist der Autoankauf europaweit ausgerichtet.

Unseren Service bieten wir europaweit an, ganz egal wo das Fahrzeug steht.

Name: Autop Autoverhuur
Description:
Autop, is opgericht in 1980, en gevestigd in Venlo, Roermond, Sittard, Heerlen en Maastricht.
Autop heeft zich in de loop der jaren gespecialiseerd in het oplossen van vervoersproblemen door passende oplossingen aan te bieden op het gebied van autoverhuur, shortlease en lease.

Autoverhuur
Wij richten ons op de particuliere én zakelijke markt, wat inhoud dat wij een omvangrijk en modern wagenpark hebben van ruim 1.400 voertuigen; van kleine tot grote personenauto's in benzine-uitvoering en volledig elektrisch, handgeschakeld of automaat, met en zonder trekhaak, personenbussen, bestelauto's en vrachtwagens in alle mate en uitvoeringen.

Shortlease/Lease
Speciaal voor de zakelijke markt verzorgen wij de shortlease en lease van auto's voor perioden van 1 tot 72 maanden.
Shortlease is een mobiliteitsoplossing; voordeliger dan huren, flexibeler dan leasen.
Verder bieden wij full-operational lease voor onze zakelijke klanten. Voor iedere bestuurder bieden wij een passende oplossing, waarbij rekening wordt gehouden met de wensen van alle betrokken partijen.

Our Vision:

To deliver the highest-quality and most cost-effective greener solutions serving all industries from technology to mobility as well as pioneering in achieving zero carbon in the region.

Our Values

Description:

Our service workshop is equipped with brand new, state-of-art tools and equipment utilized to ensure that our customer's vehicles will be serviced fast and fixed-right the first time.

Obstaráváme zákazníkům prověřené zánovní vozy střední a vyšší třídy, přičemž se specializujeme na předváděcí auta do 5 let stáří. Ročně jich prodáme až 1300, tudíž od roku 2010, kdy jsme vstoupili na trh, prošly našima rukama tisíce automobilů. V našem showroomu nabízíme standardně víc než 200 prémiových vozů, skladem jich máme víc než 150. 

V souladu s naší filozofií – chovat ke klientům jako k dobrým přátelům – jsme nastavili své služby tak, abychom zákazníkům dokázali vyjít vstříc v každé situaci. 

Nabízíme tedy: 

● prodej vozů
Auta v naší nabídce mají bohatou výbavu, nízký nájezd kilometrů a obvykle ještě tovární záruku. Důraz klademe na perfektní technický stav, prověřenou historii a garantovaný stav tachometru.  

● financování
Díky dlouhodobé spolupráci s 8 renomovanými bankovními subjekty a umíme zákazníkům zprostředkovat nadstandardně výhodné nabídky. 

● pojištění
Zhruba 80 procent klientů od nás díky spolupráci se 7 pojišťovnami odjíždí s uzavřenou pojistkou, často včetně pojištění technického stavu vozu a jeho hodnoty. 

● dovoz auta ze zahraničí
Stačí popsat, jaký vůz zákazník hledá (eventuálně si ho sám najde), a my ho prověříme a přivezeme. 

● AS Performance
Upravíme vůz podle individuálního přání – vizuálně, s ohledem na ochranu či zabezpečení
nebo

● AS Supercare
Šetříme klientům čas a sami vyřizujeme pravidelné servisní prohlídky jejich vozu, přezutí nebo vyřídíme pojistnou událost. 

● AS Pneucare
Pneumatiky prodáváme, měníme, myjeme i skladujeme. Při výměně používáme špičkové automatické stroje. 

● AS Superwash
Provozujeme celorepublikovou síť nadstandardně vybavených bezkontaktních myček se solárními panely. Nabízíme také ruční mytí včetně dezinfekce. 

● výkup 
Vůz vykoupíme a rychle odesíláme peníze na účet, vezmeme ho do komise, nebo požijeme na protiúčet. Záleží na klientově volbě.  

Svěřte se nám se svým přáním, uděláme všechno pro to, abychom je splnili. Od toho tu jsme.

Unser Ziel ist es, mehr zu bieten als Fahrzeuge: Wir schaffen Erlebnisse. Persönliche Beratung, verlässlicher Service und Begeisterung für Premium-Automobile prägen unser Handeln seit jeher.

 Unsere Markenwelt

 Service & Werkstatt

Unsere BMW und MINI Werkstätten in Krefeld und Kempen überzeugen mit modernster Technik, erfahrenen Teams und persönlichem Service. Ob Inspektion, Ölwechsel, Instandsetzung oder Unfallreparatur, Kunden aus der ganzen Region vertrauen seit Generationen auf unsere Kompetenz. Originalteile und Zubehör runden unser Angebot ab.

 Karriere & Ausbildung

Wir setzen auf starke Teams. Deshalb investieren wir in die Ausbildung junger Talente – etwa als Kfz-Mechatroniker/in oder Automobilkaufmann/-frau – und bieten Fachkräften ein Umfeld mit Sicherheit, Entwicklungschancen und Teamgeist.

 Tradition & Zukunft

100 Jahre Auto Becker Klausmann bedeuten 100 Jahre Leidenschaft für Mobilität. Doch Stillstand ist keine Option. Wir investieren in moderne Standorte, digitale Prozesse wie den Online-Check-In und in die Elektromobilität von morgen. So bleiben wir auch künftig ein verlässlicher Partner für unsere Kunden.

Name: Ermat Grup
Description:
Ermat Grup, 1989 yılında Renault Yetkili Satıcısı olarak otomobil sektörüne adım atmıştır. Dacia'nın Türkiye pazarına girmesiyle bu markanın da temsilciliğini üstlenmiştir. İzmir’de güvenilir iş modeli ve güler yüzlü ekibiyle perakende satış kategorisinde Türkiye genelinde hep ön sıralarda yer almaktadır.

2016 yılında Ermat2 markasıyla ikinci el otomobil pazarında kurumsal bir marka haline gelen grup, yıllık 3.000 perakende satışla Türkiye’nin önde gelen 2. el markalarından biri konumundadır.
2020 yılında Mitsubishi, ardından Chery ve BYD markalarının yetkili satıcısı olan Ermat, bu markaları da bölgesinde en iyi şekilde temsil etmektedir.
Otomotiv sektörünün ihtiyaç duyduğu orijinal, yan sanayi ve orijinale eşdeğer mekanik ve kaporta yedek parça ihtiyacına çözüm odaklı, kaliteli ve hızlı bir yaklaşımı Remar Otomotiv markasıyla getiren grup, bu alanda da 3 farklı şehirde konumlandırılmış ana depoları ve dinamik dağıtım ağıyla ulusal ölçekte önemli bir oyuncu konumundadır.

Ermat Grup, İzmir, İstanbul ve Ankara’da toplam 11 lokasyonda 500’ün üzerinde çalışanıyla hizmetlerini sürdürmektedir. Yıllık 10.000’i aşan otomobil satışı ve 25.000’in üzerinde satış sonrası hizmetle sektördeki güçlü konumunu korumaktadır.
Aile değerlerini, kurumsal vizyon ve misyonunun mihenk taşı yapan Ermat Grup, güvenilir ve dürüst hizmet anlayışını, işinde uzman kadrolarıyla birlikte sürdürmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: LINDEROTH A/S
Description:
LINDEROTH er et solidt bilhus som blev etableret af Bjarke Linderoth tilbage i 2003, som har over 20 års erfaring. Før opstarten af eget firma i Vejle arbejdede han med biler i Tyskland, hvor han boede nord for Hamburg og på det tidspunkt forsynede danske forhandlere med tyske biler.
Hjemveen meldte sig dog og Bjarke ville hjem til Vejle og det var starten på LINDEROTH A/S. 

Firmaet har fra dag 1 været kendt for kvalitetsbiler og høj servicegrad på både salg og eftersalg, hvilket vi også ønsker at blive husket for i fremtiden.
Vi går også ind for kvalitet frem for kvantitet, hvilket på vores sprog betyder lidt mere værdiskabende kvalitetstid til den enkelte kunde, hvor detaljegraden er høj og intet overlades til tilfældighederne.

2017 er det store år for LINDEROTH, hvor Bjarke ønsker at udvide forretningen med en partner. 
Valget faldt på Ermin Balešić som har været i bilbranchen siden 2005, hvor Bjarke og Ermin også lærer hinanden at kende. Ermin har frem til 2014 arbejdet hos Volkswagen Haderslev, Fredericia og Vejle, hvor han har prøvet kræfter med alt fra erhvervs- til privatsalg, leasing. 
Siden 2008 har han besiddet lederroller fra salgschef til filialchef hos VW. 

Ind til maj 2017 har han prøvet kræfter med udelukkende brugte biler hos Allan Hansen Automobiler i Daugård, hvor hans styrke inde for bl.a. leasing (flex, split, sæson, privat, erhverv) er blevet endnu stærkere.

Uanset hvilken dag du måtte besøge os, så vil du blive modtaget af en af indehaverne i firmaet. 
Dette synes vi er en stor fordel, da der ikke vil være langt fra ord til handling – om det drejer sig om en handel eller en udfordring der skal løses på anden vis.
Vi gør også meget ud af at have en flad organisation, hvor vi kan eksekvere hurtigt og klare opgaverne i dag frem for i morgen. Ydermere går vi meget op i velvære og motivation, hvor vi også skal have det sjovt mens vi er på arbejde.

Name: Groupe Taddeo Auto
Description:
Le Groupe Taddeo Auto est passé d’une concession familiale à un grand groupe et devient un acteur majeur du domaine automobile au Québec.
C’est en 2002, alors que Volvo Laval prend son envol vers une entité indépendante et quitte le regroupement constitué des marques BMW, Jaguar, Volvo et Land Rover, que Anthony Taddeo prend les rênes de l’entreprise. Ayant fait ses débuts à l’esthétique, passant par le service et les pièces pour finalement occuper le poste de Directeur des ventes, il se lance en affaires et devient le propriétaire de Volvo Laval.
Depuis plusieurs années, Anthony nourrissait le rêve de fonder le Groupe Taddeo Auto. Ce rêve devient réalité en avril 2021 avec l’acquisition d’Alfa Romeo Laval et de Volvo West Island.
En août de la même année, Polestar Montréal rejoint le Groupe, marquant une nouvelle étape dans son développement. En 2024, l’expansion se poursuit avec l'intégration de Honda Centre-Ville et de Volvo Cars Mont-Royal, qui remplace Volvo West Island.
Aujourd’hui, le Groupe Taddeo Auto opère sur cinq sites et compte plus de 140 employés. Son équipe de direction et de gestion, engagée et dynamique, relève avec passion les défis liés à cette croissance continue.
Volvo Laval, Volvo Cars Mont-Royal, Polestar Montréal, Honda Centre-Ville et le Centre Certifié Taddeo Auto peuvent désormais être fiers d’appartenir au Groupe Taddeo Auto, signe d’excellence et de performance. Le nouveau groupe n’a pas seulement la prétention de vendre des véhicules haut de gamme, il vous invite à vivre une expérience client hors du commun où qualité supérieure et rendement accru s’inscrivent dans la mentalité de tous.
Notre équipe est à vos côtés pour vous proposer un large choix de véhicules neufs et d’occasion haut de gamme. Nos conseillers prendront le temps de répondre à toutes vos questions et vous accompagneront tout au long de votre processus d’achat ou de location.

Name: Toyota Chodzeń
Description:
Chodzeń to firma rodzinna powstała w Piasecznie w 1976 roku. Właścicielami firmy są Panowie Lech i Piotr Chodzeń, którzy postawili w swoim biznesie na wartości oparte na szacunku, uczciwości oraz lojalności, co przekłada się na atmosferę wśród pracowników oraz ich podejście w stosunku do klientów. Naszym hasłem jest pewność, jakość, wiarygodność, które to przyświecają nam codziennie w pracy.

Jesteśmy do Państwa dyspozycji w 3 lokalizacjach: w Piasecznie (Puławska), w Warszawie (Czerniakowska) oraz w Gdańsku (Toyota Carter), oferując pełną gamę usług związanych z zakupem i eksploatacją samochodów marki Toyota. Nasze salony to miejsca przyjazne dla klienta, gdzie każdy z nich znajdzie fachową poradę i przyjacielską pomoc. Od lat budujemy ich zaufanie, a oni do nas wracają  i polecają nasze usługi swoim znajomym.

Ciągłe podnoszenie kwalifikacji naszych pracowników to część polityki firmy. Te działania procentują przy kolejnych wygranych konkursach, organizowanych przez Toyotę Motor Poland, w wyniku których wielu naszych pracowników uzyskało tytuł Mistrza Toyoty. Jesteśmy bardzo dumni z ich osiągnieć!

Obecnie w skład Grupy Chodzeń oprócz salonów Toyoty wchodzą też salony Lexus Warszawa Puławska oraz Maserati w Piasecznie.

Name: Clevr Car Leasing
Description:
Clevr Car Group er opstået grundet frustration over leasingbranchens uigennemsigtighed og faldgruber. Der er rigtig mange danskere der går op i biler, og kan se idéen i at lease biler fremfor at betale hele beløbet og en unødvendig høj registreringsafgift på én gang.

Desværre har branchen et dårlig ry og begrebet leasing er for mange forbruger forbundet med noget negativt. Generelt set er der, efter vores mening, ikke nok lovgivning og standardisering på leasingmarkedet hvilket har betydet, at der desværre har været flere historier i medierne mv., om forbrugere der er kommet til skade ved leasing.

For os er det vigtigste at hele forløbet foregår fair og gennemsigtigt og at det altid skal være en fordel at lease en bil – ikke en forhøjet udgift. Vores vision er at alle kunder bliver rådgivet igennem hele processen og at vi altid har kundens interesse som første prioritet.

Vi sidder altid klar til at servicere og elsker at snakke om biler og leasing. Send endelig en besked eller giv os et kald, hvis du ønsker at høre mere om, hvad vi kan tilbyde eller hvis du har et specifikt ønske til en bil, som du ønsker, at vi skal lave et godt tilbud på.

Name: Auktion & Markt AG
Description:
Auktion & Markt ist eine Aktiengesellschaft mit Sitz in Wiesbaden. Unter diesem Dach vereint sie die Marken Autobid.de auto-auktionen, Classicbid automobile, Propertybid Immobilien, ClassicX Café und Restaurant, ClassicX Landhaus & Hotel und ClassicX Nahetal-Arena.

Die Marke Autobid.de ist einer der größten und erfolgreichsten Gebrauchtwagenvermarkter in Europa. Mit Erfahrung und Expertise von über 30 Jahren werden täglich Gebrauchtwagen-Auktionen für den gewerblichen Kfz-Handel durchgeführt und setzt dabei mit seiner international ausgerichteten, anwenderfreundlichen Auktionsplattform Maßstäbe. 25.000 registrierte Händler aus 40 Ländern, sowie mehr als 140.000 verkaufte Fahrzeuge im Jahr machen Autobid.de zu einem starken Partner in Sachen professionelles Remarketing. Einlieferer wie namhafte Hersteller, Banken, Leasinggesellschaften, Autovermieter und Flottenbetreiber zählen ebenso zum Kundenkreis wie zahlreiche Autohändler, die ihr Gebrauchtwagenportfolio einfach und zielgerichtet ergänzen möchten. Die Vermarktung läuft kundennah über 19 eigene Auktionshäuser und Logistikzentren innerhalb Deutschlands.

Ein Profi im Bereich Auktionen und klassischem Handel mit Youngtimern und Oldtimern ist die Marke Classicbid. Name: NEUBAUER Entreprises
Description:
Chez NEUBAUER Entreprises, nous croyons que la mobilité professionnelle ne se résume pas à la vente d'un véhicule.

C’est pourquoi nous accompagnons les entreprises, artisans et grands groupes dans la conception de solutions de mobilité sur mesure, au service de leur activité.

 Notre mission : 

Chaque entreprise est unique.
Nos équipes aussi.
Qu’il s’agisse de livrer un véhicule à un artisan, de structurer une flotte de 500 voitures ou d’aménager des utilitaires spécifiques à un métier, nous apportons une réponse personnalisée, rapide et claire, avec un seul objectif :

faire gagner du temps à nos clients, et simplifier leur mobilité.

 Une organisation pensée pour les pros :
 SME (Small & Medium Enterprises)

Le partenaire privilégié des TPE, PME et professions libérales.
Des offres multi-marques, des solutions de financement flexibles et un suivi complet, du conseil à la livraison.

 Utilitaires

La mobilité utile, adaptée à chaque métier.
Nos experts configurent, équipent et livrent des véhicules professionnels personnalisés, du simple fourgon au châssis cabine aménagé.

 Fleet (Flottes & Grands Comptes)

Une cellule dédiée aux flottes d’entreprises et gestionnaires de parc.
De la commande à la restitution, nous gérons l’ensemble du cycle de vie du véhicule, en partenariat direct avec les principaux loueurs et gestionnaires (Arval, Ayvens, Alphabet, Traxall, etc.).

 Une expérience 100 % digitale

Avec nos plateformes exclusives, nous avons repensé la gestion B2B autour de trois valeurs clés :

fluidité, fiabilité, transparence.

Commandes, livraisons, suivi de stock, échanges avec les clients et partenaires… tout devient simple, centralisé et traçable.

Name: PLUS AUTOTRADE
Description:
Plus Autotrade se remarcă ca unul dintre principalii furnizori de autovehicule "young-used" premium din România, reprezentând un pilon solid al mediului de afaceri autohton. Încă de la înființarea sa în anul 2010, acest business cu capital integral românesc și caracter antreprenorial s-a impus prin angajamentul său față de excelenta în servicii și prin diversitatea soluțiilor oferite.
Concentrându-ne întotdeauna pe asigurarea unei experiențe excepționale pentru fiecare client, am reușit să extindem prezența noastră la nivel național, deschizând în prezent nu mai puțin de nouă showroom-uri în marile orașe ale țării. 
În plus față de activitatea principală de vânzare și intermediere auto, furnizăm o gamă variată de servicii complementare, precum intermedierea financiară, încheierea de asigurări și extinderea garanțiilor, preluarea autovehiculelor în regim de consignație, trade-in și buy-back.
Ceea ce ne diferențiază este angajamentul nostru neclintit față de calitate și satisfacția clienților noștri. Ne propunem întotdeauna să oferim servicii de înaltă calitate și să construim relații de încredere pe termen lung cu fiecare client, astfel încât aceștia să devină ambasadori ai brandului nostru.
În lumina interesului în creștere din partea vânzătorilor pentru canale de vânzare alternative și din ce în ce mai actuale, precum și a preferinței crescânde a clienților pentru mediul online în căutarea următorului autovehicul, am decis să lansăm la sfârșitul anului 2023 platforma Plus Auto Marketplace. Prin această inițiativă, am creat un mediu virtual care aduce împreună profesioniști și persoane private interesate să vândă sau să achiziționeze autovehicule, oferind o experiență sigură și transparentă utilizatorilor platformei.
Această decizie strategică reflectă angajamentul nostru de a rămâne în pas cu evoluția pieței și de a răspunde nevoilor și așteptărilor în continuă schimbare ale clienților noștri.

Name: Garage Confidentiel
Description:
L’histoire de l’entreprise
Né de la passion de ses créateurs, Garage Confidentiel a été créé afin de vivre et partager avec vous la passion de l’automobile, tout en vous faisant profiter de l’expérience acquise dans le domaine depuis des années. Nous commercialisons des véhicules d’exception et intervenons en tant que mandataire en proposant des services d’import et de recherche personnalisée. Nous avons tout une gamme de services de conciergerie premium à domicile dédiés aux véhicules de prestige.

Le concept
Chez nous, la confidentialité est primordiale. Le concept de Garage Confidentiel a été entièrement et spécifiquement développé autour de ce principe fondamental. C’est pourquoi, nous n’avons pas de showroom ouvert au public. Nos véhicules sont stockés dans des locaux tenus confidentiels, les visites se font uniquement sur rendez-vous et la confidentialité entre acheteur et vendeur est scrupuleusement préservée.
Notre concept a été minutieusement élaboré en collaboration avec de nombreux propriétaires afin de modéliser un business modèle répondant à l’ensemble de leurs besoins. Aujourd’hui, ce modele à la fois économe et orienté vers l’excellence, nous permet aujourd’hui de vous proposer des services de qualité premium tout en gardant des tarifs très compétitifs.

Nos valeurs
• L’excellence : Nous attribuons une importance primordiale à la qualité de nos prestations et à l’état irréprochable des véhicules que nous proposons.
• Le respect : Nous tenons un point d’honneur à traiter chaque client et chaque véhicule avec le plus grand respect.
• La confiance : C’est un élément essentiel sur lequel nous sommes intransigeants. Ainsi nos clients peuvent avoir l’esprit tranquille lorsqu’ils font appel à nos services, nous confient leur auto ou les clés de leur domicile pour la prise en charge de leur véhicule.
• La passion : Parce que c’est cette même passion qui nous unis tous, jour après jour !

Votre concession vous accueille dans la zone d’Activité du Landreau à Beaucouzé près d'Angers. Avenir Automobiles vous conseille pour l'achat et l'entretien de votre Audi. Entrez dans notre showroom et découvrez un large choix de véhicules neufs et d'occasion 
Vous recherchez un véhicule d’occasion Audi ? Nous mettons à votre disposition un hall dédié dans lequel vous retrouverez toutes nos occasions Audi disponibles. 
Vous souhaitez louer une Audi pour 1 week-end, 1 semaine, 1 mois ? Notre service Audi rent est à votre disposition pour vous conseiller et vous louer le véhicule correspondant à vos besoins.
Nos services : service voiturier à domicile, Audi Twin Service, service de réception digitalisée avec voiturier, Audi Cam.

Name: Auto Imperial de Bragança
Description:
A fundação da Auto Imperial de Bragança, Lda. remonta ao ano de 1982 com a comercialização e assistência após-venda de veículos automóveis da prestigiada marca nipónica Toyota. Como forma de servir cada vez melhor os seus clientes, é inaugurada em 2003 uma filial em Mirandela, que assegura o serviço de venda e após-venda.

Em 2011 a Auto Imperial de Bragança, Lda. atinge mais um objetivo de dinamização e crescimento, ao abraçar uma nova parceria com a marca sul coreana Hyundai. Em 2016 é nomeada como concessionário para o distrito de Bragança com a marca asiática Isuzu.

Em 2022 é criada a AI Mobility com o objetivo de desenvolver o negócio na área da mobilidade flexível. Desta forma, o primeiro ramo criado foi a AI Mobility Rent-a-Car. Por fim, em 2023 são formadas duas parcerias: Guerin no distrito de Bragança e GlassBack (reparação e substituição de vidros).

Name: SuperCars Automotors
Description: Somos una empresa innovadora en la venta de vehículos nuevos electricos. Somos el Distribuidor Exclusivo de la marca AIQAR para Bolivia.

Name: Volkswagen Bourg-en-Bresse
Description:
Bienvenue chez votre concessionnaire Volkswagen à Bourg-en-Bresse. Retrouvez toutes les actualités de votre concession. 

Nos offres englobent un large éventail de services destinés aussi bien aux particuliers qu'aux professionnels. Ces services comprennent la vente de véhicules neufs ou d'occasion, des solutions de financement personnalisées, des offres d'assurance adaptées, l'entretien et la réparation des véhicules, ainsi que la vente de pièces de rechange et d'accessoires.

 Suivez-nous également sur Instagram : @vwbourgenbresse et sur Facebook : Volkswagen Bourg-en-Bresse

Name: Koçaslanlar Motorlu Araçlar
Description: Renault yetkili bayisi olan Koçaslanlar Holding grup şirketlerinden Koçaslanlar Motorlu Araçlar; İnegöl ile Bursa arası yol üzeri, otobüs terminali karşısında 2006 yılında müşterilerine hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. 5000 m2 kapalı alana sahip olan İnegöl Plazamızda Renault ve Dacia markalarının satış, servis, yedek parça, 2. el satış, lastik satışı, sigorta hizmetleri ve araç estetiği hizmetleri bulunmaktadır. satış sonrası müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman birinci planda tutmak tüm grup şirketlerinde olduğu gibi Koçaslanlar Motorlu Araçlar için de en önemli misyondur.

Name: Jammu Motors Private Limited
Description:
Jammu Motors Private Limited is Dealership Group of Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. 
Jammu Motors is a prominent authorized Dealer in Jammu Province in the UT of Jammu & Kashmir & has developed a widespread network of 13 outlets including showrooms and Service centers across Jammu, Akhnoor, Kathua, Vijaypur, Nowshera and Chowki Choura.
In 2019, Jammu Motors established NEXA Showroom at Jammu City for complete range of premium cars segment like Ciaz, S-Cross, XL6, Baleno & Ignis.
For exchange of old vehicles and sale of certified pre-owned cars Jammu Motors provides the facility of True Value at Jammu City for our customers.
For catering to the driving skills' developmental needs of our customers Jammu Motors has set up three state of the art “Maruti Driving Schools” at different locations across Jammu and Akhnoor cities. At these Maruti Driving Schools customers get trained by a team of experienced and certified professionals.   
Jammu Motors has received numerous awards in the recognition of its sustained & excellent performance in Sales, Service and for ensuring high level of customer satisfaction/retention. Most prominently Jammu Motors has achieved the prominence of being the only Dealer in Jammu and Kashmir having been conferred upon prestigious and coveted Award “ROYAL PLATINUM BAND” by Maruti Suzuki India Ltd consecutively for the 5th year in a row.
Jammu Motors has marked its active presence in the Commercial Vehicles Segment by having a Maruti Suzuki Commercial Showroom.
Jammu Motors is lead by Mr. Sanjay Aggarwal, Managing Director, who is also the Chairperson of FADA (Federation of Automobile Dealers Association)- Jammu Chapter & Co-Chairman of PHDCCI –Jammu wing.

Name: FINANCIERE KOALA
Description:
La holding Financière Koala a été créée en Novembre 1988 par François RAGUIN, lors de l’acquisition de la première concession K2 Auto sur Nîmes distribuant la marque Citroën (et la ligne premium DS depuis 2009).
En 1996, l’entreprise s’est ensuite diversifiée en proposant les marques Fiat, Abarth, Alfa Romeo et Lancia.
Souhaitant élargir son activité sur un segment davantage orienté sur le haut de gamme, le groupe intègre en 2013 les marques BMW et Mini, puis l’enseigne Jeep en 2020.
La structure aspirant à présenter également une offre plus axée sur une gamme prestige propose depuis 2024 les marques Maserati et Lotus.

FINANCIERE KOALA est une holding familiale comptant à ce jour 19 concessions automobiles pour 600 collaborateurs délivrant différentes marques (Citroën, DS, Alfa Roméo, Abarth, Lancia, Jeep, Fiat, BMW, Maserati& Lotus et implantées essentiellement sur le pourtour Méditerranéen.
Le siège se trouve sur Nîmes où se regroupe l'ensemble des services supports.

Name: AUTOGRUPPEN
Description: Autogruppen är ett modernt företag som säljer nya Peugeot samt begagnade bilar av olika modeller och märken. Vi har över trettio års erfarenhet från bilbranschen. Hos oss möter du professionell, välutbildad och kunnig personal.

Name: CFAO Mobility Centrafrique
Description:
Installé en République centrafricaine depuis 1979, CFAO Mobility Centrafrique est le distributeur exclusif des marques de renommée mondiale : Toyota, Suzuki, Mitsubishi, Hino, Hohan, Yamaha, Bridgestone    Techking et Pirelli.
Il vend une large gamme de véhicules neufs de tourisme sous les marques Toyota, Mitsubishi et Suzuki.

CFAO Mobility Centrafrique distribue également des deux-roues, des générateurs et des motos-pompes Yamaha ainsi qu’une gamme de pneus Bridgestone, Pirelli et Techking particulièrement bien adaptée au continent africain.

À travers un partenariat avec Loxea, il propose un service de location de véhicules.

Name: International Automotive Group Inc. (IAG)
Description: International Automotive Group (IAG) is a leading automotive group in the Greater Toronto Area, comprised of seven dealerships and a certified Collision Centre for aluminum body repair. Our dealerships include Yorkdale Ford Lincoln, Formula Ford Lincoln, Weston Ford, Coventry North Jaguar Land Rover, Pickering Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram, Scarborough Mitsubishi, and Mid-Toronto Auto Sales. We offer a comprehensive range of automotive products and services, including new and pre-owned vehicle sales, maintenance and repair, financing, and parts and accessories. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing exceptional service and building long-term relationships with our customers. We take pride in being at the forefront of the automotive industry, with a focus on innovation and quality. Our Collision Centre is equipped with the latest technology and staffed by skilled technicians trained in the latest techniques for aluminum body repair. At IAG, we are committed to providing our customers with the best possible experience and exceeding their expectations. Contact us today to experience the IAG difference.

Name: Leavens Automotive Group
Description:
Leavens Automotive Group

Leavens Motors was founded in 1958. Leaven Motors became Leavens Volkswagen, then adding new dealerships to become Leavens Automotive Group. Our stores include Leavens Volkswagen, Leavens Volvo Cars London, Volkswagen Chatham, Leavens Mazda, Leavens Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram and Subaru Windsor.  In the car business, people tend to move around. At Leavens, our clients get to know us - some of our employees have been with us for 20 to 30 years.  

The team at Leavens Automotive Group are fully trained Volkswagen, Volvo, Subaru, Mazda, Chrysler Dodge Jeep and Ram brand experts with one thing in mind: to help you make informed purchase decisions. Whether you're in the market for a new or pre-owned vehicle, or require service or assistance in buying parts, we are here to help make your experience a pleasurable one.  

We recognize that your expectations are increasing every day... and we're up to the challenge of meeting those needs! We look forward to providing you with a best-in-class sales and service experience and are prepared to go the distance to welcome you to the Leavens Automotive family.

Name: RMB Inter Auto
Description:
Înfiinţată în 1993, RMB Inter Auto este în prezent reprezentant zonal pentru şase dintre cele mai importante mărci de pe piaţa auto: Mercedes-Benz, Mitsubishi, Ford, Hyundai, Jaguar, Land Rover. Compania noastră este membră a grupului Ţiriac Auto, cea mai extinsă reţea de dealeri şi service auto la nivel naţional.

 Principalele activităţi economice cuprind vânzarea de autoturisme şi autoutilitare noi, precum şi autovehicule rulate, buy-back și trade in, servicii complete post-vânzare în cadrul atelierelor de mecanică, electrică şi tinichigerie - vopsitorie, iar prin intermediul partenerilor noştri identificăm cele mai avantajoase soluţii de finanţare şi asigurare, precum şi constatări daune auto.

 Suntem preocupaţi în egală măsură de calitatea produselor şi a serviciilor de care clienţii noştri au nevoie, iar obiectivele noastre pe termen lung vizează asigurarea de soluţii integrate, personalizate pentru fiecare dintre aceştia.

Name: Renault Karlik
Description:
Mobilność to nie tylko technologia – to sposób, w jaki samochody wpływają na naszą codzienność.

W Renault Karlik wierzymy, że pojazdy mają realne znaczenie dla stylu życia i sposobu pracy. Renault to dla nas znacznie więcej niż marka – to pasja do tworzenia rozwiązań, które upraszczają przemieszczanie się, wspierają działalność firm i zwiększają efektywność działania.

Jak podkreśla Laurens van den Acker, EVP, Chief Design Officer Grupy Renault, projektowanie ma na celu tworzenie produktów, które sprawiają, że życie staje się lepsze, piękniejsze i pełne pozytywnych emocji.
Na tym profilu pokażemy, jak Renault zmienia sposób działania firm i wspierają kierowców w ich codziennych zadaniach. Dbamy o komfort, efektywność i jakość, bo wiemy, że mobilność to klucz do sukcesu.

Oferujemy pełen zakres usług mobilnych – od pierwszego kontaktu z klientem po wieloletnie użytkowanie pojazdu. W naszej ofercie znajdują się samochody osobowe i użytkowe, specjalistyczne zabudowy dopasowane do różnych sektorów, autoryzowany serwis, nowoczesna blacharnia-lakiernia oraz kompleksowy pakiet finansowy w ramach Karlik Finance.

Renault Karlik – autoryzowany salon i serwis Renault w Poznaniu.
Profesjonalizm, pełna obsługa, sprawdzone rozwiązania – wszystko w jednym miejscu.
 Adres: ul. Torowa 12, Poznań
 Telefon kontaktowy: +48 61 677 54 00
 E-mail: renault@karlik.poznan.pl

Name: Autoexpo Concesionario
Description:
AUTOEXPO es la empresa líder en Bogotá en la compra y venta de vehículos nuevos y usados, con el respaldo de 30  años de experiencia honesta, profesional e idónea.

Nos especializamos en asesorar a nuestros clientes en su decisión de compra y venta de vehículos, con el fin de hacer de su elección la más óptima posible.
