Name: Grupo Gasme Automotriz
Description:
En Nissan Gasme estamos comprometidos con nuestros clientes, les brindamos atención totalmente personalizada manteniéndolos informados mientras los acompañamos en el proceso de compra.

La clave del éxito de nuestras agencias se basa además en transmitir: seguridad, calidez, respeto, honestidad, compromiso, calidad de servicio, responsabilidad, empatía y sobre todo atención al cliente. 

Contamos con 65 años de experiencia que nos respaldan, siempre con la mejor actitud de servicio para que nuestros clientes tengan una experiencia memorable.

Name: Sytner Auction
Description: Sytner Auction gives you the opportunity to purchase from our vast selection of vehicles at trade prices. Sytner Auction was established in 2006 with thousands of motor trade buyers using the platform daily. With over 140 dealerships located across the UK, we have unrivalled experience in this highly specialised market, with over 40,000 vehicles accepted in part exchange each year.

Name: Drayton Motors
Description:
Drayton Motors has been part of the RJTK Group of Companies since 2013, trading alongside Wilson and Co. The family-owned business ha sgrown from strength to strength now representing Kia, Suzuki, KGM, Maxus and Omoda Jaecoo in Boston, Louth, Grantham and Scunthorpe. 

With a strong focus on driving excellence it’s safe to say that here at Drayton Motors you’ll always feel like part of the family. 

The Drayton Motors team are active within the local community and have been the main sponsor of Boston United Football Club for 12 years. In Spring 2025 we will be opening the doors to a brand new dealership opposite the football ground - watch this space!

Always here to help!

Name: Joliette Dodge Chrysler Inc.
Description: Joliette Dodge Chrysler Inc. is a company based out of Joliette, Quebec, Canada.

Name: Bentley Marbella
Description:
Bienvenido a BENTLEY MARBELLA! Uno de los concesionarios oficiales Bentley más antiguos del mundo.

El equipo de Bentley Marbella - C. de Salamanca Concesionarios, se complace de recibirle en nuestras instalaciones en uno de los mejores sitios de España, la lujosa villa de Marbella, en la Costa del Sol de Málaga. Nuestro grupo de concesionarios con su equipo de profesionales específicos de la marca, formados y homologados por Bentley en Crewe, le asesorarán en Venta, Postventa y compra de recambios oficiales en todo lo relativo a su unidad Bentley.

Nuestros mas de 400m cuadrados de nueva exposición le deleitarán con las últimas novedades expuestas así como una maravillosa selección de Branded Goods, donde como buen amante coleccionista podrá adquirir los mejores regalos de la marca alada. También hemos ampliado para usted nuestro nuevo taller tanto de mecánica como de Bodyshop, suponiendo uno de los talleres mas avanzados en el trabajo de carrocerías de acero, aluminio y carbono de España para un acabado perfecto.

También disponemos de tienda de recambios oficiales física y programa de larga estancia hotel para su vehículo donde cuidaremos y mantendremos su Bentley al día.
Solo tendrá que preocuparse de conducir, con nosotros, su Bentley estará en las mejores manos.

Equipo Bentley Marbella.

Name: JMC-Jackson Motor Company
Description: Jackson Motor Company is Tasmania’s leading automotive dealer network, stocking a diverse range of new and used vehicles around the state. Your purchase experience with us extends beyond the vehicle – we pride ourselves on finding the right car for your lifestyle and making the process easy and enjoyable. Offering finance, warranty, parts, and service, JMC is the destination for all your motoring needs.

Name: autohaus pfaller electric
Description:
Willkommen im Autohaus Pfaller, Ihr Partner für BYD, Volvo, Mazda und Kia. Zu unseren Leistungen zählen Verkauf, Werkstatt, Spenglerei und Lackiererei.

Als Familienbetrieb geführt sind wir und unser professionelles und motiviertes Team seit 50 Jahren ein verlässlicher Ansprechpartner für Ihre Bedürfnisse rund um individuelle Mobilität. Zu unseren Kunden zählen gleichermaßen Privatpersonen, EPUs, KMUs und große Flottenkunden. Always Open for change bieten wir umfangreiche Beratung zum Thema Elektromobilität für eine gemeinsame schadstoffarme Zukunft. 

Gleichberechtigung ist uns ein zentrales Anliegen in unserem Betrieb und ein Thema, für das ich mich auch innerhalb der Branche gerne einsetze.

Name: Safi Pre-Owned Motors
Description:
Founded in 1994, Safi Pre-Owned Motors is dealership of used certified vehicles (Cars & Motorcycles). 

Ever since our dealership opened, we have been eager to provide quality, well-maintained luxury & budget-friendly vehicles. We tend to deliver the best quality vehicles at the foremost competitive costs, all in an impeccable truthful, relaxed and pressure-free atmosphere. 

Safi has earned well over 10,000 customers as a result their commitment to customer satisfaction. We have grown from servicing a town to major southern districts of Tamil Nadu & Kerala, and now boast a growing countrywide customer base.

Name: ABC Motors
Description:
ABC Motors is a trusted provider in the import, sales, and servicing of electric vehicles in Armenia. As the official dealer of ARCFOX and CHANGAN, the company also supplies a wide range of models from other top-tier electric vehicle brands.

Core services include:
    •    Sales of electric vehicles with expert consultation
    •    Supply of official spare parts
    •    Professional maintenance and after-sales service

ABC Motors is dedicated to advancing sustainable and eco-friendly transportation across Armenia by delivering high-quality, smart, and innovative electric vehicles for both individual and corporate clients.

Name: TC Harrison Group Limited
Description:
T.C Harrison Group Ltd is one of the UK’s largest privately owned family businesses, proudly operating since 1931 and now led by the fourth generation of the Harrison family. Across our 19 locations and 500‑strong team, we support customers nationwide through a diverse portfolio spanning automotive retail and aftersales, construction equipment, fleet management and vehicle leasing.
Rooted in our heritage yet focused firmly on the future, in January 2026 we announced the evolution of our Motor Division with the introduction of KGM at our Stamford site. This expansion reflects our commitment to offering greater choice and value to all our customers, group-wide.
Alongside our automotive operations, TC Harrison JCB and Gunn JCB deliver industry‑leading construction machinery sales, parts and service support, while TCH Leasing, TCH Salsa and iCarLease provide comprehensive mobility, fleet, and funding solutions for businesses and individuals across the UK.
Across every part of the Group, our founding values remain unchanged: exceptional service, long‑term relationships, and a commitment to doing right by our customers, principles that have guided us since 1931 and continue to shape our journey today.

Name: Grupo Ilha Verde
Description:
O Grupo Ilha Verde é uma organização vocacionada para o ramo automóvel. Representa um conjunto de empresas de capital familiar e ao longo de 40 anos adquiriu e desenvolveu vários negócios desde Aluguer de Automóveis, passando pelo Ensino de Condução Bem como a Comercialização de Viaturas Novas e Usadas. Iniciou a sua actividade em 1971, com a Ilha Verde Rent a Car, em S. Miguel, marcando posteriormente presença em todas as ilhas do arquipélago, posição que mantém com o slogan “Nove ilhas uma Escolha”. Dois anos mais tarde aposta na abertura de Escola de Condução Ilha Verde, mantendo também a sua actividade em Ponta Delgada.
Como Concessionário de automóveis desde 1987, este grupo representa a Ford, Nissan, Subaru, Honda, Renault e Dacia.
Sedeada também em Ponta Delgada, e com o principal objectivo de proporcionar ao mercado açoriano a comercialização de viaturas semi-novas e de retoma das diversas concessões, cria uma empresa especializada para o efeito: “Usados que são novos, aos melhores preços.”
No mercado nacional o Grupo Ilha Verde é associado das empresas “Ausocar Lda.” E “General SA”, ambas de aluguer de automóveis e venda de viaturas semi-novas. Também da “Gesleilões SA”, leiloeira de automóveis e venda da “Pneuseasy” venda e assistência de pneus.
A prestação de todos os serviços baseia-se em padrões de qualidade, pelo que a maioria das empresas estão criticadas, pela Norma ISO 9001, pretendendo até final de 2011 concluir a certificação de todo o Grupo.
Location: Ponta Delgada (São José), Ilha de São Miguel

Name: Aiko Motors
Description:
Somos una empresa especializada en la innovación y comercialización de productos relacionados con la industria automotriz. Fundada en 2020 con el compromiso de desarrollar un modelo de negocios adatado a la realidad latinoamericana con una oferta de altísima calidad a precios competitivos.

Nuestra propuesta comercial incluye la compra, venta, importación y exportación, directamente o a través de aliados de vehículos automotores y de tracción mecánica, sus componentes, accesorios, auto partes y repuestos, así como el mantenimiento, reparación, y servicio integral de vehículos de toda clase. 

Nos esforzamos por brindarle una experiencia excepcional desde el primer contacto. Nuestro equipo de ventas está altamente capacitado y listo para brindarle un servicio personalizado, escuchar sus preferencias y ayudarlo a encontrar el vehículo que mejor se adapte a sus necesidades y presupuesto.

Uno de nuestros principales propósitos es su satisfacción a largo plazo. Contamos con un centro de servicio completo con técnicos altamente capacitados y equipos de última generación para asegurarnos de que su vehículo siempre esté en las mejores condiciones. 

Además, ofrecemos una amplia gama de repuestos y accesorios genuinos para mantener su vehículo en óptimas condiciones.

Nuestro compromiso con la excelencia se extiende más allá de nuestras instalaciones, es por esto que contamos con una red de aliados a nivel nacional tanto para la venta como para el servicio postventa de nuestros clientes. 

En Aiko Motors estamos comprometidos a brindar a nuestros clientes una nueva y mejor experiencia de conducción al proveerles el verdadero confort, seguridad y calidad en todos nuestros vehículos.

Name: ARDSON VOLVO Mons
Description: Your Volvo automotive specialist in Mons. Visit us to discover our new models and get advice from one of our experienced vendors (English speaking). Our car dealership takes care of the maintenance of your Volvo, repair, and sourcing of genuine parts. Are you looking for accessories? We are here for you.

Name: TC Harrison Group Limited
Description:
T.C Harrison Group Limited is one the largest privately owned dealer groups in the UK, with our divisions covering both the construction and automotive industries. T.C. Harrison has expanded over the years to have around 500 employees across 16 group locations, including Sheffield, Derby and Peterborough. The combined Group divisions of T.C. Harrison JCB, T.C. Harrison Ford and TCH Leasing boast an annual turnover of around £280 million, whilst serving over 200,000 happy customers. This is successfully achieved through a strict policy of exceptional levels of service and customer satisfaction in every aspect of the Group.
 
T.C. Harrison Group Limited still ensures to provide the work ethic first brought on by our founder Cuth Harrison in 1931. The business has been thriving through the Harrison family for four generations, with the original values still visible today through excellent service provided.

Name: Carmart (Pvt) Limited
Description:
Carmart (Pvt) Limited is the importer, authorized repairer, and spare parts distributor for Peugeot in Sri Lanka. Founded in 1953 by the late Mr. Clarence Amerasinghe, Carmart is one of the longest running automobile

Name: Prancing Horse of Nashville
Description:
We are Ferrari’s newest dealer destination, located one exit from BNA in Nashville, Tennessee.

First, we are here for our guests. We have opened our doors for you to come enjoy your favorite Ferrari models and to take advantage of the amenities we offer.

Second, we are here for our clients. We invite you to join us on a journey through our inventory of preowned Ferraris, where you can find your next dream car or even sell yours if you are looking to upgrade!

Third, we are here for our community. Our doors are open wide so that everyone can enjoy their time spent here without worry or concern. Bring your super car enthusiast friends and family to tour the facility. It’s like a modern museum of all things Ferrari.

You will feel right at home in any one of our many lounges that we offer—including the three guest library rooms and cocktail room with no expenses spared! If you are a local Italian car owner from Nashville, Brentwood and Franklin or have retired to a home in Belle Meade or Green Hills you will find accommodations beyond compare. We are here to serve your Ferrari maintenance needs with an attentive after sales service and spare parts team at the ready to keep your current prancing horse in perfect running order.

Ready to upgrade or make a change to your stable? Inquire about our trade program or our consignment process. We are here every step of the way.

Please tell us about yourself and join our VIP guest list to stay updated on new arrivals and future events.

Mission Statement

Dedicate our lives to inspiring our employees, our guests and the members of our community in their mission to fulfill their dreams. It is our fundamental belief that all of this is best achieved through the faithful execution of servant leadership.

Company Philosophy

We are a luxury retailer, not a car dealer, our success will be measured in that light.

Mantra

We are here to serve you!

Name: Keskusautohalli
Description:
Keskusautohalli – Turvallisuutta ja luotettavuutta vuodesta 1927

Keskusautohalli on yksi Suomen vanhimmista ja arvostetuimmista autokaupoista, jonka historia juontaa juurensa vuoteen 1927. Yhtiö aloitti toimintansa Turussa, ja siitä tuli nopeasti tunnetuksi Volvon ensimmäisenä jälleenmyyjänä Suomessa. Vuosikymmenien aikana Keskusautohalli on edustanut useita autoalan huippumerkkejä ja kasvanut merkittäväksi toimijaksi.

Tänä päivänä Keskusautohalli on perheyritys, joka tarjoaa asiakkailleen laajan valikoiman uusia ja käytettyjä autoja sekä kattavat huoltopalvelut. Vuonna 2024 liikevaihto oli 95,9 miljoonaa euroa, ja yritys myi yli 2 900 autoa. Toimipisteet sijaitsevat Turussa, Raisiossa, Salossa ja Forssassa, ja palveluksessa on yli 120 asiantuntevaa ammattilaista.

Edustamme tunnettuja automerkkejä kuten Volvo, Honda, Renault, Dacia, Nissan, Opel ja Polestar. Arvomme perustuvat laatuun, asiakastyytyväisyyteen ja ympäristötietoisuuteen, ja toimintamme on sertifioitu ISO 9001 -laatu- ja ISO 14001 -ympäristöstandardeilla. 

Keskusautohalli on tunnettu pitkästä historiastaan, mutta katsoo myös tulevaisuuteen, tarjoten asiakkailleen luotettavaa palvelua ja innovatiivisia ratkaisuja.

Name: Foton Trucks España
Description:
Importadora oficial de los vehículos Foton en España.

Foton Motor Group, una de las empresas de automoción comercial con más éxito del mundo, se fundó el 28 de agosto de 1996 en Pekín, China. Con un ámbito de negocio que abarca una serie completa de vehículos comerciales, incluyendo camiones medianos y pesados, camiones ligeros, furgonetas, camionetas, autobuses y maquinaria de construcción, Foton Motor tiene un récord de producción acumulada y un volumen de ventas de aproximadamente 8.000.000 de vehículos. El valor de la marca Foton Motor se ha evaluado en unos 16.600 millones de dólares, ocupando el puesto NO. 1 durante 13 años consecutivos en el campo de vehículos comerciales de China.

Foton estableció la empresa conjunta Beijing Foton Cummins Engine Co., Ltd. (BFCEC) con Cummins en 2008 y Beijing Foton Daimler Automotive Co., Ltd. (BFDA) con Daimler AG en 2012. 
Además, Foton se unió a empresas de renombre mundial como Cummins, ZF, CEVA Logistics, Faurecia, Wabco, Continental Electron, TUV Rheinland, etc. para establecer «Foton Global Innovating Alliance», con el objetivo de hacer avances en ciencia y tecnología, y producir productos de automoción de ahorro de energía, respetuosos con el medio ambiente e inteligentemente interconectados.

Foton cuenta con más de 1.000 distribuidores en todo el mundo. Sus productos y servicios se han extendido a más de 110 países de todo el mundo. Foton tiene cinco bases de producción en China, India, Brasil, Rusia y Tailandia, y ha establecido empresas de comercialización en India, Brasil, Rusia, Argelia, Kenia, Vietnam, Indonesia y Australia, exportando sus productos a más de 110 países y regiones.

Name: Vehikel. epic sportscars
Description:
Vervoering.

Het grootste onderscheid tussen auto’s zit hem in de mens erachter. De ontwerper, de maker, de bestuurder. Het gaat niet om vervoer maar om vervoering! Althans voor mij. En ik vermoed ook voor u. Ik ben Jeroen Gilles, eigenaar van Vehikel. Mijn roots liggen in de techniek. Ik heb werktuigbouwkunde gestudeerd (Ing.) en mijn eerste bedrijf was van technische aard. Van jongs af aan ben ik gefascineerd door sportwagens. Het voelt als mijn ‘roeping’ om bijzondere exemplaren beschikbaar te maken. Uit liefde voor snelheid, schoonheid en weergaloze techniek.

Ik ben Bas Brinkmann. Na velen jaren ervaring in de in- en verkoop bij o.a. Renault en Jaguar heb ik in 2009 de stoute schoenen aangetrokken en ben ik zelfstandig ondernemer geworden. Vanuit ons nieuwe pand aan de Crommelinbaan 44 in Cruquius werk ik nauw samen met Jeroen. Ik ben verantwoordelijk voor de consignatie verkoop. Een nieuwe eigenaar tevreden onze showroom zien verlaten is hetgeen waar ik de meeste voldoening uithaal. 

Wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen

Wij leveren het gedroomde rechtstreeks. Of we gaan er voor u naar op zoek. Een geweldige uitdaging omdat het om modellen gaat waar er maar een beperkt aantal van zijn. Speciale uitvoeringen met vaak bijzondere kleurstellingen. Future classics. Altijd snel. Altijd tijdloos. Met aandacht geselecteerd en gecontroleerd. Compleet met een transparant, gedocumenteerd onderhoudsverleden. Een aansluitende garantie behoort uiteraard tot de mogelijkheden.

De enige verrassing die wij u willen bezorgen is een aangename. Anders hebben we ons doel niet bereikt. Ervaar het zelf en voel u welkom in onze showroom in Cruquius.

Met hartelijke groet,

Jeroen Gilles & Bas Brinkmann
Vehikel. epic sportscars

Name: Carola Daimler Cars | CaBo GmbH
Description:
„Carola Daimler Cars“ ist ein Unternehmen der Urenkelin von Erfinder und Visionär Gottlieb Daimler.

Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht – getreu dem Motto „das Beste oder nichts“ – die automobile Tradition und seinen Pioniergeist fortzuführen und weiterzuentwickeln. 

So konnte in Stuttgart-Plieningen ein Raum geschaffen werden für Freunde klassischer Automobile. Wir vermitteln und handeln mit Oldtimern, Youngtimern und Sammlerstücken mit Potenzial und Geschichte.

Wir sind stolz, als zuverlässig, fair und für Originalität auf dem Markt bekannt zu sein.  Vertrauen, Transparenz und Leidenschaft zum Handwerk zeichnen uns aus.
 
Den Handel ergänzen wir mit unserer Eventlocation, automobilen Events - wie unserer „Carola Daimler Classics“ Rallye - und anderen Veranstaltungen und Services, die eine Affinität zur Automobilkultur aufweisen.

Englisch: 

“Carola Daimler Cars” is a company owned by the great-granddaughter of inventor and visionary Gottlieb Daimler.

True to the motto “The best or nothing,” we have made it our mission to continue and further develop the automotive tradition and his pioneer spirit. 

Thus, we were able to create a space in Stuttgart-Plieningen for fans of classic automobiles. We purchase, broker, trade and sell classical cars, modern classics, and collectors’ items with potential and history.

We are proud to be known as reliable and fair partner with a focus on originality and perfection. Trust, transparency, and the passion for the craft are what distinguish and characterize us.

We complement the retail trade with our event location, automotive events - such as our own “Carola Daimler Classics” rally – as well as other events and services that have an affinity towards the automotive culture.

New Vehicle Solutions aim to be the best at what we do - Offering the Best Price Deals on all Car and Commercial vehicles throughout the UK - and all with FREE Delivery! 
 
Why are the BIG companies of this world able to buy their new cars or commercial vehicles cheaper than you?
 
It has always been a frustration that a Private Individual, Sole Trader, Partnership or a Limited Company end up paying the higher price than the big players in the business world.
All vehicles of the same make and model cost the same to build, so why do prices vary so much?
 
It's Simple -  by committing to a larger volume of vehicles they then command a larger discount.

Otoarena Müzayede ve Bilişim Hizmetleri A.Ş. olarak, 20 yılı aşkın süredir sektörde yer alan uzman ekibimizle oto açık artırma hizmetinin Türkiye’nin yeni gücü  olarak Ekim 2024’te yolculuğuna başlamıştır. 
İlk Açık artırmasına 6 Kasım 2024 tarihinde başlayan Otoarena 3 hafta gibi kısa süre içinde 500 adedin üzerinde araç satışına aracılık ederek gücünü, tecrübesini ve farkını ilk ayda gösteren tek açık artırma platformu olmuştur. Bunun yanı sıra hafta içi her gün düzenlediği açık artırmalar ile satıcı üyelerine hızlı finansman kaynağı, alıcı üyelerine ise hızlı araç kaynağı sağlamaktadır. Bu iki temel özelliği ile sektörde en büyük sermayenin güven olduğunu ispatlamış bir şirket olmuştur.
 Otoarena aracını satmak isteyen müşterilerin araçlarını hafta içi her gün düzenlemiş olduğu açık artırmada, ortalama 60 saniyede canlı sunum metoduyla, 20 yılı aşkın süredir çalışmakta olduğu, temsilciliğini yaptığı müşteri olmaktan çıkıp yol birlikteliği yaptığı üyelerine en doğru fiyatla satmaktadır.
60 saniye gibi kısa sürede canlı sunumla satış yapan, rekabeti en üst seviyede tutan, en doğru fiyatı en hızlı şekilde sağlayan, hem araç satışı öncesinde hem de araç satışı sonrasında tüm süreçleri zaman kazanmanızı sağlayacak şekilde ve ödeme güvencesi garantisiyle sağlamaktadır.

Im April 1924 gründete Max Voets in Braunschweig die Firma Max Voets GmbH für die Reparatur und Wartung von Automobilen; gleichzeitig übernahm er die Generalvertretung der Selve Automobilwerke, die damals einen Vierzylinder mit 2000 ccm Hubraum und 35 PS herstellten. 

Jetzt, 100 Jahre später gehört die Voets Gruppe zu den großen deutschen Mobiltätsanbietern.

Mit der Kompetenz rund um Mobilitätsdienstleistungen an 20 Standorten in Niedersachsen und Sachsen-Anhalt präsentiert die Voets Gruppe die Marken Volkswagen, Volkswagen Nutzfahrzeuge, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA, ŠKODA und Porsche mit ihren ca. 1.200 Mitarbeiter*innen. Wir sind Ihr qualifizierter Ansprechpartner sowohl für den klassischen Verkauf von Neu- und Gebrauchtfahrzeugen, als auch für jede Art der Reparatur und Wartung, des Schadensmanagements, Flottenmanagements, Kurz- und Langzeitvermietung sowie im Rahmen unserer Plattform „ELECTRIFY ME!“ auch für Elektromobilität.

Name: MAXUS Electric Vehicles - South Africa
Description:
MAXUS South Africa is accelerating the decarbonisation of urban logistics fleets with world class electric vehicles. 

MAXUS South Africa currently offers three commercial EV models to the local
market:

● The MAXUS eDeliver 3 Panel Van, which features a comfortable cab, a range of up to 244-344 km and a payload of up to 945 kg. This vehicle has been extensively tested and validated in South Africa over the past 24 months with MAXUS’ leasing partner, Everlectric.

● The MAXUS eDeliver 3 Chassis Cab, a two-seat, single chassis variant that allows customers to load a range of commercial bodies onto the long wheel base chassis. These include drop side load bins, space saver cargo canopies, refrigeration and temperature controlled bodies. It can be ordered for delivery later this year.

● The MAXUS T90EV, which can be ordered for delivery in late 2023, will be the first electric double cab bakkie to be available in South Africa. With 354 km of range, the vehicle provides an alternative to urban 4X2 commercial combustion double cabs in industries like mining, private security, aviation, and farming.

MAXUS vehicles have sufficient range for commercial operations and can be charged overnight, with solar panels or when there’s no load shedding. They can be charged on most existing DC Fast Charger networks in South Africa. The local dealership and its partners have also created a grid-tied charging infrastructure with solar micro-grids to support customers.

Name: Mercedes-Benz Witman
Description:
Jesteśmy Autoryzowanym Dealerem Mercedes-Benz i AMG (AMG Brand Center). Naszym klientom zapewniamy profesjonalną i kompleksową obsługę w zakresie zakupu i użytkowania samochodów koncernu Daimler.

W naszym salonie sprzedaży oferujemy szeroką gamę samochodów z gwiazdą oraz atrakcyjne warunki finansowania i ubezpieczenia zakupionych aut. Oprócz sprzedaży samochodów gwarantujemy profesjonalną obsługę serwisową w zakresie wszelkich niezbędnych działań naprawczych, a także sprzedaż oryginalnych części, akcesoriów i kolekcji ze znakiem Mercedes-Benz. Nasi pracownicy przechodzą wszystkie niezbędne szkolenia i certyfikacje, aby w jak największym stopniu spełniać oczekiwania naszych klientów.

W firmie Witman od zawsze staramy się traktować naszych Klientów z najwyższym szacunkiem i uwagą. Dokładamy wszelkich starań aby chwile spędzone z nami pozostawiały wrażenie wyjątkowości oferowanych przez nas usług. Dzięki temu według Klientów to właśnie firma Witman jest liderem na Trójmiejskim rynku, nie ze względu na wielkość a jakość świadczonych usług.

As with a trade association, our ethos is to promote best practice and provide quality legal advice at an affordable price. We offer membership packages specifically designed to help deal with employment issues, health and safety requirements, data protection regulations, customer complaints, trade to trade problems and much more.

Whether you own or are responsible for a Franchise Dealership, Car Supermarket, Used Car Dealership, Independent Service and Repair Garage, Parts Manufacturer/Supplier, Lawgistics membership packages can help protect your business, demonstrate good practice, and cut unnecessary overheads. We have tiered membership so there’s a package that’s just right for your business.

Name: Mazda Autoone
Description:
At Mazda, we don't just build cars; we craft driving experiences. Our love for driving runs deep, evident in every Mazda vehicle. 

Passionate about driving and dedicated to the spirit of Jinba Ittai, the oneness between car and driver, Mazda is committed to making cars that are great to drive, great to own, and great to look at.

Our journey began in Hiroshima, Japan, where we've grown from making three-wheel trucks to becoming the first Asian brand to win Le Mans. We've won accolades like "World Car of the Year" and "World Car Design of the Year," showcasing our commitment to innovation and design.

With a focus on sustainability, we're creating exciting PHEV and EV vehicles while perfecting our internal combustion engine vehicles. We're on a mission to become the leading non-European premium automotive brand in Europe.

Mazda AutoOne, member of Syngelidis Automotive Companies,  is the official commercial representative of the iconic Japanese automaker in Greece since 2019.

Join us in our pursuit of driving pleasure, innovation, and a sustainable future. Let's experience the road together, the Mazda way.

Name: Hamilton Electric Bikes Inc.
Description: Opened in 2018 Hamilton Electric Bikes sells and services over 15 different brands of the coolest electric bicycles on the market. An electric bicycle is a motorized bicycle with an integrated electric motor used to assist propulsion. Many kinds of e-bikes are available worldwide, but they generally fall into two broad categories: bikes that assist the rider's pedal-power and bikes that add a throttle. Most of the ebikes we carry have both peddle assist and a throttle. They are fun, useful and still provide you with the ability to get in a great workout if you choose. You will ride more, do more with your e-bike and even smile much more :-) Come in and get an overview of the many different models and options and test drive a few to really understand what all the talk is about.

Name: Auto Select
Description:
Founded by entrepreneur Hercílio Cardoso Jr, Auto Select was born with a simple yet powerful purpose: to make access to cars without bureaucracy possible for average wage earners living in the United States.

What started as an innovative solution in Massachusetts quickly grew, taking shape as a unique business model — car subscription as an accessible alternative, without banks and without red tape.

Today, Auto Select is a trusted reference within Sub-prime communities in the U.S. We have already helped hundreds of families and workers achieve mobility, freedom, and dignity behind the wheel. Our mission goes far beyond delivering cars: we strive to be the trusted partner in the lives of those who are building a new story in another country.

At Auto Select, we believe that every customer carries a dream. That’s why our culture is built on trust, closeness, and responsibility. Here, no one is just a number: every subscription represents a real achievement, an important chapter in the life of someone who believed in us.

Our vision is clear: to be the company that most transforms the lives and the access of  automobile consumers in the U.S. automotive market. And to achieve so, we count on a team passionate about results, committed to delivering human, agile, and transparent service.

La révolution du transport individuel est en marche ! 

Se déplacer tout en réduisant son impact sur l’environnement et en préservant la santé  est une priorité pour tous.

 Où vais-je la recharger ?
 Quelles sont les solutions financières disponibles ?
 Quelle est l’autonomie réelle ?
 Combien coûte l’entretien ?
 Quelle est la durée de vie des batteries ? 
 Est-ce adapté à mes besoins ?
 Quelle solution de recharge installer ?

Tout ça, ça fait beaucoup, non ?

Whether customers buy, lease, or rent, C2 Vehicles provides unparalleled technical and logistical support. Products include new and reconditioned golf carts, utility vehicles, refreshment vehicles, and the new class of Neighborhood Electric Vehicles (NEV). NEV’s are a class of federally designated low-speed vehicles operating on roads with a posted speed limit of 35 MPH or less. NEV’s are an affordable, efficient, and green alternative to traditional cars and trucks for commuting, shopping, and municipal needs.  

The company maintains a fleet of 1500+ rental vehicles offered for short-term needs and special events. Customer support is delivered by factory-certified technicians operating from our 5 physical New England locations. Company headquarters is in Wareham, MA.

Name: Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld
Description:
For more than 40 years, Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld has built a reputation for being one of the UK’s leading motorhome specialists.

Its extensive collection of motorhomes and camper vans – both new and used – are based at the company’s headquarters at junction 14 on the M6 near Stafford.
Rich in quality, quantity and variety, Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld boasts the largest collection of premium German brand motorhomes anywhere in the UK for customers to view at first hand.

This is a family owned and run business, with more than four decades of experience and knowledge, headed up by Ross Edwards as Managing Director.

Four of the best
Over the last 10 years, Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld has established itself as the No 1 UK home for a quartet of brands which typify outstanding German excellence in engineering and design Carado, Dethleffs, HYMER and Niesmann + Bischoff. Some of the very best motorhomes in the world are available from Travelworld and the dedicated team is on hand to meet in person, over the phone or virtually, to answer all your questions.

Outstanding service
Once you have purchased your motorhome, it’s important to maintain it to a high level and the outstanding Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld service offering guarantees exactly that.

The full offering includes a 21-bay workshop packed with experienced and highly-qualified technicians ready to deliver a host of after-sales services and products, with a 12-month guarantee on all work carried out.

In addition, Erwin Hymer Centre Travelworld became an official MOT Testing Centre in early 2021, one of the first motorhome dealerships in the country to be given the accreditation from the DVSA after a robust series of tests, checks and inspections.

Name: Şentürk Otomotiv Grup
Description:
Şentürk Otomotiv’in temelleri 90’lı yılların başında atıldı.
1992 yılında Bursa–Yalova Yolu üzerinde ilk Şentürk Hyundai Bayii kuruldu. Artan başarı ve müşteri talebiyle, Türkiye’nin en büyük Hyundai showroomlarından biri hayata geçirildi. 30 yılı aşkın Hyundai iş birlikleri boyunca hizmet kalitesi, güvenilirliği ve ödüllerle pekişen başarılarıyla sektörün öncüleri arasında yer aldı.
2000 yılında imzalanan Şentürk–KIA ortaklığı ile İstanbul Caddesi üzerinde KIA showroomu faaliyete geçti. 20 yılı aşkın süredir satış performansı ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı yaklaşımıyla KIA tarafında da liderliğini sürdürmektedir.
2025 yılının son çeyreğinde Şentürk Otomotiv, İstanbul Şişli’de Kia ve SWM bayiliğini de hizmete açarak güçlü ve deneyimli kadrosu ile müşteri odaklı hizmet kültürünü İstanbul’a taşımıştır.
Aynı zamanda sigorta alanında MS Şentürk Sigortam bünyesinde; Ak Sigorta, Allianz, Axa, Eureko, Sompo, HDI, Zurich ve Türkiye Sigorta gibi birçok güçlü markanın acenteliklerini yürütmektedir.
2. el el araç alanında da faaliyet gösteren Şentürk Otomotiv; köklü tecrübesi, itibarı, müşteri güveni ve çalışanlarının özverisiyle büyümeye devam etmektedir.
2006 yılında kurulan Şentürk Rent A Car, 2021’de yenilenen marka kimliğiyle Contact Rent A Car ismini almıştır.
Bugün İstanbul, İzmir ve Bursa’da günlük ve filo kiralama hizmetleri sunan Contact Rent A Car; geniş araç filosu, uygun fiyat politikası ve 7/24 destek hizmetiyle sektörde fark yaratmaktadır.
2023 ve 2024 yıllarında tüm şubeleriyle Yolcu360 En Başarılı Rent A Car Ödülünü kazanarak başarısını üst üste tescillemiştir.

Name: Van den Heuvel Auto's
Description:
Van den Heuvel Auto's

Voor zorgeloze kilometers

Persoonlijk, kwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en service.

WIE ZIJN WIJ?
Passie en vakmanschap, dat drijft ons. Leuk je te ontmoeten! Wij zijn Jan-Willem en Reinald van den Heuvel. Beiden al 25 jaar werkzaam in de autobranche en al heel wat ervaring op de kilometerteller. Een sterk staaltje vakmanschap zien wij direct, van ronkende diesels tot duurzame elektrische auto’s. Wij zorgen voor een betrouwbare bolide, waar u elke dag van kunt genieten. Bij ons telt die ‘beslissende handdruk’. Noem het ouderwets, noem het uit de tijd, wij noemen het liever betrouwbaar met kwaliteit. Benieuwd naar wat we voor u kunnen betekenen? Maak een afspraak!

Wij zorgen voor zorgeloze ritten. Van A naar B, onderweg met het gezin, op vakantie of op weg naar werk. Met passie en een hart voor vakmanschap vergelijken wij het constant veranderende aanbod van auto’s op de markt.

Van aankoop tot verkoop en van lease tot verzekeringen. Met al meer dan 25 jaar ervaring. Op het gebied van auto’s weten wij waar we over praten. De mens staat bij ons op één, daarom staan we voor u klaar met deskundig advies bij de aankoop van een betrouwbare auto die voldoet aan uw persoonlijke wensen. U bent van harte welkom bij Van den Heuvel Auto’s. De koffie staat klaar.

•	Inkoop
•	Verkoop
•	Leasing
•	Financiering
•	Verzekering

Name: Rodaria Ltda.
Description:
Rodaria Ingeniería de Transporte es una empresa que busca anticiparse a las necesidades del mercado ofreciendo ventajas competitivas, participando de los proyectos de sus clientes y aportando con soluciones innovadoras.

El compromiso con nuestros clientes se basa en ofrecer una experiencia de conducción única, un vehículo adecuado para sus requerimientos y mantener siempre la mayor calidad posible en cada uno de nuestros procesos. Todo ello unido a la emoción de satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes con cada uno de los vehículos que comercializamos.

NUESTRA MISIÓN
Apoyar permanentemente el transporte boliviano, mediante la orientación, comercialización y seguimiento de equipos con tecnología de punta, modernizando el transporte de pasajeros y el movimiento de carga nacional e internacional.

NUESTRA VISIÓN
Sostener el liderazgo de mercado consolidando y optimizando el servicio técnico y suministro de piezas de nuestras líneas a lo largo y ancho de todo el territorio nacional.

También, importa y representa oficialmente en todo el territorio boliviano las marcas de vehículos Dongfeng, camionetas ZNA y productos RANDON. Además, de piezas de las fábricas RANDON, SUSPENSYS, JOST, MASTER, FRAS-LE, KML, EATON y BUCK METAL.
Location: Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Santa Cruz

Name: SUPER MEGAVENDAS
Description:
A Super MegaVendas é especializada em softwares impulsionadores de vendas para montadoras e concessionárias de veículos, ajudando nossos clientes a aumentar performance, produtividade e resultados.

Nosso propósito é transformar a forma como o mercado automotivo vende, utilizando tecnologia e inovação como motores de crescimento.

Há 7 anos impulsionando vendas em todo o Brasil, começamos com métodos tradicionais e evoluímos para um modelo escalável e digital, tornando-nos a primeira plataforma digital de eventos e a maior impulsionadora de vendas de veículos da América Latina.

Nossa trajetória teve início no chão da loja, em contato direto com gestores e vendedores, entendendo seus desafios reais e desenvolvendo soluções que funcionam na prática.

Cada evento e projeto é pensado com um único objetivo:

Impulsionar vendas de forma rápida, inteligente e mensurável, elevando a performance dos times e o potencial de cada lead.

Hoje, já realizamos mais de 1.000 eventos, atendemos mais de 100 grupos e impactamos mais de 2.500 vendedores em todo o Brasil, levando estratégia, tecnologia e resultado para o setor automotivo.

Name: Lércio Pinto
Description:
A Lércio Pinto, fundada em 1988, em Santa Maria da Feira, teve sempre o seu objetivo bem presente ao longo das décadas: deixar a sua marca no mercado automóvel.

Com mais de 30 anos de atividade, este objetivo foi sendo cumprido e o crescimento da empresa e da sua notoriedade permitiram que se tornasse Concessionário oficial da marca Citröen, da marca Kia e também da sua marca própria de comercialização de veículos usados - Lércio Pinto Usados. Além disso, dispõe também de uma oficina qualificada, com os mais variados serviços de assistência técnica.

Atualmente, a Lércio Pinto assume-se como uma PME Líder do mercado de comercialização de automóveis em Portugal, destacando-se pela qualidade e diversidade de produtos e serviços oferecidos, tendo sempre como principal preocupação e dedicação, a satisfação de todos os clientes.

Name: SERE Motors
Description:
Welcome to SERE Motors, a distinguished family-owned car dealership, flourishing from humble beginnings to become a beacon of automotive excellence in Northern Ireland. Established by Stanley Edgar, a visionary in the automotive sector, our journey began with a simple portacabin beside the family home. Today, we stand proud with expansive showrooms located on Boucher Road, Belfast, and Moira Road, Lisburn.

The name 'SERE' is steeped in our heritage, representing the initials of our founders, Stanley and Rosemary Edgar. Their ethos of integrity and dedication continues to drive us forward.

February 2000 marked a significant milestone with the opening of our first Used Car Supermarket in Lisburn. Now, our facilities span over 4.5 acres, presenting a vast selection of hundreds of cars, including esteemed brands and sought-after models.

At SERE Motors, we don't just sell cars; we offer an automotive experience. We are proud to host KGM in our Belfast showroom and used car supermarkets in our Belfast and Lisburn locations. Our aftersales services, accredited for MG, Mitsubishi, SEAT, KGM (formerly SsangYong), Renault, Chevrolet, and Fiat, ensure unparalleled care for your vehicle.

We are more than a dealership; we are your partners in automotive solutions. From business Contract Hire and Fleet management to personal purchases, our expert team is dedicated to tailoring services to your unique needs. At SERE, customer satisfaction is paramount. We strive to provide exceptional value, a welcoming environment, and comprehensive support throughout your vehicle ownership journey.

Part of the diverse SERE Group, our interests span across Motor, Aviation, and Medical sectors, reflecting our commitment to innovation and excellence in various industries.

Join us at SERE Motors, where our history, expertise, and dedication converge to offer you an unmatched automotive experience.

Our team of experts will find the right bus to fit your budget and requirements. We also offer bus rental services to accommodate customers who only need buses for short term use.

People have come to rely on Hudson Bus  for our integrity, responsiveness, and industry expertise.

Chez Renault Rennes Longchamps, vous pouvez bénéficier des services suivants : réparations, carrosserie, entretien sans rendez-vous pour véhicules toutes marques, vente d'accessoires et de pièces de rechange, vente de véhicules d'occasion, vente de véhicules neufs, location de véhicules (Mobilize Share - site des Longchamps), vente de véhicules hybrides et électriques, service Renault Pro+.

Renault Rennes Longchamps assure la vente de véhicules neufs Renault et Dacia, et des véhicules d'occasion toutes marques, ainsi que l'entretien et les réparations de votre véhicule. 

Notre priorité est d'apporter à nos clients une réponse à leurs exigences d'automobilistes.
Soyez assuré de notre volonté de tout mettre en œuvre pour vous apporter la satisfaction que vous êtes en droit d'attendre de nous.

Nous nous engageons sur : le prix, le choix et la qualité (voitures neuves et d’occasion, réparations, maintenance, équipements et accessoires…etc.). 
Également sur la possibilité d’essayer une large gamme de véhicules, le respect de votre budget et du financement de vos achats, une offre de services complètes (entretiens, assistance, accessoires…etc.), la disponibilité, la convivialité et la recherche de la meilleure solution pour votre problématique automobile.

Name: Creddie
Description: Imagine a world where buying a car is not only easy and stress-free, but also empowers people to take control of their credit worthiness. Creddie.co is making that a reality. We are revolutionizing the car buying experience by addressing both the financing and ownership aspects. We are working hard to offer a comprehensive, personalized, and customer-centric approach that includes financing options, transparent pricing, maintenance and repair services and an innovative dashboard to manage all aspects of car ownership. Our unique approach not only helps people buy the cars they want, but also helps them re-establish their credit worthiness and in the future, buy newer or higher end vehicles that were previously out of reach. With a loyal customer base that will return for future car purchases and create a sense of community among customers, Creddie.co is poised for explosive growth. Join us today!

Name: Davenport Autopark
Description:
Our Mission: 
To serve God by improving lives, through transportation. 

Five Pillars:
• By delivering superior transportation backed by exceptional service.
• By serving others (and each other) with respect and appreciation. 
• By helping employees pursue their dreams.
• By reinvesting in God’s kingdom here on earth.
• By sharing the Good News of Jesus Christ.

Our Core Values: 
•   Honesty/Integrity
•   Customer Service
•   Teamwork
•    Generosity

Our Vision: 
We see a community in which God is glorified by how we care for one another. 

Service to others:
At Davenport Autopark we’re all about service. Our family has been serving the Rocky Mount community and surrounding areas for over 90 years. We serve on local boards, are members of local churches and civic clubs and donate to local charities. 

Through our “Community for Life” program we make donations to local charities selected by customers and from profits at the end of the year. In addition, Davenport honors First Responders (“Hometown Heroes”) and rewards a Teacher-of-the-Year and a lucky United Way contributor with a new car each year.  

This same commitment to service applies to our customers as well as our community. Davenport’s “Dealership for Life” program provides customers the peace of mind that comes with having a personal mobile app, online scheduling, valet pick-up and delivery, courtesy multi-point inspections and car washes, shuttle service, loaner cars and a lifetime engine warranty. At Davenport, we’re here to serve you.

Unstoppable Automotive Group is a premier, privately-held, family-operated consortium of luxury automotive dealerships. Name: Foton Portugal
Description:
Fundada em 1996 e com sede em Pequim (China), a Foton é hoje um dos principais fabricantes mundiais de veículos comerciais e um dos grandes impulsionadores da mobilidade elétrica de frotas empresariais. 

Desde 2024 Portugal, a Foton comercializa uma gama de veículos comerciais ligeiros e pick-ups, reconhecida pela sua excelente relação qualidade-preço.

Em todo o mundo, já vendeu mais de 11 milhões de veículos, estabelecendo parcerias estratégicas com a Cummins, Bosch, Daimler e ZF.

Name: Central Auction Group
Description: Central Auction Group is your auction platform with service. We understand that salvage equipment, vehicles, and machinery are not a one size fits all solution, and that personal service and attention are required to make the process seamless and effective for all.

Name: Walker Movements
Description:
Walker Movements is an international leader in the sale and distribution of second hand trucks. Specialising in premium brands including but not limited to Scania, DAF, MAN, Volvo, Mercedes, Renault and Iveco trucks, as well as a large stock of trailers, we offer choice like no other. 

Supplying to both customers throughout the UK and overseas, we provide an outstanding export service, with the facilities to transport and ship any of the vehicles we have in stock to any worldwide destination.

Over the past 34 years our small, friendly team of truck experts have sold more than 21,500 trucks and have served more than 15,000 happy customers all over the world.

Our 21-acre custom built sales centre is conveniently located next to the M1 motorway between junctions 24A and 25 in the Midlands; so stop on by for a coffee and a chat, or give us a call to discuss your requirements. We're always happy to help!

Name: BMW Autohaus Nefzger
Description:
Seit der Gründung vor über 90 Jahren ist die Fokussierung auf das Kundenwohl die oberste Prämisse für das BMW Autohaus Nefzger. Umfassenden Service und erstklassige Ausstattung verbinden wir in einer familiären Atmosphäre, um unser höchstes Ziel zu erreichen: dass Sie zufrieden sind.

Ihre individuellen Wünsche liegen uns am Herzen, wir beraten Sie umfassend und kompetent und sorgen dafür, dass Sie in Ihrem BMW Autohaus Nefzger in Berlin immer exakt auf Sie zugeschnittene Leistungen erhalten. Unsere versierten Mitarbeitenden sind stets für Sie da und betreuen Sie individuell mit Ihren Anliegen. Im Mittelpunkt steht bei uns der Mensch.

Name: Nardo Bil Gruppen
Description:
𝐍𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐨 𝐁𝐢𝐥 𝐆𝐫𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧 er Midt-Norges største bilforhandlerkjede med forhandlere fra Ålesund i sør til Rørvik i nord. Siden oppstarten i 1983 har flere bilmerker vært innom. Pr i dag er vi stolt forhandler av Volvo, Polestar, Land Rover, Lotus, XPENG og Zeekr.

Vi streber etter å levere 𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘵𝘪𝘥 𝘨𝘰𝘥𝘦 𝘰𝘱𝘱𝘭𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘭𝘴𝘦𝘳 til våre kunder og samarbeidspartnere. Det skal være trygt og sikkert å være kunde hos oss.

Name: Mark Motors Porsche
Description:
Welcome to Mark Motors Porsche, your destination for the ultimate Porsche experience in Ottawa. We are committed to providing unparalleled customer service, embodying the legacy and spirit of Porsche's rich history.

As a distinguished member of the Porsche family and a part of Mark Motors group, we offer an exceptional lineup of Porsche vehicles that represent the pinnacle of automotive engineering, performance, and luxury. 

What truly sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to providing exceptional customer service. Our knowledgeable and dedicated team of professionals is here to ensure your experience with us exceeds your expectations. From the moment you step into our dealership to the years of ownership that follow, we are devoted to building lasting relationships and delivering personalized service that is tailored to your individual needs.

Beyond our dedication to Porsche excellence, we proudly celebrate Porsche's storied racing heritage. The same passion and pursuit of perfection that drive Porsche on the racetrack are reflected in every vehicle we offer, ensuring an exhilarating and dynamic driving experience for our customers.

At Mark Motors Porsche, we believe that true luxury extends beyond the automotive realm. We are deeply rooted in the Ottawa community and actively involved in initiatives that support and uplift our neighbors. Through sponsorships, partnerships, and community events, we strive to make a positive impact and contribute to the fabric of our beloved city.

Name: Xcelerate Auto
Description:
Xcelerate is a national company that offers financing, leasing and warranty products for the Battery Electric Vehicle industry for both the private and public sectors. Our vision is to create the ability for customers to easily get into an electric vehicle without having to deal with the traditional auto buying/leasing experience. Every product is developed with a focus of walking backwards from the customer experience, with a strong focus on “Xcelerating” the transition to sustainable transport. Our clients receive unlimited truth, honesty and transparent industry analytics, while maintaining a no pressure, no nonsense approach to their EV lease, purchase or EV ownership experience.
 
Our staff and leadership team has a wide range of expertise and backgrounds; with over 40 years of automotive experience, 25 of those years specializing in the electric vehicle space. Our team has come from the traditional automotive space, former Tesla management and Silicon Valley tech, and we strive to be in the forefront of automotive technology with the goal of transitioning the public into the future of electric transport.
 
At Xcelerate we have a strong focus on the automotive space, but we encourage new ideas, with a start-up mentality that is always open to new ideas. A key quality we look for is out of the box thinking and creative problem solving.

Name: EasyGO Car Rental
Description:
EasyGO Car Rental, a subsidiary of Uvez Automotive, is a brand where you can rent a car daily, monthly and long-term with attractive opportunities. With its experience from the past and the assurance of Uvez Automotive, EasyGO opens the doors of a comprehensive automotive world to you, our valued customers.

With the affordable price guarantee and uninterrupted service support, EasyGO branches, where you can rent the vehicle you want individually or corporately, have insured vehicles suitable for every need and taste. EasyGO, which combines customer satisfaction-oriented understanding and innovative solutions, also offers its customers opportunities such as address delivery rental and car rental from airports.

EasyGO, which is expanding its fleet day by day with 0 km vehicles to meet your every need, offers the latest model vehicles, each more useful and stylish than the other, to both you and your company.

By choosing EasyGO, you can meet your individual vehicle needs or your company's fleet vehicle needs with daily, monthly and long-term rentals and enjoy the roads.

Name: Eagers Automotive Western Australia
Description:
Eagers Automotive Limited is the leading automotive retail group in Australia and New Zealand, with a long and proud history of more than 100 years.

Our name was changed to Eagers Automotive Limited from A.P. Eagers Limited in 2020 following our acquisition of the listed Automotive Holdings Group Limited (AHG). This new name better reflects our position in the automotive industry and recent growth, whilst also maintaining a connection to our foundation.

We are a pure automotive retail group representing a diversified portfolio of automotive brands across Australia and New Zealand.

Our core business consists of the ownership and operation of motor vehicle dealerships. We provide full facilities including the sale of new and used vehicles, service, parts and the facilitation of allied consumer finance.

Our operations are typically provided through strategically clustered dealerships, many of which are situated on properties owned by us in high profile, main road locations, with the balance leased by us.

Our main operations are located in Brisbane, regional Queensland, Adelaide, Darwin, Melbourne, Perth, Sydney, the Newcastle/Hunter Valley region of New South Wales, Tasmania and Auckland.

Name: Pantai Bharu
Description:
Pantai Bharu began as a small construction company in Jalan Pantai Bharu, Kuala Lumpur, before transitioning into the auto-trading industry in 1978. Recognizing the growth potential of the Malaysian automotive market, Pantai Bharu specialized in imported used and reconditioned vehicles, particularly from Japan. This early venture aligned with the New Economic Policy (NEP), a program aimed at fostering local business growth and economic restructuring in Malaysia.

In 1983, Pantai Bharu ventured into the national automotive scene by launching an EON Sales Dealership (now Proton Edar Sales Dealership) in Taman Berkeley, Klang. By 1991, the company secured land in Jalan Meru, Klang, establishing Bangunan Pantai Bharu, a significant milestone reflecting its steady expansion and growing influence.

With a workforce of over 200 professionals, Pantai Bharu remains committed to staying relevant and evolving with the industry. The company proudly operates multiple dealerships across Malaysia:

- Proton 3S in Jalan Kapar, Klang
- Proton and Emas 3S in Persiaran Anggun, Rawang
- Proton 1S in Bandar Baru Klang
- Perodua 3S (upgraded CI coming soon) at its Klang HQ
- Future Perodua 3S planned at the border of Klang and Shah Alam
- KIA 3S at its HQ
- Dong Feng EV showroom, embracing the electric vehicle revolution
- Imported Car Showroom, the legacy and prestige
- Pusat Servis Pantai Bharu, hospitality and quality

At its core, Pantai Bharu is more than just a dealership—it’s a brand built on trust, customer-centric values, and a passion for automobiles.

Name: Wheelmax
Description:
Wheelmax is a user-friendly car marketplace that simplifies the car buying journey for individuals. Our platform empowers users to find the perfect car for their needs and budget with insightful guidance.

Name: EVOGO
Description:
We all love the freedom that having a car gives us.

However, let’s face it, owning a car can be a costly affair. Not only do you have to spend all your savings or take out finance to afford one in the first place but then you have the costs of running and maintaining the vehicle, not to mention the money you lose through depreciation when you sell it on for a newer model. What a hassle!

Which is why more and more people in the UK are choosing to lease rather than buy their car.

However, not all lease agreements are what they should be, often creating burdens of their own.

EVOGO is the smart alternative to vehicle leasing because you get all of the benefits of owning a vehicle, just like a traditional lease, but with a level of flexibility and a range of choice and cost that is unique to EVOGO.

You won’t be tied into lengthy contracts or complicated finance deals. And you’ll experience a premium level of service that will leave you feeling warm inside!

Ready to get behind the wheel of a brand new car? Flexible and affordable, on the latest makes and model of premium vehicles. Don’t just go, EVOGO.

Name: Guanzon Group of Companies
Description:
It all started with the thrill of riding a bicycle and the fondest memories it leaves in the mind of the little child, this is where the dream began.

Our roots can be traced from selling kalesa (horse cart) parts to becoming a progressive and stable partner in motorcycle and mobile phone retail sales. Now with 170 Motorcycle branches and 80 mobile phone shops, we continue to grow and expand with a commitment to loyalty, honesty, and trust.

Guanzon Group of Companies will always strive in helping every Filipino make their life comfortable by providing the best and quality products and services.

Name: Thames Motor Group
Description:
Thames Motor Group, a family-run business with its head office in Kent, was established in 1971 by Vipen Khanna. Vipen has been in business for many years, and has diligently built a portfolio of diverse enterprises, including motor dealerships, property development and fuel retail.

Sanjay Sobte, Vipen’s nephew, runs the two dealerships in Thames Motor Group (Slough) Limited and is proud to be the Dealer Principal of one of the top-selling dealerships for both Fiat and Abarth since 2000. Having started as a salesman for Thames Motor Group in 1986, Sanjay then progressed to a Sales Manager and then to Dealer Principal before he was finally promoted to the Managing Director of Thames Slough.

Thames Slough’s continued success has led to us introducing further franchises, including Alfa Romeo in early 2013, then Jeep in June 2016. We are proud owners of the newly built Jeep and Alfa dealership next to our original Fiat/Abarth site on Bath Road. This prestigious dealership is Europe’s largest Jeep and Alfa showroom holding over 50 cars over 2 floors. It certainly creates a wow factor!

In 2001, Kevin Khanna, Vipen’s son, was appointed Dealer Principal of Thames Motor Group (Tunbridge Wells) Limited and became the youngest Dealer Principal in the UK. Kevin’s strong business acumen and passion for the motor trade has made Thames Motor Group one of the most customer-focused franchise dealers in the region.

In 2015 Kevin moved over to the property side of the business and Natasha Khanna, Vipen’s Daughter, became the Dealer Principal at Tunbridge Wells. Natasha ran the company’s car rental location for 13 years and also has nearly 20 years’ experience in HR for the group. She brings to Tunbridge Wells her wealth of knowledge in people management and customer focus.

Description:

We offer unbeatable value on new/used vehicles and service! 
We are a family business proud of our Cornish heritage, delivering outstanding service to Cornwall and the wider region for 80+ years! On the 25th February 1933, John Hawkins Snr sold 1 gallon of petrol for 1/7½d  (one shilling seven pence halfpenny), 1 gallon Paraffin for 11d (eleven pence) and 1lb Carbide for 4d (four pence). Hawkin's Motors has been in operation ever since!

Name: Hakvoort GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei Hakvoort/HANKO – Ihrem langjährigen Partner für Premium-Mobilität und einer Unternehmenskultur, die Exzellenz und Innovation vereint. Seit 1968 sind wir renommierter Partner der Premiummarken BMW, MINI, BMW i, BMW M und BMW Motorrad. An unseren acht Standorten in Sankt Augustin, Siegburg, Königswinter, Eitorf, Bad Marienberg, Altenkirchen, Koblenz und Neuwied bieten wir eine exklusive Auswahl an topaktuellen und innovativen Fahrzeugen sowie Gebrauchtwagen. 

Die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden schreiben wir groß. Wir wissen, dass Sicherheit, Zuverlässigkeit, Umweltverträglichkeit, Leistung und Komfort von höchster Bedeutung sind. Unser engagiertes Team von Fachleuten arbeitet kontinuierlich daran, unsere Kunden durch exzellente Beratung und erstklassigen Service zu begeistern. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen dabei unsere Mitarbeiter/innen. Wir glauben fest daran, dass ihr Erfolg der Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg ist. Daher investieren wir kontinuierlich in die Weiterentwicklung unserer Mitarbeiter/innen und fördern individuelle Karrierewege durch gezielte Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen und berufliche Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Unsere Unternehmenskultur ist geprägt von Teamarbeit, Offenheit und Wertschätzung. Wir schaffen eine inspirierende Arbeitsumgebung, in der Kreativität und Innovation gefördert werden. 

Wir sind stolz darauf, ein Teil einer Branche zu sein, die maßgeblich zur technologischen Entwicklung beigetragen hat. Das Automobil hat nicht nur die Art und Weise verändert, wie wir uns fortbewegen, sondern auch, wie wir leben und arbeiten. Bei Hakvoort/HANKO sind wir davon überzeugt, dass die Freude am Fahren eine Tradition mit Zukunft ist. Wir glauben an intelligente Innovationen und kontinuierliche Verbesserungen, die die Mobilität von morgen gestalten werden – und dass das Automobil auch weiterhin mit Begeisterung und Freude verbunden sein wird.

Name: MCV CHEVROLET
Description:
O negócio familiar começou com uma oficina mecânica de reparação de caminhões ainda na década de 40, na cidade de Caratinga – MG, fundado por Manoel Coelho que acabava de chegar na região, vindo de Leopoldina – MG. 

Com o passar dos anos, com a colaboração do filho Wadson Coelho, os negócios se expandiram para o ramo de combustíveis.

Em 1960, Manoel Coelho e o filho Wadson Coelho, assinaram um contrato de concessão com a General Motors no Brasil, onde tornaram-se concessionários Chevrolet na região.

Os negócios foram se solidificando e gerando inúmeros empregos.  

Hoje, o grupo possui três unidades, sendo a Matriz em Caratinga que completa 63 anos em 2022 com agregada filial em Governador Valadares e outra sede em Manhuaçu, ambas Minas Gerais.

O Grupo atua no ramo de vendas de automóveis novos, seminovos de procedência e de agregados como: acessórios, peças e serviços da marca Chevrolet.

Contamos com estruturas modernas em nossas três unidades, contendo área de conveniência, amplo show room com os mais novos modelos da marca e uma equipe capacitada para prestar um atendimento de excelência. 

Os departamentos e serviços de peças contam com os mais eficientes programas de atendimento, onde o cliente é atendido na hora marcada e diretamente pelo técnico.

Preza-se o atendimento de excelência para total satisfação do cliente, o que consequentemente vem resultando nas classificações anuais como concessionária "A", pela GM por seis vezes, sendo quatro vezes consecutivas. 

Nosso objetivo é a qualidade, presteza e transparência!

Nous développons également notre activité de location sous l'enseigne Renault RENT. Notre priorité est d'apporter à nos clients une réponse à leurs exigences d'automobilistes. Nous respectons le cahier des charges constructeur en tant que distributeur agrée auprès de 11 marques en répondant à l'ensemble des besoins liés à votre vie d'automobiliste. Soyez assuré de notre volonté de tout mettre en œuvre pour vous apporter la satisfaction que vous êtes en droit d'attendre de nous.

Nous nous engageons sur : le prix, le choix et la qualité (voitures neuves et d’occasion, réparations, maintenance, équipements et accessoires…etc.). Également sur la possibilité d’essayer une large gamme de véhicules, le respect de votre budget et du financement de vos achats, une offre de services complètes (entretiens, assistance, accessoires…etc.), la disponibilité, la convivialité et la recherche de la meilleure solution pour votre problématique automobile.

Renault Chartres a quitté son site historique avenue Marcel-Proust, ouvert en 1982, pour emménager au cœur du parc d’Archevilliers, sur la commune de Nogent-le-Phaye.  Le showroom dédié au commerce s’étend à 950 m ², dont 800 m ² pour les véhicules neufs dédiés aux particuliers et 150 m ² pour les professionnels.

L'équipe de Renault Chartres sera ravie de vous accueillir prochainement. À très bientôt !

Description:
About Prestige Vehicle Leasing

Prestige Vehicle Leasing supports professionals and business owners with personal and business vehicle leasing and car finance, offering clear, practical guidance and a straightforward process from start to finish.

We work as a personal broker, meaning clients deal with one point of contact throughout — from the initial conversation through to vehicle delivery.

Our services include:
	•	Personal and business vehicle leasing     (PCH & BCH)
	•	PCP and Hire Purchase finance options
	•	Vehicle sourcing across all manufacturers
	•	End-to-end handling, from approval to delivery

As an independent brokerage, we provide impartial advice and access to a wide range of lenders and suppliers, ensuring each client is guided toward the option that genuinely suits their needs.

Whether you’re actively planning a vehicle change or simply exploring options for later in the year, we’re always happy to have an initial conversation and offer clarity where it’s helpful.

Name: Caxton Industries
Description:
Welcome to Caxton Industries, where the rumble of engines and the scent of burning rubber fill the air! We are not just your average car selling company; we are the epitome of automotive passion and performance. If you have gasoline running through your veins, you've come to the right place!

At Caxton Industries, we eat, sleep, and breathe cars. Our team of petrolheads is driven by an insatiable hunger for horsepower, adrenaline-pumping speed, and the thrill of the open road. We understand that a car is not merely a means of transportation; it's a symbol of freedom, a manifestation of your wildest dreams, and a testament to engineering marvels.

Step into our showroom, and you'll be greeted by a symphony of roaring engines, gleaming metallic curves, and seductive designs that will make your heart race. From classic muscle cars that exude raw power to sleek sports cars that embody elegance and precision, we have a mesmerizing collection that caters to every automotive enthusiast's desires.

But we don't stop at just selling cars; we curate an experience like no other. Our passionate team will guide you through every step, sharing their encyclopedic knowledge of makes, models, and automotive history. We believe in fostering a community of petrolheads, where conversations about horsepower, torque, and lap times flow freely.

At Caxton Industries, we understand that true car enthusiasts crave more than just a vehicle; they yearn for an emotional connection. That's why we meticulously handpick each car in our inventory, ensuring that it possesses the perfect blend of performance, heritage, and style. We pride ourselves on offering a selection that caters to the discerning tastes of even the most dedicated gearheads.

Whether you're a seasoned collector, a performance junkie, or someone embarking on their first automotive adventure, Caxton Industries is here to fuel your passion.

Description:
For Decades Auto Boland has been synonymous with the highest standard of service and quality, in the motor industry in the south east of Ireland. Where possible we always try to promote within our existing staff and provide all the upskilling and career advancement opportunities at our disposal. We run and promote many training and development programmes within Auto Boland, from the recent development of our graduate programme to training our the training we provide in sales and financing and the many apprenticing mechanics we have trained throughout the years.

Here at Auto Boland we also recognise that the customers are the driving force behind our business. At Auto Boland Honda & Volvo we are lucky to have such a loyal customer base and your custom and indeed repeat custom in most cases is not overlooked. If you are part of our customer base and have visited our LinkedIn page we would like to thank each and every one of you for your support over the last number of decades, which has made doing what we do a pleasure.

Name: Frimann Biler A/S
Description:
Frimann Biler er autoriseret Toyota forhandler på Lolland-Falster med salg og værksted i Nykøbing F. og Maribo. 

Maribo værksted tilbyder, udover Toyota, også autoriseret service til mærkerne: Hyundai, Citroën og Opel. 
 
Vi uddanner og forbedrer os konstant, således at vi kan yde den bedste service for vores gæster.

Lige siden Frimann Biler blev etableret i 1984, har vi arbejdet på at blive de bedste til at handle med nye og brugte biler, samt at være totalleverandører af serviceydelser på en måde, der skaber kunder for livet. 

Frimann’s 5 værdier

Smilet
Hos Frimann har vi en positiv tilgang til opgaverne, og vi møder altid kunder og kolleger med et smil. Smilet er med til at skabe en positiv hverdag, der afspejler sig i både kunderelationer og arbejdsmiljø.

Respekt
Både som kunde og som medarbejder ønsker vi at blive mødt med engagement. Det skaber vi ved at udvise respekt for vores medarbejderes personligheder og kompetencer og hylde forskelligheden. Vi fokuserer på deres stærke sider, og vi giver dem mulighed for at tage ansvar og for at udvikle sig menneskeligt og fagligt.

Gennemsigtighed
Åbenhed og ærlighed er nøgleord hos Frimann både internt og eksternt. Derved skaber vi en gennemsigtighed, der øger harmonien i vores arbejdsmiljø og hjælper vores kunder med at træffe de beslutninger, der er rigtigst for dem.

Fleksibilitet
Fleksibilitet handler om at være opmærksom på kundernes forskellige behov og handle derefter. Når vi er opmærksomme og fleksible, bevarer vi nærheden til kunderne og skaber langvarige og holdbare relationer. Vi ser forandringer som positive udfordringer – ikke som trusler.

Oplevelser
Et besøg hos Frimann skal altid være en unik og positiv oplevelse. Vi skal holde fast i vores evne til at udfordre os selv og levere en smule mere, end kunden forventer. Det er sådan, vi adskiller os fra de andre.

Description:

Axxia vous propose ses services d'entretien et de réparation sur rendez-vous, un espace Entreprise au service des professionnels, un service Après-Vente ainsi qu'un service de Pièces de Rechange et Accessoires.

Notre mission : Vous accompagner et mettre notre professionnalisme à votre service pour vous offrir les solutions les plus adaptées à votre style de vie.

Depuis plus de 100 ans, BMW se réinvente pour créer des voitures toujours plus sûres, plus efficientes et plus responsables.

Aujourd'hui, BMW continue avec l'ambition de produire la voiture la plus verte au monde grâce à une nouvelle approche circulaire de la production automobile. Les actions et engagements de BMW s’articulent autour de quatre axes :

RE:THINK : Repenser la conception de nos voitures.

RE:USE : Réutiliser au maximum les matériaux et les batteries.

RE:DUCE : Réduire les émissions de CO2 et l'exploitation des ressources.

RE:CYCLE : Recycler pour donner une nouvelle vie aux composants.

Suivez nos pages Facebook, Instagram pour découvrir toutes les actualités de votre concessionnaire AXXIA BMW, vous laisser inspirer par nos événements et en apprendre plus sur notre vision pour une mobilité durable.

Name: Petrányi Autó
Description:
A 100% családi kézben levő Petrányi Autó a hazai autópiac egyik vezető és folyamatosan fejlődő kereskedő és mobilitás szolgáltató vállalkozása. A márka a 70-es évek eleje, a Kerepesi-úti alkatrész-kereskedelem elindítása óta (el)ismert az autószeretők között. A következő meghatározó lépés 1992-ben a gépjármű-kereskedelem megindítása a Ford hivatalos partnereként, melynek a Petrányi Autó a mai napig az egyik vezető kereskedője. A növekedés záloga az erős retail fókuszt követően a folyamatosan fejlődő vállalati igények kiszolgálása volt egy tudatos flottapolitikával, melyet 2002-ben a második, Üllői úti szalon és flottaközpont megnyitása is segített. 2008-ban, a válság idején is opportunista szemlélettel gondolkodó tulajdonosok megnyitották harmadik, Budaörsi úti szalonjukat, mely egyben prémium Ford Store  kategóriás helyszínné is vált. 
A Petrányi Autó tevékenysége párhuzamosan folyamatosan bővült önálló új tevékenységi körökkel is - a Next Autó Kft 2002-es indulása óta az egyik vezető hazai lízing és flottakezelő céggé nőtte ki magát. A Next Car Rentallal és a miniBUD Kft-vel a rövid távú autóbérlés, turizmus és személyszállítás területén vált fontos piaci szereplővé a vállalkozás, előbbivel egyben a fenntarthatóságban előre törő GreenMotion hazai franchise partnereként.
Az Airport Service Konzorcium (ASK) 2010-óta végzi a Budapest Airport kiszolgáló gépparkjának teljes körű technikai karbantartását. Alkatrész fronton pedig az alkatreszfordpetranyi.hu szintén TOP10-es Magyarországon. 
A gépjármű értékesítés területén 2022-től indult el a mutlibrandkorszak, amikor a 4. fővárosi helyszín, a Mázsa téri Petrányi Autó Centrum is megnyitott  A Petrányi Autó a japán Nissan, majd a hazai piacra első hivatalos kínai márkaként belépő MG kereskedőjeként, és az autószerelmesek szívét megdobogtató amerikai V8-as modellek, a Dodge, RAM és GM hivatalos forgalmazójaként igazi sokrétű mobilitási megoldást kínál a V8-tól a 100% elektromos autókig. Petrányi Autó - A jövőbe vezet.

Name: Grupa Adamowscy
Description:
Grupa Adamowscy to firma z ponad 50-letnim doświadczeniem w branży motoryzacyjnej, która od pokoleń buduje zaufanie klientów w północnej i środkowej Polsce. Nasza historia to dowód na to, że solidność, profesjonalizm i ciągłe doskonalenie są fundamentem sukcesu. Od zawsze stawiamy na jakość, innowacje i indywidualne podejście, dzięki czemu jesteśmy niezawodnym partnerem dla każdego kierowcy.

Specjalizujemy się w sprzedaży i serwisie samochodów Renault i Dacia oraz marce Yamaha, a nasza oferta obejmuje również szeroki wybór samochodów używanych w ramach programu RENEW . Program ten zapewnia tylko sprawdzone pojazdy, które przeszły dokładne kontrole jakości, gwarantując klientom bezpieczeństwo i komfort na każdym etapie zakupu i użytkowania.

Działamy w sześciu lokalizacjach: 
Starogard Gdański, ul. Zblewska 33 
Grudziądz, ul. Szosa Toruńska 29A
Włocławek, ul. Polna 100
Płock, ul. Bielska 70
Bydgoszcz, ul. Modrzewiowa 7
Chojnice, ul. Gdańska 68

To tutaj, w nowoczesnych salonach i serwisach, łączymy nasze bogate doświadczenie z pasją do motoryzacji. Oferujemy nie tylko sprzedaż samochodów (w tym sprzedaż flotową ) ale również kompleksowe usługi posprzedażowe, w tym:
 Serwisy mechaniczne.
 Serwisy blacharsko-lakiernicze.
 Usługi ubezpieczeniowe dopasowane do potrzeb klientów.

Naszym priorytetem jest zapewnienie komfortu, niezawodności i najwyższej jakości obsługi. 
Dzięki ciągłym szkoleniom i wdrażaniu innowacji stale podnosimy standardy naszych usług, by sprostać oczekiwaniom nawet najbardziej wymagających klientów.

Zapraszamy do Grupy Adamowscy – miejsca, gdzie tradycja motoryzacji spotyka się z nowoczesnością, a każdy klient może liczyć na pełne wsparcie i indywidualne podejście.

U nas najpierw jesteś gościem a dopiero potem Klientem.

Description:
Welkom bij ECAR, de specialist in elektrische auto’s
Het is onze missie om elektrisch autorijden toegankelijk te maken voor iedereen.
Elektrisch rijden is niet alleen goedkoper, duurzamer en beter voor het milieu. Het is ook nog eens veel leuker en fijner rijden! Althans dat vinden wij!

Wie zijn wij?
Ons team bestaat uit gepassioneerde mensen die vol overtuiging klanten en geïnteresseerden zoveel mogelijk uitleg geven over elektrisch rijden.
Onze website groeit langzaam uit tot ‘the place to be’ als je iets wilt weten over elektrisch rijden. Je vindt er zeer diverse blogs over alles wat met elektrisch rijden te maken heeft.

Uitgebreid aanbod
Natuurlijk vind je op onze website ook een uitgebreid aanbod van elektrische auto’s. Of je nu op zoek bent naar een leuke stadsauto, een nieuwe leaseauto,
een comfortabele gezinsauto of een elektrische bus voor je bedrijf, wij zorgen voor een breed aanbod met de beste elektrische auto’s, betaalbaar voor iedereen.
Wil je een keer proefrijden in een elektrische auto? Dan staan er altijd een paar voor je klaar bij ons pand in Alphen aan den Rijn.

Overige diensten
Het hebben van een elektrische auto roept allerlei vragen op. Wij helpen en adviseren bij het vinden van de beste oplossingen op het gebied van laadpalen en laadpassen.
Natuurlijk bieden wij ook financieringen en verzekeringen op maat.

Onze kernwaarden 

Transparant
Duurzaam
Merkonafhankelijk
Vriendelijk & Vrolijk

ECAR is de handelsnaam voor nieuwe elektrische auto’s, geïmporteerd door onze internationale autogroothandel. Alle auto’s worden geleverd met fabrieksgarantie en zijn snel beschikbaar. Kortom: Je koopt dezelfde auto als bij de dealer maar dan tegen een veel lager bedrag en met een kortere levertijd!

ECAR: elektrisch rijden voor iedereen!
Location: Alphen aan den Rijn, South Holland

Nous mettons un point d’honneur à proposer des véhicules d’exception et un service empreint de transparence, pour garantir à nos clients une tranquillité d’esprit totale.

Ce qui distingue MYOTO :

Name: Macom Mitsubishi
Description:
Com uma trajetória de mais de 30 anos, a Macom Mitsubishi se tornou sinônimo de qualidade e confiança no mercado automotivo em Belém, Ananindeua e região. Ao longo dessas décadas, nos dedicamos a oferecer não apenas veículos de alta performance e tecnologia avançada, mas também um atendimento personalizado, sempre voltado para superar as expectativas de nossos clientes. Acreditamos que o sucesso de uma empresa está nas relações que constrói, e na Macom Mitsubishi, cada cliente é tratado como parte essencial dessa história.

Nosso compromisso com a honestidade e a transparência é o que sustenta as relações de negócios que mantemos ao longo dos anos. Para nós, a confiança é conquistada diariamente, com serviços que primam pela qualidade e com uma equipe especializada, pronta para atender todas as necessidades relacionadas a veículos Mitsubishi. Seja na compra de um novo automóvel, na manutenção ou em qualquer outro serviço, oferecemos soluções que combinam inovação, eficiência e segurança.

Fidelizar clientes é um dos nossos principais objetivos, e por isso, investimos constantemente em melhorias e na capacitação de nossa equipe. A Macom Mitsubishi valoriza cada interação, e é com essa filosofia que construímos laços duradouros com nossos clientes. Para nós, a satisfação não termina com a entrega do veículo; ela se estende no suporte contínuo, garantindo que nossos clientes tenham uma experiência completa e tranquila em todas as etapas de sua jornada automotiva.

Ao longo desses 30 anos, a Macom Mitsubishi se orgulha de ter se consolidado como uma referência no setor automotivo da região. Continuamos a evoluir, acompanhando as novas tecnologias e tendências do mercado, sempre com o foco em oferecer o melhor para nossos clientes. Seja na venda de veículos novos ou seminovos, na prestação de serviços especializados ou no atendimento pós-venda, estamos comprometidos em manter a excelência que nos trouxe até aqui.
