Name: 2-A Grup Otomotiv
Description:
2010 yılında otomotiv alanında bireysel ve kurumsal ihtiyaçlara profesyonel çözümler sunmak ilkesiyle yola çıkan 2-A Grup Otomotiv, kuruluşundan günümüze süregelen kaliteli ve yenilikçi uygulamalarıyla sektörde saygın bir yer edinmiştir. Ulusal ölçekte araç kiralama, ikinci el araç alım-satımı, ekspertiz ve değerleme hizmeti, araç sigortası alanlarında Türkiye’nin en güvenilir markalarıyla iş birliği yürütmekte, kullanıcı öncelikli stratejilerin geliştirilmesi ve hayata geçirilmesinde öncü olmaktadır.

2-A Grup Otomotiv, ülkemizin en köklü şirketlerinden biri olan Anadolu Grup ile kurumsal anlamda iş birliği içerisindedir. Araç kiralama alanında Garenta, ikinci el araç alım satımı konusunda ikinciyeni.com, ekspertiz ve değerleme alanında Carwiz markalarının bayiliklerini yürütmektedir. Ayrıca uluslararası araç kiralama markası olan Hertz’in de bayilik hizmetini vermektedir. Söz konusu alanlarda Anadolu Grup güvencesi ile kullanıcılara güvenli hizmet sunmakta, tüketici lehine yeni nesil birçok uygulamayı hayata geçirmektedir. 

2-A Grup Otomotiv, Anadolu Grubu ile çalışmakla birlikte sektörde kendi markalarını yaratarak faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. Perla Araç Kiralama ile İstanbul Otostat ofisinde filo kiralama hizmeti vermektedir. Yine 2-A Grup markası olan Sigortanom ile tüketicilerin sigorta ihtiyaçlarına yanıt olmaktadır. 2-A Grup Otomotiv, faaliyetlerini Diyarbakır, Denizli, Mardin, Konya ve İstanbul’da yürütmekte, ülke çapında geniş bir alana hitap etmektedir.

Global markalarla iş birliği kültürü, tüketici ürünlerinde marka güvenilirliği, güçlü kurumsal yönetim anlayışı ile faaliyette bulunduğumuz her alanda yüzümüz ileriye dönük… Sürdürülebilir kalite ve kurumsal yapımızı, yeniliğe ve ilerlemeye açık dinamik bir anlayışla zirveye taşımayı hedefliyoruz.

Description:
Honda Plaza Ayışığı, Altunizade'de 5 Mayıs 1997’de faaliyete başlamıştır. 

Eksiksiz hizmet anlayışı ile plaza bünyemizde bulunan grup şirketimiz Günışığı Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti. Honda ve diğer marka model araçlarınız için Trafik, Kasko, Konut, Dask, İşyeri ve Sağlık poliçeleri gibi bütün branşlarda “Acentenize Güvenin” sloganıyla yenilikçi ürün ve hizmet kalitesiyle sizlere destek vermektedir. 

28 Nisan 2007 yılında taşındığımız yeni plazamızda 7.000 m²’si kapalı alan, 4.000 m2’si açık alan olmak üzere 11.000 m2 alanda tüm teknik eğitim ve belgelere sahip yetişmiş kadromuzla Honda müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir. Firmamıza geldiğinizde genç, dinamik ve profesyonel ekibimizle Otomobil Satış, Servis, Yedek Parça, Sigorta ve 2. El Otomobil Satış hizmetlerinde Honda ruhunu ve keyfini yaşarsınız. 

Tüm hizmetlerimizi güler yüzle ve çözüm üreten bir anlayışla alırsınız. Honda Plaza Ayışığı günümüz bayilik sisteminin gereklerini ve profesyonel anlamda müşteri beklenti ve ihtiyaçlarını karşılayarak koşulsuz müşteri memnuniyeti konusunda başarılara imzasını atmıştır. 

1998 yılı Honda satışlarında Türkiye “Satış” Birinciliği, 1999 yılı İstanbul “Satış” Birinciliği, 2000 yılı İstanbul “Satış” Birinciliği, 2000 yılı “Servis Danışmanları” Birinciliği, 2004 “Yedek Parça” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2009 yılı “Müşteri Memnuniyeti” İstanbul Birinciliği, 2012 Honda Rüya Takımı “Otomobil FRR” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2014 yılı İstanbul “Satış” Birinciliği, 2015 yılı İstanbul “Satış” Birinciliği, 2015 Honda Rüya Takımı “Otomobil Boya Teknisyeni” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2017 HTR Bayi “NHC” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2018 “Yedek Parça” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2018 yılı Satış ve Satış Sonrası “Müşteri Memnuniyeti” İstanbul Birinciliği, 2018 Honda Rüya Takımı “Otomobil Yedek Parça Danışmanı” Türkiye Birinciliği, 2019, 2020 ve 2021 yılları İstanbul “Satış” Birinciliği, 2022 "Servis Müşteri Memnuniyeti" İstanbul Birinciliği ve 2022 Honda "Satış" Türkiye Birinciliği bu başarılarımız arasındadır.

De huidige tijd vraagt van uw als ondernemer het nodige aan flexibiliteit, maatwerk en het anticiperen op situaties in een voortdurend in beweging zijnde markt.  Als mobiliteitspartner adviseren wij u graag als het gaat om het beheer van uw wagenpark, voor nu en in de toekomst.

Wij van Smart Mobility Lease vinden een persoonlijk contact met onze opdrachtgevers een must en werken ook altijd met een vaste contactpersoon om de optimale samenwerking te waarborgen.

Door onze jarenlange ervaring en kennis zijn wij in staat u professioneel te adviseren en u een aanbod te doen dat geheel aan uw vraag voldoet.  

Of u nu op zoek bent naar een tijdelijke/kortdurende oplossing voor uw mobiliteitsprobleem of voor als u zoekende bent naar een mobiliteitsoplossing voor een langere periode, wij hebben de oplossing voor uw probleem.
Is er haast geboden ? Door onze flexibiliteit is het mogelijk dat u binnen 24 uur een passend in uw mailbox aantreft. Alle ondernemers zijn bij ons van harte welkom, de starter van nu is de ondernemer van de toekomst!

Name: Karahallılar A.Ş.
Description:
Veli Yolcu - Mahmut Yavuz ve Ortaklık kollektif şirketinin biyografisi firma ismini, kurucularının doğup, büyüdükleri yer olan UŞAK ilimizin, KARAHALLI ilçesinden almıştır. Kurucusu Veli Yolcu ve Mahmut Yavuz 1943 yılında Balıkesir`e gelip yerleşerek manifatura mesleği ile işe başlamışlardır. Çok zor şartlar altında piyasada yer edinip, ailelerin büyük çocukları olan Mevlüt Yolcu ve Ahmet Yavuz`un işe intikali ile gelişme göstermeye başlamış ve 1958 yılında kollektif şirkete dönüşürek dayanıklı tüketim malları pazarlamak üzere şube açmışlardır. 1950 de traktör satıcılığına başlamış olup 1965 den itibaren otomotiv alanına ağırlık verilmiştir. 1971 de Bursa yolu birinci kilometredeki servis hizmetleri binası hizmete sokulmuştur. Firma ortaklarının gayreti ile sürekli büyüme göstermiş, manifatura, dayanıklı eşya ticareti yanında otomotiv dalında çeşitli markalarla Marmara ve Ege Bölgesinde ismini duyurmuştur.

Karahallılar yukarıda bahsedilen iştigal konuları dışında 1952 de Akhisar`da zeytinyağı üretim işine başlamıştır. Karahallılar firması 1983 yılından günümüze kadar ortaklardan Mevlüt Yolcu`nun başkanlığında ödediği vergilerle birçok ödüller almıştır. Şu anda bünyesinde sürekli olarak 200 civarında personel istihdam etmekte olup zeytin kampanya zamanlarında bu sayı 300` e ulaşmaktadır. Kendi adını taşıyan 18 dershanelik bir ilköğretim okulunu Balıkesir Adnan Menderes Mahallesinde 1991 yılında inşa ettirerek Türk Milli Eğitimi`ne bağışlamıştır. Firma günümüzde 2 aileden oluşan Mevlüt Yolcu, Melih Yolcu, Murat Yolcu, Serdar Yolcu, Mahmut Akgün Yavuz, Mehmet Yavuz, Mert Yavuz, faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Name: Ritmo Chevrolet
Description:
Fundada em 2002 em Poços de Caldas, Minas Gerais, a Ritmo Chevrolet carrega uma história que se conecta ao universo automotivo desde os anos 1960. Hoje, com 5 concessionárias localizadas em Poços de Caldas, Alfenas, Andradas, Guaxupé e São Sebastião do Paraíso, somos referência em oferecer excelência nos produtos e serviços Chevrolet para o Sul de Minas.
Ao longo dessas duas décadas, temos nos dedicado incansavelmente à satisfação total de nossos clientes, investindo continuamente em infraestrutura, inovação e na capacitação de nossas equipes. Esse compromisso com a qualidade e a experiência do cliente nos rendeu, por 15 anos consecutivos, o título de Concessionário A, uma das mais altas distinções concedidas pela General Motors do Brasil.
Nosso foco é seguir evoluindo, consolidando nossa posição no mercado e fortalecendo a confiança na marca Chevrolet.

Name: Lastenrad B2B GmbH
Description:
Wir haben die größte Auswahl von Lastenräder für den gewerblichen Einsatz in Baden-Württemberg im Angebot. Unser Ziel ist es zu zeigen, dass Lastenräder DIE nachhaltige und praktische Lösung für den Klimaschutz und die Verkehrswende vor Ort sind!

Daher bieten wir passende Lösungen für jeden Einsatzzweck an, die vor Ort in Freiburg persönlich getestet werden können. Wir beraten gerne zu Vorteilen, Fördermöglichkeiten und welche Finanzierungsoptionen es gibt.

Elektro-Lastenräder (25 km/h), ausgestattet mit einem starken Motor und einer sicheren Transportbox, sind für den Transport von Waren und Gütern hervorragend geeignet. Gleichzeitig werden sie bei der Anschaffung eines Rades im Wert von bis zu 10.000 € mit 25% (max. 2.500 €) gefördert. 

Sie bieten folgende Vorteile:
- Hohe Flexibilität und Effizienz im Einsatz
- Lasten können ökologisch und ohne Stau transportiert werden
- Sie brauchen keinen Kraftstoff und verursachen kein CO2 und Lärm
- Emissionsfreie, platzsparende und sozial-ökologische Lösung
- Sie brauchen kein Kennzeichen, keine Versicherung und keinen Führerschein

Name: Leapmotor Ecuador
Description:
Leapmotor es una empresa de vehículos eléctricos inteligentes impulsada por la tecnología con una gama completa de capacidades de investigación y desarrollo. 

Fundada en 2015, Leapmotor tiene su sede en Hangzhou, China, y tiene una presencia global con oficinas en los Estados Unidos, Europa y Japón. En 2022, Leapmotor entregó un total de 111.168 vehículos, lo que supone un crecimiento interanual del 154%.

Leapmotor está representada en Ecuador por Autofenix S.A., una empresa que tiene más de 20 años de trayectoria en el mercado automotriz ecuatoriano. 
Autofenix se especializa en la distribución de vehículos y en la oferta de servicios integrales de posventa. Tiene como propósito ofrecer a sus clientes la mejor experiencia posible antes, durante y después de la compra.

Name: Tyresoles do Brasil
Description:
Revendedor oficial de pneus Goodyear.

O mundo começava a respirar as consequências da guerra fria quando, em 26 de março de 1952, nascia a empresa Tyresoles de Sergipe Indústria e Serviços S/A. Fundada pelo senhor Walter de Oliveira Mesquita, presidente e diretor da empresa, a Tyresoles acompanhou o avanço da economia e, com o passar do tempo, várias mudanças significativas aconteceram. O consequente aumento no quadro de funcionários, aliado à mudança nos hábitos de trabalho, proporcionaram excelência no atendimento aos clientes e maior capacitação profissional aos colaboradores. Em dezembro de 1991, a empresa que era S/A, passa a ser uma Sociedade por Quotas de Responsabilidade LTDA, com a denominação de Tyresoles de Sergipe Indústria Comércio e Serviços Ltda.
  
   Prezando sempre pela qualidade e versatilidade, a Tyresoles buscou novos investimentos e em Maio de 1993, decorrente da incorporação da empresa, o posto Auto Car transforma-se em Posto Tyresoles, tornando-se filial no ramo de atividades do comércio de vendas de combustível e lubrificante. Vivenciando o eminente processo de globalização, a empresa abre filiais em Nossa Senhora do Socorro, Estância, Itabaiana, Lagarto, Paulo Afonso e Alagoinhas, posicionando-se de maneira efetiva no mercado e oferecendo sempre produtos e serviços com ótimo padrão de qualidade.
  
   Atualmente, a empresa busca investimentos conscientes, aliando avanço econômico e causas ambientais.

Name: Schneider Gruppe
Description:
Die Schneider Gruppe ist ein dynamisches Familienunternehmen mit einer starken Präsenz im Sächsisch-Bayerischen Städtenetz. Unser engagiertes Team von über 500 Mitarbeitenden ist seit über 45 Jahren leidenschaftlich dem Automobil verschrieben. 

Wir bieten unseren Kunden ein großes Portfolio an Fahrzeugen und Services, darunter die Marken Renault, Dacia, Alpine, SEAT, CUPRA, Mazda und Land Rover. Wohnmobil- und Reisemobilinteressierte profitieren seit über 10 Jahren von einem breiten Spektrum verschiedenster Kauf- & Mietangeboten.

Unser Ziel ist es, unseren Kundinnen und Kunden die beste Beratung und den besten Service zu bieten. Wir wollen ein führender Anbieter im Automobilbereich in Deutschland sein und unseren Beitrag zur Mobilität der Zukunft leisten.  

Unseren Mitarbeitenden bieten wir ein Arbeitsumfeld mit attraktiven Vorteilen und Sozialleistungen, sowie vielfältigen Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten. Nach 2022 und 2023 wurden wir in diesem Jahr zum dritten Mal in Folge mit der KUNUNU TOP COMPANY Trophäe ausgezeichnet und sind so Teil der am besten bewerteten 5% aller Unternehmen auf der bedeutsamsten Arbeitgeberplattform in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz. Wir sind ein Unternehmen, das sich stetig weiterentwickelt, neue Herausforderungen sucht und freuen uns darauf, die Erfolgsgeschichte gemeinsam mit unseren Mitarbeitenden fortzusetzen.

Name: CarPrice
Description:
Founded in 2014, CarPrice is a technology startup based in Moscow, known for its robust online auction platform that efficiently facilitates transactions between private car sellers and professional buyers. CarPrice innovative platform ensures a transparent, secure, and efficient marketplace, enhancing liquidity in the used car market across Russia.

For Sellers: CarPrice simplifies the car selling process. Sellers can easily bring their cars for a comprehensive evaluation, including a legal check and standardized technical inspection. The detailed report is then uploaded to their auction platform, where registered buyers place competitive bids. Sellers are presented with the highest bid and can choose to accept or reject the offer without any obligation.

For Buyers: CarPrice provides a reliable and continuous source of varied inventory, making it a preferred buying channel for professional buyers. Access to the platform and transaction facilitation comes with a minimal fee, ensuring a high-quality buying experience.

CarPrice has been recognized for its innovative approach, including the development of a new C2B2C tool that assists customers in purchasing cars for resale. In 2024, Forbes ranked CarPrice as the 15th most valuable internet company in Russia, a testament to their impact and success in the digital marketplace.

"At CarPrice, we are committed to bringing transparency to the Russian automobile market. It's a challenging journey, but we have started by revolutionizing the car selling process. Our goal is to ensure that every transaction is clear, fair, and beneficial for all parties involved."
Matthieu Lannegrand CarPrice CEO

Name: SuperVettura
Description:
SuperVettura is the official UK dealer for Koenigsegg and are specialists in the international sale of rare hypercars and exclusive supercars.

We are proud to represent and have one of the longest standing partnerships with Koenigsegg. From those early days of the CC8S model to the now iconic status of the Jesko, SuperVettura has been part of the evolutionary journey and the team have been instrumental in Koenigsegg sales, helping the brand to grow into the largest and most successful marketplace in the world; the United Kingdom. We have unmatched records of sales both here in the UK and internationally and also boast the largest collection of pre-owned Koenigsegg examples in the world!

Our showroom has been a prominent car dealership for over 100 Years in Sunningdale, near Ascot, a populous village with a retail area of boutique specialist shops, wine bars, cafe’s and restaurants in the Royal Borough of Windsor and Maidenhead. It takes up the extreme south-east corner of Berkshire, UK. Surrounded by leafy pastures Sunningdale is also well-known within the golfing world for its own outstanding Golf Club and neighbouring Wentworth Golf Club. SuperVettura is located on London Road conveniently opposite London Road Car Park. Coworth Park Hotel is only minutes away along with other local places of interest including the world famous Ascot Racecourse, Guards Polo Club, Virginia Water Lake, Wentworth Club and Windsor Great Park.

Name: Porsche Centrum Kraków

Name: Aunsbjerg A/S
Description:
Hos Aunsbjerg pakker vi det hele ind på den gode måde. Med tryghed, tillid og service

Aunsbjerg er et bilhus med afdelinger i Kolding, Horsens & Aarhus. Vi sælger flere bilmærker og er autoriseret værksted for udvalgte mærker. Vores mission er at være bilhuset, hvor du altid får den fulde pakke – uanset om du er på udkig efter en nyere eller brugt bil – eller en god servicepakke.

Faktisk er service vores primære produkt. Vores service er at yde den rette rådgivning, at trække på vores store viden og erfaring i forbindelse med at anskaffe den helt rigtige bil til dig og din økonomi. Og når du endelig har fundet din drømmebil, sørger vi for at holde dig kørende med den rette servicepakke, originale reservedele og faguddannet personale, der er specialister i den bil, du har købt hos os.

Hos Aunsbjerg er vi vilde med biler – det falder os helt naturligt. Vores mål er at være et af landets dygtigste bilhuse med service i absolut topklasse. Derfor går vi også meget op i at uddanne vores folk løbende i de forskellige bilmærker og modeller. Både vores bilrådgivere og mekanikere har masser af viden og erfaring inden for de mærker, vi udbyder og servicerer. Du er derfor sikker på at få den bedst muligt betjening, når du anskaffer din nye bil eller skal have råd og vejledning vedr. reparation og servicepakker.

Name: HPA MOTORS
Description:
C’est en 2018 que Pierre Cave, décide de créer HPA Motors : un site web de passionnés, qui met en relation acheteurs et vendeurs autour d’autos exceptionnelles : des voitures de sport, de collection, ou de course, dénichées aux quatre coins du monde.

Pour le jeune pilote (Pierre est vice champion de France en Formule Renault avec l’écurie LAMO RACING CAR), il s’agissait d’une suite logique : « Je consacre ma vie au sport auto : de par mon activité de pilote, j’ai développé un solide réseau de passionnés à travers le monde. Il m’a paru logique de mettre en relation tout ce petit monde autour d’une passion commune : collectionneurs, acheteurs, vendeurs ou encore experts autos ».
En confiant la vente ou l’achat de votre auto à HPA Motors, vous bénéficiez ainsi des conseils d’experts et de passionnés  avant tout, qui privilégient la qualité au « volume ».

« Nous ne sommes pas de simples « vendeurs autos » : nous mettons notre réseau et nos compétences au service de nos clients. Nous avons une approche personnalisée, chaque client et chaque auto est unique et nous sommes davantage dans le conseil et le service que dans la transaction. »

Name: AUTOBRITT
Description:
Autobritt – L'excellence automobile depuis 1968
Fondé en 1968 par Jean-Jacques Thuner, pilote de rallye reconnu, Autobritt s’est imposé comme un acteur incontournable dans la vente et l’entretien de véhicules d’exception à Genève. Depuis plus de 50 ans, la famille Thuner continue de faire vivre cette passion automobile à travers un service haut de gamme et un savoir-faire unique.

 Nos spécialités : Jaguar, Land Rover, Volvo, Lotus et Morgan
Autobritt est aujourd’hui structuré autour de trois entités complémentaires :
- Autobritt SA : Située aux Acacias, cette concession historique représente les marques Jaguar, Land Rover, Lotus et Morgan.
- Autobritt Automobiles SA : Situé également aux Acacias, juste en face d'Autobritt SA, ce site est dédié à l’univers de Volvo, emblème de sécurité et d’innovation suédoise.
- Autobritt Grand-Pré SA : Installée sur la Rive Droite, au-dessus de la gare Cornavin, cette structure accueille également les marques Jaguar, Land Rover et Volvo.

 Services & Expertise
Chez Autobritt, nous vous proposons :
- Des pièces détachées d'origine et des accessoires officiels pour toutes les marques que nous représentons.
- Un service après-vente hautement qualifié, assuré par des techniciens, mécaniciens et carrossiers régulièrement formés aux dernières technologies des constructeurs.
- Un accueil personnalisé et une écoute attentive à chaque étape de votre expérience client.

 Autobritt, une grande famille à votre service
Depuis plus de cinq décennies, notre engagement reste le même : offrir une qualité de service irréprochable, dans le respect des valeurs familiales et de la tradition suisse.

 3 adresses à Genève – 1 passion commune : l’automobile de prestige.

Name: Yacht Network By United City Yachts
Description:
Yacht Network by United City Yachts, is North America’s premier full-service yacht brokerage, offering local expertise with international reach. With offices and broker coverage spanning Toronto, Kingston, Montreal, Vancouver, Vancouver Island, Kelowna, Lake Simcoe, Southwestern Ontario, Ottawa, New York, Michigan, Massachusetts, North Carolina, and Ohio, we connect buyers and sellers across Canada, the United States, and beyond.

We know the yacht markets across the continent and more importantly, we have the relationships to move yachts anywhere: across provinces, across states, to the U.S., the Caribbean, and overseas. While many brokers focus only on their local listings, we specialize in cross-market connections, giving buyers access to an unparalleled selection of quality sail and power yachts, and giving sellers maximum exposure to serious prospects from multiple regions.

Our experienced brokers combine deep market knowledge with a multi-channel marketing strategy, ensuring your yacht is seen by the right audience whether through online platforms, targeted advertising, boat shows, or our extensive broker network. We handle every detail of the process, from valuation and marketing to negotiations, contracts, financing, insurance, and post-sale support.

Our mission is to be the first choice for pre-owned yacht buyers and sellers across North America by promoting the yachting lifestyle, delivering exceptional before-and-after-sale care, and leveraging a professional network committed to results. Whether you’re selling your current vessel or searching for the boat of your dreams, we invite you to experience the difference of working with a brokerage that lives and breathes boats—locally, nationally, and internationally.

Avrupa standatlarındaki pazarlama ve servis kalitesiyle hizmet veren Yiğitler Motorlu Araçlar A.Ş Türkiye pazarında taşımacılık sektörünün sorunları ile yakından ilgilenmek ve efektif çözümler üretmek üzere  2021 yılının ikinci çeyreğinde sektöre giriş yapmıştır.

Name: AUTO ONE GROUP
Description:
With locations in Toronto and Vancouver, the Auto One Group is “Solutions Driven” and has grown into one of Canada’s largest and most customer-focused automotive leasing companies. We are committed to building sustainable relationships based on transparency and respect while offering a range of custom in-house leasing options. We also offer a wide range of complimentary services including; used vehicle sales, vehicle service, vehicle sourcing, and commercial leasing. 

Our highly experienced leasing representatives possess industry leading knowledge and take a consultative approach. Simply put, we work directly with our clients to create a custom solution for their unique needs and financial situation regardless if its personal lease, business lease or commercial lease. These values extend to our in-house administration staff who take pride in directly assisting clients throughout the entire lease process.

Our used vehicle inventory ranges from luxury and exotic vehicles to commercial trucks and cargo vans. Every unit we have in stock undergoes a rigorous 140 point inspection and is priced competitively on the market meaning there is no better place to find a premium used vehicle in the Toronto or Vancouver markets. If we do not have a specific vehicle in stock, we can leverage our extensive network to source the exact vehicle on a client’s behalf. 

Our operations are supported by Corpfinance International Limited, a Toronto based Investment Bank, who's many years of industry expertise and management affords us the ability to ensure the best sales and leasing experience possible for our customers.

No company could be more passionate about listening to, and serving its customers. Name: Autobedrijf Broere
Description:
Automobielbedrijf P. en D. Broere is een modern autobedrijf dat Citroën vertegenwoordigt in de Krimpenerwaard en omstreken. U kunt bij ons terecht voor alles wat u van een modern autobedrijf mag verwachten. In onze showroom vindt u de nieuwste Citroën modellen. Daarnaast bieden wij altijd een uitgebreide keuze occasions van alle merken aan. Ons bedrijf is een hecht familiebedrijf dat al sinds de jaren vijftig van de vorige eeuw gevestigd is aan de Lekdijk aan de rand van Krimpen aan den IJssel.

In onze werkplaats kunt u terecht voor onderhoud, reparaties, APK keuringen en schadeherstel aan uw auto. Natuurlijk kunt u voor zaken als navigatie en accessoires ook terecht bij Automobielbedrijf P. en D. Broere B.V.
 
Wij zijn bijna 60 uur per week geopend om u altijd zo goed mogelijk van dienst te kunnen zijn. Ook buiten deze uren zijn we natuurlijk beschikbaar via de 24-uurs service Citroën Assistance. Ons kleine, vaste en vertrouwde team helpt u zes dagen per week graag verder. Persoonlijke aandacht staat hierbij centraal.
 
Kortom: jarenlange (Citroën-)ervaring en vertrouwde service in een moderne en persoonlijke omgeving! Voor een ruimere kennismaking bent u van harte welkom in onze showroom en werkplaats aan de Lekdijk in Krimpen aan den IJssel. De koffie staat altijd klaar!

Now three dealerships strong with nearly 200 employees, Mauer is a business and civic leader. We operate around five core values: Respect, Integrity, Drive, Community and Fun. Name: Müller-Gruppe
Description:
Die Müller-Gruppe – Wir schaffen Lösungen für Ihren Fuhrpark

Unser Familienunternehmen ist seit seiner Gründung 1957 in Losheim am See kontinuierlich gewachsen. Mit mittlerweile achtzehn Autohäusern in Rheinland-Pfalz und im Saarland zählt unsere Unternehmensgruppe zu den größten Autohaus-Gruppen Deutschlands. Heute beschäftigten wir bei der Müller-Gruppe über 300 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter und stehen für Kompetenz, Qualität und Kundennähe.

Unsere Markenvielfalt

An unseren Standorten in Losheim am See, Dillingen, Saarlouis, Lebach, St. Wendel, Trier und Simmern vertreten wir die Marken BMW, MINI, Škoda, Mazda, Peugeot, Opel und Leapmotor. Diese breite Modellpalette ermöglicht es uns, sowohl Privatkunden als auch Geschäftskunden eine maßgeschneiderte Lösung anzubieten.

Leistungen für Geschäftskunden

Mit unserem "Müller-Gruppe | BUSINESS PARTNER"-Programm unterstützen wir Unternehmen dabei, ihre Fuhrparks optimal zu gestalten. Von einzelnen Dienstfahrzeugen bis hin zum kompletten Flottenmanagement entwickeln wir Lösungen, die exakt auf die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden abgestimmt sind:

> Optimierte Leasing- und Finanzierungsangebote
> Maßgeschneiderter Service
> Komplette Fuhrpark- und Schadenmanagement-Lösungen
> Elektromobilitätskonzepte mit PKWs und Nutzfahrzeugen

Warum zur Müller-Gruppe?

 Einfache Abläufe – direkte Kommunikation mit Ihren Fahrern
 Persönliche Betreuung – feste Ansprechpartner in jeder Filiale
 Verantwortungsbewusstsein – E-Mobilität & Plug-in Hybride als nachhaltige Ergänzung
 Zuverlässigkeit – termintreue und fristgerechte Abwicklung inkl. Abhol- & Bringservice
 Hilfe im Schadensfall – professionelles Schadenmanagement & große Ersatzwagenflotte

Unser Versprechen

„Qualität, Service und Kundennähe sind die Basis unseres Denkens. Mit uns haben Sie einen starken, kompetenten und zuverlässigen Partner an Ihrer Seite.“
– Joachim Müller, Geschäftsführer der Müller-Gruppe

Name: McLaren San Francisco
Description:
MCLAREN SAN FRANCISCO - BRINGING THE MAGIC OF MCLAREN TO NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

If you are looking for the perfect driver’s car – one that feels comfortable and inspires confidence from the moment you sit in it – come test drive a McLaren. You’ll find exhilarating performance in the real world, a true, linear connection between every driver action and vehicle reaction…accented with the latest in-car entertainment, communication and navigation technology.  McLaren is a genuine, no-compromise, high-performance sports car. Powerful and efficient, comfortable and exhilarating, with a compact exterior and a spacious interior. In short, McLaren vehicles unite qualities that were once thought to be mutually exclusive.

By designing the entire model range around a carbon fiber chassis, McLaren has created a strong, safe and lightweight race-inspired core. They then design an innovative suspension system that uniquely combines agile handling and remarkable road-holding with the ride comfort of a luxury sedan. A powerful, tractable and refined engine, mated to a double-clutch Seamless Shift Gearbox gives all McLarens a huge breadth of ability. And the sophisticated electronic control systems governing the suspension, transmission, brakes and even the aerodynamics, deliver maximum control, minimal intervention and total exhilaration.

Call us at 650-352-8660 to set up your test drive today. We are open from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 pm Monday through Saturday, closed Sundays.

Name: Groupe Leclair
Description:
Le Groupe Leclair, c’est avant tout une histoire de passion pour l’automobile qui perdure depuis trois générations. L’entreprise familiale, qui emploie plus de 450 personnes, compte cinq concessions automobiles franchisées dans le Grand Montréal, regroupant les bannières Honda, Hyundai et Subaru, de même que deux centres d’occasion (Occasion Rive-Nord et Occasion Chomedey), deux centres de collision (Carrosseries C.A. et Centre de collision Rive-Nord), une  division de crédit spécialisé, Crédit Vite Vite, ainsi qu’une division d’achat de véhicules, AutoGoGo.ca, dont les succursales se trouvent à Laval, Longueuil et Québec. Le Groupe a également été sélectionné pour opérer l’une des trois premières concessions Liteborne de la province, Liteborne Laval, dont l’ouverture officielle est prévue plus tard cette année. 

Des installations à la fine pointe de la technologie jumelées à un personnel compétent, courtois et heureux sont les clés du succès pour le Groupe Leclair, chez qui le travail d’équipe prime depuis maintenant plus d’un demi-siècle. Par ailleurs, la Fondation Famille Leclair s'engage à redonner à sa communauté en soutenant annuellement de nombreux organismes aux missions toutes aussi nobles et importantes les unes que les autres. À travers cinq grands axes, soit la lutte contre la pauvreté, l’intégration sociale, la santé et les saines habitudes de vie, le respect de la diversité et les arts et culture, le Groupe Leclair se fait un devoir de contribuer, à sa façon, au bien-être de notre collectivité et à l'avancement de notre société.

Ziel aller unserer Bemühungen ist die vollständige Kundenzufriedenheit.

Kundenorientierung
Eine persönliche, ausgerichtete Kundenbeziehung steht für uns im Zentrum. Der Kunde hat für all seine Anliegen einen kompetenten Ansprechpartner. Unsere Arbeit schafft Nutzen für den Kunden und dient nicht einem Selbstzweck.

Fachwissen und Weiterbildung
Unser Fachwissen passen wir laufend den neusten Technologien und Modellen an. Laufende Weiterbildung ist für uns eine Selbstverständlichkeit. Wir sind ständig bestrebt, unsere Erfahrung sowie unser aktuelles Wissen und Können im Sinne einer direkten Kundenorientierung durch gelebtes Qualitätsmanagement abzusichern. 

Qualität und Professionalität
Als BMW- , BMW i-Service und MINI Service-Händler unterstellen wir uns einem regelmässigen Qualitätsaudit, das wir bereits an beiden Standorten erfolgreich bestanden haben. Damit verpflichten wir uns für Qualität, Qualitätssicherung sowie für Professionalität.

Integrität und Vertrauen
Integrität und die Einhaltung ethischer Grundsätze stehen bei uns an oberster Stelle. Zusammen mit unserer Kompetenz schaffen wir dadurch Vertrauen bei unseren Kunden. 

Als unsere Kundin und unser Kunde sollen Sie zu der Überzeugung gelangen, in der Auto Steiner AG Gommiswald + Rapperswil-Jona einen verlässlichen Partner mit einem umfangreichen Leistungsangebot zu haben.

Rui Rijo começou cedo a trabalhar com o pai num Stand, mas também cedo se lançou por conta própria! A paixão pelos carros não deixou margem para dúvida que a sua vida estaria ligada a eles! 30 anos de experiência no comércio automóvel comprovam o profissionalismo que presta no serviço de venda e pós-venda. O crescimento sustentável foi sempre uma preocupação, pelo que a evolução da marca tem sido sempre ponderada e assertiva. Por esse motivo Rijo não … apenas um nome, e sim o Gerente da empresa RUI RIJO Lda, com uma vasta equipa de profissionais que vão da área comercial e administrativa, bem como já que a garantia total é dada pela empresa, esta é apoiada por pessoas competentes nas áreas

Name: ADF Automobiles
Description:
Après plus de 15 ans passés en concession, Antony Deronzier fonde une première société en Suisse en 2022, ADS-Collection, toujours en activité. Puis il décide de créer ADF Automobiles afin de mettre son expérience et son professionnalisme au service d'une clientèle de proximité, qui souhaite collaborer avec une personne de confiance pour la recherche de leur futur véhicule.
Basée en à Chilly (74270) en Haute-Savoie, ADF Automobiles propose de nombreux véhicules disponibles rapidement, pour les particuliers et les professionnels. La société offre également des solutions de financement adaptées aux demandes des clients, des garanties ainsi qu'un contrôle mécanique complet sur chaque véhicule.
De plus, ADF Automobiles apporte un accompagnement à la vente pour toute personne qui souhaite vendre sa voiture au meilleur prix, en toute sécurité.

Name: Lexus Liverpool

Welcome to Lexus Liverpool located on Rimrose Road, Bootle in Liverpool.

Name: All-State Ford
Description:
At All-State Ford Truck Sales, we specialize in providing businesses with the right Ford commercial vehicles to keep operations running smoothly. From F-Series trucks and Super Duty models to Transit vans and work-ready fleet solutions, we help companies of all sizes optimize their fleet with vehicles built for reliability, efficiency, and performance.

Our team is dedicated to making fleet purchasing simple and cost-effective. We offer tailored financing options, expert guidance, and a service team that ensures your vehicles stay front-line ready. Whether you’re expanding your delivery fleet, upgrading construction vehicles, or outfitting a new business, we partner with you to find solutions that save time, reduce costs, and keep your business moving forward.

Why businesses choose All-State Ford Truck Sales:
- Expert commercial vehicle guidance
- Flexible financing and fleet solutions
-Full-service support for maintenance and reliability
- A trusted partner for growing businesses in Kentuckiana.

Follow our page to see fleet success stories, new inventory updates, and insights to help your business get the most out of your commercial vehicles.

Name: Fine Car Company
Description:
Running auctions around the clock and around the world, Fine Car Company has become the go-to place for sellers looking to find the perfect buyer for their one-of-a-kind car. We pride ourselves on our cutting-edge, innovative technology that makes the auction process simple and seamless for buyers and sellers alike.

Combining our smart platform with high-quality photography and expert catalogue listings, we have created an immersive, reliable and transparent experience for both buyers and sellers.

Every listing is supported by our dedicated team of experts. Most importantly, we showcase each car’s unique attributes. With fast results and no selling fees, welcome to a smarter way of selling your car.

Name: Lumiere Veiculos
Description:
A Lumière Veículos, que desde 2001 é representado pela Citroën, acaba de ganhar um reforço de peso: a Peugeot, que agora também faz parte do nosso time.
Isso significa que toda a estrutura, equipe e excelência de serviços oferecidos exclusivamente a clientes Citroën, agora também passam a atender quem tem ou quer ter um Peugeot.
Essa chegada vem num momento de celebração para o grupo: em 2022, completamos 21 anos de atividades.
Ah, e falando em aniversário, é regra que o aniversariante faça um discurso. Lá vai o nosso:
Nós da Lumière Veículos, assumimos o compromisso em continuar sempre próximos aos nossos clientes, mantendo a relação de confiança e qualidade nos serviços prestados. Nosso desejo e metas para o futuro são os mesmos que nos pautam hoje: deixar nossos clientes felizes por terem escolhido rodar com a gente. Aos clientes Citroën, nosso muito obrigado pela confiança. Vocês foram vitais para atingirmos essas conquistas.
Aos clientes Peugeot, sejam bem-vindos à festa.
Vermelhos e azuis: Vamos bater um bolão juntos.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Dubois Trucks
Description:
CAMIONS DUBOIS – YOUR TRUSTED DEALER
Camions Dubois is a family business that has been in the heavy truck business for over 30 years. We specialize in the sale of trucks and used parts of all makes. A major player in the heavy vehicle industry, we sell our trucks as well as our parts (engines, transmissions, differentials and others) locally, nationally and internationally.

Camions Dubois is also a rebuild shop for all makes of engines. Specialized and experienced mechanics are always able to install engines, transmissions and all other parts. Whether it’s for an installation or a repair, we offer you a personalized quality service, efficient and at a fair price in our two mechanical workshops.

Even more, Camions Dubois is also the specialist in watering trucks! We can provide you with the most complete and functional watering equipment, adapted to your needs, and all this installed on the vehicle of your choice. In addition to sales, we are proud to offer short and medium-term rental services for our watering trucks. Exclusive distributor in Canada of United Water Trucks water transportation and watering equipment, we have a vast inventory of watering parts on site.

Name: OtomRacing
Description:
Otom Racing | Revolucionamos la forma de moverte

Somos una empresa ecuatoriana apasionada por la movilidad inteligente y accesible. En Otom Racing creemos que cada persona merece una moto confiable, con garantía real, respaldo permanente y el mejor precio del mercado.

Ofrecemos una experiencia integral: venta de motos multimarca, servicios técnicos especializados, financiamiento directo con Crediotom, seguros con Otom Protec, compra programada con Otom Plan y asesoría personalizada en cada paso del camino.

Con talleres en Quito, Cuenca y Santo Domingo, más de 100.000 seguidores en redes sociales y una comunidad creciente de riders, somos líderes en servicio, innovación y atención al cliente.

Nos estamos expandiendo, estamos creciendo y buscamos aliados, talentos y profesionales que compartan nuestra visión: transformar la movilidad en Ecuador desde la confianza, la tecnología y la cercanía.

 #MotoEsOtom #MovilidadInteligente #OtomRacing

Name: European Prestige UK
Description:
European Prestige has successfully traded in the highest quality performance and luxury cars from both Ireland and UK locations.

Founded in Ireland 8 years ago, the more recently established UK arm of the business has rapidly developed through organic growth and acquired a loyal global customer base who appreciate the quality of our stock and our commitment to the highest levels of customer service.

From our 20,000 square foot showroom outside London, we typically hold a range of performance and luxury cars from manufacturers including Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, McLaren, Bentley, Mercedes-Benz and Range Rover. We specialise in Supercars, only dealing in those with low mileage, desirable specifications and presented in pristine condition. The majority of cars we sell come with a manufacturer’s warranty balance and will stand the most rigorous of independent inspections.

It should be noted that we physically own the stock that we retail and only occasionally represent a car on consignment if it can meet our demanding standards of presentation and provenance.

The founder John, started dealing in cars 15 years ago, importing special limited edition models into Ireland and after commercially successful stints in Australia, came to England to establish the business to focus on the supply of the most exclusive, special, prestige cars at the higher end of the market.

If we do not currently stock the exact car you are looking for, we have an established network of partners throughout Europe to source any Supercar. We are keen cash buyers of the highest quality vehicles similar to those that we sell and can make instant decisions, with payment in 24 hours, in addition to handling collection and delivery.

We are open 7 days a week and can host visits at our showroom by appointment. We look forward to demonstrating the quality of our stock and providing insight into how our business has become synonymous with the highest standards of integrity and customer service.

Name: Daytona Automobil
Description:
Daytona Automobil specializes in sourcing and trading rare, high-value automobiles for collectors, investors, and enthusiasts worldwide. With a deep understanding of the market and a passion for exceptional cars, we navigate the evolving landscape of automotive investments, always staying ahead of trends.  

Our business model is built on discretion, expertise, and an international network of trusted partners. We operate with a strong focus on off-market transactions, securing exclusive opportunities for our clients before they reach the open market. Whether it is modern hypercars, classic icons, or limited-production exotics, we ensure that every car meets the highest standards of provenance, originality, and quality.  

Beyond buying and selling, we provide tailored advisory services, guiding clients on acquisitions, sales strategies, and investment potential. Our approach is data-driven, leveraging historical trends and current market insights to help clients make informed decisions.  

At Daytona Automobil, we believe that extraordinary cars deserve extraordinary service. Our team handles each transaction with precision and professionalism, ensuring seamless logistics, financing solutions, and global delivery.  

With a track record of handling some of the world’s most desirable automobiles, we do not just trade cars—we create opportunities.

Name: Peak Auto Auctions
Description:
At Peak Auto Auctions we’re redefining the way vehicles are bought and sold through our online auto auction platform, purpose-built for towing companies, dealerships, and salvage yards.

We specialize in the sale of abandoned vehicles, surplus inventory, and salvage units, offering a fast, compliant, and transparent solution for sellers—and a trusted source of inventory for buyers.

What sets us apart? No hidden fees and one simple, flat buyer premium. Our goal is to make the auction process as seamless and predictable as possible—for everyone on the lot or behind the screen.

Whether you're clearing space, sourcing inventory, or streamlining your operations, we’re here to help move metal with integrity.

Name: LotSync.AI
Description: "For too long, dealerships have been forced to cobble together multiple systems to manage their inventory lifecycle – multiple sources for appraisals, another for management, and yet another for advertising. This fragmented approach not only wastes time but also creates costly inconsistencies. We built LotSync to solve this fundamental problem. Our platform unifies every inventory touchpoint under one roof, while our AI technology continuously learns and adapts to each dealership's unique operations. The result is a seamless system that not only streamlines workflows but actually gets smarter and more accurate over time. This is the future of dealership operations – one platform, zero compromises." Andy Short, Founder & CEO

Name: GH Autos
Description:
Bienvenidos a GH Autos, su destino de confianza para la compra y venta de vehículos premium.

En GH Autos, nos especializamos en ofrecer una selección exclusiva de automóviles nacionales e importados de las marcas más prestigiosas del mercado, incluyendo Audi, Volkswagen, Mercedes-Benz, BMW y Porsche. Nuestro compromiso es proporcionar a nuestros clientes una experiencia de compra y venta segura y profesional, destacándonos por la calidad y la excelencia en cada transacción.

Para garantizar su tranquilidad y confianza, ofrecemos un año de garantía en todos nuestros vehículos, respaldando así la fiabilidad y el estado óptimo de cada automóvil. Además, facilitamos la adquisición de su vehículo soñado con opciones de financiación flexibles, adaptadas a sus necesidades y presupuesto.

Si busca un modelo específico que no tenemos en stock, también ofrecemos un servicio exclusivo de tráenos tu coche por encargo. Nuestro equipo se encargará de localizar y traer el vehículo que desea, garantizando que cumpla con sus expectativas en cuanto a características y condición.

Con un equipo de expertos apasionados por el mundo del automovilismo y una red de proveedores cuidadosamente seleccionada, garantizamos que cada vehículo en nuestro inventario cumpla con los más altos estándares de rendimiento, seguridad y lujo. Desde la rigurosa inspección técnica hasta el asesoramiento personalizado, cada paso en el proceso de compra o venta está diseñado para ofrecerle tranquilidad y satisfacción total.

En GH Autos, entendemos que adquirir un vehículo premium es una inversión importante y personal. Por ello, nos esforzamos por brindar un servicio transparente y profesional, asegurando que cada cliente reciba la atención y el respaldo que merece.

Confíe en nosotros para encontrar el vehículo perfecto que se ajuste a sus necesidades y expectativas.

Name: Jyväskylän Autotarvike -konserni
Description:
Vuonna 1942 perustettu Jyväskylän Autotarvike Oy on osa R. Ruth -konsernia, jonka emoyhtiö R. Ruth Oy osti vuonna 1963. R. Ruth Oy on Robert Ruthin vuonna 1883 perustama sukuyritys, jonka omistavat nykyään hänen jälkeläisensä ja heidän perhepiirinsä. Konsernimme työllistää tällä hetkellä keskimäärin n. 200 henkilöä.

Meillä on autokauppaliiketoimintaa Jyväskylässä, Mikkelissä ja Savonlinnassa ja edustamamme automerkit ovat Volkswagen, Volkswagen Hyötyautot, Audi, SEAT, CUPRA ja Hyundai. Olemme Suomen vanhin Volkswagen-jälleenmyyjä.

Meillä on Jyväskylässä kaksi autoliiketoimipaikkaa; Aholaidantiellä toimii Volkswagenin ja Audin henkilöautomyynti sekä Volkswagen hyötyautomyynti (uudet ja käytetyt), kattavine huolto- ja varaosapalveluineen. Sen lisäksi Aholaidantiellä toimii myös SEATin ja CUPRAn huolto- ja varaosapalvelut. Sorastajantiellä palvelevat SEAT-, CUPRA-, Hyundai-myynti ja vaihtoautokeskus sekä Volkswagen Direct Express- ja Hyundai-huoltokorjaamot. 

Savilahden Auto Oy on Jyväskylän Autotarvike Oy:n tytäryhtiö, joka toimii Mikkelissä Volkswagenin ja SEATin jälleenmyyjänä kaikkine palveluineen ja tarjoaa lisäksi Audin huoltoedustuksen ja täydet varaosapalvelut sekä vastaa konsernin vaihtoautokaupasta Mikkelin alueella. Savilahden Auto Oy Savonlinna on Savilahden Auto Oy:n tytäryhtiö, joka toimii Savonlinnassa Volkswagenin jälleenmyyjänä. Myös täältä löytyvät Volkswagenin ja SEATin täydet huolto- ja varaosapalvelut sekä vaihtoautomyynti.

Name: Wadowscy Campery
Description:
Wadowscy to firma rodzinna, założona przez mojego ojca, Józefa Wadowskiego, w 1971 roku w Krakowie. Od początku istnienia jej działalność jest związana z motoryzacją. Zajmujemy się przede wszystkim sprzedażą nowych samochodów marek Volvo i Kia, a także samochodów używanych wszystkich marek. Prowadzimy pełna obsługę posprzedażną, sprzedaż produktów finansowych i ubezpieczeń oraz akcesoriów i części zamiennych.
Odkąd sięgam pamięcią, pasja podróżowania, poznawania nowych miejsc i aktywnego wypoczynku, czyli po prostu caravaning, jest obecny w życiu naszej rodziny. Postanowiłem podzielić się swoim doświadczeniem i zainteresowaniami z przyjaciółmi naszej firmy. Kilka lat temu po raz pierwszy wynajęliśmy naszego prywatnego campera. Jak pokazały następne miesiące, zainteresowanie nową ofertą firmy przeszło nasze najśmielsze oczekiwania! W 2005 r. rozpoczęliśmy sprzedaż pojazdów campingowych pod szyldem Wadowscy Campery.
Zapraszamy do naszych placówek w Gaju k/Krakowa (ul. Myślenicka 7) oraz w Jankach k/Warszawy (ul. Mszczonowska 24).

Pozdrawiam serdecznie
Paweł Wadowski

Nasza oferta obejmuje sprzedaż, serwis i komis camperów oraz przyczep campingowych od najlepszych producentów: Affinitym, Dethleffs, Hymer, Knaus, Laika, Sunlight i Weinsberg.

Sierra is the sole auction outlet for seized vehicles from the Attorney General of the State of Arizona, Department of Public Safety (DPS), the Counter Narcotics Alliance (CNA), Maricopa County Sheriff’s Office (MCSO), and the vast majority of Government and Police agencies statewide! Additionally, Sierra has partnered with numerous charity organizations to auction donated vehicles.

Sierra hosts the largest monthly public auctions in Arizona and is regularly attended by new and returning bidders, many times more than its nearest competitor. Sierra’s experience and performance is unmatched in the industry.

Sierra is a progressive and professional organization that is constantly improving its capabilities and services. The Sierra team is experienced and dedicated, with individuals who specialize in every facet of the operation; from auctioneers, real estate agents, inventory specialists, and marketing professionals, no other firm has the team that Sierra has assembled.

A company is only as good as its commitment to providing Legendary Customer Service and the people that support that service philosophy. While our long history and extensive clientele are impressive, our legendary customer service philosophy and unmatched advertising and marketing expertise are equally as impressive. Please take the time to meet our team of hardworking, friendly professionals.

If you have any questions or would like more information on any of our Arizona Auctions please contact at (602) 242-7121

Name: DIJON GESTION MOTEUR
Description:
Depuis 2012, Dijon Gestion Moteur (DGM) vous offre le meilleur de la technologie des préparations, reprogrammations et mises au point moteurs et châssis.

Après 20 ans passés dans la maintenance et la préparation automobile de véhicules de prestige (Venturi, Porsche), l’équipe DGM est fière de vous accueillir dans ses locaux. Perfectionner vos voitures, motos et quads pour satisfaire vos envies est notre objectif principal et Dijon Gestion Moteur est aujourd’hui LA société spécialiste.

En effet, après avoir passé le véhicule au banc avec analyse de richesse pour repérer d'éventuels dysfonctionnements, nous développons pour chaque véhicule un programme en fonction de son moteur, de votre projet et de vos attentes afin d'obtenir une gestion du couple la plus fine possible et d'éviter les crêtes. 
La reprogrammation et la mise au point sont suivies d'essais afin de repérer d'éventuels défauts et les supprimer.

Name: BOB Automobile GmbH
Description:
Mit einer Marke in die Zukunft. BOB bewegt.

BOB Automobile: Ihre Wünsche sind unsere Leidenschaft

Wir verkaufen nicht einfach nur Autos: Bei BOB Automobile wird Tradition gelebt und als moderne Automobildienstleistung angeboten. Als erfahrene Mobilitätsexperten und Vertragspartner der Marken Renault, Alpine, Dacia, Mazda, Hyundai sowie Jaguar und Land Rover reparieren, warten und pflegen wir Pkws und Nutzfahrzeuge. Was uns antreibt? Unsere gemeinsame Leidenschaft für Kraftfahrzeugtechnologie und dafür, alles immer ein bisschen besser zu machen, als Sie es erwarten würden. BOB Automobile ist eine moderne Mehrmarken-Autohausgruppe mit Standorten im Ruhrgebiet, im Bergischen Land, in Hagen, in Düsseldorf und in Leverkusen. Neben der kompletten Angebotspalette an Neuwagen im Kfz- und Nutzfahrzeugbereich bieten wir auch eine große Auswahl an geprüften Gebrauchtwagen. Bei unseren Service- und Werkstattleistungen sind Meisterkompetenz, Originalteile und Originalzubehör selbstverständlich. Name: Fletcher Jones Toyota of Carson
Description:
ABOUT US
Fletcher Jones Automotive Group invites guests to our newest dealership, Fletcher Jones Toyota of Carson! We are family-owned and operated for over 45 years, dedicated to bringing only the best options for Toyota drivers in Southern California. We look forward to bringing the Fletcher Jones Experience back to Toyota.

OUR HISTORY
Toyota of Carson opened its doors in 1978, inviting new and loyal enthusiasts of Toyota to visit our family-owned and operated dealership in Carson, CA. Our Team’s commitment to preserving the family touch shines through the countless hours of bringing the best of best financing offers, service specials, and more. Guests always find their expectations exceeded, whether it is working with one of our many bilingual team members, receiving the college rebate, or many of the other perks of shopping with us. Now more than 4 decades later, our family-first approach drives us to the next part of our journey. We are excited to announce we are joining the Fletcher Jones Family!

JOINING THE FLETCHER JONES FAMILY
Toyota of Carson kicked off 2023 handing over its keys to Fletcher Jones Automotive Group, one of the largest and most respected family-owned and operated groups in the world. Established in 1946, their family-first approach to taking care of guests sets a precedent for all dealerships. They will simultaneously keep the Toyota of Carson promise and bring the Fletcher Jones Difference to our guests. We look forward to our newest chapter and invite you to visit us today!

Description:
30 yılı aşkın bir süredir otomotiv sektöründe faaliyet gösteren şirketimiz, müşterilerimize yetkili satış ve servis hizmetleri sunmaktadır. İhtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak ve sürüş deneyiminizi mükemmelleştirmek için çalışıyoruz.

Bünyemizde bulunan markalarımız Volkswagen, Volvo, Toyota ve Chery, sektördeki en tanınmış ve güvenilir markalardan bazılarıdır. Her biri üstün kalite, yenilikçilik ve güvenlik standartlarına sahip araçlardır. Müşterilerimize geniş bir model yelpazesi sunarak, kişisel tercihlerinizi karşılayacak en iyi seçenekleri sunmaktayız.

Müşteri memnuniyeti, işimizin merkezinde yer alır. Uzman ekiplerimiz, bilgi birikimleri ve deneyimleriyle sizlere hizmet vermek için buradadır. Satış sürecinden servis ve bakım hizmetlerine kadar her adımda sizinle yakından ilgileniyoruz. Güvenilir ve uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmayı hedeflerken, her zaman kalite, dürüstlük ve şeffaflık prensiplerine bağlı kalıyoruz.

Otomotiv sektöründeki değişimleri yakından takip ediyoruz ve güncel teknolojileri kullanarak size en yeni ve ileri seviye çözümler sunuyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına odaklanırken, sürdürülebilirlik ve çevre dostu uygulamaları da ön planda tutuyoruz.

LinkedIn sayfamızdan bizi takip ederek sektördeki gelişmeleri ve yenilikleri yakından takip edebilirsiniz. Size daha iyi hizmet sunmak için sürekli olarak çalışıyor ve önerilerinizi değerlendiriyoruz. Bize katılın ve sürüş deneyiminizi mükemmelleştirmek için bizi tercih edin.

Our dedication to durability ensures that your investment stands the test of time and road conditions, providing a reliable companion for all your journeys.

Quality is not just a promise but a fundamental aspect of our brand. From the moment you enter one of our vehicles, you get an environment meticulously designed with attention to every detail. From the plush interiors to the robust exterior build, each element is carefully curated to offer you an unmatched experience.

Durability is ingrained in every fiber of our vehicles – a result of relentless testing and refinement. Name: Mercedes Benz of Walnut Creek
Description:
Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek is a proud member of the Sonic Automotive family, a Fortune 500 company that is among one of the largest automotive retailers in the United States. Independently, Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek holds various records as the Bay Area’s fasting growing Mercedes-Benz dealer in: market share, pre-owned sales, service, associate and customer satisfaction as measured by Mercedes-Benz of North America. 

Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek not only prides itself in its performance, but also in its ability to provide the east bay with over 160 jobs. They currently have the most internal promotions within the entire Sonic Automotive family. Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek is committed to the development of their associates as this has proven to be the best way to grow their dealership. The majority of the management team started their respective automotive careers with an entry level position, the Shop Foreman started as a car washer and even their General Manager started out as a lot attendant. 

At Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek they believe that success is created and sustained from a foundation of happy employees. They hold various events throughout the year for the sole purpose of associate satisfaction, such as barbeques, monthly luncheons, ping-pong tournaments, costume contests and decorating contests. They are constantly striving to make their dealership the best place to work and shop in all aspects of the business. 
  
Being a community minded business, Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek not only hosts employee events, but also takes part in many different community events. Last year they participated and/or hosted dog and cat adoptions, car shows, art and wine festivals, golf tournaments, and school fundraisers. 

With their fresh and innovative leadership staff Mercedes-Benz of Walnut Creek is doing business differently, from the way they appreciate their employees to their goal to provide an unmatched customer experience.

Name: Cadê Minha Peça
Description:
A Cadê Minha Peça surge para transformar a experiência de compra de peças automotivas, simplificando e desburocratizando o processo que, até então, costumava ser uma verdadeira dor de cabeça para quem precisa de peças para carros. Sabemos que, quando o carro quebra, o que mais se quer é rapidez e praticidade, e é exatamente isso que oferecemos.

Com um estoque vasto e "infinito" de peças de alta qualidade, incluindo opções de fornecedores nacionais e internacionais, garantimos a disponibilidade de itens para todos os tipos de manutenção, desde uma simples revisão até reparos mais complexos. A tecnologia é nossa grande aliada: o sistema de busca é superintuitivo, facilitando a localização da peça certa de forma ágil e eficiente, tanto para carros nacionais quanto importados.

Nosso compromisso vai além da simples venda de peças: queremos oferecer uma experiência fluida, sem burocracia e com o melhor preço do mercado. E mais, com nossa operação 100% digital, realizamos entregas em até 59 minutos, seja via internet ou televendas. Com a Cadê Minha Peça, você encontra a solução que precisa de maneira rápida, eficiente e sem complicação.

Seja você mecânico ou proprietário de veículo, a Cadê Minha Peça é o seu novo aliado para manter o carro sempre em perfeito estado.

Name: Noble Toyota
Description:
Noble Toyota is in Chullora where Noble Avenue meets the Hume Highway.  We focus on looking after our customers in every way – from vehicle sale to delivery, through to servicing – and we apply “The Noble Way” in everything we do.

We embrace the philosophy of respect for people and continuous improvement. We hold great respect for our customers, our staff, our community and the environment.
Noble is recognised by it's franchisors' as one of Sydney's leading dealerships with Noble being a three time recipient of the Toyota President's Excellence Award and four time winner of the Toyota Top 20 Award.

Visit the Noble Toyota team for :
- New Toyota Vehicles in Sydney
- Used Cars and Used Vehicles in Sydney
- Vehicle Servicing
- Toyota Genuine Parts & Accessories
- Finance and Insurance
- Toyota Fleet

Our Dealership was established in the 1970’s - then known as Ken Sam’s Toyota.  In 1996, the Noble Toyota name was founded, and a new management team set about a new way of doing business – Customer First!

Today, Noble employs more than 95 staff members, and with our focus on fleet business we sell 200 new Toyota vehicles, and 50 used vehicles per month.

At Noble Toyota, we service a wide range of customers from Liverpool, Western Sydney, Parramatta, Bankstown and beyond.  So if you're in the market for a used car, parts, service, new car then come and see our Noble Toyota Dealership.

Name: Poyser Motor Group
Description:
Poyser Motor Group is a family owned, multi-franchise dealership located in Central Victoria across two sites in High Street, Bendigo and Midland Hwy, Epsom.

We employ over 13” team members and pride ourselves on being part of the local community for over 45 years.

Our first dealership, Ron Poyser Motors Pty Ltd opened at 151 High St, Bendigo in 1979 as a Holden, Isuzu and Bedford dealer, under the leadership of Ron Poyser.

The Service and Parts division initially operated out of Williamson St, before moving to the High St premises in 1982. In 1994, we became an authorised Mercedes-Benz and Freightliner dealer. By 1996 our truck division had outgrown their facilities and moved to a larger premises in Adam St.

Over the years, we’ve always strived to earn our reputation as a leading regional dealership.

In 2004, due to further business growth, Poyser Motors & Poyser Trucks moved into a new purpose built dealership facility at 119-141 Midland Hwy, Epsom. A year later, Ron’s son, Adam Poyser became Dealer Principal.

In 2012, Ron Poyser retired from the business after three decades in the car industry.

December, 2014 saw the addition of a second dealership site at 185- 203 High St, Bendigo when we acquired the brands of Hyundai, Nissan, Volkswagen and Chrysler Jeep Dodge. It was at this time that our dealerships aligned and became known as the Poyser Motor Group.

Today our award winning group, proudly represents the following brands, Holden, Mercedes-Benz, Hyundai, Nissan, Ram, Volkswagen, GWM Haval, GMSV, and Isuzu Trucks. Both dealership sites also stock a wide range of Pre-Owned Vehicles.

Poyser Motor Group offers quality service, knowledge and experience across our Sales, Service and Parts Departments. Our team are dedicated to providing you with an extraordinary experience.

Name: Groupe Appro
Description:
Le Groupe Appro est un groupe d’entreprises indépendant, structuré en 2025, spécialisé dans les services automobiles à destination des entreprises et des particuliers.

Le groupe s’appuie sur des entités complémentaires et sur des équipes composées d’experts disposant de plus de 20 ans d’expérience dans le commerce automobile et l’entretien des véhicules. Cette expertise terrain constitue le socle du savoir-faire et de la crédibilité du Groupe Appro.

Le Groupe Appro regroupe aujourd’hui :

• Appro Concept — vente, reprise et financement de véhicules neufs et d’occasion
• Appro Pare-brise et Services — Changement Pare-Brise, préparation et remise en état de véhicules, logistique automobile, convoyage.
• Appro Mécanique — entretien, maintenance et réparation mécanique multimarque

Le cœur d’activité du Groupe Appro est orienté B2B. Nous accompagnons les entreprises dans la gestion de leurs flottes de véhicules (VP et VU), l’entretien et la maintenance, la préparation avant mise en circulation, la remise en état en fin de leasing, ainsi que la logistique et le convoyage.

En parallèle, le groupe accompagne également les particuliers dans leurs projets d’achat, de vente et d’entretien de véhicules, avec la même exigence de sérieux, de transparence et de qualité de service.

Le Groupe Appro s’appuie sur Appro Production, pôle de production photo et vidéo du groupe, dédié à la valorisation des entreprises, des équipes et des projets. Appro Production accompagne le groupe et ses partenaires dans leur communication visuelle, leur image de marque et leur visibilité.

Depuis sa création, le Groupe Appro connaît une croissance rapide et structurée, avec l’ouverture de nouveaux sites, le développement de nouvelles activités et le passage d’une dizaine de collaborateurs à plus de 30 aujourd’hui.

Le Groupe Appro se construit autour d’un collectif engagé, convaincu qu’une entreprise durable repose avant tout sur les femmes et les hommes qui la font vivre au quotidien.

Name: PURR
Description:
PURR | The $100B Inventory Engine for Dealers Who Refuse to Bleed Cash

Let’s talk real.
Every time a dealer buys from auction, you’re already $2K–$3K deep before the car even hits your lot.
Fees. Transport. Recon. Floorplan interest.

You’re stacking risk to maybe make $1K–$3K… if nothing goes wrong.
Meanwhile, online dealers are closing your buyers before you even get a call.

I lived that life.
Running Pre-Owned Ops 4 rooftops, doing everything “right,” but watching every deal get thinner.

Then I realized the one thing every seller wants that no dealer offers: retail price.

So I quit.
Started in a tent behind a car wash in an Alberta winter, and built a system that attracts sellers steady, without spending dealer money.

Imagine outbidding every competitor by thousands...
without touching your floorplan or using your credit line.
How many more deals would you win?

Introducing PURR’s $100B Inventory Engine

It’s the plug-and-play model that gives you endless used cars without spending a dime of your cash.
No floorplan. No buy fees. No dead capital.

Proof:
 Scaled from 0 to 100+ units and became Canada’s #1 reviewed dealer.
 Two pilot stores made $500K profit from cars they didn’t pay for.
 All before spending a cent on ads.

How it prints cash:
1 $0-cost cars → inventory delivered free.
2 Seller-paid recon → turns “expense” into “income.”
3 $2K guaranteed front-end → negotiation-proof profit.
4 $5K–$12K per unit → proven gross range.
5 Compounding loop → sellers feed trades, trades feed sales, sales feed cash.

This isn’t software. It’s an engine.
Once it’s running, your dealership becomes impossible to kill.

Who It’s For:
Dealers done paying auction tax.
Owners who want full lots, fat margins, and future-proof cash flow.
Operators who don’t wait to “see how it goes” — they take the wheel.

 New Dealer Territories Opening Now
Limited spots available.
DM me “PURR” and I’ll show you how to add cars, and cash,  without using yours.

Name: Cooper Motor Company
Description:
Cooper Motor Company has been a legacy of automotive excellence since 1938.  With a rich history spanning over eight decades and founded in the midst of automotive innovation, Cooper Motor Company began its dealership with the Dodge and Plymouth franchises. The post-war era witnessed the dealership's growth with Oldsmobile and adaptation to the evolving automotive landscape, laying the foundation for its enduring presence.

Cooper Motor Company evolved alongside the automotive industry. Those decades brought expansion and diversification, with the dealership embracing Jeep, Eagle, Plymouth and Chrysler franchises.  The addition of the Ram BusinessLink added the complete commercial products lines of Ram Medium Duty to include the Ram 4500, Ram 5500 and the Ram Promaster Van which has dominated the Last Mile Delivery industry.  With the addition of Chevrolet and GMC in 2023, Cooper Motor Company continues to grow.

Cooper Motor Company has a strong focus and commitment on providing tailored solutions for corporations with fleet vehicle needs. This commitment to comprehensive fleet solutions has positioned Cooper Motor Company as the go-to partner for businesses seeking reliability and efficiency in their vehicle fleets.  Whether the fleet company is regional or nationwide, our team understands the challenges of ordering specific vehicles for any area of the country or immediate inventory needs with nationwide delivery service.  

As a certified Disability Owned Business, Cooper Motor Company stands at the forefront of disability entrepreneurship, demonstrating the potential for individuals with disabilities to excel as business owners and industry leaders. The company's success serves as an inspiration and a beacon of hope for others within the disability community, highlighting the importance of breaking down barriers and promoting inclusivity in the business world.

Cooper Motor Co and Cooper Chevrolet GMC are Disability Owned Business Enterprise (DOBE) Certified

Name: Volvo Cars Sri Lanka
Description:
Volvo Cars is one of the most well-known and respected car brands in the world which originates from Sweden.

At Volvo, everything we do starts with people. So our mission to make people’s lives easier, safer and better is something that comes naturally to us. It’s the Volvo way. Today, we’re still as focused as ever on our three core values: safety, quality and care for the environment. Our human centric focus is what makes us different from all other car companies, and it is at the heart of everything we create.

In every generation, Volvo has been a pioneer in safety. From ‘Three-point Safety Belt’ in 1959 to ‘Connected Safety’ in 2016 Volvo has redefined safety in the automobile industry. Volvo Car Corporation's Accident Research Team has studied, documented and analyzed more than 40,000 real traffic accidents involving Volvo cars and the knowledge gained by that has helped to develop many of the innovative safety systems we launched over the years. Our vision is that by 2020 no one should be killed or seriously injured in a new Volvo car.

In 2014 Volvo has had a significant transformation in design and technology on a new production platform, worth USD 11.5 Billion. The Volvo luxury XC90 SUV & S90 Sedan are the first models to be produced on the new platform. The XC90 alone has won over 130 international awards to date including the prestigious Red Dot ‘Best of the Best’ Product Design Award.

Volvo Cars Sri lanka offers Sales, Service and Spare Parts of Volvo Cars under one roof at its state-of-the-art facility located in Peliyagoda, Sri Lanka. The facility is designed according to the VRE (Volvo Retail Experience) guidelines in order to deliver the maximum customer satisfaction.  All our staff members are frequently trained by Volvo Cars Corporation to make sure they are up to date with the latest technologies and concepts.

La empresa fue fundada por tres socios con amplia experiencia en el sector automotriz:
- Ezequiel Calcarami, Fundador y CEO de Grupo Simpli.
- Nicolás Daneri, Fundador y CEO de Zento, concesionaria oficial Toyota en Argentina.

Description:
First established in 1902, Triumph Motorcycles celebrated 110 years of motorcycle manufacture in 2012. For more than two decades, Triumph Motorcycles has been based in Hinckley, Leicestershire, and has produced iconic bikes that perfectly blend authentic design, character, charisma and performance. Building around 60,000 bikes per year, Triumph is the largest British motorcycle manufacturer and has over 750 dealers across the world. 

At the heart of Triumph’s philosophy is a commitment and passion to develop truly unique motorcycles that offer a blend of distinctive design, intuitive handling and performance to enjoy the perfect ride.
This focus, innovation and engineering passion has today created a broad range of bikes suited to all motorcycle riders, including the striking 2.3 litre Rocket III, the unmistakable Speed Triple, the TT winning SuperSports Daytona 675R, class defining Tiger 800, transcontinental Tiger Explorer and the iconic Triumph Bonneville family.

Fundamentally, Empire Autos NI offer dependable, immaculately presented and competitively priced cars with minimal fuss - we want to make each experience one to remember.

Prior to sale, each of our cars go through rigorous inspections with fully trained mechanics and prepared by one of our fully qualified detailers.

Feel free to browse our extensive range of stock and contact us today for a pressure free, no obligation conversation.

Philip Hedley a degree qualified engineer wanted to provide a level of service for the prestige automotive brands (Bentley, Porsche, Jaguar Land Rover and Audi) over and above that of the main dealer networks whilst continuing to maintain a value for money service for the customer.

As an experienced development engineer at manufacturer level Philip felt the research and development roles, he had within Bentley Motors Ltd and Jaguar Land Rover Ltd plus his experiences of working alongside both Porsche and Audi research and development engineers would allow this dream to be realised.

Fast forward to today and we are now a team of 4 with an ever-increasing customer base and we continue to provide a top-quality value for money service for 4 of the most prestigious automotive brands in the world.

Name: Keleşler Motorlu Araçlar
Description:
Keleşler Ford'a hoş geldiniz. Sektördeki 42 yılı aşkın uzmanlığıyla Türkiye'nin önde gelen Ford yetkili satıcısı ve servisi Keleşler Ford olarak siz değerli müşterilerimize olağanüstü ürün ve hizmetler sunmaktan, güven ve güvenilirliğe dayalı kalıcı ilişkiler kurmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Keleşler Ford'da, özel ekibimiz kişiselleştirilmiş ve profesyonel bir deneyim sunmayı taahhüt eder ve her müşterinin sahip olma yolculuğu boyunca değerli ve desteklenmiş hissetmesini sağlar. Ford marka binek, hafif ticari ve orta ticari geniş araç yelpazemizle hem bireylerin hem de işletmelerin benzersiz ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için çeşitli seçenekler sunarken, uzman teknik kadromuz ve son teknoloji ekipmanlarımız ile ilk seferde doğru onarım ve tamirat hizmeti sunuyoruz.

En yeni Ford modelleri, en son teknolojiler ve sektörel bilgiler hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak için LinkedIn'de bizimle bağlantıda kalın. Otomotiv sektöründe güvenilir bir isim olarak, beklentilerinizi aşmaya ve otomotivde mükemmellik sunmaya kendimizi adadık.

Büyüyen topluluğumuza katılın ve Keleşler Ford farkını yaşayın. Hemen bizimle iletişime geçin ve kalite ve müşteri memnuniyetine olan sarsılmaz bağlılığımızla desteklenen mükemmel araç çözümünü bulmanıza yardımcı olalım.

Description:
É uma associação  fundada em 13/08/2013 que reúne voluntariamente entidades empresariais da reparação de veículos, no Brasil denominadas “Sindirepa”, e tem como objetivo o desenvolvimento, modernização e o relacionamento com as federações das indústrias e a confederação da Indústria e cooperação junto a instituições públicas e privadas, nacionais e internacionais, com o objetivo de orientar e promover a melhoria contínua das empresas de reparação de veículos.

As entidades associadas pertencem a estrutura confederativa, formada por Federação e Confederação da Indústria e atendem os preceitos que ditam o artigo 513 da CLT – Consolidação das Leis do Trabalho, como representar perante as autoridades administrativas e judiciárias os interesses gerais da categoria econômica da reparação de veículos e colaborar com o Estado como órgãos técnicos e consultivos.

Name: 77 Auto Group
Description:
Jesteśmy firmą specjalizującą się w sprzedaży samochodów, doradztwem w zakresie wyboru samochodów nowych oraz finansowania.

Nasza oferta obejmuje:

 Sprzedaż samochodów
Oferujemy szeroki wybór pojazdów – zarówno nowych, jak i używanych. Dzięki naszym zróżnicowanym ofertom znajdziesz samochody różnych marek i modeli, idealnie dopasowane do Twoich potrzeb i oczekiwań.

 Finansowanie i leasing
Oferujemy różne opcje finansowania zakupu samochodu, w tym kredyty i leasing, dostosowane do potrzeb i możliwości finansowych naszych klientów.

 Realizacja zamówień na floty
Specjalizujemy się we wsparciu realizacji zakupu floty pojazdów. Oferujemy kompleksową obsługę, od doradztwa przy wyborze pojazdów, przez negocjację kontraktu, po finalizację zakupu.

 Konsultacje przy wyborze samochodów
Dostarczamy profesjonalne doradztwo w zakresie konfiguracji pojazdów i pomagamy znaleźć najlepsze rozwiązania dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb naszych klientów.

 Sprowadzanie samochodów na zamówienie z Niemiec i Szwecji
Realizujemy zamówienia na samochody z Niemiec i Szwecji, zapewniając, że każdy pojazd jest dokładnie sprawdzany pod kątem stanu technicznego i historii, aby sprowadzać wyłącznie samochody najwyższej jakości, bez przeszłości wypadkowej.

Dlaczego warto wybrać współpracę z 77 Auto Group?

W 77 Auto Group stawiamy na profesjonalizm i pełne zrozumienie potrzeb naszych klientów w oparciu o nasze wieloletnie doświadczenie. Naszym celem jest nie tylko sprzedaż samochodów, ale również budowanie długotrwałych relacji opartych na zaufaniu i satysfakcji.

 Profesjonalne doradztwo
 Kompleksowa obsługa klienta
 Wysoka jakość oferowanych pojazdów
 Transparentne warunki współpracy

Name: Jb Cars NG
Description:
There is a need in Nigeria for a large selection of quality used cars, and JB Cars will sell these top-quality used vehicles at a competitive price. The owner have over 2 years of experience in new and used auto sales. We will continue to develop our excellent working relationship with local dealers and auctions to bring the savings to the customer.

Solution

We will create a purchasing environment that caters to the customer’s needs. We are selling a professional service and an experience in car buying that will bring customers back again, as well as referring friends and family. We estimate an optimistic gross margin over the industry average. We will be successful because of the excellent team we have assembled and the drive and determination of the owners.

Market

Almost everyone needs a car to get from point A to B. Many families have two or more cars. Due to the recent success of the new car market, there is a large inventory of used cars available for re-sale. New car sales have enjoyed the largest single month gain in October up 24%.

Why Us?

Jb Cars provides a unique car buying experience to the customers in the Nigeria. One that focuses on customer satisfaction first. We understand that vehicle purchasing is a necessary, but sometimes unpleasant experience. Our goal is to provide the customer with an enjoyable, honest service by satisfying individual customers practical transportation needs with a quality product.

We also believe it is important to have quality vehicles at a low cost, and will back each vehicle with a 30 day limited warranty.

Name: Euro Sumar
Description:
Euro Sumar d.o.o. je pouzdani lider u oblasti uvoza, distribucije i servisiranja Suzuki automobila, motocikala i skutera , sa iskustvom poslovanja u oblasti od 1995. godine.

Naša kompanija je osnovana s ciljem da na domaćem tržištu omogući široku dostupnost visokokvalitetnih japanskih vozila, oslanjajući se na tradiciju, inovativnost i vrednosti koje Suzuki kao brend promoviše već decenijama. Inspirisani japanskim korenima i usmereni na postizanje najviših standarda, nastojimo da svakom kupcu pružimo vrednost za novac, uz maksimalnu uslužnost i posvećenost.

Od 2021. godine, roširili smo svoj poslovni portfelj i preuzeli ulogu zvaničnog uvoznika, distributera i servisera i za SYM i Moto Morini motocikle i skutere, čime dodatno osnažujemo ponudu i prisutnost renomiranih brendova na našem tržištu. Ovaj iskorak omogućava nam da pružimo još širu paletu vrhunskih motocikala i skutera, kao i profesionalnu podršku i servisne usluge za sve naše klijente.

Naša misija je da kontinuirano povećavamo zastupljenost Suzuki, SYM i Moto Morini proizvoda na domaćem tržištu, radeći na jačanju prepoznatljivosti brenda i poboljšanju iskustva naših klijenata. Posvećeni smo razvoju profesionalnog i standardizovanog poslovanja koje garantuje kvalitet i pouzdanost svih naših usluga. Težimo da budemo pravi izbor za kupce, poželjan poslodavac za zaposlene, pouzdan poslovni partner za naše poslovne saradnike i odgovorna društvena organizacija koja svojim radom doprinosi razvoju cele zajednice.

Temeljne vrednosti našeg uspeha su kvalitet proizvoda, uslužnost I preciznost u komunikaciji, poverenje koje gradimo svakodnevnim radom, inovativnost u pristupu poslovanju i razumevanje potreba i želja naših klijenata. Svaki izazov gledamo kao priliku za napredak, a naši zaposleni su glavni nosioci razvoja i uspeha kompanije. Kroz stalne inovacije i usavršavanje, težimo da ostanemo lideri u prodaji i servisiranju vozila, pružajući najviši nivo usluga i zadovoljstva.
