Name: Fertitta Chevrolet
Description:
The Fertitta family, renowned for their entrepreneurial spirit and deep commitment to the community, is proud to usher in a new era for a beloved Houston Texas institution: Norman Frede Chevrolet. 

For 50 years, Norman Frede Chevrolet has been a cornerstone of the community, delivering unmatched service, quality vehicles, and a strong focus on Customer Satisfaction. Now, this proud legacy continues under the leadership of the Fertitta family.
 
Tilman Fertitta, a name synonymous with success across various industries, has long been a driving force in Texas business. With ventures spanning dining, hospitality, entertainment sports and luxury automotive dealerships, the Fertitta family consistently demonstrates an unwavering dedication to quality, customer service, and community values. The decision to acquire Norman Frede Chevrolet reflects the desire of the Fertitta family's to further extend their legacy of service and innovation within the automotive industry.
 
For decades, this dealership has been a trusted destination for generations of drivers in the Webster and Houston area offering more than just vehicles—it has been a place where relationships and community ties were flourished. The Fertitta family is committed to preserving this legacy while infusing it with their own visions of entrepreneurial energy. 
 
Under the leadership of the Fertitta family, the dealership is set to evolve, bringing with it a renewed emphasis on innovation, customer experience, and community engagement. The Fertitta family remains committed to ensuring that every customer feels like family, providing the same level of care, respect, and service that has defined their success in all their ventures.

Name: BYD by ADG Groep
Description:
Bij BYD Meppel, onderdeel van ADG Groep, zijn we gepassioneerd over het aanbieden van toonaangevende, duurzame mobiliteitsoplossingen. Wij zijn trotse dealer van BYD's baanbrekende elektrische voertuigen, een merk synoniem voor innovatie, kwaliteit en duurzaamheid. Ons assortiment omvat een breed scala aan elektrische modellen, geschikt voor zowel particulieren als zakelijke klanten, die allemaal bijdragen aan een schonere, groenere toekomst.

BYD, oorspronkelijk gestart als batterijproducent, heeft zich ontwikkeld tot 's werelds grootste fabrikant van elektrische voertuigen. Deze achtergrond in batterijtechnologie stelt hen in staat om voertuigen van uitzonderlijke kwaliteit en betrouwbaarheid te leveren, waarbij ze de standaard zetten in de evolutie naar emissievrij vervoer.

Bij BYD Meppel streven we naar uitmuntendheid in klantenservice. Van aankoopadvies tot after-sales ondersteuning, ons deskundige team staat klaar om een naadloze ervaring te bieden. Voor optimale dienstverlening zijn wij daarom enkel geopend op afspraak.

Name: Kia Öztopraklar Otomotiv
Description:
Kia Türkiye’de her geçen gün itibariyle pazar payını arttırmaktadır. Bu durum Mersin Kia servisi hizmetleri için de geçerliliğini korumaktadır. Özellikle Mersin Kia Öztopraklar son zamanlarda üst düzeyde bir hizmetin merkezinde yer almaktadır. Esasında Kia markasına olan ilginin artış göstermesine paralel olarak bu marka ait hizmetlere olan talepler de artış göstermektedir. Bu talebin karşılanması noktasında Mersin Kia Öztopraklar harika fırsatların adresi konumunda yer almaktadır.

Mersin Kia markasına olan ilginin oldukça fazla olduğu bir kent olarak karşımıza çıkmaktadır. Bu durumun doğal sonucu olarak Mersin’de Kia servisine dair hizmetlere olan ilginin de artış gösterdiğini rahatlıkla ifade etmek mümkün olmaktadır. Bu marka özellikle inovasyon noktasında üst düzeyde bir çalışmanın merkezinde yer almaktadır. Tam da bu noktada pek çok farklı modelle de tüketicilerin karşısına çıkmaktadır. Bu durumun doğal sonucu olarak bu markaya ait araçların son zamanlarda oldukça popüler olduğunu rahatlıkla ifade edebiliriz.

Kia günümüz itibariyle pek çok farklı modeli piyasaya sunarak; kullanıcıların taleplerini karşılamak noktasında üst düzeyde bir etkiye sahip olmayı başarmıştır. Hibrit araç piyasasında da iddialı bir konumda yer alan bu uluslararası markanın yenilik konusunda da üst düzeyde çalışmaları ortaya koyabildiği biliniyor. Bu noktada hem ticari hem de binek araç piyasasında güçlü bir şekilde yer almayı başaran markanın aynı zamanda konforlu araçlarıyla dikkatleri üzerine çektiği biliniyor.

V roce 2021 vyrobil Volkswagen 4,9 milionu vozidel, mezi něž patří bestsellery, jako jsou Polo, T-Roc, Golf, Tiguan nebo Passat, ale také úspěšné modely elektromobilů ID.3 a ID.4. K tomu je nutné připočítat více než 10 000 prodejců a servisních partnerů s 86 000 zaměstnanci. Volkswagen svou strategií ACCELERATE důsledně urychluje transformaci na softwarově orientovaného poskytovatele mobility.

V České republice působí importér od roku 1991, nyní pod hlavičkou firmy Porsche Česká republika, která je součástí rakouské skupiny Porsche Holding Salzburg.

Chez HB Motors, notre passion pour les véhicules va au-delà de la simple conduite. Nous sommes des amoureux de l'automobile, des connaisseurs de qualité, et des défenseurs du service exceptionnel. Nous comprenons que la flexibilité est essentielle. C'est pourquoi nous proposons des solutions de location de véhicules adaptées aux particuliers et aux entreprises. Louez une voiture pour un jour, un mois ou même une année, et découvrez la différence d'une mobilité sur mesure.

Pourquoi Choisir HB Motors ?
Des Véhicules Distingués : Chacun de nos véhicules est choisi avec soin pour son raffinement, sa performance et son design. Vous méritez le meilleur, et nous sommes là pour vous l'offrir.

Tailored Finance Solutions: Understanding that one size doesn't fit all, our financial services are customised to meet the unique needs of our clients. Whether it's for personal use or an entire corporate fleet, we provide flexible financing options that align with your goals and budget.

Sustainable Mobility for a Better Future: At WhipSmart, we're committed to reducing carbon emissions and fostering a greener, cleaner Australia. By promoting the use of EVs, we contribute to a sustainable future, supporting both environmental stewardship and technological innovation.

Name: DS STORE DENİZLİ
Description:
OTOMAT Motorlu Araçlar: Güvenilirlik ve Yenilikte Öncü

1977 yılında Denizli’de kurulan OTOMAT Motorlu Araçlar, otomotiv sektöründe güvenilirlik, kalite ve yenilikçi yaklaşımıyla ön plana çıkan bir markadır. Kuruluşundan bu yana müşteri memnuniyetini merkeze alan hizmet anlayışıyla hareket eden şirketimiz, geniş ürün yelpazesi ve üstün servis hizmetleriyle bölgesinde lider konumda yer almaktadır.

OTOMAT Motorlu Araçlar olarak Opel markasının yetkili bayiliğini başarıyla yürütmekteyiz. Bunun yanı sıra, sektörün ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak adına sürekli gelişen bir vizyona sahibiz. Sadece satış değil, satış sonrası hizmetlerimizle de müşterilerimizin yanında olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Elektrikli ve hibrit araçlar gibi sürdürülebilir teknolojilere olan yatırımımızla, çevreye duyarlı bir yaklaşımı benimseyerek geleceğe değer katmayı hedefliyoruz.

1977 yılından bu yana kazandığımız deneyim, güçlü ekip ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, OTOMAT Motorlu Araçlar olarak otomotiv sektöründeki öncü rolümüzü sürdürmeye kararlıyız.

Our mission is to provide a hassle-free experience for our customers. We take care of all the details, from start to finish, so you can focus on what's important to you. With us, you can sell your car in just three easy steps:

First, provide us with some basic information about your vehicle. You can do this by filling out our online form, or giving us a call.

Second, receive an instant quote from us. Our team of experts will evaluate your car based on the information you provide and give you a competitive offer on the spot.

Finally, schedule a convenient time for us to pick up your car and hand over payment. We'll come to your location, whether it's your home or workplace, to make the process as easy as possible for you.

We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service. We understand that selling your car can be a big decision, and we're here to answer any questions you may have.

Name: Mobility-360
Description:
Als Mobility 360 AG bieten wir ein innovatives Mobilitätskonzept an, das Ihnen exklusive und individuell ausgestattete Fahrzeugmodelle zu einem einzigartigen Preisvorteil gegenüber herkömmlichen Leasingverträgen ermöglicht. Durch den Wegfall des Restwert-Risikos können Sie bis zu 40 Prozent Ihrer Mobilitätskosten reduzieren und bleiben dabei flexibel, unabhängig und vor allem liquide.

Unser Konzept vereint die Vorteile des modernen Leasings mit denen des Mietens, um Ihnen eine Finanzierung in der Komfortklasse zu bieten. Wir verstehen, dass Mobilität für Unternehmer von großer Bedeutung ist und bieten auch Lösungen für belastete Schufaeinträge an.

Bei uns bleiben Sie flexibel - Sie können individuell bestimmen, wie lange Sie Ihr Fahrzeug fahren möchten. Wenn Sie früher aus dem Vertrag aussteigen möchten, können Sie diesen nach jeweils 12 Monaten ohne Mehrkosten auflösen. Wir bieten auch individuelle Kündigungsoptionen an, damit Sie zusätzliche Flexibilität genießen können. Mit unserem Mobilitätskonzept können Sie Ihr Fahrzeug sogar vor Vertragsablauf einfach auf ein Modell Ihrer Wahl umsteigen.

Wir ermöglichen es Ihnen, endlich in Ihr Traumauto einzusteigen. Besuchen Sie unsere Webseite und füllen Sie das Formular aus, um mehr darüber zu erfahren: www.mobility-360.de.

Name: Dream Drivers Club
Description:
Dream Drivers Club is an exclusive community of people who enjoy the convertible way of living. 
We are sharing our passion, our experiences and, most important, the ownership of a Mazda MX5 ND. 

How does it work? 
Our members are co-owners of their dream car and have exclusive access to:
- on track days 
- driving a Mazda MX5 for 7 days/year during a 3 year period
- socializing events and parties organized by The Club

What are the costs?
Members pay a one time fee upon joining the Club. Currently, the membership is 3500 EUR

Who pays for insurance and car maintenance?
The Club takes care of all these costs - you might want to consider, though, the gas while driving the car :)  

Can I choose the period in which I can drive the car?
Yes, choosing the period is done as follows:
In the first year - in the order of registration in The Club (it can be around your birthday, holiday or whenever you dare to invite her to the beach with a convertible)
In the second year - in the reverse order of enrollment (in the end, all members pay the same fee)
In the third year - following a lottery 

Being a unique concept in Romania, you definitely have more questions. Call us to talk about Mazda, but make sure the phone is fully charged. We are as passionate about cars as you are and...we might talk for a while 

We are a social community - text us on whatsapp
+40791566933

www.DreamDriversClub.com

Description:
Unsere Mission
Wir garantieren für die Mobilität unserer Kunden.Für uns ist kein Kunde wie der andere. Wir konzentrieren uns auf die Probleme und Bedürfnisse unsere Kunden und lösen diese schnell und kompetent. Heutzutage ist Zeit ein sehr wertvolles Gut, deshalb steht die Flexibilität und Mobilität unserer Kunden immer im Vordergrund.

Unsere Werte
Unsere Unternehmenskultur ist durch folgende Werte geprägt

Kundenorientierung
Wir konzentrieren uns auf das Wesentliche – unsere Kunden glücklich zu machen. Dabei möchten wir schneller, besser aber vor allem anders als unsere Mitbewerber sein.

Ergebnisorientiert
Wir streben kontinuierliches, gewinnbringendes, gesundes und nachhaltiges Wachstum an. Hierbei spielen Mitarbeiter mit unternehmerischem Denken und einer hohen Leistungsbereitschaft eine extrem wichtige Rolle, denn nur so erreichen wir stets unsere Ziele.

Offene Kommunikation
Wir sorgen für eine hohe Transparenz im Unternehmen. Zwischen allen Hierarchieebenen wahren wir eine offene und ehrliche Kommunikation. Das Wohlbefinden und die Meinung unserer Mitarbeiter ist uns extrem wichtig, denn nur wer Freude an seiner Arbeit hat, hat auch Erfolg.

Vertrauen
Ohne gegenseitiges Vertrauen ist das Arbeiten im Team nicht möglich. Wir bei Maschek Automobile leben eine auf Vertrauen basierende Unternehmenskultur, die uns als Team zusammenhält. Bei uns ziehen alle an einem Strang.

Verantwortung
Unsere Mitarbeiter tragen nicht nur die Verantwortung für ihre eigenen Aufgaben, sie haben auch immer ein Auge auf Kollegen. Gemeinsam übernehmen wir die Verantwortung für Ihre Mobilität. Wir beherrschen unser Handwerk – Sie können uns vertrauen.

Name: Mallow Road Motors
Description:
Mallow Road Motors we founded in 2002 by Pio Cafferkey and Stephen Ferriter. With humble beginnings, operating from a Portakabin while construction was ongoing, our first premises opened in late 2002 on the Old Mallow Road, offering Kia cars and Isuzu and Iveco commercial vehicles. 

French automaker Citroën came on-board in 2010 at our original showroom. In 2015, thanks to growing sales, we moved Kia sales to a new showroom located in Blarney Business Park, less than 5kms from our existing premises. In 2017 we were appointed a Peugeot main dealer and commenced rebranding our original premises as a Peugeot showroom. In 2021 work commenced on a new Citroën showroom located next to our Kia showroom in Blarney Business Park. In early 2022 we celebrated 20 years in business with the opening of our third retail facility, as well as 20 years as a Kia main dealer, making Mallow Road Motors the longest-serving Kia dealer in Ireland. 

Today we are main dealers for Kia, Citroën and Peugeot in Cork city and county, with sales locations at our three dedicated showrooms in Old Mallow Road and Blarney. Our team of experienced motor industry sales professionals are on-hand for any queries. We offer customer solutions for sales, fleet, contract hire and more. From passenger to commercial vehicles, our team are here to help. Contact us on 021-4392066.

Name: Grupa Euro-Car
Description: Firma Euro-Car Sp. z o.o. od początku swojego istnienia związana jest z Gdynią, w której początkowo miała swoją siedzibę jako Autoryzowana Stacja Obsługi Serwisowej aż do dzisiaj, kiedy możemy Państwa zaprosić z dumą do siedziby w nowoczesnym budynku.Obiekt, w którym obecnie znajduje się Salon i Serwis liczy sobie ponad 3 tys. m.kw. posiada wygodny parking podziemny i rozbudowaną część serwisową. Spełnia on wszystkie standardy Forda, a przede wszystkim umożliwia komfortową obsługę Klientów. Rok 2015 był dla naszego salonu rokiem wielu zmian i związanych z nimi wyzwań. Euro-Car oraz towarzyszące mu Centrum Pojazdów Dostawczych przekształciło się w FordStore Euro-Car oraz Centrum Transita. Jako jedni z sześciu salonów w całej Polsce z dumą możemy zaprosić naszych klientów do skorzystania z szerokiej oferty wyjątkowych samochodów jednocześnie zapewniając obsługę na najwyższym poziomie. Działając w północnej Polsce jako jedyni w regionie oferujemy takie modele jak Ford Mustang, Ford Edge, Ford Mondeo Vignale czy supersportowy Ford Focus RS. Dla wszystkich, którzy poszukują samochodów dostawczych, Centrum Transita stanowi idealne miejsce. Klienci mogą nie tylko skorzystać z szerokiej gamy samochodów ciężarowych ale również doposażyć i dostosować nadwozie Transita do wszelkich wymagań. Zapraszamy !

Name: RDS AutocAyr
Description:
RDS AutocAyr is an independent car servicing and repair center located in Ayr, Ayrshire. We offer a range of services including car servicing, repairs, diagnostics, and tyre fitting. 

RDS AutocAyr focuses on providing quality service at affordable prices, building long-term relationships with customers, and utilising modern technology and skilled technicians. 

Key Services:

Car Servicing:
RDS AutocAyr provides comprehensive car servicing for all makes and models, including hybrid vehicles. We offer services like oil changes, filter replacements, and full vehicle checks, with an option to book online. 

Car Repairs:
We handle a variety of vehicle repairs, from standard work like brakes, timing belts, exhausts, and suspension repairs to more complex issues identified through diagnostics. RDS AutocAyr emphasises using up-to-date technology and skilled technicians for quality repairs. 

Diagnostics:
RDS AutocAyr uses advanced diagnostic technology to analyze vehicle issues, including engine management, emission systems, stability control, and more. 

Tyres:
We offer tyre fitting services, including budget tyres and various brands like Michelin and Pirelli. Customers can check their tyre sizes and book appointments online or by phone. 

Contact: We prefer to speak to our clients and get the details first hand. Our friendly front desk will be able to offer advice and get you booked in. Simply call: 01292 737 676

Name: İstanbul Fiat Otomotiv
Description:
İstanbul Fiat Otomotiv, farklı ihtiyaç ve taleplere uygun sıfır ve ikinci el araçların satışı ile birlikte aynı zamanda servis ve orijinal yedek parça gereksinimlerine birlikte cevap veren köklü bir firma olup, uluslararası ticari araç sektörünün temel taşlarından IVECO markasının ana bayisi olarak hizmet sunmaktadır.

Firmamız, kurucumuz sayın Nihat Arı’nın girişimciliğiyle 1965 yılında 75 m²’lik bir dükkanda otomotiv sektörüne ilk adımını atmış, sektörün gelişimini yakından takip etmekten bir an olsun uzaklaşmamış, müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışı ve sıkı sıkıya bağlı olduğu “Dürüst Tüccar” ilkesinden taviz vermeden her zaman başarılara imza atmış, günümüzde ise, IVECO standartlarında 10.800 m²’si kapalı, 106.000 m²’si açık olan bir hizmet alanına ulaşmıştır.

Müşteri Odaklı yaklaşım anlayışıyla ticari araç sektörünün ve buna bağlı olarak müşteri ihtiyaçlarının gelişimlerine hazırlıklı olmak, değişen ve sürekli yenilenen taleplere anında ve uygun hizmeti sunabilmek, tüm faaliyetlerimizde sürekli daha iyiyi hedefleyerek iyileştirmeler yapmak ve kalite standardımızı her zaman bir üst noktaya taşımak ana prensiplerimizdendir.

Şirketimiz en büyük yatırımını çalışanına yapmakta ve en alt kademeden itibaren uzun süreli çalışma prensibini benimsemekte olup, İstanbul Fiat kültüründe yetişmiş çalışanlarımızın her birinin kendi alanında inisiyatif almasını ve faaliyetlerini hatasız sürdürebilmelerini hedeflemektedir.

Tüm çalışanlarımızın, hizmet kalite standardımızın devamlılığı ilkesine katılımı esastır. Geleneksel hizmet anlayışı ve şirket prensiplerimiz doğrultusunda şirket hedeflerimiz her seviyeden çalışanın doğrudan katılımıyla belirlenir.
Siz değerli iş ortaklarımıza, iş akış süreçlerine ilişkin doğru bilgilendirme mümkün olan en açık ve hızlı şekilde yapılarak paylaşılmaktadır.

Kuruluşumuzdan bugüne ticari faaliyetlerimizin çerçevesini belirleyen dürüst esnaflık ilkesi ve geleneksel değerler, günümüzün gerektirdiği yeniliklerle harmanlanmıştır.

Name: AUTO  COMPOL S.A.
Description:
30 lat na rynku – to zobowiązuje ! 
Na początku lat 90. sprzedażą samochodów marki Renault w Poznaniu zajmowało się kilka firm. 
Dwie z nich – Euroimpex, i Compol, postanowiły połączyć swoje siły.
W ten sposób powstała firma Auto Compol, która od ponad trzech dekad działa w stolicy Wielkopolski sprzedając samochody Renault i Dacia.
W 1994 roku podpisana została umowa o współpracy z Koncernem Renault.
Obecnie firma Auto Compol zatrudnia ponad 70 osób. Dodatkowo w salonach i serwisach doświadczenie zdobywają adepci szkół mechanicznych. 
Prowadzimy działalność w trzech obiektach.
Pierwszy i najstarszy salon mieści się przy ul. Kazimierza Wielkiego, niespełna 800 metrów od poznańskiej Starówki. Salon w centrum miasta to miejsce, do którego poznaniacy się przyzwyczaili i chętnie go odwiedzają.
Drugi salon, został wybudowany w 2011 r. przy ul. Dąbrowskiego w Poznaniu.  Klienci znajdą tam samochody marki Renault osobowe oraz pełną gamę samochodów dostawczych, serwis mechaniczny oraz sprzedaż części i akcesoriów.
Trzeci - najnowszy obiekt znajduje się w Luboniu przy ulicy Armii Poznań 37 .
To właśnie tu otworzyliśmy nowy- drugi już Salon Dacia. Klienci mogą zapoznać się tu z pełną gamą samochodów używanych.

Name: Japox Corporation Co., Ltd.
Description:
Japox Corporation delivers advanced DX solutions through its flagship AI-powered vehicle appraisal platform, Shuun-Car, designed to maximize the value of automotive assets and transform the way vehicles are evaluated across industries.

What Shuun-Car enables: By simply entering a Vehicle Identification Number (VIN), users can instantly obtain vehicle appraisals and mileage estimates. This innovation eliminates the inefficiencies of manual data entry and in-person inspections, bringing speed, accuracy, and transparency to sectors ranging from used car dealerships to financial institutions.

Horizontally and vertically integrated vehicle databases combined with AI-powered appraisal logic

Real-time reflection of market dynamics for fair and adaptive pricing

Seamless API integration with existing enterprise systems

Scalability from hundreds to thousands of vehicles for fleet and asset managers

By reducing operational burdens for small and medium-sized dealerships while also empowering large corporations to manage vast fleets as strategic assets, Shuun-Car drives data-driven decision-making across the automotive value chain.

With a single VIN input, the platform instantly identifies manufacturer, model, grade, year, mileage, and even hidden equipment options, while AI algorithms forecast depreciation and optimize pricing strategies. This not only improves the accuracy and efficiency of appraisal workflows but also creates new opportunities in insurance, leasing, and financing where transparent vehicle valuation is critical.

Shuun-Car represents a paradigm shift away from traditional practices of on-site appraisal and negotiation, redefining vehicles as “visible and measurable assets.” It is a next-generation platform that harnesses AI and digital technology to bring clarity, trust, and scalability to the global automotive ecosystem.

Name: Grupa Auto Park
Description:
Zapraszamy serdecznie do współpracy z naszą renomowaną firmą, będącą jedynym autoryzowanym dealerem samochodów marki Toyota oraz Lexus w dwóch strategicznych lokalizacjach: Białymstoku oraz Lublinie.
Nasz salon w Białymstoku, założony przez spółkę "Auto Park" w 2000 roku, od lat stanowi filar doskonałej obsługi klienta. Od 2005 roku rozszerzyliśmy naszą działalność o ASD Toyoty w Kalinówce k. Lublina, co umożliwiło jeszcze szerszy dostęp do naszych wysokiej jakości pojazdów. Od października 2022 roku możemy Państwa również zaprosić do naszego nowoczesnego salonu Lexusa w Lublinie, zapewniając najwyższy standard obsługi i najnowocześniejsze modele samochodów tej prestiżowej marki.
Nasza firma stale rośnie, a zespół liczy już ponad 250 osób, które dzięki profesjonalnym szkoleniom gwarantują doskonałą obsługę i ciągły rozwój jakości naszych usług. Jesteśmy dumni z tego, że od lat jesteśmy liderem na lokalnym rynku, dostarczając najlepsze samochody zarówno klientom indywidualnym, jak i firmom.
Nieustannie poszerzamy naszą ofertę, oferując zarówno nowe, jak i używane auta, kompleksowe usługi finansowania i zarządzania flotą, a także serwis mechaniczny i blacharsko-lakierniczy.
Jesteśmy aktywnymi uczestnikami naszej społeczności, wspierając szereg inicjatyw oraz lokalne drużyny sportowe. Nasza firma wspiera podlaskie i lubelskie fundacje (m.in. Fundację Naszpikowani i Fundację Podlascy Aniołowie), a także jest sponsorem takich drużyn sportowych jak: UKS Dojlidy Białystok, Lowlanders Białystok, Żubry Białystok, Viking Fight Club, BAS Białystok, Jagiellonia Białystok oraz Miejski Klub Sportowy TBV Start Lublin. Dodatkowo, aktywnie uczestniczymy w programach stażowych i przygotowania zawodowego, współpracując z Politechniką Lubelską, Zespołem Szkół Mechanicznych im. Św. Józefa w Białymstoku, Instytutem Rozwoju Gospodarczego oraz Branżową Szkołą I Stopnia nr 10 w Białymstoku.
Przyjdź i dołącz do naszej rosnącej rodziny zadowolonych klientów i partnerów.

Name: Volt Group
Description:
"Üç il əvvəl iki tərəfdaşım və mən Azərbaycanın mobillik sektorunda iz buraxmaq üçün cəsarətli Vizyonu (VISION) olan bir şirkət quraraq inanılmaz səyahətə çıxdıq.

 2011-ci ildən bəri Çin avtomobil markalarının, o cümlədən Great Wall Motor və Havalın ilk investoru olmaqla, Çinin böyüyən NEV markaları ilə möhkəm əlaqələr qurmaq üçün təcrübəmdən istifadə etməkdən məmnunam. Bu, hər biri müəyyən bir bazar seqmentini hədəf alan altı françayzinq brendini rəsmi olaraq almağımıza səbəb oldu.

Çin mobillik sektorunda sürətlə inkişaf edən texnologiya dünyasında biz müştəriləri yeni texnologiyaların bir çox üstünlükləri ilə tanış etməkdə bizi ön sıraya qoyan ƏSAS DƏYƏRLƏRİ (CORE VALUES) qurmağı prioritet hesab etdik. 
ŞİRKƏT MƏDƏNİYYƏTimiz (COMPANY CULTURE) biznesə yanaşmamızı əks etdirir - innovativ, müştəri yönümlü və gələcəyə hesablanan.

Dinamik və sürətlə genişlənən komandamız interaktiv studiyalara çevrilmiş salonlarımızdan istifadə edərək sosial media vasitəsilə öz bilik və təcrübələrini paylaşa bilir. Bu, onları sürətlə böyüyən izləyici bazası ilə təsir edənlər (influencer) olmağa sövq etdi.

Uğurlu satış və satış sonrası xidmətlə yanaşı, biz həm yerli, həm də xarici sərmayələri cəlb edərək, korporativ icarə və taksi xidmətlərini şaxələndirmişik. Hökumətin alternativ enerjiyə keçidi və COP29-a dəstəyini bu yaxınlarda elan etməsi ilə strateji istiqamətimiz milli gündəliyə mükəmməl uyğun gəlir.

Gələcəyə baxarkən, 2028-ci ilə qədər pərakəndə satış bazarının 10%-ni və korporativ parkın ümumi payının 3%-ni elektrik nəqliyyat vasitələri ilə tutmaq üçün aydın HƏDƏF (GOAL)  qoymuşuq. Dinamik qlobal avtomobil sənayesində bizim MİSSİYAMımız (MISSION) aydındır. : Azərbaycanda mobillik sektorunun transformasiyasına liderlik etmək.

Azərbaycanda mobilliyin gələcəyini yenidən müəyyənləşdirərkən bu həyəcanverici səyahətdə bizə qoşulun!"                 
 
Emin Əsgərov
Təsisçi və icraçı direktor

Name: Transakauto Reims
Description:
TransakAuto est une agence automobile.

Fonctionnant comme une agence immobilière, nous sommes intermédiaires entre acheteurs et vendeurs.

Au sein d'un réseau d'une soixantaine d'agences sur tout le territoire national, notre équipe jeune et dynamique de TRANSAKAUTO Reims s'adaptent aux besoins des acheteurs et des vendeurs.

Notre objectif est de vous éviter toutes les préoccupations liées à la vente de votre véhicule : appels intempestifs, négociations agressives, essais non sécurisés, risques sur les règlements et risques administratifs (carte grise non faites par l'acquéreur).

Avec TRANSAKAUTO vendez SANS FRAIS votre véhicule et sans l‘immobiliser, si vous en avez besoin.

Une fois l’acheteur trouvé, nous pourrons lui proposer des services tels qu'une reprise, un financement ou des garanties constructeurs valables dans toute l'Europe.
Ce qui permettra de rassurer les futurs acheteurs et donc de booster la vente de notre client, le vendeur.

Faites donc confiance à Transakauto pour l'achat ou la vente de votre voiture !

Name: Autopark GmbH
Description:
Heute sind wir im Neuwagensegment mit drei starken Marken vertreten. Im Bereich Gebrauchtwagen und Service verkaufen und reparieren wir alle Automarken. Zudem sind wir mit durchschnittlich 300 lagernden Gebrauchtwagen eine der größten Gebrauchtwagenplattformen in ganz Westösterreich.
Im Schnitt verkaufen wir pro Jahr ca. 5.000 Neu- und Gebrauchtwagen und erzielen einen Umsatz von ca. € 100 Mio. Hinter diesen Zahlen arbeiten ca. 240 sehr motivierte und fleißige Mitarbeiter und Mitarbeiterinnen. In all unseren Standorten befinden sich modernste mechanische und elektronische Fachwerkstätten mit top-geschultem Personal, sowie mit integrierten Abteilungen für Karosseriespenglerei, Lackierung und Spot-Repair.

Im Bereich Ersatzteile und Zubehör sind wir heute erfolgreicher Großhandelspartner für knapp 30 Partnerbetriebe in Tirol, Salzburg, Osttirol, Vorarlberg und Südtirol. Für uns zählen jedoch nicht nur die harten Fakten und Zahlen. Unser Leitmotto im Betrieb ist das „Good Feeling“, das gute Gefühl, welches in allen Bereichen unseres Unternehmens zu spüren ist. Die Basis dafür ist, dass sich unsere Mitarbeiter und somit in weiterer Folge unsere Kunden und Geschäftspartner wohlfühlen.

Name: Valec Renault
Description:
A Renault inova e produz carros no Brasil desde 1998, ano de inauguração do Complexo Ayrton Senna em São José dos Pinhais no Paraná. Ao longo de duas décadas, a marca já produziu cerca de 3 milhões de veículos e quase 4 milhões de motores destinados ao mercado nacional e também a vários estados americanos.
 
A VALEC RENAULT nasce no mesmo ano de inauguração da fábrica Renault no Brasil, em 1998, com a concessionária em Jundiaí (SP).
 
Depois disso, com objetivos ambiciosos, a Valec Renault seguiu apostando no mercado automotivo da região. Em setembro do ano 2000, chegava à cidade de Sorocaba.
 
Quatro anos depois, em 2004, já estava em Campinas e, em junho de 2005, tamanho o sucesso, a VALEC abriu sua segunda unidade na cidade. Já em dezembro de 2011 inaugurou-se a loja na cidade de Valinhos.
 
Assim, com mais de 20 anos de tradição a Valec Renault se consolidou na região, ultrapassando até as fronteiras das cidades em que atua. Muitos são os fatores que influenciaram nessa conquista. A Valec acreditou na expansão de seus serviços e qualificação em todos os setores. Sendo assim, além de oferecer toda a gama de veículos de passeio 0km da marca, é referência quando se trata de utilitários, cuidando da manutenção e transformação desses veículos adequando-os para a necessidade de cada cliente.
 
Com uma equipe altamente especializada, os profissionais Pro+ da Valec Renault atendem PCD, taxistas, frotistas e clientes profissionais. Além de darem toda a orientação na hora de escolher o veículo, indicam a melhor forma de pagamento, assim como o pacote de serviços mais apropriado para cada caso.
 
Os clientes da Valec ainda têm segurança e facilidade na hora da manutenção. Com pacotes de revisão à preço fechado, revisão em até 60 minutos e mecânicos capacitados para a realização dos serviços e sanar todas as dúvidas. Tudo isso contando com condições especiais e peças originais do maior balcão de peças do interior, outro diferencial da Valec Renault.

Im Porsche Zentrum Niederbayern/Plattling steht stets eines im Fokus: Sie – und Ihre Leidenschaft für Sportwagen. Ob klassisch oder vollelektrisch: Bei uns finden Sie alles, was das Herz eines Sportwagen-Enthusiasten höherschlagen lässt. Menschen, die Ihre Begeisterung teilen und unvergessliche Erlebnisse, die wir für Sie schaffen – auf der Rennstrecke wie auf den Traumstraßen dieser Welt.

Name: Vakgarage Voskuilen & DOCHTERS
Description:
Vakgarage Voskuilen & DOCHTERS is een sociaal familiebedrijf in Houten bij Utrecht. U bent bij ons aan het juiste adres voor reparatie en onderhoud van bedrijf en personen voertuigen van alle merken. Wij zijn lid van de Vakgarage groep met meer dan 300 Vestigingen in Nederland. Onze naam staat niet alleen symbool voor de volgende generatie die nu aan het roer staat, maar weerspiegelt ook onze toewijding aan diversiteit en moderne waarden, die we koesteren binnen ons familiebedrijf.

Vakgarage Voskuilen & DOCHTERS is a social family business in Houten near Utrecht. You have come to the right place for repair and maintenance of company and personal vehicles of all brands. We are a member of the Vakgarage group with more than 300 branches in the Netherlands. Our name not only symbolizes the next generation at the helm, but also reflects our commitment to diversity and modern values, which we cherish within our family business.

Name: Jim Gauthier Chevrolet
Description:
New and Pre-Owned Vehicle Dealer and Repair Centre

Opening its doors at 1400 McPhillips in 1990 Jim Gauthier Chevrolet is a premier sales & service destination. Backed by the reputation earned by our founder Jim Gauthier we are known as the home of the Big Guy deal. That big guy deal is our promise to you, the customer, that we will do everything in our power to provide you with the best price and financing options possible for a new or quality used vehicle and support you in your vehicle ownership experience for years to come.

Sales
At Jim Gauthier Chevrolet we are a customer first dealership. That means we look for sales specialists who are enthusiastic about matching the right person with the right vehicle. Our sales team works hard to stay informed so they can answer any questions you may have and are all about making your vehicle purchase experience both easy and positive.

Finance
As one of Manitoba’s top dealerships our financial advisors receive access to the best rates from a multitude of banking options. This means our business and finance team can get you the best rate and terms possible for your next vehicle purchase even if you have lower than average credit.

Service
We have you covered for all your vehicle needs from every day routine maintenance to major mechanical repairs. We make it easy for you to care for your vehicle so that you can drive for as long and as trouble free as possible. With Shuttle service

Name: CROSSBIKE.US
Description:
In December 2023, CROSSBIKE launched their  inaugural, limited edition, luxury electric bike with uncompromised design and performance, “THE MX1”.

Based near both coasts in California and North Carolina, CROSSBIKE sells their luxury motocross-style electric bikes at fine retailers, predominantly upscale bike stores with a shared passion for our brand.

At CROSSBIKE, we do NOT sell our luxury ebikes online or at the big box retailers. When someone comes to our website and wants to place an order online, we refer that order to one of our local bike dealers.   If there isn’t one in the area, we sign up a new dealer.  Why?  Because when it comes to buying an ebike, people want to touch it, feel it, and ride it.  And when they want to customize it, adjust it, or fix it, they want to be able to go to their local bike store. The way things used to be.

CROSSBIKE will always be a premium brand at a fair price, designed for our motocross and biking enthusiasts.  We listened to the experts that helped us build and design our brand. All our models will incorporate high-quality, best-in-class parts, with timeless Italian design.  

CROSSBIKE: “California Engineering Meets Italian Design”.

NOTE: Are You A Bike Store Owner?  We are looking for dealers.

Name: Stellantis &You Polska
Description:
Szukasz samochodu nowego lub używanego? Dobrze trafiłeś!
Zapewniamy kompletną ofertę sprzedaży, serwisu i napraw blacharskich. W naszym salonie oferujemy Państwu pełną gamę samochodów marki Citroen i oddajemy do dyspozycji grono naszych wysoko wykwalifikowanych doradców, którzy przygotują skrojoną na miarę ofertę samochodu nowego lub używanego, jego finansowania i ubezpieczenia.

W ramach naszej działalności oferujemy
• Sprzedaż samochodów nowych.
• Skup i sprzedaż samochodów używanych w programie Citroen Select jak również samochodów innych marek.
• Autoryzowany serwis mechaniczny oraz blacharsko-lakierniczy.
• Sprzedaż oryginalnych akcesoriów Citroen.
• Finansowanie zakupu samochodu nowego lub używanego z wykorzystaniem kredytu i/lub leasingu.
• Ubezpieczenia komunikacyjne i inne różnych firm.
Jesteśmy z Państwem już ponad 15 lat, a zadowolenie naszych Klientów jest dla nas wielką satysfakcją i wartością. Wychodząc naprzeciw Państwa oczekiwaniom nieustannie rozwijamy się i dbamy o jak najwyższą jakość obsługi każdego dnia.
• Jesteśmy do Państwa dyspozycji przez 6 dni w tygodniu.
• Dzięki wykwalifikowanej i zaangażowanej kadrze utrzymujemy najwyższy poziom świadczenia usług serwisowych. Nasi pracownicy zdobywają podium w Mistrzostwach Świata Ekspertów technicznych.
• Szanujemy Państwa czas, dlatego wprowadziliśmy nowatorski sposób komunikacji z Państwem przez aplikację video i szukamy w tym zakresie kolejnych rozwiązań.
Serdecznie zapraszamy do kontaktu!
Oto 4 główne powody, dla których warto nas odwiedzić
1. Jazda testowa na życzenie.
2. Autoryzowany serwis mechaniczny i blacharsko- lakierniczy .
3. Auto zastępcze na czas serwisu.
4. Oryginalne części Citroen.

Name: Auto Combi
Description:

We bieden altijd een mobiliteitsoplossing die bij u past.

Name: VOLT MOBILITY
Description:
The Lessor Car Rental LLC trading as Volt Mobility is a Dubai-based corporation specializing in the leasing and operation of electric vehicles (EVs), with a unique focus on developing the infrastructure needed to simplify the transition to EVs.

Our core business centers around the operation of commercial and heavy-duty vehicles, offering tailored solutions for businesses while providing comprehensive charging infrastructure to support our fleet. Additionally, we serve the passenger transport sector, specifically targeting limousine fleets with eco-friendly, electric alternatives.

With strong, reliable partnerships in over 100 countries, Volt Mobility is at the forefront of building the essential charging infrastructure that helps businesses and governments reduce their carbon footprint and move towards a more sustainable future.

Name: Anchor Vans Ltd
Description:
Anchor Vans is a long established specialist light commercial vehicle dealer. Our senior management have over 25 years Motor Trade experience at the highest level. Our Chairman is a Fellow of the Institute of The Motor Industry.

We know everything there is to know about supplying new and used vans at UNBEATABLE PRICES.
How do we do it ?

    * We supply brand new vehicles to order.
    * We supply all makes and quote prices for all vehicles in one phonecall.
    * We ensure all vehicles are registered for you at DVLC Swansea.
    * We do ALL the paperwork - it couldn't be easier for you.

Every new vehicle comes with a minimum of two years' manufacturers warranty from the day it leaves our dealer, and many have a third years' warranty subject to certain conditions. (Varies by manufacturer and source of supply)

Our sales team operate nationally and we have supplied vehicles from Edinburgh in the North to the Channel Isles in the South.

Our office support staff are always on hand to help you with insurance, accessories, registration and deliveries.

We have two main goals: to give enormous savings to our customers and to be easy to do business with.

Name: Kelowna Toyota
Description:
Since we opened Kelowna Toyota at our first location on Highway 97 near the Kelowna Fire hall in 1970, our staff has grown from 12 to 42 team members. We out grew our original location and moved into a brand new facility in 1995 on Leathead Road, where we are still located today.

We have always believed that Kelowna Toyota plays a strong part in our community. We are proud to support the Kelowna Community Food Bank, the Kelowna General Hospital, Crimestoppers and assist in the fund raising efforts of local service clubs. You will also find Kelowna Toyota involved with the Kelowna YMCA and providing a Bursary for UBCO Nursing & Business faculties.

The Kelowna Toyota team has enjoyed the benefits of the Okanagan Lifestyle along with the friendly association with so many clients. We are committed to providing our customers with the best automobiles possible from Toyota and following up with the best service possible in all areas of the dealership.

We would like to take the opportunity to thank our loyal customers for their business over the past 40 plus years and look forward to serving our community for many more years to come.

Name: Acorn Specialist Cars
Description:
Acorn Specialist Cars' inception was born out of our love for luxury, performance and classic cars. We have lots of experience in the premium sector having operated in this segment over many years before Acorn Motor Group and recognised an opportunity in the market for the hand-picked selected stock that had been sourced not necessarily based on price but on the quality, service history and provenance of the vehicle we were buying on the basis that if we were personally buying a car of this nature these would be possibly the most important factors to us.

Personal is what defines our business; by that, we mean the service our customers receive when enquiring or buying from Acorn Specialist Cars. Our dedicated Specialist team are on hand to help make your purchase a seamless and enjoyable experience. Unlike other businesses offering similar stock, we have the benefit of being able to be selective because we do not suffer from the same stock pressures as other businesses because our Specialist Cars business forms part of our wider Group.

Name: Valley Imports
Description:
Valley Imports provides "service, above and beyond expectations, to those who need transportation." This simple philosophy underscores everything we do and has made us very successful.

Founded in November 1975 by the William Wallwork family, Valley Imports started with four franchises:  Audi, Volkswagen, Mercedes Benz and Porsche.  We have since added the Mistubishi line and are now the only dealer in North Dakota to carry all five of these world-class brands.

A true full-service dealership, we provide quality service and an extensive parts inventory in addition to the wide selection of new and used vehicles available at our state-of-the-art facility.

For three generations, we have served the auto-buying needs of our consumers and played an instrumental role in the automotive industry.  We will continue to strive for excellence in both these areas for generations to come.

Name: Degrifcars.com
Description:
Degrifcars.com, le parcours le plus rapide entre vous et la meilleure occasion, c’est nous !

Présents sur le territoire depuis plus de 20 ans, c'est avec plaisir que notre entreprise vous accompagnera de la recherche à la remise des clés de votre nouveau véhicule. Que vous soyez à Lille ou à Marseille, nous livrons partout en France, particulier ou professionnel nous avons les services adaptés à votre besoin. L’ADN de Degrifcars.com est avant tout d’être un mandataire automobile et distributeur de voitures neuves et d’occasions récentes proposant des tarifs très compétitifs ! Notre site de vente en ligne propose jusqu’à 5000 véhicules de la berline au SUV en passant par l’utilitaire.

Multimarques, vous saurez trouver le véhicule de vos envies et ce à un prix ou à mensualité imbattable ! Au-delà de notre site, nos bureaux vous sont ouverts, pour un café ou pour répondre à vos questions. Besoin de véhicules d’entreprises, d'un break pour accueillir votre bébé, un SUV familial ou d'une berline tout confort ? Notre accompagnement est complet : location avec option d'achat (LOA), location longue durée (LLD), leasing, crédit, reprise de votre véhicule, extensions de garantie, livraison à domicile ou en point relais…

Notre leit-motiv: vous proposer le véhicule neuf ou d'occasion récente le plus adapté à vos besoins au meilleur prix, et ce en toute transparence !

Name: J.C. Lewis Motor Co
Description:
J.C. Lewis Ford is proud to be Georgia's oldest, continually owned and operated automobile dealership. We are proud to have served the Coastal Empire (with locations in Savannah, Statesboro and Hinesville) and the surrounding community since 1912. We are extremely grateful to all of our outstanding customers and exceptional employees who have supported us over the years. Without their material contributions and dedication we would not have had the opportunity to serve the community for all these years. 

We believe in doing business the right way and are committed to transparency in every step of the car buying and servicing process. We're always looking for qualified Sales professionals and Technicians that want to join a winning team, and we believe in investing in our people!

Today, J.C. Lewis Motor Company is the proud franchisee of the Ford Motor Company; please visit our facilities in Savannah, Statesboro and Hinvesville, Georgia. We are also proud to carry the Lincoln Motor Company flag at our Statesboro store.

Name: TLU Automotives
Description:

Name: Shortline Automotive Group
Description:
Based in Aurora, the Shortline Auto Group has served the transportation needs of Colorado's Front Range since 1987.  Family-owned and operated, Shortline is committed to our customers, our staff and our community for the long run.

Each of our dealerships is focused on our customers' total satisfaction with the vehicles, parts and services we provide.  Our goal is to make the car-buying process as smooth and stress-free as possible, and to continue that positive relationship for the life of your car with top quality service and maintenance. Name: گروه خودرویی ستوده
Description:
گروه خودرویی ستوده در حوزه فروش و خدمات پس از فروش خودرو توسط آقای مجید ستوده در بهمن ۱۳۹۵ آغاز به کار کرد. 
این مجموعه با هدف ایجاد تجربه ای بهتر در فرآیند خرید مشتریان از شرکت های خودروسازی و نیز ارائه خدمات پس از فروش با استانداردهای روز دنیا شکل گرفت.
گروه خودرویی ستوده ابتدا با نمایندگی رسمی مدیران خودرو کد ۴۰۱ آغاز و هم اکنون با بزرگتر شدن اهداف پیش رو ، با تیمی بالغ بر ۲۰۰ نفر نمایندگی رسمی شرکت های خودرویی متعددی را اخذ نموده است .
این مجموعه هم اکنون به صورت چند برندی با بیش از ۱۰ مرکز  در حال فعالیت و گسترش می باشد که نمایندگی های فعال شامل : فونیکس و ام وی ام ، کرمان موتور ، لاماری ، ماموت خودرو و فردا موتور می باشد.
استفاده از نیروهای خبره باعث شده تا با ساختار علوم مدیریتی روز دنیا به همراه مدیران و پرسنل کارآزموده این مسیر برای ما هموارتر گردد.

Name: Atamian Honda
Description:
When you’re looking for a dealership with its roots planted firmly in the community it serves, you know you can count on Atamian Honda. The Atamian family has been in the auto business for almost 100 years, going back to the years following the First World War. It was in 1924, in fact, that Nish Atamian traded a horse and trailer from a milk company in exchange for a new Dodge. From those humble beginnings sprang a family-owned and operated business that has expanded and improved with every generation.

Over the years, the Atamian family’s auto business has been handed down from generation to generation, and in that time it has dealt in Dodge, Ford Hudson, Rambler, Cadillac, Pontiac, and a wide range of other models. It was in 1976 that Bob Atamian was given the opportunity to own a Honda franchise, and thanks to his insight he was able to get in business with what has become one of the most recognized and praised auto brands in the industry.

Today, Atamian Honda sells hundreds of new Honda vehicles—from the Honda Civic sedan to the Honda Fit Hatchback and Honda Pilot SUV—as well as a wide range of quality pre-owned vehicles. We are located at 150 Main St in Tewskbury, MA, where our state-of-the-art Honda franchise sits between Route 38 and I-495 and spans a tremendous 40,000 square feet.

We’re happy to say that we have helped thousands of individuals and families throughout Lowell, Lawrence, Westford, Billerica, and Andover over the years, as well as drivers throughout the surrounding areas. Come enjoy the benefits of working with a dealership that has nearly 100 years in the business and a genuine commitment to delivering quality vehicles and genuine customer service every single day

Name: GRUPO VITTACAR
Description:
Somos o Grupo Vittacar e estamos no mercado há 20 anos, com a Matriz na cidade de Vitória/ES. Iniciamos nossas atividades no ramo de veículos Multimarcas NOVOS e SEMINOVOS. 
Atualmente o Grupo representa a Marca BRP, com concessionárias  no estado do Espírito Santo (região sudeste) e no estado da Bahia e Ceará ( região Nordeste). 
No segmento de motocicletas, operamos com as marcas Royal Enfield e Triumph, com unidades em Salvador (Triumph e Royal Enfield) e Fortaleza ( Royal Enfield). No segundo semestre de 2022, demos inicio a representação da marca KTM, atuando no estado da Bahia e Espírito Santo. 
O Grupo Vittacar representa também a Marca de Tratores e Implementos Agrícolas Mahindra, com lojas no Sul de estado do Espírito Santo (Guaçuí) e ao Norte (Linhares). Em expansão para o Sul e Oeste do estado da Bahia.
Faz parte do Grupo a empresa Marina Vix, responsável pela Logística (Armazenamento) e Locação de Equipamentos e Veículos para as demais empresas.
Com o Portifólio amplo em segmentos, estamos sempre projetando novos rumos para uma maior profissionalização e avanço no ramos automobilístico.

Name: Wearside Autoparc
Description:
Wearside Autoparc is the North East's largest independently owned used car retail site. With over 350 cars and vans always in physical stock the selection on offer is second to none.

Wearside Autoparc is owned by a local Sunderland family and has operated in the Wearside area for over 30 years. The full-time team of friendly staff at Wearside Autoparc have unparalleled experience of the motor trade and retailing cars, with a combined experience between them of 175 years.

At Wearside Autoparc all our cars and vans are supplied serviced, with a full clean MOT and a six month warranty. In addition, all cars and vans are fully valeted and supplied with a Free twelve month breakdown and roadside recovery policy. Extended warranties are available at a very reasonable additional cost. In addition all cars come with a Free 30 day GAP insurance.

Wearside Autoparc uses its own highly trained technicians in our own purpose-built modern workshops. All retail cars are prepared to exacting standards and we have a dedicated after sales team to ensure customer satisfaction remains long after the date of delivery.

Due to our size and critical mass our buyers are highly experienced in sourcing quality, value for money stock, thus ensuring our cars and vans for sale are always desirable and very well priced.

Name: Renting Empresarial
Description:
Somos líderes en soluciones de Renting Empresarial diseñadas para ayudar a las empresas a optimizar su flujo de caja, mejorar su competitividad y potenciar su crecimiento. Ofrecemos alternativas flexibles y personalizadas para el financiamiento de activos, permitiendo a las organizaciones acceder a vehículos sin la necesidad de realizar grandes inversiones iniciales.

Con años de experiencia en el mercado, nos especializamos en ofrecer soluciones de renting que se ajustan a las necesidades específicas de cada empresa, desde PyMEs hasta corporaciones. Nuestro enfoque se basa en la transparencia, la eficiencia y la innovación, lo que nos permite ofrecer opciones que optimizan recursos, maximizan el rendimiento operativo y minimizan riesgos financieros.

¿Por qué elegirnos?
Flexibilidad: Diseñamos planes de renting adaptados a las necesidades de tu empresa, con opciones a medida que se ajustan a tu flujo de caja.
Ahorro de capital: Permite a tu empresa invertir en el crecimiento sin comprometer su capital de trabajo.
Innovación constante: Accede a vehículos manteniendo siempre a tu empresa a la vanguardia.
Simplificación operativa: Nos encargamos de la gestión de los activos, brindándote una solución integral que reduce la carga administrativa.
Riesgo controlado: Ofrecemos soluciones asegurando que tu empresa mantenga una operatividad continua sin sorpresas.

Name: Auto Thüllen
Description:
Seit über hundert Jahren steht der Name Thüllen für Autokompetenz. Es ist eine lange und erfolgreiche Entwicklung vom kleinen Transportbetrieb nach dem Ersten Weltkrieg bis zur heutigen Firmengruppe mit fünf renommierten Kfz-Markenvertretungen und acht Standorten von der Voreifel bis zum Niederrhein.

Attraktive Ausstellungsräume, moderne Werkstätten, Diagnose- und Wartungssysteme auf dem stets aktuellen Stand der Entwicklung sind notwendig. Entscheidend aber sind die Menschen, die damit die Dienstleistungen für unsere Kunden erbringen. Deren fachliche Qualifikation ist Voraussetzung für gute Beratung und einwandfreie Arbeit. Der persönliche Kontakt, oft über Jahrzehnte hinweg, schafft das Vertrauen, das unsere Kunden hier bei Thüllen besonders zu schätzen wissen.

Ausschlaggebend für unseren Erfolg sind Leistungsbereitschaft, der Wille zur Verbesserung, eine gute Portion Realitätssinn und das Vertrauen in die eigene Leistungsfähigkeit — in der Vergangenheit und für die Zukunft. Dabei hilft uns eine ganz besondere Verbundenheit zum Unternehmen, Kontinuität und Verantwortungsbewusstsein — nur einige Punkte, die das Management unseres über mehrere Generationen familiengeführten Betriebs auszeichnen.

Name: MAZDA Lille - Groupe Easy motors
Description:
Kodo Automobiles – Votre référence Mazda à Lille depuis 2012

Depuis 2012, Kodo Automobiles accompagne les particuliers comme les professionnels dans l’achat, le financement et l’entretien de leurs véhicules Mazda au sein de la métropole lilloise.

Concession officielle Mazda Lille, nous portons une vision claire de l’automobile :
 une expérience fondée sur la confiance, la transparence, la qualité de service et la durabilité, bien au-delà de la simple vente d’un véhicule.

Nous commercialisons l’ensemble de la gamme Mazda, en véhicules neufs et d’occasion, rigoureusement sélectionnés et contrôlés : SUV, berlines, motorisations thermiques, hybrides et électrifiées. Chaque projet est étudié avec précision afin de proposer une solution adaptée aux usages réels de nos clients.

 Des solutions de financement sur mesure
Parce que chaque situation est unique, nous proposons plusieurs modes d’acquisition :
	•	Paiement comptant
	•	LOA (Location avec Option d’Achat)
	•	LLD (Location Longue Durée)
	•	Crédit-bail pour les professionnels

Nos équipes vous conseillent de manière objective afin d’optimiser votre budget, votre fiscalité et votre sérénité dans le temps.

 Un service après-vente expert et certifié Mazda
Entretien, mécanique, carrosserie, diagnostic électronique, pièces d’origine : nos techniciens formés aux standards Mazda assurent un suivi rigoureux, fiable et durable, dans le respect de la performance et de la sécurité de votre véhicule.

 Nos engagements au quotidien
	•	Proximité et relation durable
	•	Conseil personnalisé et transparent
	•	Exigence de qualité à chaque étape
	•	Satisfaction client au cœur de nos décisions

Chez Kodo Automobiles, nous croyons qu’un véhicule n’est pas qu’un produit, mais le reflet d’un choix réfléchi, d’un accompagnement humain et d’une relation de confiance dans le temps.

 Mazda Lille – Kodo Automobiles
Votre partenaire mobilité aujourd’hui… et pour demain.

Name: Autohaus Wormser GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei einem der führenden BMW & MINI Autohäuser in den Regionen Erlangen, Forchheim und Coburg! Seit über 50 Jahren sind wir stolzer Partner der BMW AG und stehen für höchste Qualität, exzellenten Service und Leidenschaft für automobile Innovation.

 Unsere breite Produktpalette umfasst sowohl Neu- als auch Gebrauchtwagen der renommierten Marken BMW und MINI. Mit einem kompetenten Verkaufsteam stehen wir unseren Kunden bei der Auswahl ihres Traumfahrzeugs beratend zur Seite und sorgen für ein erstklassiges Kauferlebnis.

 Darüber hinaus bieten wir professionelle Serviceleistungen für BMW und MINI Fahrzeuge an. Von regelmäßigen Wartungen über Reparaturen bis hin zu Inspektionen – unser erfahrenes Serviceteam sorgt dafür, dass Ihr Fahrzeug stets in Bestzustand bleibt. Wir verwenden ausschließlich Originalteile und Zubehör, um die Performance und Langlebigkeit Ihres Fahrzeugs zu gewährleisten.

 Unser Engagement für Kundenzufriedenheit geht über den Verkauf und Service hinaus. Wir streben danach, ein umfassendes Erlebnis zu bieten, das weit über die Erwartungen hinausgeht. Bei uns stehen die individuellen Bedürfnisse und Wünsche unserer Kunden stets im Mittelpunkt.

 Besuchen Sie uns in einem unserer Standorte in Erlangen, Forchheim oder Coburg und erleben Sie die Faszination von BMW und MINI hautnah. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie persönlich kennenzulernen und Ihnen unsere erstklassigen Dienstleistungen anzubieten.

Name: Pedder Nissan
Description:
We have been in the automotive Industry in Hemet, CA since 2008. We are located at 200 Carriage Circle in Hemet, California. 

Pedder Nissan became a stand alone Nissan franchise in August 2008 after being acquired from The Gosch Auto Group (Gosch Nissan). 

David Pedder the owner of Pedder Nissan has been a leader in sales, service, and customer satisfaction and has achieved numerous local and regional awards as acting General Manager and Co-Owner of other Automotive Dealership's within the Southern California Region. Recently including but not limited to Rogers & Rogers Toyota & Rogers & Rogers Nissan, before becoming the Dealer Principal and Owner of Pedder Nissan in Hemet, California. Pedder Nissan is currently ranked in the top 10 percentile in Riverside County out of over 200 independent and franchise dealers for car and truck sales, and is the largest single point stand alone dealership of any make in Hemet, Ca. 

From our inception, our family philosophy of doing business has remained the same... "Be Honest & Treat People Fairly." We have also been blessed with a large number of repeat and referral customers, and we work hard to continue to be deserving of your loyalty. We invite you to browse our web site at www.peddernissan.com for more information about Pedder Nissans' New Vehicle line up and Used Car & Truck Superstore! We hope to see you soon. Please give us an opportunity to earn your business... and remember It's Better at Pedder!!

Name: Porsche Centre Swindon
Description:
Our Porsche Centre in Swindon is conveniently located just 3 minutes away from Junction 16 of the M4 motorway, making it easily accessible for those living in Swindon and the surrounding areas such as Wiltshire, and Berkshire, as well as nearby cities such as Reading and Oxford.

At Porsche Centre Swindon, we cater to all your Porsche needs by providing a range of services related to Porsche vehicles. This includes new and pre-owned Porsche sales, all of which are covered by a 24-month Porsche approved warranty, as well as financing options such as Personal Contract Purchase, Personal Contract Hire, Hire Purchase, and Leasing. Additionally, our Swindon Centre is home to our Porsche Classic division.

Our team of Porsche-trained technicians are dedicated to helping your Porsche perform at its best by offering services such as servicing, MOTs and repairs. We also offer genuine Porsche parts and accessories, including Classic Parts, as well as Porsche Lifestyle merchandise, which are all available for purchase at our Centre.

Please get in touch with Porsche Centre Swindon for all your Porsche sales, servicing, MOT, repairs, classic and accessories needs. Take advantage of customer parking, disabled parking and access, a comfortable waiting area, complimentary refreshments, and free Wi-Fi during your visit.

Našim zákazníkom ponúkame kompletný servisný balík:
– testovacie jazdy
– konfiguráciu vozidla na mieru
– výkup jazdeného vozidla na protiúčet
– predaj vozidiel s výhodným financovaním a poistením
– autorizovaný servis a garančné prehliadky

AutoPalace je súčasťou skupiny AutoBinck Car Distribution International – jedného z lídrov v oblasti automobilovej distribúcie v Európe, s viac než 100-ročnou históriou a silným medzinárodným zázemím.

Name: AutoLynks
Description:
At AutoLynks, we’re redefining how Egyptians buy and finance new cars. We’re a next-generation automotive marketplace that blends the convenience of online shopping with the trust and tangibility of modern offline hubs.

Why We Exist:
The traditional car buying experience in Egypt is outdated, stressful, and opaque. We launched AutoLynks to change that — making the process smarter, faster, and more transparent. By merging digital simplicity with real-world support, we deliver a seamless hybrid model that meets today’s customer expectations.

Our DNA:
We’re not traditional car dealers. We’re a team that comes from tech, equipped with deep experience in digitizing stagnant traditional industries —Today we're transforming how people buy and finance new cars, disrupting one of the last offline industries in Egypt and the region.

Name: Naza Automotive Holdings Sdn Bhd
Description:
Naza Automotive Holdings Sdn Bhd is the holding company for the automotive division under the Naza Group, providing services and support to its eight subsidiary companies within the division. Under this umbrella, the Naza Automotive Division manages vehicle distribution, premium brands and aftersales services throughout Malaysia. We proudly serve as the sole importer and distributor of Suzuki Malaysia, Ducati Malaysia and Maserati Malaysia. Additionally, we are the sole importer of Completely Built-Up (CBU) units for Mercedes-Benz Malaysia. Our subsidiary, Naza Motor Trading, specializes in the sale of premium reconditioned vehicles.

In addition to our core distribution operations, we have strategically diversified within the automotive sector expanding into nationwide transport operations, credit and leasing services and insurance renewal solutions. This diversification enables us to deliver comprehensive, end-to-end mobility support across the entire automotive value chain.

Name: Green Wave Electric Vehicles
Description:
Green Wave is NH's first and only dedicated electric vehicle provider, with a focus on making electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles available to people throughout New England. We are focused on 3 things: 
(1) Have fun! Electric Vehicles are fun to drive, and we have fun in our work every day.
(2) Keep Learning!  EVs are new, and we are here to be an educational resource for people who are interested. We are always learning ourselves so that we can be a resource to our community.
(3) Make it Better! We are a business built on sustainability, and we are here to make the world a better place by accelerating the transition away from fossil fuels. The Triple Bottom Line of people, planet, and profit are in our DNA, and we are here to make our world and the communities we serve a better place.

Come check us out in our new showroom on Route 1 in North Hampton, or message us for a virtual, online consultation today!

Name: Edwardstown Mazda
Description:
Edwardstown Mazda is a team of high performing motor industry professionals.

Our great people make us a great motor group. We are passionate, loyal, and deeply committed to developing positive, lasting relationships with each other and with our customers.

The long-established family ethos of Edwardstown Mazda is very important to us. While we work for our own families, we also have pride in working for the Edwardstown Mazda family.

It is these family values of quality, honesty and integrity that makes us different to every other car dealership and guarantee a unique standard of customer service.

We call this the Edwardstown Mazda Experience.

This experience starts when you purchase a vehicle from our dealership - the very best range, options, price, and sales knowledge in South Australia.

The experience continues every time you have your vehicle serviced at one of our service centres. You can expect state of the art service facilities, airport lounge- style hospitality, highly trained service technicians and a promise that the job will be finished on time and on budget.

When it comes time to upgrade your vehicle, we will ensure your experience is memorable and rewarding with our personalised selection and purchase process and the best trade-in price in SA.

And as an Edwardstown Mazda customer, you will also get an opportunity to access a range of rewards and participate in our Community Care program.

It's all part of the Edwardstown Mazda Experience.

Name: Dash Drive
Description:
Dash Drive is a leading provider of flexible and affordable car, van, and minibus hire across Cornwall, Plymouth, and Devon. As part of the Dash Group, a family-owned and proudly Cornish business, we deliver trusted vehicle rental services to both private and business customers throughout the South West.

With depots in Redruth and Saltash, our team provides easy access to a wide range of modern vehicles — from small cars and vans to Luton box vans, tippers, refrigerated vans, and minibuses. Whether you need a vehicle for a day, a week, or on a long-term basis, we offer simple, flexible hire options with competitive pricing and outstanding customer service.

We are specialists in business vehicle hire, working closely with companies of all sizes to provide reliable transport solutions, including short-term hires, flexible 28-day rentals, and fully managed long-term arrangements. From trades and contractors to delivery companies, event organisers, and production crews — we understand the transport needs of local businesses.

At Dash Drive, we pride ourselves on delivering a hassle-free service, local knowledge, and well-maintained vehicles ready to work. Whether for business or personal use, our aim is to make vehicle hire easy, flexible, and cost-effective.

Get in touch to see how we can help keep you moving.

For over 60 years our family-owned dealership has been committed to providing the best service and sales experience in Chicagoland. At Bettenhausen Automotive, we believe in making you feel at home in our welcoming and hassle-free environment.

Chicago’s Best Dealership
The minute you walk through the doors and speak with our friendly non-commissioned sales and service staff, you will come to realize how we became Chicagoland’s “One Price” Chrysler Jeep Dodge Ram FIAT dealership since 1992. This has fueled our decision to continue to grow and maintain a level of service that most people have never experienced.

In the spring of 2017, we finished our largest renovation to date, with our new state of the art showroom, offices, and car service center car service center, so that we may better serve our valued customers. With a more spacious showroom, five additional service bays, and more, we have the most customer-friendly dealership in the area.

Check out our updated new cars deals and car service specials! We’ll take care of your Chrysler, Jeep, Dodge, Ram repair needs and more!

Our Commitment to Customers
One thing that has not and will not be changed, however, is our commitment to complete customer satisfaction. With the dedication from our staff, we have made it our mission to provide you with a more enjoyable car buying experience with our One Bottom Line Price and No Hassle sales approach.

Our family values, honesty, and fair business practices help set us apart, and will continue to do so for the Bettenhausen family for generations to come. We are continuously seeking new ways in which we may better serve our customers.

We invite you to come visit us today and experience the difference for yourself. We know that you will find that Bettenhausen is the best dealership in Chicagoland! Just ask someone who knows.

Name: LEXUS WARSZAWA-PUŁAWSKA
Description:
W kwietniu 2009 na rynku motoryzacyjnym pojawiła się nowa Autoryzowana Stacja Obsługi marki Lexus. Siedziba salonu mieści się w Warszawie przy ulicy Puławskiej, będącej mekką salonów samochodowych wielu uznanych marek.

Firma z tradycjami
Autosalon Lexus Warszawa - Puławska to kolejne dziecko firmy CHODZEŃ, która od przeszło 40 lat wiedzie prym na stołecznym rynku motoryzacyjnym. Właściciele, Lech i Piotr Chodzeń prowadzą z ogromnym zaangażowaniem i powodzeniem dwie Autoryzowane Stacje Obsługi Toyoty, dlatego też naturalnym etapem rozwoju firmy było otwarcie największego w Polsce Autosalonu LEXUS wraz z Autoryzowanym Serwisem i Działem Części. Stacja firmy CHODZEŃ dysponuje również, jak na światowe standardy przystało, pełną gamą samochodów Lexus do jazd testowych oraz gwarantuje każdemu Klientowi Serwisu samochód zastępczy na czas naprawy.

Profesjonalna obsługa gwarantem sukcesu 
Zadowolenie Klientów to dla firmy CHODZEŃ priorytet, dlatego też w swoich szeregach zatrudnia grono specjalistów ds. sprzedaży oraz wysoko wykwalifikowany zespół ekspertów z wieloletnią praktyką w branży motoryzacyjnej marek Premium. Profesjonalna obsługa Klienta oraz przyjazna i ciepła atmosfera panująca w salonie, począwszy od działu sprzedaży po serwis to podstawowy, to najważniejszy element wyróżniający nas spośród konkurencji.

To dopiero początek
Trzy pierwsze miesiące funkcjonowania Autoryzowanej Stacji Lexus Warszawa - Puławska pokazały, że obrany przez właścicieli kierunek jest słuszny, a Klienci tej marki oczekują obsługi na najwyższym poziomie oraz możliwości wyboru szczególnie na rynku mazowieckim. Zadania, jakie postawiła sobie firma na następne lata to dalsza profesjonalna i kompleksowa obsługa Klientów, ekspansja na sąsiadujące regiony, a co za tym idzie zwiększenie zatrudnienia.

Name: PAIG Japan Automobile Investment GK
Description:
独Volkswagen AG が100% 出資するグループ企業でヨーロッパ最大の自動車販売会社であるPorsche Holding Gesellschaft m.b.H. （以下PHS）は、2018 年に日本におけるPHSのディーラーネットワーク開発および事業運営の全責任を負うPAIG Japan Automobile Investment GK（以下PAIG Japan）を設立しました。
オーストリアのザルブルクを拠点とするPHSは、現在、ヨーロッパ23カ国のほか、コロンビア、チリ、中国、マレーシア、シンガポール、日本で事業を展開しています。
PAIG Japanは、2019年1月にフォルクスワーゲンジャパン販売（VJS）、2020年4月にアウディジャパン販売（AJS）の運営をインポーターから承継し、2022年4月よりPorscheブランドの販売事業を行うため、新会社「Exclusive Cars Japan合同会社」を設立しました。 そして2025年1月、VJSとAJSを統合して「Audi Volkswagen Retail Japan」が誕生しました。
現在、PAIG Japanは、Volkswagenディーラーを11店舗、Audiディーラーを12店舗、Porscheディーラー2店舗を展開しています。

Porsche Holding Salzburg, hereinafter referred to as PHS, the largest automotive trading company in Europe, entered the Japan market in 2019. PAIG Japan Automobile Investment GK, hereinafter referred to as PAIG Japan was established in 2018, and is fully responsible for the dealer network development and operational business management of PHS in Japan market.
PHS, Salzburg-based company operates today in 23 countries throughout Europe, as well as in Colombia, Chile, China, Malaysia, Singapore and Japan.
PAIG Japan inherited the operation of Volkswagen Japan Sales in January 2019 and the operation of Audi Japan Sales in April 2020 from the importers.
In addition, as a new entity, Exclusive Cars Japan GK was established, in order to run the Porsche Brand retail business, from April 2022.
And in January 2025, we merged VJS and AJS to create Audi Volkswagen Retail Japan.
PAIG Japan currently operates 11 Volkswagen dealerships, 12 Audi dealerships, and 2 Porsche dealerships.
Location: 世田谷区尾山台, 東京都

Fondée en 2017, Asphalt Classics n’a cessé de se développer. Grâce à notre savoir-faire et notre réseau international, nous accompagnons nos clients dans chaque étape, de l’acquisition à l’entretien, en passant par la restauration et la conservation de leur patrimoine automobile.

Nos services :

-  Gardiennage sécurisé – Un espace optimisé et surveillé pour préserver votre  automobile.

-  Achat & Vente – Un accompagnement personnalisé pour trouver ou céder la voiture idéale.

-  Restauration & Entretien – Du simple entretien à la restauration complète, nous redonnons vie aux véhicules les plus prestigieux.

-  Événements – Organisation de journées sur des circuits prestigieux, avec accueil des participants, transport, restauration et assistance mécanique pour une expérience optimale sur piste.

- Transport & Entretien – Transport sur mesure de vos véhicules et services de lustrage et nettoyage pour un soin impeccable.

Chez Asphalt Classics, nous mettons tout en œuvre pour garantir une satisfaction totale à nos clients, mais aussi à nos collaborateurs. Chaque projet est unique, chaque voiture a une histoire, et nous sommes là pour la préserver.

Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus !

Name: Mondo Auto SRL
Description:
Nel 1976 il Sig. Vincenzo Lo Bosco avviò l'attività per la vendita di auto nuove ed usate.

Sino ad allora nel mercato di riferimento operavano in prevalenza le grandi case automobilistiche storiche italiane e straniere. Tuttavia, il mercato italiano iniziava ad essere influenzato dai grandi mutamenti tecnologici cominciati nella parte orientale del mercato mondiale automobilistico.

É proprio in quel momento che il Sig. Lo Bosco, grazie al suo intuito imprenditoriale, al suo approccio dinamico e sensibile ai veloci cambiamenti, lanciò una sfida al mercato automobilistico palermitano introducendo il marchio HYUNDAI, un marchio nuovo e poco conosciuto, e lo pone a confronto con le grandi case automobilistiche.

Questo nuovo brand si pone l’obiettivo di conquistare una quota di mercato automobilistico con un prodotto assolutamente non paragonabile alle altre autovetture presenti da sempre nel territorio e soprattutto modificare i gusti e i bisogni dei consumatori italiani.
 
Sin dai primi anni, grazie alla sua esperienza passata ed alle sue capacità professionali riesce a imporsi nel mercato. In quel periodo, negli anni ottanta circa, il settore automobilistico italiano iniziava a subire i primi cambiamenti.
Nonostante ciò il Sig. Lo Bosco, cavalcò la sua intuizione, accettò la sfida e nel 1986 acquisì il marchio e costituì l’azienda “Mondo Auto SRL” con il suo primo punto vendita in viale Mediatrice n.22.
Gradualmente ma costantemente il Sig. Lo Bosco trasmise ai figli la sua passione, portandoli a condividere le sue idee, i suoi progetti ed anche la sua caparbietà nel raggiungere gli obiettivi prefissati.
Nei primi anni 90 i figli Nadia, Ninni, Salvo, Alessandro e Massimo entrarono a dirigere l’azienda riuscendo, in sinergia, a portarla nell’arco di 20 anni in vetta al settore automobilistico palermitano e tra le prime cinque in Europa.

Oggi Mondo Auto SRL vanta due punti vendita a Palermo e un officina con annesso magazzino ricambi

Name: Veritas Careers
Description:
Specialist Motor Trade Recruitment.

Our Ethos
At Veritas we know that our clients and candidates, quite rightly, expect the very best service. Treating everybody we speak to as an individual and not just a number is at the heart of what we do.

We aim to give the very best service to all of our clients.

Honesty Integrity and Quality... Veritas Careers your whole career - not just your next job......

What Clients can expect from us
At Veritas we are determined to be different. We recognise that our clients do not want another pile of indifferent CV’s to trawl through. Rather they want to spend their time speaking to high quality candidates whose skills, experience and attitude closely match the brief they give us.
Our clients can expect candidates to be submitted that are screened, interviewed and assessed for their suitability for the role - based upon their brief. A team member with experience of recruiting for the role will present a detailed rationale – and interview notes - along with every submitted CV. 

What our Candidates can expect from us
We know candidates want to be treated like people rather than numbers – We will properly and considerately interview you and put you forward for jobs that match your abilities and desires - But only following an honest and thorough evaluation of your experience and credibility as a candidate.
And we will listen! Expect a warm and friendly team member to take a genuine interest in your ambitions and desires for your next career move. Helpful, professional guidance and advice - But most of all a respect for your candidacy - Veritas will never submit your CV for a role without discussing it with you first.

Z naszymi Klientami przejechaliśmy podczas jazd testowych setki tysięcy kilometrów, przeprowadziliśmy tysiące przeglądów, sprzedaliśmy litry oleju, braliśmy udział w wielu wydarzeniach, wiele organizacji i podmiotów wsparliśmy. I choć to wszystko jest ważne to jednak najważniejsi w tym wszystkim są nasi Klienci i pracownicy - ich zadowolenie i satysfakcja oraz radość z każdego dnia, który spędzają z marką Mazda. 

Zależy nam na tym, aby u nas każdy czuł się dobrze, dlatego od kilku lat uczestniczymy w programie Klient 2.0 w ramach, którego szczególnie dbamy o relacje z naszymi Klientami i atmosferę. Wyróżniamy się profesjonalizmem i otwartością, a pozytywne opinie o nas dowodzą, że potrafimy rozmawiać z naszymi Klientami.

Name: Banyan Motors
Description:
At Banyan Motors, we don’t just restore classic cars—we return them to the road with purpose, precision, and respect for the legacy they carry. Our work begins in Stuttgart, Germany, the birthplace of the cars we specialize in. There, our team of expert craftsmen tears these vehicles down to bare metal and rebuilds them to a standard that goes well beyond what most would call restoration.

Every car is completely disassembled, bodywork is corrected, the chassis is treated with KTL e-coating for total corrosion protection, and then every system—mechanical, electrical, and cosmetic—is rebuilt by hand. We use original components wherever possible, fabricate custom solutions where needed, and apply subtle, thoughtful upgrades that improve reliability, drivability, and comfort without losing the soul of the original.

These cars could win awards. They could sit in museums.
But that’s not why we build them.

We build them to be driven, to be shared, to become part of our clients’ families and legacies. The joy of owning a beautifully restored 911 or G-Wagon isn’t in the mileage—it’s in the memories. We want our clients to use these vehicles. To trust them. To pass them down.

We specialize in restoring iconic Porsche and Mercedes-Benz models, including:

Porsche Aircooled (911/2, 930, 964, 993)

Mercedes-Benz G-Class (W460/1/3)

Mercedes-Benz Pagoda (W113)

Mercedes-Benz Fintail (W108/9/10/11)

Mercedes-Benz SL/SEC (R107, C126)
This isn’t about nostalgia. It’s about permanence. These cars were built with intention the first time—and when done right, they can outlive trends, generations, and everything else in between.

If you're looking for something that speaks louder than the badge, something that blends beauty with engineering integrity—we’d be honored to build it for you.

Name: FISNI Virtual Finance
Description:
FISNI is a pioneering provider of virtual F&I for auto dealerships. With a mission to streamline the F&I process, we leverage our proprietary virtual F&I platform to enhance the customer experience and optimize dealership operations.

Founded on the principle of innovation in automotive finance, FISNI empowers dealerships to connect with customers in a virtual environment. Our experienced team of F&I managers interfaces seamlessly with clients, allowing them to complete transactions and e-sign all necessary documents from the comfort of their own homes or any location of their choosing. This flexibility not only enhances customer satisfaction but also accelerates the sales process, enabling dealerships to close deals more efficiently.

In addition to our virtual services, FISNI addresses a critical challenge faced by many dealerships: staffing. We provide a reliable solution by ensuring that a qualified F&I manager is always available to handle any deal, alleviating concerns about onboarding, training, compliance, and understaffing. Our team is dedicated and dependable, so dealerships can focus on sales without the worry of unexpected absences or staffing gaps.

At FISNI, we are committed to delivering exceptional value and service to our clients. Our innovative approach not only simplifies the F&I process but also helps dealerships maximize their potential in a competitive market. 

For more information about our services and to learn how FISNI can transform your dealership’s finance operations, please visit our website at www.fisni.com (http://www.fisni.com) or contact us at 786-423-6679.

As a leading dealership excelling in credit solutions, we are committed to helping you drive home in your dream car while making the process smooth and stress-free.

 About Us 
With years of industry expertise and a team of dedicated professionals, we have established ourselves as a reliable destination for top-notch pre-owned vehicles.
