From the moment you step through our doors to long after you drive off the lot, we are here to support you and address any questions or concerns you may have.

Description:
ZACR / ZA Car Rental is disrupting the Australian market by putting cutting-edge technology at the forefront of your journey. We're not just renting cars; we're redefining mobility, offering a seamless, efficient, and truly smart way to get on the road.

At ZA Car Rental, we leverage the power of AI, telematics, and intuitive digital platforms to transform every aspect of car hire. From instant bookings and keyless access to predictive maintenance and personalised offerings, we ensure a rental experience that’s designed for the modern Australian traveller.

Why choose ZA Car Rental for your next adventure or business trip?

 Effortless Booking & Management: Our advanced online platform and mobile app allow you to browse, book, and manage your rental in minutes. Say goodbye to lengthy queues and paperwork – your vehicle is just a few taps away.

 Keyless & Contactless Access: Experience true convenience with our smart vehicle access technology. Unlock, start, and end your rental securely using your smartphone, providing unparalleled flexibility and independence.

 Intelligent Fleet Optimisation: Powered by AI and telematics, our fleet is managed with precision. This means better vehicle availability, optimal pricing, and a consistently well-maintained, reliable fleet for you.

 Transparent & Fair Pricing: No hidden fees, no surprises. Our technology ensures transparent pricing from the outset, so you know exactly what you're paying for.

 Personalised Experiences: Our smart systems learn your preferences, offering tailored recommendations and a truly customised rental journey that anticipates your needs.

 Sustainable Choices: We're committed to a greener future. Our technology helps us optimise routes, manage fuel efficiency, and will increasingly integrate electric vehicle options for eco-conscious travelers.

 24/7 Smart Support: Our tech-enabled support ensures assistance is always available.

Name: VIP Vehicle Solutions & Asset Finance Ltd
Description:
At VIP Vehicle Solutions and Asset Finance Ltd I have the unique business set up of working on behalf of you as a customer.

We don't own any vehicles that are advertised, I work with every main dealer group within the UK putting together a list of PHYSICALLY AVAILABLE light commercial vehicles of all shapes and sizes, makes and models allowing me to supply the vehicles you as a customer require rather than what i am allowed to supply. All Invoices are direct from the dealer.

The reason I have set up like this is rather than pay hefty stocking charges to have the privilege of owning the vehicles I can supply vehicles without the additional costs of my company on top of the dealer price, allowing me to supply vehicles at realistic pricing rather than inflated pricing to pay for holding the vehicles. 

Nothing is too much trouble to locate a particular vehicle, If ply lining is required i can have that arranged together with a multiple list of other add ons that a commercial vehicle operator may need

When it comes to paying for the vehicles there are the usual finance options available via one of my partners i work closely with
Finance options are available via trusted 3rd parties I work closely with

Vehicle Finance Via Top Gear Asset Finance Ltd
Contract Hire Via Top Gear Vehicle Leasing Ltd & The Lease Hub 

Aside from the vehicle supply again via a 3rd party partner other types of Business Finance can be arranged whether it be a business loan, Funding for a new machine, Invoice Finance.. the list goes on, if you are looking for any sort of funding please look at the website for more information and ideas  www.topgearassetfinance.co.uk 

I also support two Local charities in Rotherham

Rotherham Hospice  
www.www.rotherhamhospice.org.uk

Rotherham United Community Trust
www.ruct.co.uk

Both Charities are Vital to Rotherham, any donations/sponsorship opportunities would be greatly received by both

Name: Autohaus HAESE GmbH
Description:
Autorisierter VOLVO, LOTUS, NISSAN Vertragspartner / Autorisierter POLESTAR und LYNK & CO Servicepartner. Exclusive VOLVO Military, Nato & Diplomat Sales.

Das inhabergeführte Familienunternehmen setzt seit jeher auf zwei wesentliche Faktoren: die erfolgreiche Kombination von innovativen Ideen und langjähriger Erfahrung. Zwei Faktoren, die in sämtlichen Bereichen des Unternehmens Treiber für Motivation und Performance darstellen: im Verkauf, im Service und auch im Back-Office.

An drei Standorten in Wiesbaden und Mainz-Kastel vertreibt Autohaus HAESE die Marken VOLVO, LOTUS und NISSAN, inklusive aller Werkstatt- und Serviceleistungen. Hochqualitative Gebrauchtfahrzeuge werden über das eigene Gebrauchtwagenzentrum vertrieben. Darüber hinaus ist Autohaus HAESE Servicepartner für die Marken POLESTAR und LYNK & CO.

Ein Team von mittlerweile über 90 Mitarbeitern kümmert sich um die Wünsche und Anforderungen von mehr als 5.000 Stammkunden sowie den Verkauf von mehr als 1.100 Neu- und Gebrauchtfahrzeugen im Jahr.

Innovationen finden aber auch außerhalb des Kerngeschäfts Verkauf und Service statt. Hier integriert Autohaus HAESE Leistungen in das Gesamtportfolio, die in ein gesellschaftliches Leitthema unserer Zeit hineinspielen: Mobilität. Und zwar Leistungen, die Mobilität nicht nur im sprichwörtlichen Sinn bereitstellen, sondern Mobilität erst ermöglichen und planbar machen.

Autohaus HAESE betreibt seit einigen Jahren unter der Marke HAESE Mobil eine eigene Autovermietung – nicht nur für seine Stammkunden, sondern auch als freier Anbieter am Markt. Eine absolute Innovation ist die Entwicklung und der Vertrieb einer herstellerunabhängigen Ladekarte für öffentliche E-Ladestationen sowie eine One-Stop-Solution für E-Ladestationen und Wallboxen im privaten oder gewerblichen Rahmen (Full Service für Planung/Bau/Versorgung).

Name: Reno Sava
Description:
The company RENO SAVA doo was formed in 1998 to take over and expand the job of independent craft shop Stefanov Save, which dates from 1974. After 30 years of service and repair of Renault vehicles in 1998, this family business is being officially authorized by Renault.

In early 2006, Reno Sava service changed its status and became a distributor with the right sales of new Renault vehicles, and opened a salon in Belgrade. In 2013, they opened another salon and service of Dacia vehicles at the new location in Pancevo, and in 2016, at the same location, a salon for Renault vehicles joined, following the latest standards.

This facility provides customer comfort and convenience, offering a choice of models showcasing the latest technology, aiding in configuring a vehicle according to personal preference. In the salon, customers can view some of the exhibited models and gather information about new Renault and Dacia vehicles, including passenger and cargo programs of up to 2.5t capacity.

RENO SAVA d.o.o. service is qualified to repair and maintain all Renault and Dacia vehicles. Equipped with the latest computer tools and diagnostic equipment, the service is handled by a qualified specialist staff attending regular seminars organized by Renault training center. They offer a range of information related to car maintenance, boasting a large stock of spare parts and the capability for swift procurement and delivery of all parts from Renault and Dacia programs.

Moreover, they possess a significant number of in-demand demo vehicles for test drives, allowing customers to gain a comprehensive impression of their cars. RENO SAVA takes this opportunity to express gratitude to everyone who has placed their trust in them so far and extends an invitation to owners, devoted fans of Renault and Dacia vehicles, and anyone interested in discovering the advantages of the vehicles they offer to visit them.

Our address:

Mirijevski bulevar 119, Belgrade
Novoseljanski put 62b, Pancevo

Notre service de conciergerie vous accompagne dans toutes les étapes de la vie de votre véhicule : entretien, contrôle technique, préparation esthétique, convoyage… Vous manquez de temps ? Nous nous occupons de tout.

Nous intervenons également en accompagnement à l’achat ou à la vente. Qu’il s’agisse de trouver la perle rare, de vendre dans les meilleures conditions ou de sécuriser une transaction, nous mettons notre expertise et notre réseau à votre service.

Parkkings, c’est avant tout une équipe de passionnés, au service de ceux qui aiment l’automobile autant que nous. Confiance, exigence et discrétion sont les fondements de notre engagement

Name: Rimac Denver
Description:
Rimac Denver is The Authorized Rimac Automobili Dealer in Colorado and the Mid West.

Rimac is a technology powerhouse, manufacturing electric hypercars and providing full technology solutions to global automotive manufacturers.

Founded in 2009 with headquarters in Croatia, Rimac started as a garage project and grew into a globally recognized technology leader, built upon the passion and vision of the company's Founder and CEO Mate Rimac. Strongly believing that electric propulsion systems can be used to power the new generation of sports cars and make them better, faster and more exciting, he has started the project with a handful of people as his team. The company’s flagship, the Concept_One, was entirely designed, developed and manufactured in-house. In 2018 Rimac introduced the next generation hypercar, the C_Two, a car alive with technology. Today, the company numbers over 850 people and has grown into a leader within a highly competitive industry with the ambition to become a full electrification partner for many OEMs.

Rimac Automobili has challenged the status-quo with the vision to revolutionize and reinvent the sports car with its unique technology thus successfully tackling the electrification challenge set upon the automotive industry. Most of all, we are excited to offer customers the opportunity to use our technology and know-how to create new and exciting products.

Description:
Bienvenido al Grupo Dabroy! Somos una empresa líder en la industria automotriz, compuesta por marcas especializadas como Dabroy Automotriz, Autorent, Dabroy Motos y Washpoint. Nos enorgullece ofrecer una amplia gama de servicios para brindar soluciones integrales de movilidad.

En Dabroy Automotriz, como parte de Grupo Dabroy, somos distribuidores autorizados de marcas de renombre mundial como FAW, Maxus y MG. Nuestra pasión es proporcionar a nuestros clientes una experiencia excepcional en la compra de vehículos, ofreciendo una selección confiable y de calidad. Además, nuestro taller especializado se encarga de mantener los vehículos en óptimas condiciones a través de servicios de reparación y mantenimiento de primera clase.

Autorent es nuestra división de alquiler de autos y motos, donde ofrecemos opciones flexibles y convenientes para aquellos que buscan experiencias de movilidad temporal. Nuestro objetivo es brindar vehículos confiables y de calidad para que disfrutes de una experiencia sin problemas.

En Dabroy Motos, nos dedicamos a las motocicletas. Como distribuidores autorizados de la reconocida marca Haojue, ofrecemos una amplia gama de modelos y accesorios para satisfacer las necesidades de los entusiastas de las motos. Además, nuestro taller especializado cuenta con expertos técnicos que brindan servicios de reparación y mantenimiento de motocicletas.

Washpoint es nuestro servicio profesional de lavado de vehículos. Nos enfocamos en brindar resultados impecables, utilizando técnicas y productos de alta calidad para mantener los vehículos limpios y relucientes.

Únete a nosotros y descubre cómo en Grupo Dabroy puede hacer que tu experiencia de movilidad sea excepciónal.

Forman Automotive was founded in 2001 as a way to not only serve the demands of car buyers, but the greater community as a whole. Today, the group operates 5 locations throughout the Southwest United States and continues to grow each year.

•Ultra-Competitive Compensation Package
•Medical, Dental, and Vision
•Paid Time Off
•Career Progression
•Professional Development Opportunities

Description:

Als Vertragshändler der Premiummarken BMW, MINI sowie Land Rover und Servicepartner der Marke Jaguar bieten wir Ihnen  individuelle Beratung auf höchstem Niveau. Unser hochqualifiziertes Team steht Ihnen bei der richtigen Auswahl aus den zahlreichen sportlichen, luxuriösen und angesagten Fahrzeugmodellen zur Seite und beantwortet Ihnen Ihre Fragen rund um den Kaufprozess, zu passenden Finanzierungs- oder Leasingmöglichkeiten oder der richtigen Versicherung. 

Mit sechs Standorten entlang der Ostseeküste (Lübeck, Kiel, Eutin, Bad Segeberg, Oldenburg i.H., Wismar) und rund 280 Mitarbeitern, darunter 36 Auszubildende, gehören wir zu den größten Autohäusern der Region. Unsere Tätigkeitsschwerpunkte liegen im Kfz-Werkstattservice sowie dem Vertrieb von Neu- und Gebrauchtfahrzeugen.

Seit 2015 sind wir angebunden an das familiär geführte Traditionsunternehmen Ernst Dello GmbH & Co.KG. Diese Basis bietet unseren Mitarbeitern einen sicheren Arbeitsplatz, moderne Arbeitsmittel und eine leistungsgerechte Entlohnung. Ein großer Stellenwert unseres Unternehmens ist die kontinuierliche Aus- und Fortbildung unserer Mitarbeiter.

Sie können sich für Premiumfahrzeuge begeistern, arbeiten gerne im Team und haben Freude am Umgang mit  Kunden? Dann möchten wir Sie kennenlernen!

Ob Kunde oder Mitarbeiter, wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Wünsche in Erfüllung gehen. Lassen Sie sich von uns begeistern.

Name: MG Motor Azerbaijan
Description:
Əfsanəvi Britaniya Əsilli MG (Morris Garages) markasının Azərbaycanda yeganə və rəsmi idxalçısı "ASIA Motors" şirkətidir.
 
MG qədər qürurlu və ehtiraslı bir tarixə malik olan brendlər azdır. 1924-cü ildə yarandığı gündən bəri MG markası insanların sürməyi sevdiyi avtomobillər yaradır. 99 il sonra sürətlə irəliləyərək, bu ikonik brend indi tamamilə yenilənmiş və gələcəyə hazırdır.
MG avtomobillərini tamamilə yeni səviyyəyə qaldırdı. Brend özünün onilliklər boyu klassik Britaniya dizaynlarını müasir texnologiya ilə birləşdirir və brend indi müştərilərinə əyləncəli, lakin funksional avtomobillər cərgəsini təklif edir; sürücülərin və sərnişinlərin gündəlik ehtiyaclarını ödəmək üçün nəzərdə tutulmuş və istehsal edilmişdir.
 
Brend Yaxın Şərqdəki müştərilərinə MG-nin Şanxaydakı dizayn studiyalarında və Londondakı qabaqcıl dizayn studiyalarında hazırlanmış ağıllı, funksional və sərfəli məhsullar təklif edir. Avtomobillərin geniş çeşidi müxtəlif maraqları olan motoristlər üçün əlçatandır: yolsuzluq, şəhər mənzərələri, ətraf mühitə diqqətli və ya sadəcə sürücülük həzzlərini qəbul etməyə hazır olanlar.

Roberto Cristófano pone a su disposición sus más de 25 años de experiencia técnica y solvencia empresarial.

El respeto que Ud. nos merece nos hace recordar una vieja frase que dice “no hay cena gratis” (siempre alguien paga, en muchos casos Ud.).

Por eso nosotros no regalamos nada, solo le vendemos en su justo precio y con un excelente servicio de pre-entrega y post-venta unidades 0 Km. y usadas, inspeccionadas con conocimiento de la marca y total solvencia en un moderno taller con la última tecnología y personal altamente capacitado.

Estamos seguros que Ud. compartirá el propósito que anima a nuestrea empresa de brindarle solo lo mejor en un momento tan importante como el de la compra de su coche, evitando así atenciones que solo distraen del servicio que Ud. debe exigir.

Son estos principios de honestidad y ética los que acompañarán siempre nuestra relación.

Name: Bonneton 2 Roues - Aubenas
Description:
Bonneton 2 Roues, c'est une affaire de famille depuis 1933 ! Trois générations de passionnés se sont succédées :

Jean-Baptiste Bonneton le fondateur, a débuté par la vente de cycles.
Michel, le fils et son épouse Geneviève, tous deux passionnés et animés par leur métier dans le deux roues. 
Michel, parti à la retraite en 2013 après 40 ans de bons et loyaux services, a participé à de nombreuses compétitions notamment en Enduro et en Rallye, de quoi donner des envies à leur dernier enfant, Eric, qui reprend les commandes de la concession avec le soutien de toute l'équipe :

David et Kevin au commercial, Charly et Guillaume en tant que magasiniers, Florent, Alois, Thomas et Jordan à l'atelier, Anthony et Lucas à la boutique MotoAxxe, et Valentin et Maryloue à la communication. 

Eric lui aussi est animé par la compétition, comme Michel son Père. Il est manager du Team Bonneton Fantic, engagé en Enduro sur le championnat de France et sur les Classiques.

Toute la famille vit la compétition comme moteur de progrès, et sait partager ses expériences avec sa clientèle pour dynamiser l'activité de la concession : compétition sur circuit, engagement en tout-terrain, sorties découvertes quads et motos, journées portes ouvertes régulières... 

La concession est en perpétuel mouvement, ce qui a motivé son déménagement en 2000. En quittant le centre ville pour s'installer dans une zone commerciale afin d'agrandir sa surface de vente, avec un nouvel espace accessoires, MotoAxxe.

Venez découvrir notre concession Yamaha et rencontrer l’équipe Bonneton 2 roues !

Name: NEXBE
Description:
Ułatwiamy przejście na elektromobilność, zamieniając dom w najtańszą i najwygodniejszą stację ładowania. W jednym miejscu dobieramy i finansujemy auto, montujemy i konfigurujemy wallboxa, instalację PV i inteligentne taryfy – tak, aby całkowity koszt posiadania był niższy niż w spalinowych, a doświadczenie codziennej jazdy po prostu lepsze.

Tworzymy świat, w którym „ładowanie w domu” jest standardem, a energia dla mobilności pochodzi głównie z OZE. Chcemy być nr 1 w Polsce w integracji EV + PV + smart charging – pierwszym wyborem właścicieli domów i firm – przyspieszając dekarbonizację transportu poprzez prostotę procesu, realne oszczędności i obsługę, która przyjeżdża pod Twój dom.

Z nami zyskujesz kompleksowe wsparcie:
 Dobór i finansowanie auta elektrycznego (leasing, kredyt, gotówka)
 Montaż i konfiguracja ładowarki dopasowanej do Twojego domu lub firmy
 Audyt energetyczny PV + EV
 Pomoc w uzyskaniu dotacji
 Pełna obsługa formalności – jedna firma, jedna umowa, zero stresu

Nexbe - pełna niezależność energetyczna!

Description:

Notre équipe animée par la même passion, se charge aussi bien de l'entretien courant, réparation, préparation que de la customisation de vos deux roues.

Alliant cet amour de la mécanique et de la moto, la transmission du savoir, et de la convivialité au sein de notre motoclub, nous avons pour mission de vous garantir l'excellence.

Unique en son genre, Jetbike est un garage éco-responsable et s'engage pour l'environnement en recyclant l'intégralité des produits chimiques et pétroliers consommés.

Nous serons ravis de vous accueillir dans notre show-room au style vintage et industriel situé au coeur de la région toulousaine.

Hanspeter Frei, der langjährige und geschätzte Geschäftsführer von uns, bleibt eine wichtige Stütze im Autocenter Bülach. Seine treuen Kunden können auch weiterhin auf seine umfassende Expertise und seinen herzlichen, persönlichen Service zählen.

Unser hochmotiviertes Team im Autocenter Bülach verfolgt ein klares Ziel: Wir wollen die Erwartungen unserer Volkswagen-Kundschaft nicht nur erfüllen, sondern übertreffen! Mit einem erfahrenen VW-Diagnostiker, einer freundlichen und familiären Serviceannahme sowie einem kompromisslosen Fokus auf Qualität möchten wir ein aussergewöhnliches Kundenerlebnis schaffen.

Als unabhängiger VW-Partner bieten wir ein umfassendes Angebot an Service- und Garantieleistungen, das keine Wünsche offenlässt. Entdecken Sie unsere Neuwagen im Showroom, vereinbaren Sie Probefahrten oder stöbern Sie in unserem vielseitigen Angebot an Occasionen. Selbstverständlich unterstützen wir Sie auch mit attraktiven Finanzierungsoptionen und einem professionellen Flottenmanagement.

Das Autocenter Bülach freut sich darauf, Sie auf höchstem Niveau zu bedienen. Wir setzen auf eine persönliche und vertrauensvolle Betreuung, die unsere Basis für langfristigen Erfolg bildet. Besuchen Sie uns und erleben Sie, wie wir Ihre Mobilitätsbedürfnisse mit Leidenschaft und Engagement erfüllen!

Door deze samenwerking tussen Italiaans vakmanschap en lokale precisie bieden we een perfecte combinatie van innovatie en betrouwbaarheid. Kia has grown to become one of the country’s most recognised brands, thanks to an exciting fleet of vehicles. Unique design, reliability, and economy give the carmaker mass appeal, with many awards gained across its range.

Choose from a selection that includes the small, stylish Picanto, the luxury all-electric Kia EV6 as well as the practical and versatile Sorento – Kia has many vehicle solutions to satisfy the modern motorist.

When you choose Group 1 Kia, you’ll instantly see our advantages over other retailers. Our dedicated Aftersales department is comprised of highly skilled specialists who possess excellent knowledge of all Kia models. They undertake all servicing, maintenance, and repairs to the highest standard, and are always available to give advice and guidance. Our Aftersales team also has access to a broad variety of parts and accessories to help you undertake your own upkeep or personalise your vehicle.

At Group 1 Kia in Coulsdon and Maidstone, we strive to provide our customers with more, whether you’ve used us many times in the past or if this is your first visit. We look forward to welcoming you to one of our Group 1 Kia dealerships.

Name: Indiana Independent Automobile Dealers Association
Description:
IIADA is the only trade association in Indiana representing the independent used car dealer. IIADA is recognized throughout Indiana as the official voice of the used car dealer.  The Association has an established record of accomplishment and fair dealing.


Important news and information about the automobile industry is mailed to our members through the IIADA Car Lines magazine and the Used Car Dealer national magazine. These publications will keep you informed on issues affecting your business income.

IIADA is nothing new. It was established in 1987 to represent used car dealers in Indiana. IIADA has a presence before the State Legislature and becomes involved with the state regulatory agencies whenever necessary.

IIADA proudly includes in its membership dealers of all sizes, from the largest to the smallest. Its strength is in the devotion of its individual members. Otwarcie Lamborghini Katowice to ważny krok w rozwoju rynku wyjątkowej motoryzacji w Polsce. Wierzymy, że Śląsk – ze swoją energią, dynamiką i potencjałem – jest naturalnym miejscem dla marki, która od zawsze łączy ekstremalne osiągi z niepowtarzalnym stylem.

Nuestros valores nos definen:

● Orientación al cliente: Escuchamos, entendemos y ofrecemos soluciones personalizadas con el objetivo de superar expectativas.
● Fiabilidad y profesionalidad: Garantizamos un servicio de máxima calidad, cumpliendo con los más altos estándares de seguridad y eficiencia.
● Innovación y sostenibilidad: Apostamos por tecnologías limpias y soluciones de movilidad responsables con el medioambiente.

En Eutrasa Mobility, no solo movemos personas, movemos el futuro de la movilidad.

Avec nos plus de 250 collaborateurs répartis sur plusieurs sites en France, nous avons développé un écosystème unique pour répondre aux besoins variés de nos clients, qu’ils soient particuliers ou professionnels.

Nos 5 métiers :
Location courte durée : sous la franchise AVIS, la location courte durée, répondant aux besoins ponctuels des entreprises et des particuliers.
Location longue durée : Lease & Go propose en location longue durée des véhicules utilitaires et de tourisme d'occasion aux professionnels.
Vente de véhicule d'occasion : Les Grandes Occasions vend des véhicules d'occasion pour les particuliers et les professionnels.
Transport : RUPL assure le transport et la logistique pour la livraison de véhicules sur tout le territoire.
Mécanique et carrosserie : VD2L a des ateliers dédiés à l’entretien et la réparation pour notre parc automobile.

Nos engagements reposent sur trois piliers :
Proximité et humanité : héritage de nos valeurs familiales, nous plaçons nos clients et collaborateurs au cœur de nos priorités.
Durabilité : nous adoptons une démarche responsable, avec des solutions accessibles et durable pour l’environnement.
Fiabilité : notre savoir-faire et notre capacité d’anticipation nous positionnent comme un partenaire de confiance à long terme.

Que vous soyez un professionnel cherchant à optimiser sa flotte ou un particulier à la recherche d’un véhicule de qualité, Massoutre Mobilité s’engage à vous offrir une expérience sur-mesure.

Rejoignez-nous pour redéfinir ensemble l’avenir de la mobilité !

Name: FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv
Description:
Ağır ticari araç sektöründe satış hizmeti veren FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv 2004 yılında, Mustafa Demirbaş tarafından kurulmuştur. Şehir içi otobüs pazarına BMC San. ve Tic. A.Ş. bayiliği ile giren FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv İstanbul ve Ankara merkezli satışları ile Türkiye pazarında önemli başarılar elde etmiştir.

Başta İstanbul ve Ankara olmak üzere halk otobüsü piyasasında önemli satış rakamlarına ulaşan FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv, siparişle satışa son vererek stoktan satışla müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir. En uygun ödeme koşulları, anında ürün teslimi ve müşteri memnuniyeti ile büyüyen FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv; İstanbul Sancaktepe, Ankara Göksu ve Kocaeli Kartepe şubeleri ile hizmet alanlarını genişletmiştir. 2004 yılında BMC markasıyla ağır ticaret araç sektörününe giren FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv, 2013 yılında TEMSA, 2014 yılında FORD TRUCKS ve 2015 yılında KARSAN markalarını ailesine katmıştır.

Türkiye genelinde 3 merkezden satış hizmeti veren FSM Demirbaş Otomotiv, marka ve ürün gamı artışı ve çeşitliliği sayesinde şehir içi otobüs pazarında her segmentte satış hizmeti verirken; kamyon ve çekici alanında da hızla büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Mercedes-Benz of Newton
Description:
Mercedes-Benz of Newton has been family-owned and operated for over 43 years, and we think that drivers can tell the difference this personal touch makes. 

Your experience starts by walking into a stunning showroom that showcases the latest Mercedes-Benz lineup from one of the most respected manufacturers in the world. Once you’ve selected a vehicle, browse our accessory boutique to personalize your new ride with Genuine Mercedes-Benz Accessories.

First-rate service doesn’t cease when you drive home. Extended service hours and courtesy drop-off and pick-up services have been created to make sure you can have your vehicle kept in peak condition without a dash of hassle. If you need to drop by, our Premier Express Lane delivers the attention you deserve in an hour or less, all without sacrificing quality. We’ll even provide Roadside Assistance for our customers — 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Just contact one of our drivers using the complimentary Roadside Assistance Mobile App.

From the second you walk through our doors, you’ll be treated to flawless service, no matter your automotive needs. We can’t wait to be of assistance and we look forward to serving your driving needs.

Name: Eighteen Eighty-Six
Description:
“Cars should ignite the inner child in all of us, which is precisely why Eighteen Eighty-Six exists”

We believe the joy of motoring comes from a quick pop to the shops or the trip to see friends at your local, the journey to a car meet or a road trip abroad, when you turn a car on you should hear the exhaust note, you should smell the fuel, jump in and clunk it into gear, you pull off and feel the rubber of the wheels fighting for grip through your bare hands as the car sticks to the road. Cars aren't meant to just provide an A to B, they are meant to be something that excite our inner child and that is why we (Eighteen Eighty-Six) exist, to inspire those who love automotive and keep your passion alive. 

As the world changes it is highly likely that electric cars will become the norm for the daily commute, autonomous vehicles will take people from A to B, but we together can keep the passion alive, at Eighteen Eighty-Six you can find articles, videos, a podcast, merchandise, events and even cars for sale that will enthrall and inspire your passion, so please take a moment, grab a brew and kick your feet up, we have you covered with all things automotive!

Description:

À chaque étape de son développement, SRJ Automobile a su adapter son savoir-faire artisanal aux innovations technologiques et aux besoins changeants des automobilistes de chaque époque. 

Une entreprise à l’histoire et aux valeurs authentiques.


AUTHENTICITÉ - L’esprit d’une entreprise familiale.
SRJ Automobile puise son essence dans ses racines alsaciennes, valorisant des principes de transparence, de proximité et de bienveillance. Fidèles à notre héritage, nous cultivons une approche humaine où chaque interaction est empreinte d’une envie sincère de bien faire. 

SAVOIR-FAIRE - L’alliance de l'artisanat et du commerce.
Chez SRJ Automobile, nous allions l'art de l'artisanat à l'excellence technique dans notre atelier de mécanique et de carrosserie-peinture. Notre maîtrise ne se limite pas à nos outils, elle s'étend également à notre approche commerciale, où chaque interaction est soigneusement orchestrée pour offrir un accompagnement sur mesure.

ADAPTABILITÉ - La clé de notre évolution. 
Chez SRJ Automobile, l'adaptabilité est essentielle pour répondre aux défis de la mobilité moderne. Nous savons évoluer avec les besoins de nos clients et les évolutions du marché en ajustant continuellement nos services et nos pratiques. Cette agilité nous permet de maintenir un haut niveau de qualité tout en restant fidèles à notre héritage familial.

Un mot du fondateur - 
Une belle équipe c’est ce qui fait la richesse d’une entreprise.

Name: MAD CARS
Description:
Every car that is displayed for sale on our showroom floor is a car that we would like to own. We absolutely believe that our vehicles are superior when compared to the industry average in terms of condition and we make sure that every car is serviced up to date before delivery. We promote a family type environment when it comes to our staff and our company has a very low rate of staff turnover giving a much more personal feel to the buying experience when compared to a corporate dealership. We have a large group of repeat clients that have been loyal to us across generations. We are very proud of our reputation. Due to the nature of the product that we sell, whether it be new or pre-owned, our clients may experience items which are in need of repair. We have a management team with over 100 years of experience combined who are reachable and available. We are always courteous and approachable in these situations and we are compliant to the rules and regulations which govern our industry. We deal with a small network of suppliers who are accredited and do their own due diligence on the vehicles before supplying us. We do not buy vehicles from repossession auctions or pawn shops. We keep a fantastic range of new and pre owned vehicles and like to keep stock right across the spectrum including a good range of commercial vehicles. Regardless of whether we are selling a car from R50 000 or R500 000, the same amount of care and respect is given to the process of preparing the vehicle for the showroom floor.
Every car is sent for an 82 point AA DEKRA test and if any repairs are required, they are done before delivery. The fees we charge are consistent and transparent, all charges are displayed below and there are no hidden costs involved in any transaction.

Name: Asri Motor
Description:
Berdiri sejak tahun 1984 dengan nama awal TRIJAYA MOTOR, berlokasi di Jalan Dharmawangsa 42C, Surabaya. TRIJAYA MOTOR pada awalnya fokus pada penjualan mobil bekas. Pada tahun 1986, TRIJAYA MOTOR berubah nama menjadi ASRI MOTOR dan memulai fokus pada penjualan mobil bekas dengan merek TOYOTA. Seiring dengan berjalannya waktu dan semakin meningkatnya penjualan TOYOTA pada saat itu, ASRI MOTOR resmi ditunjuk sebagai  “Authorized Toyota Dealer” oleh PT. Toyota-Astra Motor pada tahun 1988.

Tepat pada tahun 1992, ASRI MOTOR mendirikan cabang pertama mereka di kota Sidoarjo dengan sistem 3S (Sales, Service, Sparepart). Cabang pertama tersebut berlokasi di Jalan Jenggolo No. 52, Sidoarjo dan sekarang terkenal dengan ASRI MOTOR JENGGOLO. Kepercayaan konsumen Sidoarjo dan sekitarnya membuat ASRI MOTOR melebarkan area dengan membuka cabang keduanya di Jalan Raya Taman No. 147, Sidoarjo atau yang biasa dikenal dengan ASRI MOTOR TAMAN pada tahun 2012. Cabang kedua ini pula ASRI MOTOR menerapkan sistem 3S yang sama dengan cabang pertamanya.

Sesuai dengan tagline perusahaan “Enjoy Our Services” membuat ASRI MOTOR tetap terus memberikan pelayanan terbaik hingga pada tahun 2019, ASRI MOTOR mendirikan layanan Bodi & Cat untuk meningkatkan purna jual kendaraan TOYOTA yang berlokasi di Jalan Raya Stadion No. 146-147, Sidoarjo.

Name: Moelv Bil & Caravan AS
Description:
Under finanskrisen i 2009 var vi fire stykker som startet opp med bruktbil og verksted på Moelv  med et mål som vårt slagord så godt sier - å bli  "Din forhandler i Mjøsregionen."

For at vår ambisjon skulle bli til virkelighet investerte vi for å bli et  komplett godkjent bilsenter som kunne tilby tjenester av høy kvalitet  innen mekanisk verksted, karosseriarbeid og lakkering. Dette førte til  at vi møtte på behovet for å utvide, og slik ble i 2013 salgsavdelingen på Gjøvik til! 

Vi var på god  vei, og sammen hadde vi kommet gjennom utfordringene med et skritt nærmere målet. Alle vet at camping er en svært populær ferieform, og  siden vi ville ha noe for alle, begynte   vi å komme inn på temaet caravan og bobiler. 

I 2015  ekspanderte vi da med å bli autorisert forhandler av det innovative merket KNAUS, dette åpnet mange dører for oss og vi fikk muligheten til å kunne vurdere flere merker.  For oss var det viktig å kunne tilby alt du trenger for en perfekt ferie, og siden det har det blitt Tabbert, T@B og Weinsberg for å ha noe for alle innen bobil og caravan.  

Det hadde vært en spennende reise og enda bedre skulle det bli, i 2016 gikk vi fra å være flere eiere til en og dette skulle snart vise seg å ha  flere fordeler. 

Vi opplevde å bli mer ambisiøse, bedre på service og  kvalitetssikring og vi merket raskt at båndet mellom firma og kunder ble tettere. Vi er stolte av at vi hadde en omsetning på 40 millioner i  2009 og avsluttet med en omsetning på 42 millioner i 2016, men det  skulle ikke stoppe der. 

2017 skulle nemlig  bli et eksplosjons år når det kom til salg av caravan og bobiler, og vi  tror dette kommer av vår gode service og produkttilbud, og  bestillingslisten for 2018 ble tredoblet og ikke nok med det, etter en stor investering i et stort og flott lokale på Gjøvik som er mer tilegnet ble bestillingslisten for 2019 enda engang doblet!  

2021 ble nok et toppår med en omsetning på ca kr 55 mill og et overskudd på godt over kr 2 mill. Det beste åre

Vi förstår att att köpa eller sälja en bil kan kännas stort, och vi är här för att göra det enkelt och bekymmersfritt.

Vi erbjuder också praktiska lösningar som online-värdering, så att du snabbt kan få en uppskattning av vad din bil är värd – ett perfekt sätt att planera ditt nästa steg. Du kan välja att sälja din bil direkt till oss eller låta oss förmedla den via auktion för att få det bästa priset.

Name: Peugeot Bangladesh | Anwar Group
Description:
Welcome to the official Linked IN page of Peugeot in Bangladesh.


AG Motors Ltd. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Anwar Group of Industries was appointed as the official distributor of the Peugeot brand in Bangladesh. Anwar Group of Industries is one of the largest and oldest Bangladeshi conglomerates. It consists of 18 subsidiaries that are servicing consumer goods, steels, cement, textile, finance and automotive industry. Manwar Hossain is the Chairman of Anwar Group. AG Automobile Division is led by Mr. Hossain Khaled, a visionary leader in the automotive industry.


Peugeot is a French brand of automobiles owned by Stellantis.


The family business that preceded the current Peugeot companies was founded in 1810, is regarded as the oldest car company in the world. On 20 November 1858, Émile Peugeot applied for the lion trademark. Armand Peugeot (1849–1915) built the company's first car steam tricycle. They joined forces with Léon Serpollet in 1886; this was followed in 1890 by an internal combustion car with a Panhard-Daimler engine.

The Peugeot company and family are originally from Sochaux. Peugeot retains a large manufacturing plant and Peugeot museum there. In February 2014, the shareholders agreed to a recapitalisation plan for the PSA Group, in which Dongfeng Motors and the French government each bought a 14% stake in the company.

Peugeot has received many international awards for its vehicles, including six European Car of the Year awards.

Peugeot has been involved successfully in motorsport for more than a century, including victories at the Indianapolis 500 in 1913, 1916, and 1919. Peugeot Sport won the World Rally Championship five times (1985, 1986, 2000, 2001, 2002), the Dakar Rally seven times (1987, 1988, 1989, 1990, 2016, 2017, 2018), the 24 Hours of Le Mans three times (1992, 1993, 2009), the World Endurance Championship twice (1992, 1993), the Intercontinental Rally Challenge Championship three times, the Intercontinental Le Mans Cup twice (2010, 2011) and the Pikes Peak International Hill Climb three times (1988, 1989, 2013).

Name: Muzaida | مزايدة
Description: شركة الأفق للمزادات المحدودة هي شركة رائدة ومتخصصة في مجال المزادات، حيث تعمل على بيع جميع أنواع السيارات والشاحنات. تأسست الشركة عام 1998 تحت إشراف شركة عبد اللطيف جميل، وقد نمت وتطورت على مر السنوات لتصبح واحدة من أبرز الشركات في صناعة المزادات. تفخر شركة الأفق للمزادات بتاريخها الطويل في تنظيم المزادات، حيث قامت بتنظيم أكثر من 700 مزاد بنجاح. يتميز كل مزاد بمجموعة متنوعة من السيارات، حيث يتم عرض مئات السيارات المختلفة في كل مزاد. تسعى الشركة جاهدة لتلبية احتياجات العملاء وتحقيق أعلى مستويات الرضا من خلال تقديم خدمات عالية الجودة وعمليات مزاد فعالة وشفافة. في عام 2021، تحققت خطوة هامة في رحلة نجاح الشركة، حيث تحولت إلى كيان مستقل بمثابة شركة رائدة في صناعة المزادات، كما تم إطلاق علامة "مزايدة"، وهي منصة إلكترونية شاملة تعتبر إحدى الحلول التي تم إنشاؤها للتحول الرقمي. تستمر شركة الأفق للمزادات في توفير حلول مبتكرة وموثوقة لعملائها، وتسعى دائمًا لتحقيق التفوق في مجال المزادات وتلبية احتياجات السوق بكفاءة واحترافية عالية.

Name: Xpedit - BMW Motorrad
Description:
Xpedit er Danmarks største BMW Motorrad forhandler med salgs- og serviceafdeling i Farum og Ølgod. Vi sælger nye BMW motorcykler og brugte af alle mærker. I alt bliver det til over 600 solgte MC'er om året.  

Vi er i dag en af nordens største motorcykelforhandlere. Det hele startede dog knap så prangende i en garage tilbage i 1997, hvor Rune Bach-Andersen og Kurt Møberg indkøbte og solgte reservedele til motorcykler på hobbyplan. De grundlagde Xpedit i 2004 og gennem flere år, drev de to kompagnoner et mindre firma med salg af motorcykler og reservedele til MC’er, men med starten af virksomheden Xpedit, tog de skridtet fuldt ud og gjorde den store passion for motorcykler deres levevej. 

Kurt og Rune slog i foråret 2011 dørene op til Xpedit CPH, en ny og moderne motorcykelbutik med BMW Motorrad som hovedattraktion. Ideen med at sælge, reparere, servicere og klargøre motorcykler skulle vise sig at være rigtig. Den 1. januar 2016 blev Xpedit eneforhandler af BMW motorcykler i Danmark. 

Virksomheden består i dag af over 30 ansatte fordelt over de forskellige afdelinger


Et af nøgleordene hos Xpedit er, at det skal være sjovt at gå på arbejde. Filosofien for dette klare mål er, at lysten driver værket.
Vi har altid den motorcykel, som du går og drømmer om. Hvis ikke vi har den stående, skaffer vi den gerne til dig.

Name: John Starks Kia
Description:
John Starks' all-out style stamped him as one of New York City's most popular athletes during his memorable 8-year Knicks basketball career (1990-91 through 1997-98).

He was named an NBA All-Star in 1994, All-Defensive Second Team 1992-93, League's Sixth Man of the Year 1996-97. Starks averaged 14.1 points as a Knick, playing a key role on the 1994 Eastern Conference Championship team. John was the New York Knicks' all-time career leader in 3-point field goals (982), 12th in total points (8,489), eighth in assists (2,394) and seventh in steals (711).

John Starks is most notably known for "The Dunk," one of the most famous plays in team history when Starks made a long drive to the net to dunk on a herd of Bulls in the final minute of New York's win over Chicago in Game Two of the 1993 Eastern Conference Finals on May 25, 1993.

About John Starks
John Starks, one of the most popular, tenacious and electrifying players in Knicks team history, has served the Alumni Relations and Fan Development Advisor for the New York Knicks since 2005.

In the New York Knicks front office, Starks is involved in day-to-day efforts to expand Knicks alumni relations, community relations and fan development programs, also providing support in suite sales, sponsor & marketing efforts.

In the front office of the Knicks, John continues the longstanding tradition of community involvement established during his playing days. He is also a perennial figure in the Metropolitan area with a myriad of youth-oriented efforts.

John Starks' Nonprofit & Community Involvement
1994, he established the nonprofit John Starks Foundation, which provides monetary grants to NY, CT, NJ and Tulsa, OK college-bound students who demonstrate academic achievement, a commitment to community service, and financial need. For more than a decade, John also oversaw the John Starks Youth Basketball Camp in Purchase, NY.

Name: Terry Reid Automotive Group
Description:
We are a family owned and operated dealership serving Georgia including North Atlanta, Marietta, Kennesaw, Rome and surrounding areas, and are located in historic Cartersville.

As pioneers in the automotive internet process, Terry Reid recognized that the internet would eventually level the playing field in pricing and negotiation for consumers in the early 1990's.  He recognized the powerful tools and negotiating power the internet would give consumers, allowing them to make a more educated decision car buying.  So, our family rethought our future and the strategic alliance to this consumer driven method, and relocated our dealerships to areas just outside metro areas like Atlanta to find a way to bring savings to our customers.

The metro business model is broken and flawed today.  It is not sustainable. Metro dealers costs are so high, they can't deliver the savings that they would like to.  This can and cause frustration at the point of sale and delivery.  All vehicles cost the same, but overhead and expenses don't have to.

This is why we have built our stores in outer lying metro markets like Cartersville, so our expenses are much lower than metro dealers.  This allows us to give customers the best possible price.

Try us, you'll like us.  We're not just the best price, we're the best choice.

Name: Smista Bil AB
Description:
Smista Bil är ett företag som hjälpt kunder till trygga och bra bilaffärer i över 15 år och vi är idag en av Sveriges största märkesoberoende bilhandlare. Vi valde den här branschen för att bilar alltid har varit vår passion och genom åren har vi byggt upp ett gediget kunnande om bilars kvalitet och prestanda. Den erfarenheten har vi med oss varje gång vi köper in en bil och när Du köper en bil hos oss så köper Du en bil som är grundligt testkörd och granskad in i minsta detalj. Kort sagt så köper Du en bil som vi själva hade köpt som privatpersoner.

Vi har mellan 100 och 120 bilar i olika prisklasser i lager. Vi hjälper våra kunder att hitta en bil som passar just deras behov och kunder hos oss får alltid tydliga och raka svar på alla sina frågor. Givetvis tar vi gärna din bil i inbyte och vi kan hjälpa till med finansiering.

Som företag bygger vår verksamhet på långsiktiga relationer och vi har många återkommande kunder. Vi vill att våra kunder ska vara nöjda även när bilen har gått i flera tusen mil och vi finns alltid tillgängliga om något skulle inträffa. För oss slutar inte affären när våra kunder rullar ut från vår bilhall.

Name: We Buy Any Motorcaravan
Description:
As a group that has been running since 2007, We Buy Any Motorcaravan has assisted thousands of customers selling their motorhome. Our simple 3 step process provides our customers with a quick, easy, safe and convenient way of selling their motorhome free from the hassles of private sales and the inevitable haggle of part-exchange. Believe it or not, we do more than just buy motorhomes

Our goal is to make it quick, easy and hassle-free for you to sell your motorcaravan or motorhome to us. Our mission is to give a competitive price for every motorhome that we buy.

Sell your motorhome in 3 simple steps!

1) Get in touch, either via our short form or the telephone
2) We will give you a quote based on the information provided
3) If you like the price – and we are sure you will! – then we will collect your motorhome and transfer the cash instantly to your bank account!

It couldn’t be easier to sell your motorcaravan or motorhome to us! As specialists in buying just about all makes and models of motorhomes (with no restriction on the age of your motorhome and even those with damp and condensation considered), we take away the hassle of selling your motorcaravan privately or via part-exchange.

And because we use cash to buy your motorhome, this puts you in a great negotiating position when it comes to buying or upgrading to a new motorhome or motorcaravan.

So why not get in touch today for a no-obligation quote?

Notre objectif est de vous éviter toutes les préoccupations liées à la vente de votre véhicule : appels intempestifs, négociations agressives, essais non sécurisés, risques sur les règlements et risques administratifs (carte grise non faites par l'acquéreur).

Avec TRANSAKAUTO vendez SANS FRAIS votre véhicule et sans l‘immobiliser, si vous en avez besoin.
Munissez vous de votre carte grise, de tous les justificatifs d'entretien et prenez rendez-vous dans notre agence.

Après avoir vérifié l'état de votre véhicule, son suivi d'entretien et défini avec vous un prix idéal de vente, TransakAuto Reims mettra en vente votre voiture en tant que professionnel et la proposera à son portefeuille client.

Une fois l’acheteur trouvé, nous pourrons lui proposer des services tels qu'une reprise, un financement ou des garanties constructeurs valables dans toute l'Europe.
Ce qui permettra de rassurer les futurs acheteurs et donc de booster la vente de notre client, le vendeur.

Description:
The Motorhome World team has over 20 years' experience in the automotive and motorhome industry, the team recognised a need to connect and match buyers and sellers with their ideal motorhome or campervan.

Motorhome World originated with the quest to become one of the top e-commerce platforms while we ensure that we embody a personal one to one service by connecting motorhome & campervan buyers & sellers.

This will be a very personal service whereby sellers will submit an enquiry form with details of their motorhome or campervan. Following this, a Motorhome World advisor will contact the seller, for a free valuation and guide them through the process.

If you are selling and decide to onboard with Motorhome World one of our advisors will then arrange professional photography and prep of your van for sale, we will upload your motorhome or campervan to our website. This will include the photography and shooting of video content featuring the motorhome or campervan.

NCC workshop approved habitation checks on all motorhomes and campervans.

Name: Auto Müller GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Ein starkes Team bei automüller mit starken Marken.

Lernen Sie uns kennen!

Sind Sie auf der Suche nach einem kompetenten Ansprechpartner für Ihre Mobilität? Dann sind sie bei uns genau richtig.

Unsere 11 automüller Standorte finden Sie im nördlichen Oberfranken, südlichen Thüringen und dem bayrischen Vogtland.
Hier sind wir Ihr Ansprechpartner für alles rund um die Themen Pkw, Vans und Trucks sowie die Miete für diese Fahrzeuggruppen.

Wir sind das automüller-Team und wir garantieren Ihnen zusätzlich zu einer Vielzahl an Marken und Standorten auch meisterhaften Service für Ihr Fahrzeug. Zu unserem täglich Brot gehören nicht nur Neufahrzeuge der Marken Mercedes-Benz und Hyundai, sondern auch  top-gepflegte Gebrauchtfahrzeuge mit Qualitätssiegel, wie z.B. Junge Sterne oder Hyundai Promise. Zu unserem Repertoire gehören stets über 400 Neu- und Gebrauchtfahrzeuge, welche für eine Probefahrt bereitstehen. Zusätzlich zu unserer erstklassigen Kundenberatung bieten wir außerdem hochqualifizierten Service und eine Ersatzteilversorgung in drei Bundesländern an. Unsere modernen Betriebe befinden sich in Hof, Naila, Kronach, Coburg, Dörfles-Esbach, Saalfeld, Neustadt/Orla, Plauen, Neuensalz, Auerbach/Vogtland, Münchberg sowie Weißendorf.

Zu unseren Alleinstellungsmerkmalen gehört obendrein unser hauseigenes Lack- und Karosseriezentrum, welches Ihnen im Falle einer kleinen oder auch größeren Beschädigung Ihres Fahrzeuges eine umgehende, fachgerechte Instandsetzung nach Herstellervorgaben garantiert. 

Ein Blick in die Zukunft

Seit nun über 140 Jahren sind wir als Familienunternehmen in der Region verwurzelt. Mit unserem täglichen Engagement rund um automobile Themen wachsen wir stetig weiter. So haben wir erst Mitte 2022 einen weiteren automüller Standort in Auerbach/Vogtland in unsere Betriebsstruktur integriert. Um auch in Zukunft weiter wachsen zu können, sind wir auf unser starkes Team angewiesen und sind auch immer wieder auf der Suche nach neuen Teammitgliedern.

Description:
LINEA MOTORS – Excellence, expertise et passion automobile depuis 2008

Basée en Seine-et-Marne, LINEA MOTORS s’est imposée au fil des années comme une référence dans l’univers des véhicules d’exception. Notre mission : offrir à chaque conducteur une solution complète, haut de gamme et transparente pour l’achat, l’entretien et la réparation de son véhicule.

Notre savoir-faire repose sur trois pôles complémentaires :

 Showroom — Vente de véhicules d’exception
Sélection rigoureuse de Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini et autres marques de prestige. Chaque véhicule est contrôlé, préparé et présenté avec un haut niveau d’exigence pour garantir une expérience d’achat sereine et qualitative.

 Atelier mécanique — Spécialiste Porsche & marques premium
Expertise reconnue sur Porsche, mais également sur l’ensemble des marques allemandes et italiennes. Diagnostics précis, réparations techniques, maintenance et optimisation : l’atelier met la performance et la fiabilité au centre de chaque intervention.

 Carrosserie — Agréée assurances, toutes marques
Structure moderne équipée pour la réparation, la remise en état et la reconstruction esthétique de tous types de véhicules. Grâce à l’agrément assurance, nous offrons un accompagnement simplifié, rapide et sécurisé.

Au-delà de la technique, LINEA MOTORS cultive une vision : traiter chaque véhicule comme une pièce d’exception. Ici, la transparence, la passion et le sens du détail guident chaque décision.

Que ce soit pour l’acquisition d’une supercar, l’entretien d’une Porsche de collection ou la réparation d’un véhicule sinistré, nous accompagnons nos clients avec le même engagement : précision, réactivité et excellence.

The company was awarded as a national high-tech industry in 2019, and its main products include commercial vehicle driving recorders, cameras, monitors, brake light cameras and car hard disk recorders, which are sold in Germany, Northern Europe, the United Kingdom, the United States and Australia, etc. The products have been widely praised by customers and have established a good business reputation. The company is committed to the lofty concept of "making travel safer and making our products the guardian of technology to defend life safety", and adheres to the core values of honesty, cooperation, responsibility, innovation, value and service to operate the enterprise and give back to the society.

Špecializujeme sa na:
•	Predaj nových, predvádzacích a jazdených vozidiel, vrátane osobných a úžitkových modelov,
•	Financovanie a doplnkové služby šité na mieru vašim potrebám,
•	Komplexný servis osobných, úžitkových aj nákladných vozidiel s použitím najmodernejšieho vybavenia,
•	Pravidelne školený tím odborníkov, ktorý zabezpečí precíznu a spoľahlivú starostlivosť o vaše vozidlo.

Ako autorizovaný partner značky Mercedes-Benz, vám prinášame novinky, inovácie a trendy zo sveta prémiovej automobilovej techniky. Sledujeme najnovší vývoj, aby naši zákazníci mali prístup k tomu najlepšiemu, od špičkových modelov až po najmodernejšie servisné postupy.

Naším cieľom je ponúknuť vám nielen kvalitné služby, ale aj zážitok z kvality, spoľahlivosti a luxusu, ktorý si značka Mercedes-Benz právom nesie.

Neváhajte sa na nás obrátiť, radi vám pomôžeme s akoukoľvek požiadavkou. Kontaktné údaje na jednotlivé oddelenia nájdete na našom webe.

Naast kwaliteitskeurmerk is BOVAG een brancheorganisatie van ruim 9.000 ondernemers die zich bezighoudt met mobiliteit. BOVAG Garantie

Passend vervangend vervoer

Name: GÉMOSZ - Gépjármű Márkakereskedők Országos Szövetsége
Description:
A Szövetség céljául tűzte ki a hazai márkakereskedők összefogását, a szakmán belüli érdekegyeztetést, a márkakereskedők érdekképviseletét és érdekvédelmét Magyarországon és külföldön egyaránt. 

A GÉMOSZ 2003. február 26-án elsőként a közép-kelet európai országok közül vált a CECRA (az európai autókereskedelem érdekvédelmi szövetségének) tagjává, mely a szakma meghatározó szövetsége. A CECRA konzultációs és koordinációs feladatokat is ellát a gépjárműipari szervezetek (ACEA), az Európai Unió, az Európai Bizottság, az Európai Parlament, valamint az európai intézmények között.
A CECRA-ban végzett munka lehetővé tette más szövetségekkel is az együttműködést, így tagjai vagyunk az AECP-nek, a Stellantis által forgalmazott márkák európai szövetségének. Szoros kapcsolatot tartunk fenn a Kínai Márkakereskedők Szövetségével, valamint együttműködünk a NADA-val, az Amerikai Márkakereskedők Szövetségével is. Ezek a kapcsolatok teszik lehetővé, hogy rálássunk a globális autóipari folyamatokra, mely információkkal a márkakereskedők munkáját, döntéseit tudjuk hatékonyabban segíteni.

A GÉMOSZ feladatának tekinti, hogy érdekképviseletet lásson el, szakmai javaslatokat és segítséget adjon a hatóságok, az állami szervezetek részére. Ennek érdekében a társadalmi szervezetekkel, a minisztériumokkal, a hivatalokkal, a kormánnyal, az autógyártókkal, az importőrökkel, a kamarákkal megbeszéléseket folytatott és kíván folytatni ezután is. A Szövetség arra törekszik, hogy jelen legyen a szakmát érintő törvények, jogszabályok előkészítésénél.

Name: Go Dodge Southtown Chrysler
Description:
Alberta’s Largest Inventory – Unmatched Selection, Unrivaled Service

At Go Dodge Southtown Chrysler, we don’t just sell vehicles—we deliver exceptional experiences. As part of the renowned Go Auto group, we offer the largest inventory of new and used vehicles in Alberta, ensuring our customers always have the best selection at the most competitive prices.

From powerful Ram trucks to rugged Jeeps, high-performance Dodge models, and premium Chrysler vehicles, we have something for every driver. Whether you’re looking for a brand-new ride or a quality pre-owned option, no one in Alberta offers more choices than Southtown Chrysler.

Our in-house finance and special finance team makes vehicle ownership simple, whether you have perfect credit or are rebuilding. With flexible solutions and a no-pressure approach, we help customers get approved and on the road with confidence.

Beyond sales, we provide expert vehicle care through our state-of-the-art service center, staffed by factory-trained technicians who keep your vehicle running at peak performance. Our fully stocked parts department ensures quick access to genuine parts and accessories. Plus, enjoy exclusive Go Auto perks, including the Go Card rewards program and our 30-day exchange privilege on pre-owned vehicles.

At Southtown Chrysler, our commitment to customer satisfaction and automotive excellence drives everything we do. Whether you’re shopping for your next vehicle or need expert service, our dedicated team is here to make every visit outstanding.

With Alberta’s largest selection, the best deals, and a team that puts customers first, there’s no better place to find your next vehicle. Your journey starts here.

 Visit us today and experience the Southtown Chrysler difference!

#GoDodgeSouthtown #Dodge #Jeep #Goauto

Name: Aguttes on Wheels
Description:
Avec plus de 20 millions d’euros de résultats en 2022, en augmentation de 50% par rapport à l’année précédente, le département Automobiles de Collection concrétise une progression constante depuis sa création et enregistre le meilleur taux de vente sur le secteur automobile en se positionnant comme 2ème opérateur sur le marché français.

Constitué d’une équipe de six personnes, Aguttes on Wheels organise cinq ventes aux enchères par an. Trois d’entre elles se déroulent à Paris au sein de l’Espace Champerret dans le 17ème arrondissement de la capitale (mars, juin et décembre). En partenariat avec certains des acteurs les plus prestigieux, Aguttes on Wheels orchestre également 2 à 3 ventes exceptionnelles en marge d’évènements à dimension internationale comme le Tour Auto et l’Aventure Peugeot Citroën DS.

Depuis 2016, 21 collections sont ainsi passées entre les mains d’Aguttes on Wheels. Chaque collection étant unique, notre expertise nous permet d’affiner une approche adaptée aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client. Tout au long du processus de vente, notre équipe œuvre pour assurer un service personnalisé et efficace visant à fournir une expérience mémorable.

Name: Güngör Company
Description:
Güngör Company, 33 yıllık köklü deneyimiyle Türkiye’nin lider motosiklet perakendecilerinden biridir. Motosiklet sektöründeki uzmanlığımız ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız sayesinde, dünyanın önde gelen en prestijli markalarıyla iş birliği yaparak, yenilikçi ve güvenilir bir hizmet sunuyoruz. Bugün, Vespa, Piaggio, Suzuki ve Kymco gibi global markalarla iş ortaklığımızı sürdürerek, motosiklet tutkunlarına en geniş model yelpazesini ve en güçlü satış sonrası desteğini vermenin gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Sektörde edindiğimiz tecrübeyi, modern perakende anlayışımızla birleştirerek, müşterilerimize en iyi deneyimi sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Güçlü satış ve servis ağımız, uzman ekibimiz ve yenilikçi yaklaşımımızla sadece motosiklet satışı değil, aynı zamanda bir yaşam tarzı sunuyoruz.

Güngör Company olarak, gelecekte farklı sektörlerde farklı iş kolları yaratarak planlı büyümeyi ve sektördeki lider konumumuzu daha da güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz. Stratejik yatırımlarımız ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, sektörde fark yaratan bir marka olmaya devam edeceğiz.

Name: Pacesetter Performance Consulting
Description:
At Pacesetter Performance Consulting, we’re revolutionizing how automotive dealerships achieve profitability and operational excellence in Fixed Operations. Founded by a visionary leader with a proven track record in fixed operations and data-driven strategy, we specialize in transforming complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable results.

Our Daily PaceSetter Reports deliver real-time performance metrics straight to your inbox—no logins, no software, just clarity. From service bay efficiency to maintenance sales penetration, we provide the tools and expertise to identify profit leaks, optimize workflows, and capitalize on untapped opportunities.

But we don’t stop at data. Our on-site consulting services bring boots-on-the-ground expertise to your dealership, tackling everything from sales systems and employee development to workflow efficiency, customer experience, and shop operations. We work alongside your team to implement tailored strategies that deliver powerful results, including significant gross profit increases and a culture of accountability and excellence.

Our monthly strategy documents offer expert analysis and tailored recommendations, empowering dealership principals, GMs, and service directors to make smarter, faster decisions. Whether it’s boosting service retention, improving CSI scores, or maximizing parts margins, we’re here to help you stay ahead of the curve.

Why Choose Pacesetter?
 Daily Accountability: Track advisor performance, technician efficiency, and parts margins in real time.
 Expert Guidance: Monthly insights and on-site support from industry veterans who’ve walked in your shoes.
 Seamless Integration: Aggregate data from DMS, CRM, and F&I systems into one cohesive dashboard.
 No-Fuss Reporting: Insights delivered daily via email—no new software or training required.
 Boutique Service: Highly personalized, hands-on consulting with limited availability for maximum impact.

Name: Flex Automotive Inc
Description:
Flex San Diego dealership will introduce to the California market, the popular retrofitted Toyota Landcruiser from Japan, the 106 and Wonder. A classically retrofitted Toyota Tacoma, Flex’s first endeavor in redesigning the pickup truck, is in development and will be launched first at the San Diego dealership.

About Flex in Japan
Flex was founded in 1967, and currently operates over 50 dealerships in Japan. “One dealership - One vehicle” a business concept that is rare in the industry, each dealership specializes in either the Toyota Landcruiser or the Toyota Hiace. Flex is the industry leader in the sales of both used models in Japan.
The retrofit series of both the Landcruiser and Hiace has been popular for the avid Flex fans.
The vehicles can be customized to the preferences of the customer using the online simulator .
